Matthew1:1 Livro a oyariwa wa Yesu Kristu-- mwana a Davide-- mwana a Abrahamu."
Matthew1:2 Abrahamu áyara Isake; nave Isake áyara Yakobo; nave Yakobo áyara Yuda ni annawe;
Matthew1:3 nave Yuda áyara Farese ni Zara mwa Tamare; nave Farese áyara Ezronu; nave Ezronu áyara Aramu;
Matthew1:4 nave Aramu áyara Aminadabe; nave Aminadabe áyara Naasoni; nave Naasoni áyara Salmoni;
Matthew1:5 nave Salmoni áyara Boazi mwa Rahabe; nave Boazi áyara Obede mwa Rute; nave Obede áyara Yese;
Matthew1:6 nave Yese áyara Davide mwene owo.
Matthew1:7 Nave Davide áyara Solomoni mwa mwara a Uriya; nave Solomoni áyara Roboamu; nave Roboamu áyara Abiya; nave Abiya áyara Asa;
Matthew1:8 nave Asa áyara Yosafete; nave Yosafete áyara Yoramu; nave Yoramu áyara Uziya;
Matthew1:9 nave Uziya áyara Yotama; nave Yotama áyara Ahaze; nave Ahaze áyara Hezekiya;
Matthew1:10 nave Hezekiya áyara Manase; nave Manase áyara Amoni; nave Amoni áyara Yosiya;
Matthew1:11 nave Yosiya áyara Yekoniya ni annawe va mahiku ókushiwa o Babulo.
Matthew1:12 Nave vachuli vaya va okushiwa iwo o Babulo-- Yekoniya áyara Salatieli; nave Salatieli áyara Zorobabele;"
Matthew1:13 nave Zorobabele áyara Abiyudi; nave Abiyudi áyara Eliyakimu; nave Eliyakimu áyara Azoro;
Matthew1:14 nave Azoro áyara Sadoki; nave Sadoki áyara Akimu; nave Akimu áyara Eliyudi;
Matthew1:15 nave Eliyudi áyara Eleazara; nave Eleazara áyara Matani; nave Matani áyara Yakobo;
Matthew1:16 nave Yakobo áyara Yosefe-- iyawe a Mariya-- yowo Yesu otchuwiwa Kristu áyariwe mwa yowo."
Matthew1:17 Hiha maloko othene opacherya va Abrahamu ophiyerya va Davide ti maloko khumi na masheshe; nave opacherya va Davide ophiyerya vókushiwa o Babulo maloko khumi na masheshe; nave opacherya vókushiwa o Babulo ophiyerya wa Kristu maloko khumi na masheshe.
Matthew1:18 Nave oyariwa wawe wa Yesu Kristu wári wawihiha: Amannya Mariya áhakameliwa ti Yosefe-- nyenya ehithelanne yawo-- áphwanyiwa yowo arupanle mwa Munepa Wawéla."
Matthew1:19 Nyenya Yosefe iyawe-- ári ékhaikhai-- nave’tho hákhwenle omúliha muru-- érerya m’murimani omuhiya yowo wiphini."
Matthew1:20 Nyenya vawupuwela?-?upuwela yowo itchu iha-- onani-- ngelo a Apwiya áhoneya wa yowo mulohani-- alocha-- Yosefe-- mwana a Davide-- ohóve wikusherya mekhá Mariya mwará; vawi eyo yawakheliwa mwa yowo eri ya Munepa Wawéla."
Matthew1:21 Nave anarwa‐ayara mwana mwamulopwana-- nave onarwa‐omutchuwa nsina nawe Yesu; vawi Yola anarwa‐avulusha atchu awe wa sotcheka saya."
Matthew1:22 Nave sothe sene iha sákhala wi yériwe yolochiwa ti Apwiya mwa mulipa‐miririmo-- ni wi--"
Matthew1:23 Onani mwali anarwa‐arupala-- Nave anarwa‐ayara mwana mwamulopwana-- Nave enarwa‐emutchuwa nsina nawe Emanueli; ti notaphuleya-- Muluku ni Hiyo."
Matthew1:24 Nave Yosefe ávinya va erilo awe-- éra ntoko énriye omuléla ngelo a Apwiya-- íkusherya mekhiye mwariye;"
Matthew1:25 nave hámusuwenle yowo ophiyerya amuyanre mwanawe; amutchuwa nsina nawe Yesu.
Matthew2:1 Nave va ovariwa wawe wa Yesu m’Betelehemu a Yudeya m’mahiku a Herode mwene-- onani-- alipa‐miruku a wiwo onakhuwa nsuwa yáphiya o Yerusalemu-- yi--"
Matthew2:2 Ori wowi yowo ayariwe Mwene a a Yuda? ntakhara náhona etheneri yawe wiwo onakhuma nsuwa-- nave nárwa omuthamala Yowo."
Matthew2:3 Nave Herode mwene owo vawiwa ela áhukhuliwa-- ni Yerusalemu othene vamoha ni yowo."
Matthew2:4 Nave áthukumannyiye alipa‐ephepa atokotoko othene ni alipa‐orepa a atchu-- áhákoha-- Ayariwele wowi Kristu’wo?"
Matthew2:5 Nave yawo yámuléla-- M’Betelehemu a Yudeya: ntakhara wárepiwa wawihiha ti mulipa‐miririmo-- wi--"
Matthew2:6 Nave weyo Betelehemu-- elapo ya Yudeya-- Honakhala nari mukhanikhani mwa atokwene a Yudeya-- Vawi Óhola anarwa‐avinyerya mwa weyo-- Yowo anarwa‐akukhula atchu aka aIsrayeli."
Matthew2:7 Vavo Herode áwitchana Alipa‐miruku awo wiphini--"
Matthew2:8 ákohasha elukuluku aya yóneiyaya etheneri’yo. Arumiha o Betelehemu-- ii-- Haweni mwavyashe sa mwámwana owo; nave mwamphwanya-- mukikokiherye masu-- wi miyo’tho kirwe orwa‐omuthamala yowo."
Matthew2:9 Nave yawo-- yíwalaya mwene yárowa; nave onani-- etheneri’yo yónilaya wiwo onakhuma nsuwa-- yáhahóla yawo-- ophiyerya yárwa yemela vasulu vene vari mwámwana owo."
Matthew2:10 Nave yawo vawona etheneri’yo-- yáhakalalasha ni ohakalala otokotoko."
Matthew2:11 Nave vophiya o ’mpa yáhona mwámwana owo ni Mariya amannya-- nave yáhúwela vathi omukokhorela yowo; etaphula muhakhu aya-- emvaha yowo samahala-- ti mivira ni libane ni mure."
Matthew2:12 Nave yawo yáléliwaya mulohani wi ehikokele wa Herode-- yárowa oya wilaponi waya va ephiro ekina."
Matthew2:13 Nave yawo yáchimunlaya-- onani-- ngelo a Apwiya áhoneya wa Yosefe mulohani-- ii-- Nkavinya-- okushe mwana owo ni amannya-- otchawele o Aigupto-- nave okhale wiwo ophiyerya kinarwa‐koléla; ntakhara Herode anakhwela mwana wi amwiphe."
Matthew2:14 Nave yowo ávinya-- akusha mwámwana ni amannya ohiyu-- achimula oya o Aigupto; akhalaru wiwo ophiyerya árimenliye Herode:"
Matthew2:15 wi yériwe yólochiwa ti Apwiya mwa mulipa‐miririmo wi-- Káhitchana mwanaka akhume mu Aigupto."
Matthew2:16 Vavo Herode-- vawona wi yámlosowiha alipa‐miruku awo-- ásarasareya murima tchiri-- arumiha wi átoloshe asanamwane othene a m’Betelehemu-- ni a m’mawani mwaya mothene-- óphiyerya miyakha mili ni asinanchu othene-- ntoko mwa elukuluku yeyo ákohiliye wa Alipa‐miruku awo."
Matthew2:17 Vavo yáheriwa yolochiwa ti Yeremiya mulipa‐miririmo-- wi--"
Matthew2:18 Masu yahiweya m’Rama-- Eyinlo ni ochénya winchipale-- Rakele awunlela anamwane awe; Nave hanakhwela ohakalalihiwa-- Ntakhara hávovo yawo."
Matthew2:19 Nyenya vórimela Herode-- onani-- ngelo a Apwiya áhoneya mulohani wa Yosefe mu Aigupto--"
Matthew2:20 ii-- Nkavinya-- okushe mwámwana ni amannya-- orowe wilaponi ya Israyeli: ntakhara ókhwa yole ókhwela okumi awe wa mwámwana owo."
Matthew2:21 Nave ávinya yowo-- akusha mwámwana ni amannya evolowa mwilaponi ya Israyeli."
Matthew2:22 Nyenya vawiwa yowo wi Arkelao ári mwene a Yudeya mu nipuroni mwa atithinnya Herode-- áhova oya wiwo; nave áléliwiye ti Muluku mulohani-- árowa avolowa wilaponi ya Galileya--"
Matthew2:23 arwa akilatheya mwitchokoni nsina naya Nazarete: wi yériwe yolochiwa ti alipa‐miririmo-- wi-- Anarwa‐atchuwiwa mNazarayo."
Matthew3:1 Nave-- m’mahiku ale árwa Yohane Mbatisi-- mu’takhwani ya Yudeya--"
Matthew3:2 alocha-- Rukunushani mirima-- ntakhara Omwene wa Wirimu wohachamela."
Matthew3:3 Ntakhara yola ti yowo ámlonchiye Yesaya mulipa‐miririmo-- wi-- Masu a ókhuwela mu’takhwani-- Ryeheryani nikhwála na Apwiya-- Lukamihani iphiro sawe."
Matthew3:4 Nave Yohane mekhiye yowo árino yowara yawe ya mapururu a ekamila-- ni mukwáchala wa nrapala mu’yununi mwawe; ni yólya yawe yári nasope ni mahavu a mu’takhwani."
Matthew3:5 Vavo vámkhumela yowo Yerusalemu-- ni Yudeya othene-- ni elapo yothene yawáchamana ni Yordano;"
Matthew3:6 ebatisiwa ti yowo m’muhicheni wa Yordano-- erikimupulula sotcheka saya."
Matthew3:7 Nave yowo vawona anchipale a aFarisi ni a aSaduki órwa wubatisoni wawe-- áhi wa yawo-- Anamwane a enowa nyuwo-- tani othorihenryeni otchawa esara enamórwa?"
Matthew3:8 Onihani nyuwo sawima sophwanela orukunuwa murima:
Matthew3:9 nave muhererye olocha mwa nyuwo mekhinyu-- Atithihu n’rino Abrahamu; vawi kinalocha wa nyuwo wi anawerya Muluku mwa maluku ala ovíherya Abrahamu anamwane."
Matthew3:10 Nave’tho hihano vava epaso yohiyathiwa va’khiche va miri; ntakhara awe mwiri wohima sawima saphama onúhiwa ovonyiwa va moroni.
Matthew3:11 Miva kinobatisani nyuwo m’mahini va orukunuwa; nyenya Yowo órwa vachuli vaka-- ori okipwaha ikuru-- yowo nkinaphwanela otesha isapato sawe: Yola anarwa‐obatisani mwa Munepa Wawéla ni m’moroni:"
Matthew3:12 yovérela yawe eri mu ntatani mwawe-- nave anarwa‐avérasha va’tchachoni vawe; nave anarwa‐athukumanya tirigu awe mu’khupini-- nyenya inyukula anarwa‐eyela m’moroni wohishipha."
Matthew3:13 Vavo Yesu ávinya o Galileya arwa o Yordano-- wa Yohane-- wi abatisiwe ti yowo."
Matthew3:14 Nyenya Yohane áhi amuwatele-- alocha-- Kinaphwanela miyo obatisiwa ti Nyuwo-- nave Nyuwo munarwa wa miyo?"
Matthew3:15 nyenya Yesu áhákhula-- ii wa yowo-- Emya hihano: vawi wawihihá ori waphama wi hiyo n’sariherye ekhaikhai yothene. Vavo ámwemyererya Yowo."
Matthew3:16 Nave Yesu-- ábatisiwiye-- vava ákhuma m’mahini: nave onani-- erimu yámuhuleyerya-- nave áhona Munepa wa Muluku wókhuruwa ntoko epompa orwa va Yowo;"
Matthew3:17 nave onani masu órwela wirimu awi-- Ola ti Mwanaka osiveliwa Owo-- mwa Yowo Kinnahakal’ala."
Matthew4:1 Vavo Yesu ákushiwa ti Munepa o’takhwani wi éhiwe ti Musaserya.
Matthew4:2 Nave vári Yowo hárino olya mahiku makhumi masheshe othana ni ohiyu-- vachuli vaya ávoliwa etala."
Matthew4:3 Nave awéha owo árwa alochano-- Mwári Mwana a Muluku-- nkalélani wi maluku ala ekhale ipau."
Matthew4:4 Nyenya Yowo áhákhula ii-- Wórepiwa-- Mutchu harwa‐akhala ni okumi ni epauru-- nyenya ni masu othene ókhuma mwano mwa Muluku."
Matthew4:5 Vavo Musaserya ámukusha Yowo o muchetcheni wawéla;
Matthew4:6 amwiyathi Yowo vasulu va namukaphe a empa ya Muluku-- alochano-- Mwári Mwana a Muluku-- mwisúwihe mekhinyu vathi: vawi wórepiwa-- wi-- Anarwa‐aléla angelo awe sa weyo-- Nave va mataya enarwa‐yotesha weyo-- Wi ohitannye wene va nlukuni nnani nawá."
Matthew4:7 Yesu álochano-- Nave’tho wórepiwa-- Ohimwéhe Apwiya Mulukuá."
Matthew4:8 Vavo’tho Musaserya ámukusha Yowo o mwakoni worekama-- amoniha ilapo sothe sene sa elapo ya vathi-- ni nchichimiho naya;"
Matthew4:9 ii wa Yowo-- Sothe sene kinovahani Nyuwo-- múwa vathi ni okikokhorela miyo."
Matthew4:10 Vavo Yesu álochano-- Vinya’vo Satana-- vawi wórepiwa-- Apwiya Mulukuá onarwa‐omukokhorela-- Nave Yowo mekhiyeru onarwa‐omuruméla."
Matthew4:11 Vavo Musaserya ámuhiya-- nave onani-- angelo yárwa-- emuruméla."
Matthew4:12 Nave vári Yesu áhiwa wi yámveléla Yohane-- árowa ovolowa o Galileya;"
Matthew4:13 nave ávinya o Nazarete arwa akilatheya m’Kapernao a va’shereshere va enia-- m’munlano wa Zabuloni ni Naftali:"
Matthew4:14 wi yériwe yolochiwa ti Yesaya mulipa‐miririmo’wo-- wi--"
Matthew4:15 Elapo ya Zabuloni ni elapo ya Naftali-- Ephiro ya o’nia-- okhopela wa Yordano--"
Matthew4:16 Galileya a amalapo. Atchu ókhala mwipiphini Yáhona wárya otokotoko-- Ni yawo ókhala mu nipuroni na muruli wa okhwa-- Wárya wátchowela wa yawo."
Matthew4:17 Opacherya vavo Yesu ápacherya olaleyerya-- ni olocha-- Rukunushani mirima-- ntakhara Omwene wa Wirimu woháchamela."
Matthew4:18 Nave Yesu arikimwecha mu’shereshere mwa enia ya Galileya-- áhona anna eli-- Simoni aweriwa Petro-- ni Andreya munnawe-- erikimvonya mowaya mu’nia; vawi yári alipa‐ototha ihopa."
Matthew4:19 Nave Yowo álochano-- Hankeni va’chuli vaka-- kinarwa‐kiwerani alipa‐ototha atchu."
Matthew4:20 Nave yawo yáhiya vava miowayaya-- emutchara."
Matthew4:21 Nave vópwaha vavo Yowo áhona anna akina eli-- Yakobo mwana a Zebedayo-- ni Yohane munnawe-- m’mwacheyani vamoha ni Zebedayo atithaya-- erikimchotcha miowayaya; nave áwitchana."
Matthew4:22 Nave yáhiya vava mwacheya owo ni atithaya-- emutchara."
Matthew4:23 Nave Yesu áhechecha m’Galileya mothene-- arikimhusiha mothukumanela mwaya-- alaleyerya mitchaka yaphama ya Omwene-- apenusha irecha sothene ni wicheliwa wothene mwa atchu."
Matthew4:24 Nave ovuwa wawe wáhiweya o Suriya wothe wene: nave yámkusherya othene awicheliwa-- óphariwa ni irecha ni sohosha sa miloko miloko-- ni óphariwa ti minepa yonanara-- ni échilechile-- ni ananchetche; nave Yowo áhápenusha."
Matthew4:25 Nave yámutchara miloko miloko ya atchu órwela o Galileya ni o Dekapole-- ni o Yerusalemu-- ni o Yudeya ni okhopela wa Yordano."
Matthew5:1 Nave Yowo ónniye miloko eyo-- áwela m’mwakoni; nave ákilanthiye-- yárwa wa Yowo óhuserya’we;"
Matthew5:2 nave áhula va’wanoni-- ahusiha-- ii:"
Matthew5:3 Óréla ari óhawa m’munepani: ntakhara ori wawaya Omwene wa Wirimu.
Matthew5:4 Óréla ari óthanana: ntakhara narwa‐chakalalihiwa.
Matthew5:5 Óréla ari awitchachála: ntakhara enarwa‐yákhela elapo ya vathi.
Matthew5:6 Óréla ari óvoliwa etala ni ntchanana na ekhaikhai: ntakhara enarwa‐evona.
Matthew5:7 Óréla ari ómorela ikharari: ntakhara narwa‐yákhela ikharari.
Matthew5:8 Óréla ari awéla murima: ntakhara enarwa‐yona Muluku.
Matthew5:9 Óréla ari awera murechele: ntakhara enarwa‐etchuwiwa anamwane a Muluku.
Matthew5:10 Óréla ari óhoshiwa ntakhara a ekhaikhai: ntakhara ori wawaya Omwene wa Wirimu.
Matthew5:11 Óréla muri nyuwo-- vári enarwa‐ewúlihani muru-- yohoshani-- elocha ni wotha sonanara sothene va nyuwo-- ntakhara a Miyo."
Matthew5:12 Theyani-- hakalalani: ntakhara yamahalanyu ti etokotoko Wirimu: vawi wawihihá yáhosha alipa‐miririmo yákhanl’awo muhiyariwe nyuwo."
Matthew5:13 Nyuwo muri mwápa wa elapo ya vathi; nyenya mwápa owo wonwa-- onasivihiwa ti sheni? Hihano honakhwanela’tho etchu nari-- nyenya wi ovonyiwe vate-- ni onyikaliwa ti atchu."
Matthew5:14 Nyuwo muri omwaléla wa elapo ya vathi. Etchoko yomakiwa vasulu va mwako hewerya ovitheya.
Matthew5:15 Akhweya henapariha onyari-- ni okhunéla m’munoni-- nyenya eniyathi yowo va yawiyatherya’vo aya; nave onnamwaléla othene m’pa’mmo."
Matthew5:16 Hihá nyuwo mwáryihe omwaléla wanyu va mithoni va atchu-- wi vawona miteko anyu yaphama-- yachichimihe Atithinyu a Wirimu."
Matthew5:17 Muhupuwele wi kárwa Miyo orwa‐wakanyerya malamulo akhweya alipa‐miririmo: nkárwile wakanyerya-- nyenya okhwaniherya."
Matthew5:18 Vawi tchiri kinalocha wa nyuwo-- ophiyerya eniriaya evire erimu ni elapo-- mwamucheka mwamukhani mmoha nari ethoka’ya emoha herwa‐evinyerya o malamulo-- ophiyerya sothene sériwe."
Matthew5:19 Ntakhara awe yowo otaphula nimoha na mathoriheryo yala makhanikhani-- ahusiha atchu hihá-- anarwa‐eriwa mukhanikhani mu Omwene wa Wirimu; nyenya yowo awera ni ohusiha ala-- yola anarwa‐eriwa mtokotoko mu Omwene wa Wirimu."
Matthew5:20 Vawi kinalocha ni nyuwo-- ekhaikhai anyu yáhácha opwaha ya alipa‐orepa ni aFarisi-- hamurwa‐m’volowa wene mu Omwene wa Wirimu."
Matthew5:21 Mwáhiwa wi wálochiwa wa yawo akhalai-- Ohiphe;"
Matthew5:22 nyenya yowo awipha anarwa‐akhala órosha mulachu: nyenya Miyo kinalocha wa nyuwo-- wi yowo óshimwela munnawe vóhikhala nthowa anarwa‐akhala órosha mulachu; nave yowo anarwa‐alocha ni munnawe-- A’theru weyo-- anarwa‐akhala órosha mulachu wa atokwene: nyenya yowo anarwa‐alocha. Túte weyo-- anarwa‐akhala órosha gehena a moro."
Matthew5:23 Ntakhara awe wávelélaka yamahalá vohela’vo ephepa-- nave vavo onupuwela wi munná ori ni etchu va weyo-- ohiye vavo yamahalá vahólo vohela’vo-- ovinye--"
Matthew5:24 opacherye wátana ni munná-- nave vavo rwa oveléle yamahalá."
Matthew5:25 Akuva wátana ni mukhwá a mulachu vavá oriáno va’phironi; akhweya mukhwá a mulachu anoveléle weyo wa óthoriha mulachu-- nave óthoriha owo anaveléle weyo wa msurutato-- ovonyiwe weyo mu kariposo."
Matthew5:26 Tchiri kinalocha ni weyo-- horwa‐okhuma’mo nari-- nyenya ophiyerya olimve mwékhopiri ókutchula."
Matthew5:27 Mwáhiwa wi wálochiwa-- Ohiraruwe: nyenya Miyo kinalocha wa nyuwo--"
Matthew5:28 wi yowo óweha muthiana ni omukhalela nrima vavo arimraruwano hihano m’murimani mwawe.
Matthew5:29 Nyenya nitho ná nolopwana nótchekiha-- owosole-- orihe wa weyo; vawi ori waphama wa weyo wi emoha ya sam’mwílini sá epahuwe-- nave ohivonyiwe mwiliá wothene m’gehena."
Matthew5:30 Nave ntata ná nolopwana nótchekiha-- othikile-- orihe wa weyo; vawi ori waphama wa weyo wi emoha ya sam’mwílini sá epahuwe-- nave ohirowe mwiliá wothene o gehena."
Matthew5:31 Wálochiwa’tho-- Yowo óhiya mwariye amvahe ekarawa:"
Matthew5:32 nyenya Miyo kinalocha wa nyuwo-- wi yowo óhiya mwariye-- vahikhanle nthowa noraruwa-- anamweriha yowo muthiana óraruwa: nave yowo anathela óhiyiwa owo anamraruwa."
Matthew5:33 Nave’tho-- mwáhiwa wi wálochiwa wa yawo akhalai-- Ohilupele mwawotha nyenya onarwa‐oveléla wa Apwiya solupela sá: nyenya Miyo kinalocha wa nyuwo;"
Matthew5:34 Muhilupele wene-- nari oromola Wirimu-- ntakhara ori munyukhu mtokwene wa Muluku;"
Matthew5:35 nari oromola elapo ya vathi-- ntakhara eri yonyikala’vo manani awe-- nari oromola Yerusalemu-- ntakhara ori muchetche wa Mwene mtokotoko."
Matthew5:36 Nari ohilupele o muruá-- ntakhara howerya wéliha chwee nari orípiha phii nihi nimoha."
Matthew5:37 Nyenya olocha wanyu okhale-- Ahe-- ahe; hoe-- hoe; nave yawachereryiwa va iho enarwela wa onanara owo."
Matthew5:38 Mwáhiwa wi wálochiwa-- Nitho oliva nitho-- n’ninno oliva ninno:"
Matthew5:39 nyenya Miyo kinalocha wa nyuwo-- Muhimuhihe mutchu ónanara; nyenya yowo anarwa‐ómana weyo va nramani ná nolopwana-- omuruku?-?nushele nikina’tho."
Matthew5:40 Nave wa yowo anakhwela orowa ni weyo o mulachuni ni okusha malayá omwemyererye’tho yawikhunelá.
Matthew5:41 Nave yowo ówatelela omhóla ephiro emoha-- oroweno pili."
Matthew5:42 Wa yowo óveka weyo omvahe-- nave wa yowo ókhwela wopoleya ohimrukunuwele."
Matthew5:43 Mwáhiwa wi wálochiwa-- Onarwa‐osivelana ni muhimá-- ni omwicha mwichaniá:"
Matthew5:44 nyenya Miyo kinalocha wa nyuwo-- musivelaneno amwichani anyu-- ni ovekelela yawo óhosha nyuwo;"
Matthew5:45 wawihiha wi mwakhale anamwane a Atithinyu a Wirimu; ntakhara Yowo annaweliherya nsuwa nawe va ónanara ni va aphama-- anarupihela epula va ékhaikhai ni va óhikhala ékhaikhai."
Matthew5:46 Ntakhara wi mwasivela ósivelana ni nyuwo-- yamahala tani murianyuno? nari alipa‐mushokho henera hiha?"
Matthew5:47 Nave mwalochela anninyuru-- munera sheni opwaha akina? Nari amalapo henera hiha?"
Matthew5:48 Ntakhara awe nyuwo mukhale óphameya ntoko Atithinyu a Wirimu ari óphameya.
Matthew6:1 Weheryani wi muhere sékhaikhai sanyu va mithoni va atchu-- wi moneye wa yawo: wi mwihiha hamwinono yamahala ni Atithinyu a Wirimu."
Matthew6:2 Ntakhara awe vothe vene onavelélá samahala sékharari-- ohinopa nipeka vahólo vá-- ntoko eneraya ówoka mothukumanela’mmo-- ni m’makhwála’mmo-- wawihihá wi ethamaliwe t’atchu; Tchiri kinalocha wa nyuwo-- Yawo ahakhela khuluwi samahala saya."
Matthew6:3 Nyenya weyo vovaha samahala sékharari-- ntata ná nothiana nihisuwele yeyo n’neraya ntata ná nolopwana:"
Matthew6:4 wawihihá wi samahala sá sékharari sikhale sa wiphini: nave Atithiá awona wiphini anarwa‐okokiherya weyo.
Matthew6:5 Nave mwavekelaka-- muhikhale ntoko ówoka’wo: ntakhara yawo enasivela wemela ni ovekela mothukumanela’mmo-- ni va makhulukano a makhwála-- wi yoneye wa atchu. Tchiri kinalocha wa nyuwo-- yawo ahakhela khuluwi samahala saya."
Matthew6:6 Nyenya weyo vovekela-- volowa m’pa mwá-- owale nsele ná-- ovekele Atithiá ari wiphini-- nave Atithiá awona wiphini anarwa‐okokiherya weyo."
Matthew6:7 Nave vovekela muhúluleulule siyo hoe-- ntoko eneraya amalapo-- ntakhara enera wi enarwa‐yiwiwa ni wuluma‐uluma waya."
Matthew6:8 Ntakhara awe nyuwo muhiphwanaphwaneno: Vawi Atithinyu annasuwela itchu sinothowani-- nyuwo muhipachenrye omveka Yowo."
Matthew6:9 Ntakhara awe vekelani nyuwo hihá: Atithihu a Wirimu-- Nsina nanyu nélihiwe."
Matthew6:10 Omwene anyu orwe. Okhwela wanyu wereye-- ntoko Wirimu hihá vathi vano."
Matthew6:11 Munivahe hiyo olelo yólya yahu ya’lelo.
Matthew6:12 Nave munikhurumuwele sopoleya sahu-- ntoko hiyo’tho nokhurumuwela alipa‐opoleyahu."
Matthew6:13 Nave muhinani‐kusherya mwa wéhiwa-- nyenya munivulushe wa ónanara owo."
Matthew6:14 Vawi mwakhurumuwela atchu sotcheka saya anarwa‐akhurumuwela nyuwo’tho Atithinyu a Wirimu.
Matthew6:15 Nyenya mwahikhurumuwela atchu sotcheka saya-- Atithinyu’tho harwa‐akhurumuwela sotcheka sanyu."
Matthew6:16 Nave vothe vene muninanelanyu olya-- muhikhale ni withoni wothanana-- ntoko ówoka’wo: ntakhara ennananariha withoni waya-- wi yoneye wa atchu wi enninanela olya. Tchiri kinalocha wa nyuwo-- Yawo ahakhela khuluwi samahala saya."
Matthew6:17 Nyenya weyo-- vawinanela olya-- ochiha muruá-- ni okusa withoni wá:"
Matthew6:18 wi ohoneye wa atchu wi onninanela olya-- nyenya wa Atithiá ari wiphini: nave Atithiá awona wiphini anarwa‐okokiherya weyo."
Matthew6:19 Muhíthukumanyerye mekhinyu muhakhu va elaponi ya vathi-- vári asocholo ni murawa sinnapahula; nave vári alipa‐wiya ennakhuvula ni wiya:"
Matthew6:20 nyenya mwithukumanyerye mekhinyu muhakhu Wirimu-- vári asocholo nari murawa hasinapahula-- nave alipa‐wiya henakhuvula ni ohíya:"
Matthew6:21 vawi wiwo ori muhakhuá-- wiwo onarwa‐okhala murimá’tho."
Matthew6:22 Nitho’ti onyari wa mwíli: ntakhara awe nitho ná nári na omoha-- mwíliá wothene onarwa‐okhala wawaryihiwa."
Matthew6:23 Nyenya nitho ná nári nonanara-- mwíliá wothene onarwa‐okhala worípihiwa. Ntakhara awe warya wiwo ori mwa nyuwo wári epiphi-- epiphi eyo ti etokotoko tchiri!"
Matthew6:24 Hávovo mutchu anawerye okhala kapuro a apwiya awe eli: vawi akhweya anarwa‐amwicha mmoha owo-- ni osivela mukina owo; akhweya anarwa‐ákelela wa mmoha-- avevula mukina owo. Hamuwerya okhala kapuro a Muluku ni a Muhakhu."
Matthew6:25 Ntakhara awe kinalocha wa nyuwo-- muhipe murima ni okumi anyu-- yeyo munirianyu mulye ni yeyo munirianyu muwurye; akhweya ni mwíli anyu-- yeyo munirianyu muware."
Matthew6:26 Okumi hori wopwaha yólya-- ni mwíli wopwaha yowara? Weheryani ipalame sa Wirimu-- wi hasinamisa-- nari hasinahacha-- nari hasinathukumanya mu’khupini; nave Atithinyu a Wirimu annalyiha."
Matthew6:27 Nki nyuwo hamunahiyanano opwaha hiho? Nave tani a nyuwo ni wipa murima anawerye wachererya va wunnuwa wawe mwono mmoha?
Matthew6:28 Nave munipelani murima ni yowara? Nkawehashani ithutu sa o’takhwani-- wunnuwa waya; hasinapharasha muteko-- nari hasinaviya:"
Matthew6:29 nyenya kinalocha wa nyuwo-- wi nari Solomoni mu nchichimiho nawe nothene háwanre ntoko emoha ya hiha."
Matthew6:30 Nyenya Muluku awariha wawihiha manashi a o’takhwani-- enakhala olelo-- nave omelo evonyiwa vikho-- nki tahi nyuwo opwaha tchiri-- nyuwo ororomela tonto?"
Matthew6:31 Ntakhara awe muhipele murima-- ni wi-- N’ni‐n’lye sheni? nari-- N’ni‐niwurye sheni? nari N’ni‐niware sheni?"
Matthew6:32 Vawi amalapo enakhwelasha sothene iho; vawi Atithinyu a Wirimu annasuwela wi sinnothowani sothene iho.
Matthew6:33 Nyenya m’pacherye wavya Omwene awe ni ekhaikhai awe-- nave sothe sene iho sinarwa‐sachereryiwa wa nyuwo."
Matthew6:34 Ntakhara awe muhipele murima ni omelo: vawi omelo onarwa‐wisípela murima mekhaya. Ninnakhwanela nihiku ni sawukhula saya.
Matthew7:1 Muhithoriherye-- wi muhithorihiwe. Vawi ni othoriha wiwo munathorihanyuno-- nyuwo’tho munarwa‐muthorihiwa:"
Matthew7:2 nave ni mweryo yowo muneryanyuno-- onarwa‐weryiwa wa nyuwo’tho."
Matthew7:3 Nave onona hai mwékokhola ori mu nithoni mwa munná-- nyenya ekhukulu eri mu nithoni ná weyo mwanene honupuwela?"
Matthew7:4 Akhweya onarwa‐wi hai wa munná-- Nkakemyererye kithanle mwékokhola mu nithoni ná; nave ona-- ekhukulu eyo eri mu nithoni ná nla."
Matthew7:5 Ówoka weyo! nkapacherya othanla mu nithoni ná ekhukulu eyo-- nave vavo onarwa‐wonasha othanla mwékokhola mu nithoni na munná."
Matthew7:6 Muhivaheke yawéla eyo wa anapwa-- nave muhivonyeke irácho sanyu vahólo va ikupa-- wi sinanyi?-?kalele akhweya ni manani aya-- nave vorukunuwa sináhule nyuwo."
Matthew7:7 Vekani-- nave enarwa‐evahiwa wa nyuwo; avyani-- nave munarwa‐m’phwanya; okotchani-- nave n’narwa‐nihuleliwa wa nyuwo:"
Matthew7:8 Vawi yowo anaveka anakhela; ni awavya owo anaphwanya; ni wa awokotcha owo n’nahuleliwa.
Matthew7:9 Akhweya mutchu tani a nyuwo-- yowo vomveka mwanawe epau-- anarwa‐amvaha nluku?"
Matthew7:10 Akhweya vomveka ehopa-- anarwa‐amvaha yowo enowa?"
Matthew7:11 Hihá-- khwino nyuwo-- muri onanara-- munnawerya ovaha anamwananyu samahala saphama-- wopwaha wawihai nki Atithinyu a Wirimu anarwa‐avaha itchu saphama wa yawo ómveka Yowo?"
Matthew7:12 Ntakhara awe itchu sothene mwatchunaka wi atchu yerele nyuwo-- nyuwo’tho muwerele yawo sawihiha. Yeyo ti malamulo ni alipa‐miririmo."
Matthew7:13 Volowani va mukhorani wonimuwa: ntakhara mukhora ori mtokotoko-- ni ephiro yoyano wutholowani ti yokothóla; nave ari anchipale yawo enavolowa’mo."
Matthew7:14 Vawi mukhora ori wonimuwa-- ni yoyevasha ephiro eyo yoyano wukumini-- nave óphwanya yeyo ari awalakhanyeya."
Matthew7:15 Weheryani musepe alipa‐miririmo ówoka-- yawo enarwa wa nyuwo ni sowara sa ipuchepuche-- nyenya mpuwa mwaya ari anapíli óluwa--"
Matthew7:16 munarwa‐mwásuwela ni sawima saya. Mano ennarukula mpesa va míwani-- nari makúkhu va murulani?"
Matthew7:17 Hihá-- mwiri wothene waphama onima sawima sosiva; nyenya mwiri wawucha onima sawima sonanara."
Matthew7:18 Howerya mwiri waphama wima sawima sonanara-- nari mwiri wawucha wima sawima sosiva."
Matthew7:19 Miri yothene yohima yawima yosiva-- enathikiliwa evonyiwa o moroni."
Matthew7:20 Ahe-- hihá va sawima saya munarwa‐mwásuwela yawo."
Matthew7:21 Tahi yowo ólocharu wa Miyo-- Apwiya-- Apwiya-- anarwa‐avolowa mu Omwene wa Wirimu; nyenya awera owo yokhwela ya Atithaka a Wirimu."
Matthew7:22 Anchipale enarwa‐yi wa Miyo-- nihiku nenlo-- Apwiya-- Apwiya-- henálokoha masu mu nsina nanyu-- ni mu nsina nanyu’tho ovíha minepa yonanara-- ni wera mu nsina nanyu’tho saikuru sinchipale?"
Matthew7:23 Nave vavo kinarwa‐kiwupusherya yawo-- Nkinosuwelani nyuwo ilukuluku sothene: vinyani wa Miyo-- nyuwo awera sohiléleya."
Matthew7:24 Ntakhara yela-- othene yawo eniwa masu aka yala-- ni wera-- kinarwa‐káphwanaphwaniha ni mutchu owarála-- ámakile empawe va mwala:"
Matthew7:25 Nave yátchula epula-- nave yárwa mihiche-- nave yáhopa etcheku-- sákusaka va empa eyo; nave hayúwale: ntakhara yátikitheryeya va mwala’vo."
Matthew7:26 Nave othene awiwa masu aka yala-- ni ohera-- enarwa‐ephwana?-?phwanihiwa ni mutchu olosowa yowo ámakile empawe va ehávani:"
Matthew7:27 Nave yátchula epula-- nave yárwa mihiche-- nave yáhopa etcheku-- sákusaka va empa eyo; nave yáhúwa: nave wuwa waya wári otokotoko."
Matthew7:28 Nave vákhala Yesu ákutchunliye masu yala-- miloko ya atchu yátikhina ni ehusiho awe:"
Matthew7:29 vawi áhusiha ntoko mwanene ikuru-- tahi ntoko alipa‐orepa’ya."
Matthew8:1 Nave vokhuruwa wawe va mwakoni’vo-- yámutchara miloko minchipale ya atchu."
Matthew8:2 Nave onani-- mulipa‐marecha árwa-- amkokhorela-- alocha-- Apwiya mwákhwelaka munawerya okiryeherya."
Matthew8:3 Nave Yesu áhokola ntata nawe-- amutannya yowo-- ii-- Kinnakhwela-- nkaryeheryiwa."
Matthew8:4 Nave vava marecha awe yávinya’vo. Nave Yesu álochano-- Ona weyo-- ohiléle mutchu; nyenya rowa-- wisonihe wa mulipa‐ephepa owo-- oveléle yamahala yeyo alamule‐nliye Mose-- okhale namona wa yawo."
Matthew8:5 Nave vári Yowo ávolowa m’Kapernao árwa wa Yowo kenturiyo-- amveka-- ii--"
Matthew8:6 Apwiya-- mmiravo aka ori ókona m’pa’mmo-- awicheliwa nanchétche-- awukhuliwa wawopiha."
Matthew8:7 Nave Yesu álochano-- Kinaphiya Miyo-- kimpenushe;"
Matthew8:8 Nyenya kenturiyo’wo áhákhula ii-- Apwiya-- nkinaphwanela wi mwavolowe vathi va nipatho naka hoe: nyenya mwirimlocha masu-- nave anarwa‐apenushiwa mmiravo aka."
Matthew8:9 Vawi miyo’tho kiri mutchu awiwelela olamulelo-- kirino asurutato awiwelela miyo: nave kinalocha wa ola-- Rowa-- arowa; ni wa mukina-- Rwa-- arwa; nave wa kapuro aka-- Era ela-- éra."
Matthew8:10 Nave vawíwa ela-- Yesu átikhina-- ii wa yawo ómutchara-- Tchiri kinalocha wa nyuwo-- nari mwa Israyeli-- nkiphwannye nroromelo nawihiha."
Matthew8:11 Nave kinalocha ni nyuwo-- wi anchipale a wiwo onakhuma nsuwa ni a wiwo onanela nsuwa enarwa‐ephiya-- ekhala vamoha ni Abrahamu-- ni Isake-- ni Yakobo-- mu Omwene wa Wirimu;"
Matthew8:12 nyenya anamwane awo a Omwene enarwa‐evonyiwa wipiphini ya vate: wiwo onarwa‐okhala wunla ni okhuriha minno.
Matthew8:13 Nave Yesu áhi wa Kenturiyo’wo-- Haweke-- okhale wa weyo ntoko waroromelelá. Nave ápenushiwa mmiravo’wo elukuluku yeyo."
Matthew8:14 Nave vophiya Yesu o’mpa ya Petro-- áhona mpewe awe akonne-- awicheliwa nepwesha."
Matthew8:15 Nave ámutannya ntata nawe-- nave nepwesha ámuhiva muthiana owo; nave ávinya-- amuruméla Yowo."
Matthew8:16 Nave vophiya oshekuwa-- yámukusherya atchu anchipale ophariwa ti minepa yonanara: nave Yowo ákumiha minepa eyo ni masu-- apenusha awicheliwa othene:"
Matthew8:17 wawihihá wi yakhwáne yolochiwa ti Yesaya mulipa‐miririmo’wo-- wi-- Yowo mekhiye ákusha sokhulumuwa sahu-- Atesha irecha sahu."
Matthew8:18 Nave Yesu-- vawona miloko minchipale ya atchu ómurukuryerya-- álamulela orowa okhopela."
Matthew8:19 Nave árwa mutchu mulipa‐orepa-- ii wa Yowo-- Muhusiha-- kinarwa‐kotcharani Nyuwo wothe wene muniyanyu’wo."
Matthew8:20 Nave Yesu álocha wa yowo-- Ananthala arino mihikhwe aya-- ni ipalame sa wirimu ipuru saya-- nyenya Mwana a mutchu hánono vohamela muru awe."
Matthew8:21 Nave mukina a óhuserya’we-- áhi wa Yowo-- Apwiya-- mukemyererye miyo kipacherye orowa ovitha murutchu wa atithaka."
Matthew8:22 Nyenya Yesu álocha wa yowo. Tchara Miyo-- ohiye atchu ókhwa evithe alipa‐okhwa aya."
Matthew8:23 Nave vári Yowo avoloiye m’mwacheyani-- óhuserya’we yámutchara."
Matthew8:24 Nave onani-- vávinya etcheku etokotoko va’nia-- wawihihá wi mwacheya áhuruweliwa ni machumusha: nyenya Yowo ámurupa."
Matthew8:25 Nave yawo yárwa-- emvíha-- elocha-- Apwiya nkavulushani-- n’namrimela."
Matthew8:26 Nave Yowo álochano-- Muri awova ntakhara sheni-- óroromela tonto? Vavo Yowo ávinya-- asamela etcheku eyo ni enia eyo-- nave wáhera chuu winchipale."
Matthew8:27 Nave yátikhina atchu awo-- elocha-- Ti mutchu awihai ola-- wi nari etcheku ni enia sinnamwiwelela."
Matthew8:28 Nave vophiya Yowo okhopela-- wilaponi ya Agadara-- yákumanano eli óphariwa ti masololo ókhuma o nipuroni na mahiye-- a owali tchiri-- wawihiha wi háwerya ovira’vo mutchu va ephiro yeyo."
Matthew8:29 Nave onani-- yákhuwela yi-- N’ri ni sheni ni Nyuwo-- Nyuwo Mwana a Muluku? Mórwa wino onihosha hiyo-- elukuluku aya hephiyale?"
Matthew8:30 Nave vári vachai ni yawo muloko wa ikupa sinchipale sirikimólya.
Matthew8:31 Nave minepa eyo yámveka elocha-- Mwanikumiha-- mun’rumihe hiyo nivolowe m’mulokoni wa ikupa iho."
Matthew8:32 Nave álochano-- Haweni. Nave yeyo yákhuma-- erowa ovolowa mu ikupani iho: nave onani-- muloko wothene wátchimaka ni wupuwa ohicho mu’nia’mmo-- nave wákhwa m’mahini."
Matthew8:33 Nyenya ókukhula yátchawa-- erowa o itchokoni-- elokoha sothene-- ni sawereya saya sa alipa‐minepa’wo."
Matthew8:34 Nave onani-- etchoko yothene yákhuma okumanano Yesu-- nave yámonnaya Yowo-- yámveka wi avinye m’minlanoni aya."
Matthew9:1 Nave Yowo ávolowa M’mwacheyani-- alapuwa-- aphiya witchokoni wawe."
Matthew9:2 Nave onani-- yám’mukusherya mutchu ananchétche-- okona va mapakoni: nave Yesu vawona nroromelo naya-- áhi wa awicheliwa owo-- Lipa murima-- mwana-- sotcheka sá sokhurumuweliwa."
Matthew9:3 Nave onani-- akina a alipa‐orepa yálocha m’murimani mwaya-- Ola anerela Muluku opwalu."
Matthew9:4 Nave Yesu-- vosuwela maupuwelo aya-- áhi-- Ntakhara sheni munupuwelelanyu sonanara m’mirimani mwanyu?"
Matthew9:5 vawi yavakhiviru tivi-- olocha-- Sotcheka sá sokhurumuweliwa; akhweya olocha-- Nkavinya-- weche?"
Matthew9:6 Nyenya wi musuwele wi orino ikuru Mwana a mutchu vathi vano sokhurumuwela sotcheka (vavo álochano awicheliwa owo)-- Nkavinya-- oteshe mapakoá-- orowe o’mpa wá."
Matthew9:7 Nave ávinya-- arowa o’mpa wawe."
Matthew9:8 Nave atchu a miloko yónnaya-- yáhova-- echichimiha Muluku-- awavaha atchu ikuru sawihiha iho."
Matthew9:9 Nave Yesu vovira-- orwela wiwo-- áhona mutchu-- nsina nawe Mateyu-- arikimkilathi vawakhelela mushokho-- alochano-- Kitchare Miyo. Nave yowo ávinya-- amutchara."
Matthew9:10 Nave vári Yowo ákilanthiye va yólya m’pa’mmo-- onani-- alipa‐mushokho ni alipa‐otcheka anchipale yárwa ekilathi vamoha ni Yesu ni óhuserya’we."
Matthew9:11 Nave aFarisi-- vawona ela-- yálochano óhuserya’we-- Ntakhara sheni Muhusihanyu anamólya vamoha ni alipa‐mushokho ni alipa‐otcheka?"
Matthew9:12 Nave Yesu íwaliye áhi-- Ólipa henakhwela mulipa‐mureche hoe-- nyenya awicheliwa."
Matthew9:13 Nyenya rowani muhuserye ti sheni ela-- Kinakhwela ikharari-- tahi ephepa hoe: vawi nkárwile orwa witchana ékhaikhai nyenya alipa‐otcheka."
Matthew9:14 Vavo yárwa wa Yowo óhuserya’we a Yohane-- yi-- Ntakhara sheni hiyo ni aFarisi ninninanela olya wili wili-- nyenya óhuserya’nyu heninanela?"
Matthew9:15 Nave Yesu áhi wa yawo-- Mano amiravo a empa ya othela enawerya wunla elukuluku yeyo mulipa‐othela anakhaliyeno? nyenya enarwa‐ephiya mahiku-- vári mulipa‐othela anarwa‐avíhiwa wa yawo-- nave vavo enarwa‐yinanela olya."
Matthew9:16 Nave hávovo mutchu áphitannye epareya ya ekuwo ephya va yawikhunela yakhalai; vawi epareya’ya eyo enavíha wa yawikhunela eyo-- nave ennera ephaka etokotoko."
Matthew9:17 Akhweya henamínela vinyo ahihano m’mirupani yakhalai; yihihá-- mirupa enaphuleya-- nave vinyo anayeheya-- nave mirupa enapahuwa: nyenya enamínela vinyo ahihano m’mirupani yahihano-- nave sopili sinnakhapeleleya."
Matthew9:18 Vári Yowo arikimwalochela yawo itchu hiho-- onani-- árwa mutchu mutokwene-- amkokhorela-- alocha-- Órimela hihano vava mwanaka mwamuthiana-- nyenya’tho murwe mwiyathi ntata nanyu va yowo-- nave anarwa‐akhala mkumi."
Matthew9:19 Nave Yesu ávinya amutchara-- ni óhuserya’we ene."
Matthew9:20 Nave onani-- muthiana ári ni ereche yokhuma nikhami miyakha khumi na mili-- árwa ochuli wawe-- atannya maroso a yawikhunela awe:"
Matthew9:21 vawi ámlocha mwa yowo mekhiye-- Katannyaru yawikhunela yawe kinarwa‐kipenushiwa."
Matthew9:22 Nyenya Yesu vorukunuwa ni wona yowo áhi-- Lipa murima-- mwana mwamuthiana we-- nroromelo ná nihopenusha weyo. Nave muthiana owo ápenuwa opacherya va elukuluku yeyo."
Matthew9:23 Nave Yesu vovolowa empa awe ya mutokwene owo-- ni vawona awópa akaviriko ni muloko wa atchu ónyakula--"
Matthew9:24 álocha-- Khumani-- vawi mwánahano’wo hakhwile nyenya anamrupa."
Matthew9:25 Nave yámtheya ryaryarya. Nyenya muloko’wo wákumihiwaya-- Yowo ávolowa’mo-- aphara ntata nawe; nave mwánahano’wo ávinya."
Matthew9:26 Nave ovuwa wawe wiwo wáhiweya mwilaponi yothene’yo.
Matthew9:27 Nave vovira Yesu orwela wiwo-- yámutchara atchu eli évasi-- ókhuwela ni wi-- Munimorele hiyo ikharari-- mwana a Davide."
Matthew9:28 Nave Yowo ávolowiliye m’pa’mmo-- atchu évasi awo yárwa wa Yowo: nave Yesu áhi wa yawo-- Munnaroromela wi kinawerya wera ela?"
Matthew9:29 Yálochano-- Ai-- Apwiya. Vavo átannya mitho aya-- ii-- Yériwe wa nyuwo ntoko nroromelo nanyu. Nave mitho aya yáphituwa."
Matthew9:30 Nave Yesu áhálopola-- alocha-- Weheryani-- ahisuwele mutchu mukina."
Matthew9:31 Nyenya yawo yákhuma’mo-- evuwiha ovuwa wawe mwilaponi yothene’yo."
Matthew9:32 Nave yawo erikimkhuma-- onani-- yámkusherya mutchu óhuluma-- óphariwa ti munepa wonanara."
Matthew9:33 Nave wákumihiwaya munepa owo-- óhuluma owo áhuluma-- nave miloko ya atchu yátikhina-- elocha-- Nari khalai henoneye yawihihá mwa Israyeli."
Matthew9:34 Nyenya aFarisi yámlocha-- anamkumiha minepa yonanara ni ikuru sawe sa mwene a minepa yonanara."
Matthew9:35 Nave Yesu áhechecha m’michetcheni yothene ni mwitchokoni anahusiha mothukumanela mwaya-- alaleyerya Mitchaka Yaphama ya Omwene owo-- apenusha irecha sothene ni sokhulumuwa sothene."
Matthew9:36 Nyenya Yowo-- vawona miloko eyo ya atchu-- áthanana m’murimani ntakhara a yawo-- vawi yári ómwaryeya ni ómwalamwala ókhala ntoko ipuchepuche sohikhala ni mukukhula."
Matthew9:37 Vavo álocha ni óhuserya’we-- Sokhupa sinnácha tchiri nyenya alipa‐muteko ari awalakhanyeya."
Matthew9:38 Ntakhara awe vekelani Mwanene sokhupa-- wi awopele alipa‐muteko wukhupani wawe."
Matthew10:1 Nave vári Yowo áhisitchanela ohuserya’we khumi neli-- áhávaha ekhaleno ikuru va minepa yonanara-- sokumiha yeyo-- ni sopenusha irecha sothene ni sokhulumuwa sothene."
Matthew10:2 Nave masina aya a arummwa awo khumi neli ti yala: ópacherya Simoni aweriwa Petro-- ni Andreya munnawe: Yakobo mwana a Zebedayo ni Yohane munnawe;"
Matthew10:3 Filipo-- ni Bartolomeyo; Tomasi ni Mateyu mulipa‐mushokho’wo; Yakobo mwana a Alifeyo-- ni Tadeyo;"
Matthew10:4 Simoni Mkanane-- ni Yudase Isikariote yowo’tho ámvelénle."
Matthew10:5 Yala-- khumi neli ala-- Yesu áhárumiha-- áléla yawo ni wi;"
Matthew10:6 Muhivire o’phironi ya wa amalapo-- ni mwitchokoni ya aSamariya muhivolowe’mo: nyenya tchiriene muvire o ipuchepuche sorimela sa emusi ya Israyeli."
Matthew10:7 Nave munarowanyu-- laleyani-- wi-- Omwene wa Wirimu wohachamela."
Matthew10:8 Penushani awicheliwa-- víhani ókhwa-- ryeheryani alipa‐marecha-- kumihani minepa yonanara."
Matthew10:9 Mwáhákhela siyo ene-- vahani siyo ene. Muhíkusherye icharama sa mivira-- nari sawéla-- nari sa ekhopiri-- m’mikwachalani mwanyu;"
Matthew10:10 nari murupa wa iphika wa o’phironi-- nari malaya meli-- nari isapato-- nari mutokoso: vawi mulipa‐muteko anaphwanela wakhela sólya sawe."
Matthew10:11 Nave m’michetcheni yothene nari mwitchokoni-- mwavolowa’mo-- mukohashe tani ori ophwanela mummo; nave khalaniru wiwo ophiyerya munakhuma’mo."
Matthew10:12 Nave vovolowa empa mulochele.
Matthew10:13 Nave empa’eyo yári yophwanela-- murechele anyu orwe va yeyo-- nyenya yáhiri yophwanela-- murechele anyu okokele wa nyuwo."
Matthew10:14 Nave yowo harwa‐awakhelani nyuwo-- nari ohiwa masu anyu-- munakhumanyu m’pa’mmo-- nari mwitchokoni’mmo-- tathani ntchupi m’manani anyu."
Matthew10:15 Tchiri kinalocha wa nyuwo-- wi-- mu nihiku nothoriha-- mulachu aya wa Sodoma ni Gomora onarwa‐oyeva ni wawaya wa etchoko yela."
Matthew10:16 Nkonani-- Miyo kinorumihani nyuwo ntoko ipuchepuche véri va anapíli: ntakhara awe khalani ówarála ntoko enowa-- ni éparipari murima ntoko epompa."
Matthew10:17 Nyenya warálani ni atchu; vawi enarwa‐yovelélani wa atokwene a mulachu; enarwa‐yowashulani nyuwo mothukumanela mwaya;
Matthew10:18 nave’tho enarwa‐yokushe?-?ryani nyuwo wa achamasowa ni mamwene ntakhara a Miyo-- okhala namona a wa yawo-- ni wa amalapo."
Matthew10:19 Nyenya vothe vene eniriaya yoveléleni-- muhipeleke murima munulume hai nari munaloche sheni; vawi yeyo muniryanyu mulume-- enarwa‐evahiwa wa nyuwo-- va elukuluku yeyo;"
Matthew10:20 vawi awuluma tahi nyuwo-- nyenya Munepa wa Atithinyu anamuluma mwa nyuwo."
Matthew10:21 Nave munna anarwa‐aveléla munnawe wukhwani-- ni atithi mwanawe: nave anamwane enarwa‐evanyiha awayara’ya-- ewiphiha yawo."
Matthew10:22 Nave enarwa‐yicha nyuwo atchu othene ntakhara a nsina naka; nyenya yowo óvilela ophiyerya makutchuwelo-- yola anarwa‐avulushiwa."
Matthew10:23 Nyenya eniryaya yohosheni nyuwo mwitchokoni ela-- tchawelani mukina: tchiri kinalocha wa nyuwo-- Hamurwa‐mukutchula michetche ya Israyeli-- ophiyerya vári Mwana a mutchu arwile."
Matthew10:24 Óhuserya hanapwaha muhusiha’we-- nari kapuro hanapwaha pwiya’we."
Matthew10:25 Ori wokhwanela wa óhuserya wi akhale ntoko muhusiha’we-- ni kapuro ntoko pwiya’we. Khwino yámutchuwa mwanene emusi-- wi-- Beelzebule-- herwa‐epwaha owera hihá a va emusi awe?"
Matthew10:26 Ntakhara awe muhove yawo; vawi hiyavovo etchu yákhuneliwe-- yeyo herwa‐yupululiwa; nari etchu yovitheya-- yeyo herwa‐esuwanyeya."
Matthew10:27 Yeyo kinolélakani nyuwo mwipiphini-- nkalokohani vokokoleya: nave yeyo muniwanyu mu naruni-- muloche va mapatho a’mpa."
Matthew10:28 Nave muhove yawo enipha mwíli-- nyenya okumi owo henawerya wipha; nyenya tchiriene move Yowo-- ówerya otolosha okumi ni mwíli ene m’gehena."
Matthew10:29 Iphera pili hasinathuma mwékhopiri? nave emoha ya hiho henamorela vathi vohikhala Atithinyu:
Matthew10:30 nyenya’tho nyuwo-- mihi othene a m’muruni mwanyu ahálakhanyiwa."
Matthew10:31 Ntakhara awe muhoveke; nyuwo munnapwaha étinti anchipale.
Matthew10:32 Ntakhara awe mutchu yowo anarwa‐ákhulela Miyo va mithoni va atchu-- Miyo’tho kinarwa‐kimwákhulela yowo va mithoni va Atithaka a Wirimu."
Matthew10:33 Nyenya mutchu yowo anarwa‐akikhocha Miyo va mithoni va atchu-- Miyo’tho kinarwa‐kimukhocha yowo va mithoni va Atithaka a Wirimu."
Matthew10:34 Muhanyiherye wi kárwele ovonya murechele va elaponi ya vathi vano; nkárwele ovonya murechele-- nyenya nlema."
Matthew10:35 Vawi kárwa opachula mutchu wa atithinnya-- ni mwana mwamuthiana wa amannya-- ni muthiana ótheliwa wa apwiya mwanawe:"
Matthew10:36 nave a va emusi awe a mutchu enarwa‐ekhala amwichani awe.
Matthew10:37 Yowo ósivela atithinnya-- nari amannya wopwaha Miyo-- hanaphwanela Miyo-- nave yowo ósivela mwanawe mwamulopwana-- nari mwanawe mwamuthiana wopwaha Miyo-- hanaphwanela Miyo."
Matthew10:38 Nave yowo ahinatesha mwikimanyo awe-- atchara vachuli vaka-- hanaphwanela Miyo."
Matthew10:39 Yowo áphwannye okumi awe-- anarwa‐ariha; ni yowo árihale okumi awe-- ntakhara a Miyo-- anarwa‐aphwanya yola."
Matthew10:40 Yowo awakhela nyuwo-- anakhela Miyo-- ni ókákhela Miyo-- anamwakhela Yowo ákirumihale Miyo."
Matthew10:41 Yowo awakhela mulipa‐miririmo-- va nsina na mulipa‐miririmo-- anarwa‐akhela yamahala ya mulipa‐miririmo; nave awakhela mutchu ékhaikhai-- anarwa‐akhela yamahala ya mutchu ékhaikhai."
Matthew10:42 Nave yowo anarwa‐awuryiha mmoha a anamwane ala-- nari ekahi ya mahi órirya-- va nsina na óhuserya-- tchiri kinalocha wa nyuwo-- yowo harwa‐ariha yamahala yawe."
Matthew11:1 Nave vári-- Yesu amanle wathoriherya óhuserya’we khumi neli-- ávinya wiwo ohusiha ni olaleyerya mwitchokoni mwaya."
Matthew11:2 Nyenya Yohane-- vawiwa mu kariposo miteko eyo ya Kristu-- árumiha masu ni ohuserya’we-- ii wa Yowo--"
Matthew11:3 Nyuwo mwá órwa owo-- akhweya niwehererye mukina?"
Matthew11:4 Nave Yesu áhákhula-- alochano-- Haweni mukokiherye masu wa Yohane hiho muniwanyu ni munonanyu:"
Matthew11:5 A evasi ennakhela wona waya-- ni órakala mecho ennechecha-- alipa‐marecha ennaryeheryiwa-- ni óchiyana enniwa-- ni ókhwa ennavíhiwa-- ni wa óhawa ennalaleyeryiwa mitchaka yaphama."
Matthew11:6 Nave óréla ti yowo ahinakwachuliwa ntakhara a Miyo.
Matthew11:7 Nave yala erikimrowa-- Yesu ápacherya olocha ni miloko ya atchu sa wa Yohane-- Mwákhuma oya o’takhwani wona sheni?"
Matthew11:8 Eheche yochikinyeya ni etcheku? Nyenya mwákhumale wona sheni? Mutchu ówara sochetcheya? Onani-- ówara sochetcheya ari mu ipani sa mamwene."
Matthew11:9 Nyenya mwákhumeleni? Wona mulipa‐miririmo? Tchiri-- kinalocha wa nyuwo-- topwaha mulipa‐miririmo."
Matthew11:10 Ola ti yowo wárempwe sa yowo-- wi-- Ona Miyo kinarumiha órummwa aka withoni wanyu-- Yowo anarwa‐aryeherya ephiro anyu muholo mwanyu."
Matthew11:11 Tchiri kinalocha wa nyuwo-- Hávinnye mwa óyariwa ti athiana mutchu mtokotoko ópwaha Yohane Mbatisi; nyenya yowo ori óyeva mu Omwene wa Wirimu annamunnuwela yowo."
Matthew11:12 Nave opacherya va mahiku a Yohane Mbatisi-- ophiyerya hihano vava-- Omwene wa Wirimu ori wawakuvihiwa-- nave awakuviha’wo ennashophola ni ikuru."
Matthew11:13 Vawi alipa‐miririmo othene ni malamulo yálochela ophiyerya va Yohane.
Matthew11:14 Nave mwákhwelaka wakhela-- ola ti Eliya yowo yiriaya annórwa."
Matthew11:15 Yowo ori ni maru awiwa-- íwe."
Matthew11:16 Nyenya kinarwa‐kiphwanaphwaniherya ni sheni atchu ala a mutano? Ari óphwanaphwana ni anamwane ókhala m’matchachoni a marocha--"
Matthew11:17 yawo enamwitchana akhwaya-- ni wi-- Náwopelani nyuwo akaviriko-- nave nyuwo hamwínale; nahinla eyinlo-- nave nyuwo hamwánlale."
Matthew11:18 Vawi Yohane árwa óhilya-- óhiwurya-- nave yawo eni-- Ori ni munepa wonanara."
Matthew11:19 Mwana a mutchu árwa ólya-- ni ówurya-- nave yawo eni-- Onani mutchu ólyólya ni ówuryawurya vinyo-- ntham’vene a alipa‐mushokho ni alipa‐otcheka! Nave miruku eneriwa yekhaikhai ni miteko aya."
Matthew11:20 Vavo Yowo ápacherya wokotchela itchoko iho-- mummo sériwe sinchipale iho sa miteko yaikuru sawe-- ntakhara wi heyárukunuiye."
Matthew11:21 Ochilu wa weyo-- Korazini! ochilu wa weyo Betsaida! Ntakhara saikuru iho séreiye mwa weyo séreiyeke m’Turo ni m’Sidoni-- ekárukunuwa m’murima khalai mu ishakhwini ni mu echúrwani."
Matthew11:22 Nyenya’tho kinalocha wa nyuwo wi mu nihiku nothoriha mulachu aya wa Turo ni Sidoni onarwa‐oyeva ni wawinyu.
Matthew11:23 Nave weyo-- Kapernao-- mano onarwa‐owelihiwa ophiyerya o erimu? onarwa‐okhuruwa ophiyerya wilaponi ya alipa‐okhwa! ntakhara saikuru sene séreiye mwa weyo séreiyeke m’Sodoma-- yeyo ekákhala ophiyerya olelo."
Matthew11:24 Nyenya’tho kinalocha wa nyuwo wi mu nihiku nothoriha-- mulachu aya wa Sodoma onarwa‐oyeva ni wawá."
Matthew11:25 Mu elukuluku yeyo Yesu áhákhula ii-- Kinákhulelana ni Nyuwo-- Atithi-- Mwanene Wirimu ni vathi vano-- wi mwákhuwa hiho wa alipa‐miruku ni ósuwelasha-- nave mwáhupululela hiho wa makwiya."
Matthew11:26 Ai-- Atithi-- ntakhara yawihihá yákhala yohakalaliha va mithoni vanyu."
Matthew11:27 Itchu sothene sáveléliwa wa Miyo ti Atithaka; nave hávovo mutchu anasuwela Mwana owo-- nyenya Atithi mekhaya; nave hávovo mukina anasuwela Atithi nyenya Mwana owo mekhiye-- ni wa yowo ene Mwana owo anatchuniye omupululela."
Matthew11:28 Rwani wino wa Miyo othene nyu óvela ni óhokoliwa ni mirichi-- nave Miyo kinarwa‐kiwitchuwihani nyuwo."
Matthew11:29 Ireyani nipisi naka va nyuwo-- nave huseryani wa Miyo; ntakhara kiri awitchachála ni awiyeviha m’murima: nave munarwa‐m’phwanya witchuwa wa okumi anyu."
Matthew11:30 Vawi nipisi naka n’ri nochetcheya-- ni murichi aka ori woveya."
Matthew12:1 Mu elukuluku yeyo Yesu ávira nihiku na Sabata véri va imacha sa tirigu; nave óhuserya’we yávoliwa etala-- epacherya ovurula inuku-- elya."
Matthew12:2 Nyenya aFarisi-- vawona-- yáhi wa Yowo-- Nkonani-- óhuserya’nyu enera yohemyiwa wereya nihiku na Sabata."
Matthew12:3 Nyenya Yowo áhi wa yawo-- Hamwálakhannye nari yeyo énriye Davide-- ávoliwiye etala-- ni yawo áriyeno?"
Matthew12:4 wi ávolowa empa ya Muluku-- alya ipau sawoniherya-- sohemyiwa olya yowo nari yawo áriyeno-- nyenya alipa‐epheparu."
Matthew12:5 Nari hamwálakhannyeru m’malamulo-- wi nihiku na Sabata-- alipa‐ephepa mu empa ya Muluku’mmo ennananariha nihiku na Sabata-- ehikhala ni yotcheka?"
Matthew12:6 Nyenya kinalocha wa nyuwo-- wi ópwaha empa ya Muluku eyo ori vava."
Matthew12:7 Nyenya mwásuwenleke ti sheni ela-- Kinakhwela ikharari-- tahi ephepa hoe-- hemwakáthorihale wi tonanara óhitcheka’wo--"
Matthew12:8 vawi Mwana a mutchu ori mwanene awe a nihiku na Sabata.
Matthew12:9 Nave Yowo ávinya vavo-- avolowa mothukumanela mwaya; nave onani-- mwári mutchu a ntata nophyórorowa."
Matthew12:10 Nave yámukohasha Yowo-- ni wi-- Ti wawemyiwa openusha nihiku na Sabata? wi emurosh?-?erye mulachu."
Matthew12:11 Nyenya Yowo áhi wa yawo-- Mutchu tani a nyuwo-- yowo orino epuchepuche emoha-- nave yamorela mu’lichini nihiku na Sabata-- harwa‐aphara-- akumiha yeyo?"
Matthew12:12 Nave nki tiwawihai opwaha wawe wa mutchu ni epuchepuche! Ntakhara awe tiwawemyiwa wera saphama nihiku na Sabata.
Matthew12:13 Vavo álocha Yowo wa mutchu’wo-- Okola ntata ná. Nave yowo áhókola-- nave nákokiheryiwa na okumi ntoko nikhwaya."
Matthew12:14 Nave aFarisi yákhuma-- evánela somwerela Yowo-- mwomutolosha."
Matthew12:15 Nyenya Yesu ásuwenliye-- ávinya wiwo: nave yámutchara atchu anchipale;"
Matthew12:16 nave Yowo áhápenusha yawo othene-- álipiherya masu wi ehimupulule:"
Matthew12:17 wi yériwe yolochiwa ti Yesaya mulipa‐miririmo’le-- wi--"
Matthew12:18 Nkona mmiravo aka-- yowo kúmuthanlilaka-- Ósiveliwa’ka-- yowo okumi aka onahakalalayano: Va Yowo kinarwa‐kiyathi Munepa’ka-- Nave Yowo anarwa‐alaleyerya mulachu wa amalapo."
Matthew12:19 Harwa‐akhichana-- harwa‐akhuwela; Nave nari mmoha harwa‐iwa masu awe m’makhwála;"
Matthew12:20 Eheche yophweya harwa‐antaka-- Nari onyari wotchuwa harwa‐ashipiha-- Ophiyerya wi Yowo anarwa‐aviriha mulachu okutchuliwe va olapiha."
Matthew12:21 Nave amalapo enarwa‐eroromela nsina nawe.
Matthew12:22 Vavo yámukusherya Yowo mutchu óphariwa ti nsololo-- évasi ni óhuluma; nave ámpenusha-- wawihiha wi óhuluma owo áhuluma-- óna."
Matthew12:23 Nave miloko yothene ya atchu yátikhina-- elocha-- Ola tahi mwana a Davide?"
Matthew12:24 Nyenya aFarisi vawiwa yáhi-- Ola hanakumiha masololo nyenya ni ikuru sawe sa Beelzebule-- mutokwene a masololo."
Matthew12:25 Nave Yesu ásuwela maupuwela aya-- ii wa yawo-- Omwene wokawaneya va mekhaya onakhala milepe-- ni etchoko nari emusi yokawaneya va mekhaya herwa‐ekhala:"
Matthew12:26 nave Satana akumiha Satana-- yowo anaka?-?waneya va mekhiye: nave onarwa‐okhala hai omwene awe?"
Matthew12:27 Nave Miyo kákumihaka masololo ni ikuru sawe sa Beelzebule-- anamwananyu enakumiha ni ikuru sa wani? ntakhara awe yawo enarwa‐ekhala alipa‐othoriha’nyu."
Matthew12:28 Nyenya Miyo kákumihaka masololo ni ikuru sawe sa Munepa wa Muluku-- vavo Omwene wa Muluku orimphiya va nyuwo."
Matthew12:29 Akhweya mutchu anawerya hai ovolowa mu emusi ya mutchu ólipa-- ni ohuhula mirichi awe-- yowo áhipacherya omaka mutchu ólipa owo? nave vavo anarwa‐ahuhula sa mu emusi awe."
Matthew12:30 Yowo óhikhala vamoha ni Miyo anakhocha Miyo-- ni yowo óhithukumanya vamoha ni Miyo annamwaryamwasha."
Matthew12:31 Ntakhara awe kinalocha wa nyuwo-- Sotcheka sothene-- ni solocha sothene sopwalu-- sinarwa‐sikhurumuweliwa wa atchu; nyenya yopwalu ya va Munepa Wawéla herwa‐ekhurumuweliwa."
Matthew12:32 Nave yowo analochela Mwana a mutchu sonanara-- onarwa‐okhurumuweliwa wa yowo; nyenya yowo analochela Munepa Wawéla sonanara horwa‐okhurumuweliwa wa yowo-- mu elukuluku ela ya vathi vano-- nave’tho yeyo enamórwa eyo."
Matthew12:33 Vakinavo erani mwiri okhale waphama-- ni yawima’ya ene ekhale yaphama; vakinavo erani mwiri okhale wonanara; ni yawima’ya ene ekhale yonanara; vawi ni yawima’ya mwiri onnasuwanyeya."
Matthew12:34 Anamwane nyuwo a enowa-- munawerya hai wuluma saphama-- nyuwo ókhala ónanara? vawi muwanoni munamuluma mwa otekhuma waya wa murima."
Matthew12:35 Mutchu aphama anakumiha saphama m’muhakhu awe waphama-- nave mutchu ónanara anakumiha sonanara m’muhakhu awe wonanara."
Matthew12:36 Nave kinalocha wa nyuwo-- wi masu othene a’theru-- yawo atchu eniriaya eloche-- enarwa‐yithoriherya mulachu aya nihiku nothoriha."
Matthew12:37 Vawi onarwa‐weriwa ékhaikhai ni masuá-- nave ni masuá ene onarwa‐ovanyihiwa."
Matthew12:38 Vavo alipa‐orepa ni aFarisi akina yáhákhula Yowo yi-- Muhusiha-- n’nakhwela wona eneneryo ya wa Nyuwo."
Matthew12:39 Nyenya Yowo áhákhula ii wa yawo-- Atchu ónanara óraruwa enakhwela‐khwela eneneryo; nave herwa‐evahiwa wa yawo eneneryo-- nyenya eneneryo ya Yona mulipa‐miririmo’wo."
Matthew12:40 Vawi ntoko Yona ári m’mirimani mwa chopa etokotoko mahiku mararu ni ohiyu aya-- hihá Mwana a mutchu anarwa‐akhala m’murimani mwa elapo ya vathi vano-- mahiku mararu ni ohiyu aya."
Matthew12:41 Atchu a o Nineve enarwa‐evinyeryana m’mulachu’wo vamoha ni atchu a mutano-- yávanyiha yawo; ntakhara yawo yárukunuwa m’murima ni olaleyerya wawe wa Yona; nave onani ópwaha Yona ori vava."
Matthew12:42 Mwene mwamuthiana a witchekuni ya murupi anarwa‐avinyeryana m’mulachu’wo vamoha ni atchu a mutano-- ávanyiha yawo: ntakhara yowo árwela o makutchuwelo a elapo ya vathi vano orwa‐wiwa miruku ya Solomoni; nave onani ópwaha Solomoni ori vava."
Matthew12:43 Nyenya munepa wotakhala-- vári okhumale mwa mutchu-- onnavira opwaha mapuro órama mahi wavyavya witchuwa-- nave honaphwanya."
Matthew12:44 Vavo onnalocha-- Kinarwa‐kikokela o’mpani waka-- wiwile kákhumalaka’wo; nave vophiya’wo onaphwanya muhimomo ókhalamo-- yoveliwa ni yoryeheryiwa."
Matthew12:45 Vavo onnarowa-- okusha vamoha ni yowo minepa mikina mikhwaya mithanu na mili-- yonanara yopwaha mwanene mekhaya yowo-- nave ennavolowa-- ekhala’mo. Nave makutchuwelo awe a mutchu’wo enakhala ónanara opwaha mapacheryeryo awe. Wawihihá onarwa‐okhala’tho wa atchu ónanara a mutano."
Matthew12:46 Vári Yowo arikimlocharu ni miloko ya atchu awo-- onani-- amannya ni annawe yáhémela okhwipi-- etchuna wulumano."
Matthew12:47 Nave mutchu áhi wa Yowo. Onani aminyu ni anninyu enemela va ntchachoni-- enatchuna wuluma ni Nyuwo."
Matthew12:48 Nyenya Yowo áhákhula-- ii wa yowo ólocha owo-- Amai aka tani? ni annaka tani?"
Matthew12:49 Nave áhókola ntata nawe va ohuserya’we-- ii-- Onani amai aka ni annaka!"
Matthew12:50 Vawi mutchu yowo anarwa‐era yokhwela ya Atithaka a Wirimu-- yowo ti munnaka-- ni murokoraka-- ni amai aka."
Matthew13:1 Nihiku nenlo Yesu ákhuma m’pa’mmo-- akilathi mu’shereshere mwa enia."
Matthew13:2 Nave miloko minchipale ya atchu yámthukumanela wawihihá wi Yowo ávolowa m’mwacheyani-- akilathi-- nave muloko wothene wáhémela va mokoni."
Matthew13:3 Nave Yowo áháléla itchu sinchipale m’maphwanaphwaniho-- alocha-- Onani-- mulipa‐omisa ákhuma omisa mmiso."
Matthew13:4 Nave ámisiye-- mukina wámora mukhwipi mwa ephiro-- nave sárwa ipalame-- sithupa yowo."
Matthew13:5 Nyenya mukina wámora va malukuni-- vavo havári etchaya yinchipale; nave vavo wámela-- vawi hawárino etchaya yokhwanela."
Matthew13:6 Nave nsuwa náwenlaya wávya; nave ntakhara hawárino mitathari wáwitipana.
Matthew13:7 Nyenya mukina wámora va míwani-- nave míwa eyo yátchavelana-- enyoka yowo."
Matthew13:8 Nyenya mukina wámora va’tchayani yaphama-- nave wáhima sawima-- mukina wa makhumi khumi-- mukina wa makhumi mathanu na nimoha-- mukina wa makhumi mararu."
Matthew13:9 Yowo ori ni maru-- íwe."
Matthew13:10 Nave óhuserya’wo yárwa-- yi wa Yowo-- Ntakhara sheni munashipelanyu yawo m’maphwanaphwaniho?"
Matthew13:11 Nave Yowo áhákhula ii-- Ntakhara wovahiwa wa nyuwo osuwela sokhuweya sa Omwene wa Wirimu-- nyenya hovahiwe wa yawo."
Matthew13:12 Vawi mutchu yowo orino-- onarwa‐ovahiwa wa yowo-- nave anarwa‐akhalano sawácha; nyenya yowo ahinono-- nari yeyo oriyeno enarwa‐evihiwa wa yowo."
Matthew13:13 Ntakhara awe kinnashipela yawo m’maphwanaphwaniho; ntakhara wi awona heniwa-- ni awíwa-- nari osuwelasha."
Matthew13:14 Nave enarwa‐yeriwa wa yawo masu álonchiye Yesaya-- yawo eni-- Vawíwa munarwa‐mwíwa-- nave hamurwa‐musuwelasharu; Vovarya munarwa‐m’varya-- nave hamurwa‐monaru;"
Matthew13:15 Ntakhara wálimela murima wa atchu ala-- Nave owaruni waya yáhíwa wochiyana’wo-- Nave mitho aya yárupiha; Wi ehoneru ni mitho-- Ehiwe ni maru-- Ehisuwelashe ni murima’ya-- Ehirukunuwe-- Nave kihapenushe yawo."
Matthew13:16 Nyenya mitho anyu ari óréla-- ntakhara ennona; ni maru anyu ntakhara enníwa."
Matthew13:17 Vawi tchiri kinalocha wa nyuwo-- wi alipa‐miririmo anchipale ni atchu ékhaikhai yákhala ni minkhela wona hiho munonanyu-- nyenya hayónne; ni wiwa hiho muniwanyu-- nyenya hayíwale."
Matthew13:18 Nave vano wiryanani nyuwo niphwanaphwaniho nlo na mulipa‐omisa.
Matthew13:19 Mutchu mukina awíwa masu a Omwene-- nave hanasuwelasha-- ónanara owo annarwa-- ashophola yomisiwa eyo m’murimani mwawe. Ola ti owo ómisiwa mukhwipi mwa ephiro."
Matthew13:20 Nyenya yowo anamisiwa va malukuni-- ola ti owo awíwa masu-- ni wákhela vava ni otheya;"
Matthew13:21 nave hánono mitathari mwa mekhiye-- nyenya annakhala elukuluku ekhani; nave vorwa yawukhula akhweya yohosha ntakhara a masu-- yowo annakwachuliwa vava."
Matthew13:22 Nave yowo anamisiwa o miwani-- ola ti yowo awíwa masu; nave wupuwelela wa elapo ya vathi-- ni owoka wa muhakhu onnanyoka masu: nave onnakhala othowa yawima."
Matthew13:23 Nave yowo anamisiwa va’tchayani yaphama-- ola ti yowo awíwa masu asuwelasha; yowo tchiri annimiha sawima-- éra-- akina sa makhumi khumi-- akina sa makhumi mathanu na nimoha-- akina sa makhumi mararu."
Matthew13:24 Niphwanaphwaniho nikina Yowo áháthoriherya-- alocha-- Omwene wa Wirimu onaphwanaphwanihiwa ni mutchu-- yowo ámminse mmiso waphama m’machani mwawe;"
Matthew13:25 nyenya atchu erikimkona-- mwichani awe árwa-- amisa nthakathaka véri va tirigu-- avinya’vo."
Matthew13:26 Nyenya vári muropo wáhunnuwa-- wima-- vavo náhoneya’tho nthakathaka."
Matthew13:27 Nave amiravo awe a mwanene empa eyo-- yárwa-- yi wa yowo-- Pwiya-- hamwámisa mmiso waphama m’machani mwanyu? nki ekunshe wowi nthakathaka nlo?"
Matthew13:28 Nave yowo álochano-- Mutchu mwichani aka ohera ela. Nave amiravo yáhi wa yowo-- Nave munakhwela hihano wi n’rowe-- nathukumanye nlo vamoha?"
Matthew13:29 Nyenya yowo áhi-- Hoe-- wi akhweya munathukumanyanyu nthakathaka nlo-- munirimphola’tho tirigu vamoha ni nenlo."
Matthew13:30 Hiyani sopili-- sinnuwele vamoha ophiyerya vokhupa; nave mu elukuluku yokhupa kinarwa‐kiléla ókakatcha’wo-- M’pacherye othukumanya nthakathaka-- mmake nlo mavisi wéyela-- nyenya m’mutesherye tirigu-- mwiyathi mu’khupini mwaka."
Matthew13:31 Niphwanaphwaniho nikina Yowo áháthoriherya-- alocha-- Omwene wa Wirimu ori wophwanaphwana ni mwámmiso a evai-- yowo mutchu ákunshiye-- ála va’machani vawe: yowo onakhalaru mukhanisha opwaha mimiso yothene--"
Matthew13:32 nyenya wánnuwalaya-- ori mtokotoko opwaha makukhu othene-- okhala mwiri-- wawihihá wi ipalame sa wirimu sinnarwa-- sikilathi m’mirai aya."
Matthew13:33 Niphwanaphwaniho nikina álochano; Omwene wa Wirimu ori wophwanaphwana ni yoruruvaliha ipau-- yeyo muthiana ákunshiye-- avitha m’mieryo miraru ya eshima-- ophiyerya yothene yáruruvala."
Matthew13:34 Sothe sene iha Yesu áshipela m’maphwanaphwaniho wa miloko ya atchu; nave wohikhala niphwanaphwaniho húlumale etchu wa yawo:
Matthew13:35 wi yériwe yolochiwa ti mulipa‐miririmo-- wi-- Kinarwa‐kihula va’wanoni vaka ni maphwanaphwaniho; Kinarwa‐kupulula itchu sovitheya opacherya wopacherya okilathihiwa waya wa elapo ya vathi vano."
Matthew13:36 Vavo Yowo áhiya miloko eyo-- avolowa m’pa’mmo: nave óhuserya’we yárwa wa Yowo-- elocha-- Mun’taphulele hiyo niphwanaphwaniho nlo na nthakathaka na m’machani."
Matthew13:37 Nave Yowo áhákhula ii-- Omisa mmiso waphama ti Mwana a mutchu; nave emacha ti elapo ya vathi vano;"
Matthew13:38 nave mmiso waphama ti anamwane a Omwene owo; nave nthakathaka ti anamwane a ónanara owo;
Matthew13:39 nave mwichani yowo áminse nla-- ti Musaserya: nave okhupa ti makutchuwelo a elukuluku ya vathi vano; nave ókakatcha’wo ti angelo."
Matthew13:40 Nave ntoko nthakathaka n’nathukumanyiwa vamoha-- néyeliwa va moroni; mwawihihá munarwa‐mukhala m’makutchuwelo a elukuluku ya vathi vano."
Matthew13:41 Mwana a mutchu anarwa‐aruma angelo awe-- nave yawo enarwa‐ethukumanya vamoha-- ni ovíha mu Omwene awe sokwachuliha sothene-- ni atchu awera sohileleya-- nave enarwa‐yávonya yawo mu chukutchani a moro; wiwo onarwa‐okhala wunla ni okhuriha minno."
Matthew13:42 Vavo ékhaikhai awo enarwa‐yárya ntoko nsuwa--"
Matthew13:43 mu Omwene wa Atithaya. Yowo ori ni maru íwe.
Matthew13:44 Omwene wa Wirimu ori wophwanaphwana ni muhakhu wovitheya m’machani; yowo mutchu áphwannyiye-- avitha; nave mu osivelana wawe annavinya-- atumiha sothe sene áriyeno-- athuma emacha yela."
Matthew13:45 Nave’tho Omwene wa Wirimu ori wophwanaphwana ni mutchu a marocha-- awávya irácho saphama:"
Matthew13:46 nave áphwannyiye erácho emoha ya esisapo yorekama-- árowa-- atumiha sothe sene áriyeno-- athuma yela."
Matthew13:47 Nave’tho-- Omwene wa Wirimu ori wophwanaphwana ni mowaya wovonyiwa mu’nia-- ni othukumanya vamoha sa miloko yothene-- yowo vosareya-- yárúlela va mokoni;"
Matthew13:48 nave yákilanthaya-- yáthukumanya saphama m’soku?-?sherya-- nyenya sonanara yáriha o’takhwani."
Matthew13:49 Vanarwa‐véra hihá va makutchuwelo a elukuluku ya vathi vano: angelo enarwa‐etchowa-- yáthanla ónanara véri va aphama-- nave enarwa‐yáriha mu chukutchani a moro:"
Matthew13:50 wiwo onarwa‐okhala wunla ni okhuriha minno.
Matthew13:51 Mohiwasha sothe sene iha? Yawo yáhi wa Yowo-- Ai."
Matthew13:52 Nave Yowo áhi wa yawo-- Ntakhara awe-- mulipa‐orepa mukina-- óhusihiwa mu Omwene wa Wirimu-- ori ophwanaphwana ni mutchu mwanene emusi-- yowo anakumiha m’muhakhuni mwawe itchu sakhalai ni sahihano."
Matthew13:53 Nave vári-- Yesu ámanliye maphwanaphwaniho ala-- ávinya’wo."
Matthew13:54 Nave vophiya wilaponi ya owannyawe-- áhusiha yawo mothukumanela mwaya-- wawihihá wi yátikhina-- elocha-- Ola ákushale wowi miruku yela ni saikuru iha?"
Matthew13:55 Ola tahi mwana a kháchiri a miri? nsina na amannya tahi Mariya? ni annawe tahi Yakobo ni Yosefe ni Simoni ni Yuda?
Matthew13:56 Nave arokorawe hari ni hiyo othene ala? Nave Yowo ákushale itchu sothe sene iha wowi?
Matthew13:57 Nave yawo yákwachuliwa ntakhara a Yowo. Nyenya Yesu áhi wa yawo-- Mulipa‐miririmo hanakhala othowa mahala nyenya’tho wilaponi ya owannyawe ni o emusi awe."
Matthew13:58 Nave Yowo-- ntakhara a ohiroromela waya-- hénre wiwo saikuru sinchipale."
Matthew14:1 Mu elukuluku yeyo Herode mwene áhiwa ovuwa wa Yesu--"
Matthew14:2 alocha wa amiravo awe-- Ola ti Yohane Mbatisi; ávinya wa okhwa; nave ntakhara a ela saikuru iha sinnalipasha mwa yowo."
Matthew14:3 Vawi Herode ámphara Yohane-- ammaka-- amwiyathi mu kariposo ntakhara a Herodiya-- mwariye a munnawe Filipo."
Matthew14:4 Vawi Yohane álochano-- Honemyereryiwa wa weyo okhalano."
Matthew14:5 Nave vokhwela omwipha yowo-- áhóva muloko wa atchu-- vawi yámwera yowo mulipa‐miririmo."
Matthew14:6 Nyenya vophiya nihiku noyariwa wawe wa Herode-- mwana mwamuthiana a Herodiya áhína véri vaya-- amuhakalaliha Herode."
Matthew14:7 Vavo yowo álakanano olupela wolupela-- omvaha yowo etchu yeyo aniriye aveke."
Matthew14:8 Nave yowo-- átunyeryiwa ti amannya-- ii-- Kivaheni miyo wino m’musiyoni muru wa Yohane Mbatisi."
Matthew14:9 Nave mwene owo áhukhuliwa ni othanana; nyenya ntakhara a olupela wawe-- ni a yawo yárino va sólya-- álamulela ovahiwe;"
Matthew14:10 nave árumiha-- athikila muru wa Yohane mu kariposo."
Matthew14:11 Nave ákusha muru awe m’musiyoni’mmo-- avaha wa nahano’wo: nave yowo ákusherya wa amannya."
Matthew14:12 Nave óhuserya’we yárwa-- erola murutchu-- evitha; nave yárwa eléla Yesu."
Matthew14:13 Nave Yesu iwaliye-- ávinya wiwo m’mwacheyani-- oya o nipuroni na’takhwa va mekhiye: nave miloko ya atchu-- yiwalaya-- yámutchara Yowo m’mokoni orwela mwitchokoni."
Matthew14:14 Nave Yowo ákhuma-- óna muloko mtokotoko wa atchu-- ámorela yawo ikharari-- apenusha awicheliwa’ya."
Matthew14:15 Nave vákhanlaya oshekuwa-- óhuserya’we yáphiya wa Yowo-- elocha-- Nipuro nla ti na’takhwa-- nave elukuluku yovira hihano; lélani miloko eyo ya atchu erowe-- wi eye witchokoni withumela mekhaya iphika."
Matthew14:16 Nyenya Yesu áhi wa yawo-- Yawo hiyánono nthowa norowela-- avaheni nyuwo yawo yalye."
Matthew14:17 Nyenya yawo yálochano-- Hiyo haninono etchu vava nyenya ipau thanu-- ni ihopa pili."
Matthew14:18 Nave Yowo áhi-- Murweno wino wa Miyo."
Matthew14:19 Nave Yowo álamulela miloko ya atchu ekilathi vathi va manashini; nave Yowo ákusha ipau thanu iho ni ihopa pili iho-- nave áwehiliye wirimu-- áréliha-- akawa-- avaha ipau iho wa ohuserya-- ni ohuserya wa miloko ya atchu."
Matthew14:20 Nave yálya othene evona: nave yárola sohala iho sa inyenyeri-- makali khumi na meli ósareya."
Matthew14:21 Nave yályile awo yári alopwana ntoko masana makhumi mathanu-- wáhiya athiana ni anamwane."
Matthew14:22 Nave vava Yowo áhakuviha óhuserya evolowe m’mwacheyani-- ni omuhólela Yowo okhopela-- ophiyerya wiwo Yowo alénle miloko ya atchu eroweke."
Matthew14:23 Nave Yowo álénliye miloko eyo-- áwela m’mwakoni va mekhiye-- ovekela: nave vákhanlaya oshekuwa-- Yowo ákhala wiwo mekhiye."
Matthew14:24 Nyenya vavo mwacheya áphiya véri va’nia-- awukhuliwa ni machumusha; vawi etcheku yárwa mwawopanano."
Matthew14:25 Nave va oweherya wa nesheshe wa ohiyu-- Yowo árwa wa yawo-- écha vasulu va’nia."
Matthew14:26 Nyenya óhuserya’wo yámonilaya-- arikimwecha va mahini-- yáthukumela-- yi-- Ti mthowa! Nave yákhuwela ni wova."
Matthew14:27 Nyenya vavo Yesu áhulumano ii-- Lipani murima; ti Miyo; muhóve."
Matthew14:28 Nave Petro ámwakhula ii-- Apwiya-- khwino ti Nyuwo tchiri-- mukiléle kirwe wa Nyuwo va mahini-- Nave Yowo áhi-- Rwa."
Matthew14:29 Nave Petro ákhuruwa m’mwacheyani-- échecha va mahini-- ophiya wa Yesu."
Matthew14:30 Nyenya yowo ónniye etcheku-- áhóva; nave ni opacherya onéla-- ákhuwela-- ii-- Apwiya-- kivulusheni miyo!"
Matthew14:31 Nave vavo Yesu áhokola ntata nawe-- amphara-- alochano-- Weyo óroromela tonto-- werenleni okhwa minikwa m’murimani?"
Matthew14:32 Nave yawo yávolowilaya m’mwacheyani’mmo-- etcheku yámála."
Matthew14:33 Nave yawo yári m’mwacheyani’mmo yámko?-?khorela-- elocha-- Eparipari tchiri-- mwá Mwana a Muluku."
Matthew14:34 Nave elapuwiye yáphiya o mokoni-- o Genesarete."
Matthew14:35 Nave alopwana a vavo yámusuwenlaya-- yárumiha wothe wene o elaponi yothene yorukuryerya-- ekusherya wa Yowo othene ókhala ni irecha;"
Matthew14:36 nave yámveka Yowo-- wi yatannyeru maroso a yowara yawe: nave othene yámutannyile yápenushiwa."
Matthew15:1 Vavo yárwa wa Yesu aFarisi ni alipa‐orepa-- órwela o Yerusalemu-- yi--"
Matthew15:2 Óhuserya’nyu enashuphela sheni ikano sa makholo? vawi henanyawa m’matani enalyaya.
Matthew15:3 Nave Yowo áhákhula-- ii wa yawo-- Ni nyuwo’tho munashuphela sheni nlamulo na Muluku ntakhara a ikano sanyu?"
Matthew15:4 Vawi Muluku áhi-- Chichimiha atithá ni amayá; nave-- Ólochela atithinnya ni amannya sonanara-- akhwe tchiri."
Matthew15:5 Nyenya nyuwo munalocha-- Yowo analocha wa atithinnya nari amannya-- Eyo okakhaviheryiwano-- ti yoveléliwa wa Muluku; yowo harwa‐achichimiha atithinnya."
Matthew15:6 Nave nyuwo munavevula masu a Muluku ntakhara a ikano sanyu.
Matthew15:7 Ówoka nyuwo! Yesaya álochela phama sa nyuwo-- ni wi--"
Matthew15:8 Atchu ala enakichichimiha Miyo ni iyano saya;
Matthew15:9 Nyenya murima’ya ori ochai ni Miyo. Nyenya enakithamala wa’theru-- Ni ohusiha mahusiho-- malamulo a atchu."
Matthew15:10 Nave Yowo áhitchana miloko eyo ya atchu-- ii wa yawo-- Iwani-- nave musuwelashe:"
Matthew15:11 tahi yeyo enavolowa mu’wanoni mwawe enamunanariha mutchu; nyenya yeyo enakhuma mu’wanoni mwawe-- tinamunanariha mutchu."
Matthew15:12 Vavo yárwa ohuserya-- elochano-- Munnasuwela wi aFarisi yákwachuliwa vawíwa yolocha eyo?"
Matthew15:13 Nyenya Yowo áhákhula ii-- Muropo wothene-- yowo Atithaka a Wirimu ahánliye-- onarwa‐opholiwa."
Matthew15:14 Mwahiyeni yawo-- ari ahóli a evasi. Nave évasi amuhóla évasi-- opili enarwa‐emorela mu’khokweni."
Matthew15:15 Nave Petro áhákhula ii wa Yowo-- Mun’thoriherye niphwanaphwaniho nla."
Matthew15:16 Nave Yowo áhi-- Nyuwo’tho munakhala ohísuwelela?"
Matthew15:17 Hamunasuwela wi sothene sovolowa mu’wanoni sinaya m’mirimani-- nave sinarihiwa o’salani?"
Matthew15:18 Nyenya sokhuma mu’wanoni sinarwela m’murimani; tisinamu?-?nanariha mutchu.
Matthew15:19 Vawi m’murimani munarwela maupuwelo ónanara-- sawipha-- soraruwa-- sochapaheya-- sawiya-- sanamona awotha-- sopwalu;"
Matthew15:20 iha ti sonanariha mutchu-- nyenya olya ohinyawa mata honananariha mutchu hoe."
Matthew15:21 Nave Yesu ákhuma’vo ahapuwa ovolowa o makupa a Turo ni Sidoni.
Matthew15:22 Nave onani-- Muthiana a o Kanane ákhuma m’munlanoni mule-- akhuwela-- ii-- Mukimorele miyo ikharari Apwiya-- mwana a Davide; mwanaka mwamuthiana óphariwa wawopiha ti nsololo."
Matthew15:23 Nyenya Yowo hámwakhunle nsu nimoha. Nave óhuserya’we yárwa-- emveka-- yi-- M’muléle arowe; ntakhara annakhuwela vachuli vahu."
Matthew15:24 Nave Yowo áhákhula-- ii-- Nkárummwe wa akina nyenya wa ipuchepuche sorimela sa emusi ya Israyeli."
Matthew15:25 Nyenya yowo árwa-- amukokhorela-- alocha-- Apwiya-- kikhaviheryeni."
Matthew15:26 Nave Yowo áhákhula-- ii-- Heri yaphama okusha epau ya anamwane-- ni ovonyerya asanapwa."
Matthew15:27 Nyenya yowo áhi-- Ai-- Apwiya-- vawi’tho asanapwa enalya inyenyeri somora va ehasari va apwiya’ya."
Matthew15:28 Vavo Yesu áhákhula-- alochano-- Muthiana we-- nroromelo ná ti ntokotoko: ekhale wa weyo ntoko mummo onakhwelelá. Nave mwanawe ápenuwa va elukuluku yeyo."
Matthew15:29 Nave Yesu ávinya wiwo-- arwa o enia ya Galileya-- nave áwela m’mwakoni-- akilathi vavo."
Matthew15:30 Nave miloko minchipale ya atchu yárwa wa Yowo-- yárino órakala mecho-- évasi-- óhuluma-- órakala sam’mwílini-- ni akina anchipale-- yakilathiha vathi va manani awe: nave Yowo áhápenusha:"
Matthew15:31 wawihihá wi muloko’wo wátikhina-- vawona óhuluma yulumaka-- órakala sam’mwílini epenuwaka-- ni órakala mecho yechaka-- ni évasi yonaka-- nave yawo yáchichimiha Muluku a Israyeli."
Matthew15:32 Nave Yesu áhitchana óhuserya’we-- ii-- Murima’ka onnamorela ikharari muloko wa atchu awo-- ntakhara ari okhala wokhala ni Miyo mahiku mararu-- nave heyánono etchu yólya-- nave nkinakhwela wáléla erowe óhilya-- wi enirimchupha va’phironi."
Matthew15:33 Nave óhuserya yálochano-- n’nóna wowi ipau sawihiha mu’takhwani sovoniha muloko wawihiha wa atchu?"
Matthew15:34 Nave Yesu álochano-- Murino ipau hai? Nave yawo yáhi-- Thanu na pili ni asihopa tonto."
Matthew15:35 Nave Yowo álamulela atchu awo ekilathi vathi othene:
Matthew15:36 akusha ipau iho thanu na pili ni ihopa iho; nave áthamala Muluku-- akawa-- avaha wa óhuserya-- nave óhuserya wa atchu."
Matthew15:37 Nave othene ala yálya-- evona: nave yárola sohala sa inyenyeri ithokwa thanu na pili sosareya."
Matthew15:38 Nave yályile awo yári masana makhumi masheshe a alopwana-- wáhiya athiana ni anamwane."
Matthew15:39 Nave Yowo álénliye miloko eyo erowe-- ávolowa m’mwacheyani-- aphiya m’munlanoni wa Magadani."
Matthew16:1 Nave aFarisi ni aSaduki yárwa-- emweha-- emkoha Yowo awoniherye eneneryo ya Wirimu."
Matthew16:2 Nyenya Yowo áhákhula-- ii wa yawo-- Oshekuwa munnalocha-- Onarwa‐okokoleya kwee: vawi erimu eri yosherya."
Matthew16:3 Nave woshishelo-- Olelo ti wa’tcheku: vawi erimu eri yosherya yorípa. Munnasuwela osuwelasha sa va withoni wa erimu; nyenya ineneryo sa elukuluku yela-- hamunawerya osuwelasha."
Matthew16:4 Atchu ónanara ni óraruwa enakhwelakhwela eneneryo; nyenya herwa‐evahiwa wa yawo eneneryo nyenya eneneryo ya Yona. Nave Yowo áháhiya-- avinya’vo."
Matthew16:5 Nave ohuserya yárwa okhopela-- echiwala okusha ipau."
Matthew16:6 Nave Yesu áhi wa yawo-- Weheryani musepe yoruruvaliha ipau ya aFarisi ni aSaduki."
Matthew16:7 Nave yawo yákohana mukina ni mukhwawe-- yi Hanikunshe ipau."
Matthew16:8 Nyenya Yesu-- ásuwenliye-- áhi-- Kha-- nyuwo ororomela tonto-- munakohana ntakhara sheni mukina ni mukhwawe-- wi hamukunshe ipau?"
Matthew16:9 okhala wokhala hamunasuwela-- nave hamunupuwela ipau thanu ihe sa atchu ale masana makhumi mathanu-- ni makali mahai mwáronlanyu?"
Matthew16:10 Vakina’tho ipau thanu na pili ihe sa atchu masana makhumi masheshe ni ithokwa hai mwáronlanyu?
Matthew16:11 Hai nki muhinasuwelanyu wi nkálonche wa nyuwo sa ipau? Nyenya sepani yoruruvaliha ya aFarisi ni aSaduki.
Matthew16:12 Vavo yásuwelasha wi hálénle osepa yoruruvaliha ya ipau-- nyenya ehusiho ya aFarisi ni aSaduki."
Matthew16:13 Nave Yesu-- arúliye wilaponi ya o Kaisareya a Filipi-- ákoha óhuserya’we-- wi-- Atchu enalocha wi Mwana a mutchu tani?"
Matthew16:14 Nave yawo yáhi-- Akina eni-- Yohane Mbatisi; nyenya akina-- Eliya: nave akina’tho Yeremiya-- akhweya mmoha a alipa‐miririmo."
Matthew16:15 Yowo álochano-- Nyenya nyuwo munihai wi Miyo káni?"
Matthew16:16 Nave Simoni Petro áhákhula ii-- Nyuwo mwá Kristu-- Mwana a Muluku a okumi."
Matthew16:17 Nave Yesu ámwakhula yowo-- ii-- Wá óréla-- Simoni Bar‐Yona: vawi mwíli wa enama-- n’nikhami howupululenle ela-- nyenya Atithaka a Wirimu."
Matthew16:18 Nave’tho Miyo kinalocha ni weyo-- wi weyo wá Petro-- nave va mwala ola kinarwa‐kitikitherya Muloko aka: nave milako ya elapo ya alipa‐okhwa herwa‐elipiherya va yowo."
Matthew16:19 Kinarwa‐kovaha sohulela sa Omwene wa Wirimu: nave yeyo oniryá omake va elaponi ya vathi vano-- enarwa‐ekhala yomakiwa Wirimu: nave yeyo oniryá otaphule va elaponi ya vathi vano-- enarwa‐ekhala yotaphuliwa Wirimu."
Matthew16:20 Vavo álamulela óhuserya’we ehiléle mutchu wi Yowo ti Kristu.
Matthew16:21 Opacherya vavo Yesu ápacherya wáléla óhuserya’we-- wi onaphwanela wi Yowo aye o Yerusalemu-- wi ahoshiwe sinchipale ti atokwene-- ni alipa‐ephepa atokotoko-- ni alipa‐orepa-- ni wiphiwa-- nave nihiku naneraru-- ovinya’tho wa okhwa."
Matthew16:22 Nave Petro ámkusha Yowo-- apacherya omlopola-- wi-- Vakhale ikharari va Nyuwo-- Apwiya: herwa‐yihihá wa Nyuwo hoe."
Matthew16:23 Nyenya Yowo árukunuwa-- ii wa Petro-- Hawe ochuli waka Satana weyo: wá yokikwachuliha Miyo; ntakhara hamunakhapelela sa Muluku-- nyenya sa atchu."
Matthew16:24 Vavo Yesu áhi wa óhuserya’we-- Mutchu ákhwelaka orwa vachuli vaka-- írohe mekhiye-- akushe mwikimanyo awe-- akitchare Miyo."
Matthew16:25 Vawi yowo anakhwela ovulusha okumi awe anarwa‐ariha: nyenya yowo anariha okumi awe ntakhara a Miyo anarwa‐aphwanya.
Matthew16:26 Vawi mutchu anarwa‐arukunushelani-- ákhela elapo yothene-- ariha okumi awe? akhweya mutchu anarwa‐aveléla sheni yawakakhanyiha ni okumi awe?"
Matthew16:27 Vawi Mwana a mutchu anarwa‐akóka-- mu nchichimiho ra Atithinnya-- vamoha ni angelo awe; nave vavo Yowo anarwa‐akokiherya wa atchu othene-- ntoko miteko aya."
Matthew16:28 Tchiri kinalocha wa nyuwo-- wi arivo akina a yawo enemela vava herwa‐elawiha okhwa tchiri-- ophiyerya eniriaya erwe‐yone Mwana a mutchu arwile mu Omwene awe."
Matthew17:1 Nave vamanle mahiku mathanu na nimoha-- Yesu ákusha Petro-- ni Yakobo-- ni Yohane munnawe-- arowano va mekhaya va mwakoni worekama:"
Matthew17:2 nave Yowo áthatuwa va mithoni vaya: nave withoni wawe wáhárya ntoko nsuwa-- nave sowara sawe sákhala sawéla chwee si wárya."
Matthew17:3 Nave onani-- Mose ni Eliya yáhoneya wa Yawo-- erikimlocha ni Yowo."
Matthew17:4 Nave Petro áhákhula-- ii wa Yesu-- Apwiya-- eri yaphama wa hiyo wi nikhale vava: Mwemyererya kinarwa‐kimaka vava mikotcha miraru; mmoha wa Nyuwo-- ni mmoha wa Mose-- ni mmoha wa Eliya."
Matthew17:5 Vári arikimlocharu-- onani-- néku nawárya náháhuruwela: nave onani-- masu erikimlocha mu nékuni. Ola ti Mwanaka kinasive?-?lanano-- mwa yowo kinnahakalala-- mwiweleleni."
Matthew17:6 Nave óhuserya yíwalaya-- yáthipela iyuchi saya vathi-- yova otokotoko."
Matthew17:7 Nave Yesu árwa-- átannya ii-- Vinyani-- muhóve."
Matthew17:8 Nave yawo yáwelihalaya mitho aya heyámonne mutchu hoe-- nyenya Yesu mekhiye."
Matthew17:9 Nave erikimkhuruwa va mwakoni-- Yesu áhálamulela yawo wi-- Muhiléle mutchu yawoneya eyo-- ophiyerya Mwana a mutchu avinyale wa okhwa."
Matthew17:10 Nave óhuserya’we yámkoha-- elocha-- Nave hai alipa‐orepa enalochaya wi Eliya tánáhole ophiya?"
Matthew17:11 Nave Yowo áhákhula-- ii-- Eliya’tho anarwa-- nave anarwa‐akokiherya itchu sothene."
Matthew17:12 Nyenya kinalocha wa nyuwo-- wi Eliya árwa khalai-- nave yawo heyámsuwenle-- nyenya yámwerela sothene yákhwelaya. Nave hihá’tho Mwana a mutchu anarwa‐ahoshiwa ti yawo."
Matthew17:13 Vavo óhuserya yásuwelasha wi álochano sa Yohane Mbatisi.
Matthew17:14 Nave yawo yárwilaya o mulokoni wa atchu-- váphiya wa Yowo mutchu--"
Matthew17:15 amkokhorela-- ii-- Apwiya-- Morelani mwanaka ikharari; ntakhara anicheliwa echilechile-- óhoshiwa wonanara: vawi annúwela wili wili va moroni-- ni wili wili m’mahini."
Matthew17:16 Nave kámkusherya wa óhuserya’nyu-- nave yawo heyáwenrye ompenusha."
Matthew17:17 Nave Yesu áhákhula ii-- Kha-- atchu óhiroromela ni amarapwa-- kinarwa‐kikhala ni nyuwo elukuluku yawisheni? mumkusherye wa Miyo wino."
Matthew17:18 Nave Yesu ámsamela; nave nsololo nákhuma mwa yowo: nave mmiravo’wo ápenuwa opacherya elukuluku yeyo.
Matthew17:19 Vavo óhuserya yárwa wa Yesu-- ari va mekhiye-- yi-- Manki hiyo haniwenrye okumiha yowo hai?"
Matthew17:20 Nave Yowo álochano-- Ntakhara nroromelo nanyu ti nikhani: vawi tchiri kinalocha wa nyuwo-- Mwakhalano nroromelo si mwámmiso a evai-- munarwa‐mulocha wa mwako’la-- Susa’vo orowe wile; nave onarwa‐osusa; nave hevarwa‐vakhala va nyuwo etchu yohereya."
Matthew17:21 
Matthew17:22 Nave erikimlekela m’Galileya-- Yesu álochano-- Mwana a mutchu anarwa‐aveléliwa m’matani mwa atchu;"
Matthew17:23 nave enarwa‐emwipha-- nave Yowo anarwa‐avinya’tho nihiku naneraru. Nave yawo yáthanana otokotoko."
Matthew17:24 Nave vophiya o Kapernao yale awákhela icharama sa o’mpa eyo ya Muluku yárwa wa Petro-- yi-- Muhusiha’nyu hanaveléla erupiya eyo?"
Matthew17:25 Yowo áhákhula-- Annaveléla. Nave yowo ávolowiliye m’pa-- Yesu ápacherya olochano-- ii-- Simoni-- onupuwela hai? mamwene a vathi vano enákhela mushokho wa wani? wa anamwane aya-- akhweya wa amalapo?"
Matthew17:26 Nave yowo álonchiye-- Wa amalapo-- Yesu álochano-- Ntakhara awe anamwane awo ari anethi."
Matthew17:27 Nyenya wi hiyo nihákwa?-?chulihe yawo-- hawe weyo o’nia-- ovonye nimeso-- orole ehopa yopacherya omesa; nave wáthamiha m’wano mwaya onarwa‐ophwanya’mo erupiya: nkakusha yeyo-- wánnye va muru va weyo ni Miyo."
Matthew18:1 Elukuluku yeyo óhuserya yárwa wa Yesu-- elocha-- Tani ori ópwaha mu Omwene wa Wirimu?"
Matthew18:2 Nave Yesu ítchanniye mwámwana-- ámwemesha véri vaya--"
Matthew18:3 ii-- Tchiri kinalocha wa nyuwo-- mwáhirukunuwa mukhala ntoko asanamwane awo-- hamurwa‐m’volowaru mu Omwene wa Wirimu."
Matthew18:4 Ntakhara awe mutchu yowo aniyeviha mekhiye ntoko mwámwana ola-- yowo ori ópwaha mu Omwene wa Wirimu."
Matthew18:5 Nave yowo anarwa‐ákhela mwámwana mmoha awihiha’la ntakhara a nsina naka-- anákhela Miyo:"
Matthew18:6 nyenya mutchu yowo anarwa‐atchekiha mmoha a asanamwane ala-- óroromela Miyo ori wophwanela wa yowo wi nshilo ntokotoko n’thomeyiwe va’shikoni vawe nave emunélihe yowo vawísha va’nia."
Matthew18:7 Ochilu ori ni elapo ya vathi vano ntakhara a sotchekiha! ntakhara hasiwerya owatelihiwa sotcheka wi sihiye orwa-- nyenya ochilu ori ni mutchu yowo anarwano yotchekiha eyo."
Matthew18:8 Nave ntata ná-- nari nnani ná nótchekiha-- othikile-- orihe: ori waphama wa weyo-- ovolowa mukumini órakala ntata nari nnani-- opwaha wi ovonyiwe m’moroni wa ilukuluku sothene-- ori ni mata meli nari manani meli."
Matthew18:9 Nave nitho ná nótchekiha-- owosole-- orihe: ori waphama wa weyo ovolowa mukumini n’nitho nimoha opwaha ni ovonyiwa m’gehena a moro-- ori ni mitho meli."
Matthew18:10 Weheryani wi muhivevule mmoha a akhani ala; vawi kinalocha wa nyuwo-- wi angelo aya ennaweha oweha woweha withoni wa Atithaka a Wirimu."
Matthew18:11 
Matthew18:12 Nki muni hai? mutchu akhalano ipuchepuche makhumi khumi-- nave enariméla emoha ya iho-- hahiya ihe makhumi mathanu na masheshe ni sowapula saya thanu na sheshe-- arowa o miakoni-- ni wavya yoriméla eyo?"
Matthew18:13 Nave aphwanya-- tchiri kinalocha wa nyuwo-- wi yowo anahakalalela yeyo opwaha ni sa makhumi mathanu na masheshe ni owapula thanu na sheshe iho sohiriméla."
Matthew18:14 Hihá heri yokhwela ya Atithinyu a Wirimu wi mmoha a akhani ala ariméle.
Matthew18:15 Nave khwino munná orimotchekela weyo-- hawe-- omulake va mekhinyu weyo ni yowo: awiwelela weyo-- wómkokiha munná."
Matthew18:16 Nyenya áhiwelela-- achererya okusha ni weyo mukina mmoha akhweya eli-- wi echichimiheryiwe masuá-- vawanoni va anamona eli nari araru."
Matthew18:17 Nave yowo áhiwelela yawo-- oléle Muloko wa Muluku: nave yowo áhiwelela’tho Muloko’wo-- akhale wa weyo ntoko mmalapo ni mulipa‐mushokho."
Matthew18:18 Tchiri kinalocha wa nyuwo-- Sothe sene muniryanyu mmake va elaponi ya vathi vano-- sinarwa‐sikhala soma?-?kiwa Wirimu: nave sothe sene muniryanyu mutaphule va elaponi ya vathi vano-- sinarwa‐sikhala sotaphuliwa Wirimu."
Matthew18:19 Nave’tho kinalocha wa nyuwo wi eli a nyuwo yákhulelana vathi vano etchu yeyo eniryaya eveke-- onarwa‐weriwa wa yawo ti Atithaka a Wirimu."
Matthew18:20 Vawi wiwo ori eli nari araru othukumanela mu nsina naka-- kiri wiwo véri vaya."
Matthew18:21 Vavo Petro árwa-- ii wa yowo-- Apwiya-- munnaka anarwa‐akitchekela ohai-- nave miyo kimkhurumuwele? ophiyerya othanu na wili?"
Matthew18:22 Yesu álochano-- Nkinalocha wa weyo ophiyerya othanu na wili hoe-- nyenya ophiyerya makhumi mathanu na meli wákuleliwa othanu na wili."
Matthew18:23 Ntakhara awe Omwene wa Wirimu onaphwanaphwanihiwa ni mutchu-- mwene-- yowo ákhwenle walakhanyerya ni akapuro awe."
Matthew18:24 Nave ápachenryiye walakhanyerya-- yárwa wa yowo ni mukina mulipa‐opoleya a icharama sa matalente masana makhumi khumi."
Matthew18:25 Nyenya vawi yowo áthowiwa etchu yokokiherya-- pwiya’we álamulela wi yowo atumihiwe-- ni mwariye ni anamwane awe ene-- ni sothe sene áriyeno-- wi yakoki?-?heryiwe yopoleyiwa eyo."
Matthew18:26 Ntakhara awe kapuro’wo ákokhora vathi-- amwepeserya-- ii-- Pwiya-- nkakiweheni toko-- nave sothene kinarwa‐kokokiheryani."
Matthew18:27 Nave pwiya a kapuro’wo áthanana m’murimani-- amtaphula-- amkhurumuwela yopoleyiwa."
Matthew18:28 Nyenya kapuro ola-- ákhumaliye áphwanya mukina a akapuro akhwawe yowo ámpoleiye irupiya sa meya makhumi khumi-- amphara-- amuhinyakerya va’shikoni-- ii-- Kokiherya yele wápoleiyá."
Matthew18:29 Vavo kapuro mukhwawe ola ákokhora vathi-- amveka-- ii-- Nkakiwehe toko-- nave kinarwa‐kokokiherya."
Matthew18:30 Nyenya yowo hákhwenle: nyenya árowa-- amvonya yowo mu kariposo-- ophiyerya akokiherye yopoleyiwa."
Matthew18:31 Ntakhara awe akapuro akhwawe yónilaya saweriwa iho-- yáthanana winchipale-- erwa-- ethoriha wa pwiya’ya sothe sene seriwe."
Matthew18:32 Vavo pwiya’we ámwitchana-- alochano-- Kapuro weyo ónanara-- káhokhurumuwela yopoleyiwa yothene eyo vavale wákivenká:"
Matthew18:33 weyo’tho hokámuthananenle kapuro mukhwá-- ntoko miyo’tho káhóthananela."
Matthew18:34 Nave pwiya’we áshimwa-- amveléla wa alipa‐ohosha-- ophiyerya wi yowo amkokiherye yopoleyiwa yothene eyo."
Matthew18:35 Hihá’tho Atithaka anarwa‐awerelani-- nyuwo mwáhikhurumuwela othene nyu munninyu ni murima’nyu."
Matthew19:1 Nave vári Yesu ámanliye masu yala-- ávinya o Galileya-- arwa o munlanoni wa Yudeya-- okhopela wa Yordano."
Matthew19:2 Nave miloko mitokotoko ya atchu yámtchara; nave Yowo áhápenusha wiwo.
