Matthew19:3 Nave aFarisi yárwa wa Yowo-- emweha-- elocha-- Khwino onnemyereryiwa wi mutchu ahiye mwariye va nthowa nenlo ariyeno?"
Matthew19:4 Nave Yowo áhákhula-- ii-- Hamwálanke wi Yowo ápachunshe atchu vopacherya-- áhápachusha yawo mulopwana ni muthiana--"
Matthew19:5 ii-- Ntakhara a ela mulopwana anarwa ahiya atithinnya ni amannya-- nave anarwa‐aphitana ni mwariye-- nave eli awo enarwa‐ekhala mwíli wa enama mmoha?"
Matthew19:6 wawihihá wi hari’tho eli nyenya mwili wa enama mmoha. Ntakhara awe ela yeyo Muluku áphitannyiye vamoha-- mutchu ahipachule."
Matthew19:7 Yawo yálochano-- Nyenya ntakhara sheni Mose álamulenliye ovaha ekarata yomwalanela-- ni omuhiya?"
Matthew19:8 Yowo álochano-- Ntakhara a wuma murima wanyu-- Mose áwemyereryani ohiya árinyu; nyenya vopacherya hiwákhanle hiha."
Matthew19:9 Nave Miyo kinalocha wa nyuwo-- Mutchu yowo anahiye mwariye-- vohikhala nthowa na oraruwa-- athela mukina-- anamraruwa: nave yowo anathela ohiyiwa owo anamraruwa."
Matthew19:10 Óhuserya yálochano-- Khwino mulachu wa mutchu ni mwariye ori wawihiha-- hori waphama othela."
Matthew19:11 Nyenya Yowo áhiwa yawo-- Othene hewerya wakhela yolocha ela-- nyenya wa yawo evahiwe."
Matthew19:12 Vawi vari atchu ohuliwa-- yawo yáyariwe awihiha mwirukuluni mwa amai aya: nave vari ohuliwa yawo yáhuliwe tatchu: nave vari ohuliwa yawo yíhunle mekhaya-- ntakhara a Omwene wa Wirimu. Yowo anawerya wakhela ela ákhele."
Matthew19:13 Vavo yákushiwa wa Yowo asanamwane-- wi Yowo iyathi mata’we va yawo-- ni ovekela: nyenya óhuserya’wo yáhásamela."
Matthew19:14 Nyenya Yesu áhi-- Hiyani asanamwane-- muháhihe orwa wa Miyo: ntakhara Omwene wa Wirimu ori wa awihihá."
Matthew19:15 Nave Yowo áhiyathi mata’we va yawo-- avinya’vo."
Matthew19:16 Nave onani-- mutchu árwa wa Yesu-- ii-- Muhusiha-- yaphama tivi kiniryaka kere-- wi kikhaleno okumi wohimala?"
Matthew19:17 Nave Yowo álochano-- Onakikoherya sheni sa etchu yaphama? orivo Mmoha ti Yowo aphama; nyenya wákhwelaka ovolowa mukumini-- khapelela malamulo."
Matthew19:18 Yowo álochano-- Awisheni? Nave Yesu áhi-- Ohiphe-- Ohiraruwe-- Ohiye-- Ohere namona awotha--"
Matthew19:19 Chichimiha atithá ni amayá-- nave-- Onarwa‐osivela mukhwá ntoko onisivelelá weyo mwanene."
Matthew19:20 Mmiravo álochano-- Sothene iha kákhapelela-- enakithowa ti sheni’tho?"
Matthew19:21 Yesu ámléla-- Wákhwelaka okhala óphameya-- hawe-- watumihe hiho oriáno-- ovahe atchu óháwa-- nave onarwa‐okhala ni muhakhu Wirimu: nave hanke wino-- okitchare."
Matthew19:22 Nyenya mmiravo’wo víwaliye yolocha eyo-- árowa óthanana: ntakhara árino muhakhu mwinchipale."
Matthew19:23 Nave Yesu áhi wa ohuserya’we-- Tchiri kinalocha wa nyuwo-- wi mutchu mwanene muhakhu anarwa‐avolowa ni wukhuliwa mu Omwene wa Wirimu."
Matthew19:24 Nave’tho kinalocha wa nyuwo-- eri yavakhiviru wi ekamila evire va mulako wa sikano-- wopwaha wi mwanene muhakhu avolowe Omwene wa Wirimu."
Matthew19:25 Nave óhuserya-- yíwalaya-- yátikhina winchipale-- elocha-- Nave tani anáwerye ovuluwa?"
Matthew19:26 Nave Yesu áháweha-- álochano-- Ela eri yohiweryeya ti atchu-- nyenya itchu sothe sene siri soweryeya ti Muluku."
Matthew19:27 Vavo Petro áhákhula-- ii wa Yowo-- Onani-- hiyo náhiya sothene ni otchara Nyuwo; nki vano n’narwa‐nikhala ni sheni?"
Matthew19:28 Nave Yesu álochano-- Tchiri kinalocha wa nyuwo-- wi yenyu mwákitchanre Miyo-- mu oyariwa’tho-- Mwana a mutchu aniriye arwe‐akilathi va munyukhuni mtokotoko wa nchichimiho nawe-- nyuwo’tho munarwa‐mukilathi va minyukhuni mitokotoko khumi na mili-- othoriha maloko khumi na meli a Israyeli."
Matthew19:29 Nave othene yawo yáhiyale ipa-- nari anna-- nari arokora-- nari atithi-- nari amai-- nari anamwane-- nari imacha-- ntakhara a nsina naka-- enarwa‐yakhela sokoki?-?heryiwa sinchipale sene-- nave enarwa‐evolowa okumi wohimala."
Matthew19:30 Nyenya anchipale ópacherya enarwa‐ekhala ókiserya-- nave ókiserya enarwa‐ekhala ópacherya."
Matthew20:1 Vawi Omwene wa Wirimu ori wophwanaphwana ni mutchu mwanene emusi-- yowo ákhumale woshishelo orepela alipa‐muteko m’machani yawe ya mpesa."
Matthew20:2 Nave álakanniye ni alipa‐muteko-- va erupiya ya meya emoha nihiku nimoha-- áhárumiha o’machani wawe."
Matthew20:3 Nave ákhuma nsuwa niwenle-- óna akina yemenle mahala ene va ntchachoni;"
Matthew20:4 nave wa yawo áhi-- Haweni nyuwo’tho m’machani-- nave kinarwa‐kovahani yeyo eri yophwanela. Nave yawo yárowa."
Matthew20:5 Nave’tho ákhuma othana-- nave’tho vothitimana nsuwa-- éra emohamoha."
Matthew20:6 Nave vawachamela oshekuwa ákhuma-- aphwanya akina yemenle; alochano-- Mwemelele sheni wino mahala ene nsuwa nothene?"
Matthew20:7 Yawo yálochano-- Ntakhara hávovo mutchu án’repenle. Yowo álochano-- Haweni nyuwo’tho o’machani iwo wa mpesa."
Matthew20:8 Nave váriaya oshekuwa-- mwanene emacha áhi wa kapitao awe-- Hawe witchane alipa‐muteko-- wavahe yawo olivela waya-- opacherye wa ókutchulela ophiyerya wa ópacherya."
Matthew20:9 Nave yawo órempwa vawachamela oshekuwa várúlaya-- yáhákhela atchu othene erupiya ya meya emoha."
Matthew20:10 Nave ópacherya várúlaya-- yáhányiherya wi enarwa‐yakhela yopwaha-- nave yawo’tho yáhákhela othene erupiya ya meya."
Matthew20:11 Nyenya yawo yákhenlaya-- yárokela wa mwanene emusi--"
Matthew20:12 yi-- Ókutchulela awo yáphara muteko elukuluku tonto nave mwáhálikanyiha yawo ni hiyo návilenle okhulumula wa nsuwa ni oviha waya."
Matthew20:13 Nyenya yowo áhákhula-- ii wa mmoha a yawo-- Mukhwaka-- nkowonke-- weyo hiwálakanne ni miyo va erupiya ya meya emoha?"
Matthew20:14 Kusha yawá-- orowe; ntakhara miyo kinakhwela ovaha wa owo ókutchulela ntoko wa weyo."
Matthew20:15 Honaweryeya wa miyo wera yeyo kinakhwelaka ni saka? Akhweya nitho ná nonanara ntakhara miyo kiri aphama?
Matthew20:16 Hiha ókutchulela enarwa‐ekhala ópacherya-- nave ópacherya enarwa‐ekhala ókutchulela."
Matthew20:17 Nave Yesu arikimuwela o Yerusalemu-- ákusha óhuserya khumi neli va mekhaya-- nave va’phironi álochano--"
Matthew20:18 Onani-- n’nawela o Yerusalemu; nave Mwana a mutchu anarwa‐aveléliwa wa alipa‐ephepa atokotoko ni alipa‐orepa--"
Matthew20:19 nave yawo enarwa‐emuthoriherya wi anaphwanela okhwa-- enarwa‐emveléla wa amalapo wi emurohe ni omuwashula-- ni omuthomeya; nave Yowo anarwa‐avíhiwa nihiku naneraru."
Matthew20:20 Vavo árwa wa Yowo amayaya a anamwane a Zebedayo ni anamwane awe ene-- amkokhorela-- ni oveka etchu wa Yowo."
Matthew20:21 Nave Yowo álochano-- Onakhwela sheni? Yowo álocha-- Lamulelani wi anamwane aka eli yala erwe‐ekhale-- mukina o ntatani nanyu nolopwana-- ni mukina o nothiana-- mu Omwene anyu."
Matthew20:22 Nyenya Yesu áhákhula ii-- Nyuwo hamunasuwela yeyo munavekanyu. Munawerya owuryerya ekahi yeyo kiniriaka kiwuryerye Miyo? Yawo yálochano-- N’nawerya."
Matthew20:23 Yowo álochano-- Ekahi aka munarwa‐muwuryerya tchiri: nyenya okhala o ntatani nolopwana waka-- ni o nothiana-- hori waka ovaha-- nyenya ori wa yawo oryeheryeliwe ti Atithaka."
Matthew20:24 Nave khumi awo yíwalaya-- yásarasareya murima ni anna eli awo."
Matthew20:25 Nyenya Yesu áhísitchanela yawo-- ii-- Munnasuwela wi mamwene a atchu ennisera mekhaya apwiya’ya-- nave atokwene aya ennalapiha."
Matthew20:26 Hevarwa‐vakhala hihá wa nyuwo hoe: nyenya yowo anakhwela okhala mutokwene mwa nyuwo-- anarwa‐akhala namarika‐mahi anyu;"
Matthew20:27 nave yowo anakhwela okhala ópacherya mwa nyuwo-- anarwa‐akhala kapuro anyu:"
Matthew20:28 ntoko’tho Mwana a mutchu hárúle oruméliwa nyenya oruméla-- ni oveléla okumi awe oliva wa atchu anchipale."
Matthew20:29 Nave yawo erikimkhuma m’Yeriko-- muloko mtokotoko wa atchu wámtchara."
Matthew20:30 Nave onani-- atchu évasi eli yákilathi mukhwipi mwa ephiro-- yawo yíwalaya wi Yesu ámvira’vo-- yákhuwela yi-- Munimorele hiyo ikharari-- Nyuwo Mwana a Davide."
Matthew20:31 Nave muloko’wo wáhahíha-- wi emále. Nyenya yákhuwelasha-- elocha-- Apwiya-- munimorele ikharari-- Nyuwo Mwana a Davide."
Matthew20:32 Nave Yesu áhémela-- awitchana-- ii-- Munakhwela kiwereleni sheni?"
Matthew20:33 Yálochano-- Apwiya-- wi mitho ahu yone."
Matthew20:34 Nave Yesu áthanana-- atannya mitho aya: nave vava yáhona’tho-- emutchara."
Matthew21:1 Nave vári yawo yáháchamela o Yerusalemu-- ephiya o Betfage-- o mwakoni wa Azitona-- vavo Yesu árumiha óhuserya eli--"
Matthew21:2 alochano-- Rowani witchokoni yoluluwana ni nyuwo-- nave vavo munarwa‐m’phwanya púru ómakiwa-- ni mwanawe vamoha ni yowo-- taphulani yawo-- murweno wa Miyo."
Matthew21:3 Nave mutchu alocha etchu ni nyuwo-- munarwa‐mwi-- Apwiya ennamuthowa-- nave vavo enárumiha."
Matthew21:4 Nave eyo yáhihihá-- wi yeriwe yolochiwa ti mulipa‐miririmo wi--"
Matthew21:5 Nkaléla ni mwana mwamuthiana a Zioni-- Nkona-- Mweneá anarwa wa weyo-- Awitchachála ni owela va púru-- Ni va mwápúru-- mwana a enama ótesha murichi."
Matthew21:6 Nave óhuserya’wo yárowa-- yera ntoko Yesu álénliye;"
Matthew21:7 ekoka ni puru ni mwanawe-- yiyathi va yowo sowara saya-- akilathi Yowo vavo."
Matthew21:8 Nave anchipale ene a muloko’wo yáhátalela sowara saya va’phironi; nave akina yáheka makukhu a miri-- yátalela m’phironi’mmo."
Matthew21:9 Nave miloko yomhólela ni yotchara-- yákhuwela-- wi-- Hosana wa Mwana a Davide! Órélihiwa ti Yowo anórwa mu nsina na Apwiya! Hosana Wirimu‐rimu!"
Matthew21:10 Nave ávolowiliye mu Yerusalemu etchoko yothene yátchukuruwa-- elocha-- Tani ola?"
Matthew21:11 Nave miloko ya atchu yáhi-- Ola ti mulipa‐miririmo Yesu a o Nazarete a Galileya."
Matthew21:12 Nave Yesu ávolowa o’mpa ya Muluku akumiherya vate othene ótumiha ni óthuma marocha-- apirikisha ihasari sa awakakhanyiha icharama; ni minyukhu ya ótumiha ipompa’wo;"
Matthew21:13 alochano-- Yórepiwa-- Empa’ka enatchuwiwa empa yovekela’mo; nyenya nyuwo mohera nikhuku na alipa‐ohuhula."
Matthew21:14 Nave yárwa wa Yowo o’mpa ya Muluku iwo atchu évasi ni órakala mecho-- nave yápenushiwa."
Matthew21:15 Nyenya alipa‐ephepa atokotoko ni alipa‐orepa-- yónilaya sotikiniha hiho Yowo énriye-- ni anamwane erikimkhuwela o’mpa ya Muluku iwo wi-- Hosana wa Mwana a Davide; yásarasareya murima-- elochano-- Munníwa enalochaya ala?"
Matthew21:16 Nave Yesu álochano-- Ai: hamwálanke-- Muwanoni mwa makwiya ni awámwa mwáthoriherya sochichimiha?"
Matthew21:17 Nave Yowo áháhiya-- akhuma m’muchetcheni-- arowa o Betaniya-- akona wiwo."
Matthew21:18 Nave woshishelo-- Yowo arikimkokela o muchetcheni-- ávoliwa etala."
Matthew21:19 Nave ónniye mukúkhu mmoha va’phironi-- áphiyerya vavo-- aphwanya vahívovo etchu va yowo nyenya makúkhuru; Yowo álochano-- Horwa‐wima’tho mahiku othene. Nave vavo mukúkhu’wo wányála."
Matthew21:20 Nave óhuserya yónnaya ela yátikhina-- yi-- Mukúkhu’wo wáhákuvela sheni onyála?"
Matthew21:21 Nave Yesu áhákhula-- alochano-- Tchiriene kinalocha wa nyuwo-- Mwakhalano nroromelo-- ohikhwa minikwa-- munarwa‐mwera tahi ela ya va mukúkhuru-- nyenya khwino munarwa‐mulocha nari wa mwako’la-- Nkateshiwa-- ovonyiwe mu’nia-- enarwa‐yeriwa."
Matthew21:22 Nave itchu sothe sene munirianyu mukohe mu ovekela-- ni ororomela-- munarwa‐mwakhela."
Matthew21:23 Nave Yowo ávolowiliye o’mpa ya Muluku-- alipa‐ephepa atokotoko ni atokwene a atchu yámurwela arikimhusiha-- elocha-- Munera iha ni olamulelo wawihai? nave tani óvahileni olamulelo wawihiha?"
Matthew21:24 Nave Yesu áhákhula-- alochano-- Miyo’tho kinokohani nsu nimoha-- mwakiléla nenlo-- Miyo’tho kinolélani ni olamulelo wawihai kinerakano iha."
Matthew21:25 Obatiso wa Yohane-- onarwela wowi? Wirimu akhweya wa atchu? Nyenya yawo yákohana mukina ni mukhwawe-- wi-- Nihihá-- Wirimu-- Yowo analocha wa hiyo-- Mwáhiyerye sheni omwiwelela?"
Matthew21:26 Nyenya nihihá-- Wa atchu-- ninnova muloko’wo wa atchu; vawi othene ennamwera Yohane ntoko mulipa‐miririmo."
Matthew21:27 Nave yámwakhula Yesu-- yi-- Han’nasuwela hiyo. Yowo’tho álochano-- Nave’tho Miyo nkolélani ni olamulelo wawihai kinerakano iha."
Matthew21:28 Nyenya munihai nyuwo? Mutchu árino anamwane eli; arwa yowo wa ópacherya ii-- mwana we-- hawe waphare muteko olelo m’machani’mmo mwa mpesa."
Matthew21:29 Nyenya yowo ákhocha-- ii-- Nkinakhwela miyo: nyenya vachuli vaya átcharuwa murima-- arowa."
Matthew21:30 Nave árwa wa mukina owo-- alocha ntoko mummo. Nave yowo áhákhula-- ii-- Kinarowa pwiya: nave hákele’wo."
Matthew21:31 Tani a eli awo énre yokhwela ya atithinnya? Yawo yálocha-- Ópacherya owo. Yesu álochano-- Miyo’tho kinalocha wa nyuwo-- wi alipa‐mushokho ni athiana awóséla ennaholela nyuwo-- ovolowa mu Omwene wa Wirimu."
Matthew21:32 Vawi Yohane áhorwelani mu ephiro yekhaikhai-- nave hemwámwiwelenle: nyenya alipa‐mushokho ni athiana awóséla yámwiwelela: nave nyuwo-- mónnanyu-- hemwá?-?tcharuiye vachuli vaya-- wi m’mwiwelele."
Matthew21:33 Wiryanani niphwanaphwaniho nikina. Vári mutchu-- mwanene emusi-- yowo áhála emacha ya mpesa-- arukuryeryiha ekhuntale-- athipa mummo movochela’mo mpesa-- amaka empa-- apoleyiha wa ólima emacha-- arowa okina."
Matthew21:34 Nave mahiku a sawima yáchamenlaya árumiha akapuro awe wa ólima emacha’le-- wakhela sawima saya."
Matthew21:35 Nave ólima’wo yákusha akapuro awe-- emmana mmoha-- emwipha mukina-- emvonya maluku mukina."
Matthew21:36 Nave’tho yowo árumiha akapuro akina-- awácha opwaha ópacherya’wo; nave yáwerela yawo ntoko mummo."
Matthew21:37 Nyenya vachuli vaya áhárumihela mwanawe-- ii-- Enarwa‐emwerela mwanaka mahala."
Matthew21:38 Nyenya ólima’wo yámonilaya mwana owo-- yálocha mukina ni mukina-- Ola ti mukelampa-- hankeni-- nimwiphe-- nave hiyo n’narwa‐nikusha mikelampa’we."
Matthew21:39 Nave yámkusha-- emriha okhwipi wa emacha-- emwipha."
Matthew21:40 Vano mwanene emacha akonke-- anarwa‐era sheni wa ólima’wo?"
Matthew21:41 Yawo yálochano-- Yowo anarwa‐atolosha wonanara ónanara yawo-- aveléla emacha wa ólima akina-- yawo enarwa‐ekokiherya wa yowo sawima va mahiku aya."
Matthew21:42 Yesu álochano-- Hamwálankeru m’sorepa-- Nluku nenlo yákhochilaya óteka empa Nenla nákhala muru wa munyethe: Ela yárwenle wa Apwiya-- Nave eri yotikiniha m’mithoni mwahu?"
Matthew21:43 Ntakhara awe kinalocha wa nyuwo-- wi Omwene wa Muluku onarwa‐ovíhiwa wa nyuwo-- ovahiwa wa atchu óvaha sawima sawe."
Matthew21:44 Nave yowo awúwa va nluku nla anarwa‐aphweya; nyenya va yowo n’nam’morele-- n’narwa‐nimushila."
Matthew21:45 Nave alipa‐ephepa atokotoko ni aFarisi-- yíwalaya maphwanaphwaniho awe-- yásuwelasha wi analocha sa yawo."
Matthew21:46 Nave yákhwenlaya omphara-- yáhóva miloko ya atchu-- ntakhara yámwera wi ti mulipa‐miririmo."
Matthew22:1 Nave Yesu áhákhula-- úlumano’tho mwa maphwanaphwaniho-- ii--"
Matthew22:2 Omwene wa Wirimu onaphwanaphwana ni mutchu-- mwene-- yowo áryeheryenle mwanawe yólya ya othela--"
Matthew22:3 arumiha akapuro awe-- witchana awitchaniwa wuthelani wiwo: nave yawo heyákhwenle orwa."
Matthew22:4 Vavo’tho árumiha akapuro akina-- alocha-- Lélani awitchaniwa’wo-- Onani-- koryeherya yólya’ka: inyope saka-- ni sonuna kohipha-- ni itchu sothene sohitchwa: rwani wuthelani."
Matthew22:5 Nyenya yawo yáramusa-- evinya-- mukina o’macha wawe; mukina o marochani wawe:"
Matthew22:6 nave óhala’wo yáphara akapuro awe-- ewerela elomwe-- ewipha."
Matthew22:7 Nyenya mwene áshimwa; aruma asurutato awe etolosha alipa‐wipha’le-- yeyela etchoko aya."
Matthew22:8 Vavo álocha wa akapuro awe-- Sa othela hihano sohitchwa-- nyenya awitchaniwa’wo hephwanenle."
Matthew22:9 Ntakhara awe rowani nyuwo o makhulukano a iphiro-- nave yawo muniryanyu mwaphwanye-- itchanelani wuthelani wu."
Matthew22:10 Nave akapuro awo yákhuma o’phironi-- ethukumanya othene yáphwannyaya-- nari ónanara-- nari aphama; nave othela iwo wásareya ni ókhala va sólya."
Matthew22:11 Nyenya mwene owo árúliye-- owona avayólya awo-- áhona mummo mutchu óhiwara yowara ya othela:"
Matthew22:12 alochano-- Mukhwaka we-- wávolowile munno hai óhikhalano yowara ya othela? Nave yowo hárino masu."
Matthew22:13 Vavo mwene áhi wa órummwa-- M’make yowo mata ni mecho-- mvonyeni wipiphini ya vate; wiwo onarwa‐okhala wunla ni okhuriha minno."
Matthew22:14 Vawi awitchaniwa ti anchipale-- nyenya óthanliwa ti awalakhanyeya."
Matthew22:15 Vavo aFarisi yárowa-- evánela momukukuchela mu wuluma wawe."
Matthew22:16 Nave yárumiha wa Yowo óhuserya’ya-- vamoha ni aHerode-- yawo yálonche-- Muhusiha-- ninnasuwela wi muri éparipari-- nave munnahusiha ephiro ya Muluku mweparipari tchiri-- nave hamunathokororya mutchu mukina: vawi hamunaweha withoni wa atchu."
Matthew22:17 Ntakhara awe mun’léle hiyo-- munupuwela sheni?"
Matthew22:18 Onnemyereryiwa ovaha mushokho wa Kaisara-- akhweya hoe? Nyenya Yesu ásuwela onanara waya-- ii-- Munakeherya sheni-- ówoka nyuwo?"
Matthew22:19 Nkakoniheni echarama ya mushokho. Nave yawo yámkusherya erupiya ya meya.
Matthew22:20 Nave Yowo áhi wa yawo-- Ya wani eruku ela-- ni orepa waya?"
Matthew22:21 Elocha yawo-- Ya Kaisara. Vavo Yowo áhi wa yawo-- Ntakhara awe vahani wa Kaisara sawe sa Kaisara-- ni wa Muluku sawe sa Muluku."
Matthew22:22 Nave yawo yíwalaya-- yátikhina-- emuhiya-- evinya’vo."
Matthew22:23 Nihiku nenlo yárwa wa Yesu aSaduki-- enalocha hawívovo ovinya’tho wa okhwa;"
Matthew22:24 emukoha-- elocha-- Muhusiha-- Mose áhi-- Mutchu akhwa-- ohikhala ni mwana-- munnawe mukhani anarwa‐athela mwariye-- amvíherye munnawe epyo."
Matthew22:25 Manki vári ni hiyo anna athanu neli: nave ópacherya áthela-- ariméla óhikhala ni epyo-- ahiya mwariye wa munnawe mukhani;"
Matthew22:26 emohamoha anawili-- ni aneraru-- ophiyerya anethanu n’nawili."
Matthew22:27 Nave vokutchulela áriméla’tho muthiana owo.
Matthew22:28 Ntakhara awe muvinya’tho anarwa‐akhala mwara a wani a athanu neli awo? vawi othene yákhalano.
Matthew22:29 Nyenya Yesu áhákhula-- ii wa yawo-- Murimtcheka ohisuwela sorepiwa-- nari ikuru sa Muluku."
Matthew22:30 Vawi muvinya’tho wa okhwa henathela-- nari henatheliwa-- nyenya enakhala ntoko angelo a Wirimu."
Matthew22:31 Nyenya sa ovinya wa okhwa-- hemwálanke yeyo yálochiwe wa nyuwo ti Muluku-- alocha--"
Matthew22:32 Miyo kiri Muluku a Abrahamu-- ni Muluku a Isake-- ni Muluku a Yakobo?"
Matthew22:33 Hari Muluku a alipa‐okhwa nyenya a akumi. Nave miloko ya atchu yíwalaya-- yátikhina ni ohusiha wawe."
Matthew22:34 Nyenya aFarisi-- yíwalaya wi ámáliha aSaduki-- yámthukumanela."
Matthew22:35 Nave mmoha a yawo-- muhusiha a malamulo-- ámkoha ni omweha ii--"
Matthew22:36 Muhusiha-- nlamulo ntokotoko ti nivi na m’malamulo?"
Matthew22:37 Nave Yesu áhi wa Yowo-- Onarwa‐osivelana ni Apwiya Mulukuá ni murimá wothene-- nave ni okumiá wothene-- nave ni mirikuá yothene."
Matthew22:38 Nla n’ri nlamulo ntokotoko n’nopacherya.
Matthew22:39 Nave nanawili nolikanano tinla-- Onarwa‐osivela mukhwá ntoko onirá wisivela mwanene mekhá."
Matthew22:40 Va malamulo ala meli ti vothomeya malamulo othene ni alipa‐miririmo.
Matthew22:41 Nave aFarisi yáthukumannaya-- Yesu áhákoha--"
Matthew22:42 ii-- munupuwela hai sa Kristu? ori mwana a wani? Yawo yálochano-- A Davide."
Matthew22:43 Yowo áhi wa yawo-- Nave Davide m’munepa anamuromolela sheni Yowo-- Apwiya-- alocha--"
Matthew22:44 Apwiya álocha wa Apwiyaka-- Okhale va ntatani naka nolopwana-- Ophiyerya Miyo kinarwa‐kiyathi amwichaniá vathi va mananiá."
Matthew22:45 Ntakhara awe Davide ámuromola Yowo Pwiya-- hai oriye mwanawe?"
Matthew22:46 Nave hárivovo mmoha áwenrye omwakhula masu. Nave hálipale murima mutchu mukina omkoha etchu opacherya nihiku nenlo.
Matthew23:1 Vavo Yesu áhuluma ni miloko ya atchu ni óhuserya’we--"
Matthew23:2 alocha-- Alipa‐orepa ni aFarisi enakilathi va munyukhuni wa Mose;"
Matthew23:3 ntakhara awe itchu sothe sene eniryaya yoléleni-- erani nave mukhapelele: nyenya muhere ntoko miteko aya; vawi yawo ennuluma-- nave henera."
Matthew23:4 Ahe-- ennamaka mirichi yolimela ni yohosha votesha-- ereya va makhatani a atchu; nyenya yawo anene mekhaya henakhwela osusa yeyo ni munwe aya."
Matthew23:5 Nyenya ennera miteko yothene wi yoneye wa atchu: vawi enunnuwiha oruku aya wa ihasiri saya--"
Matthew23:6 yunnuwiha maroso-- nave ennasivela mapuro a mahala va sólya ni minyukhu ya mahala mothukumanela--"
Matthew23:7 ni mirechele m’matchachoni-- ni witchaniwa ti atchu-- Rabi."
Matthew23:8 Nyenya nyuwo muhitchaniwe-- Rabi; vawi muhusihanyu ori mmoha-- nave nyuwo othene muri anna."
Matthew23:9 Nave nyuwo muhiromole mukina atithinyu vathi vano-- vawi orivo mmoha ti Atithinyu a Wirimu."
Matthew23:10 Nave muhitchaniwe muhóli-- vawi orivo mmoha Muhóli anyu-- ti Kristu."
Matthew23:11 Nyenya mtokotoko ópwaha a nyuwo anarwa‐akhala namarika‐mahi anyu.
Matthew23:12 Nave yowo anarwa‐ísinnuwiha mwanene mekhiye anarwa‐ayevihiwa; nyenya yowo aniyeviha mwanene mekhiye anarwa‐annuwihiwa.
Matthew23:13 Nyenya ochilu wa nyuwo-- alipa‐orepa ni aFarisi-- ówoka! ntakhara munawalela Omwene wa Wirimu withoni wa atchu: vawi nyuwo mekhinyu hamunavolowa’mo-- nave munnahíha yawo enavolowa wi ehivolowe’mo."
Matthew23:14 
Matthew23:15 Ochilu wa nyuwo alipa‐orepa ni aFarisi-- Ówoka! ntakhara munaviravira o’nia ni o mokoni wera mutchu mmoha mulipa‐orukunuwa; nave aniriye akhale awihiha-- munnamwera yowo mwana a gehena opwaha nyuwo wili."
Matthew23:16 Ochilu wa nyuwo ahóli évasi-- yenyu munalocha-- Yowo analupele oromola va empa ya Muluku-- hemwaha; nyenya yowo analupele oromola va mivira ya empa ya Muluku-- ori ótcheka."
Matthew23:17 Nyuwo ólosowa-- ni évasi: vawi tivi eri yopwaha-- khwino mivira-- akhweya empa ya Muluku yeyo enéliha mivira eyo?"
Matthew23:18 Nave’tho-- Yowo analupele oromola vohelavo iphepa-- hemwaha; nyenya yowo analupele oromola va yamahala ya vasulu vavo-- ori ótcheka."
Matthew23:19 Nyuwo évasi-- vawi tivi eri yopwaha yamahala khwino-- akhweya vohelavo iphepa vavo vanéliha yamahala eyo?"
Matthew23:20 Ntakhara awe ólupela oromola vohelavo iphepa-- analupela va yeyo ni va sothene sa vasulu vaya."
Matthew23:21 Nave ólupela oromola va empa ya Muluku-- analupela va yeyo ni va Yowo ókhala mummo."
Matthew23:22 Nave ólupela oromola Wirimu-- analupela va munyukhu mtokotoko wa Muluku-- ni va Yowo ókhala vavo."
Matthew23:23 Ochilu wa nyuwo-- alipa‐orepa ni aFarisi-- ówoka! ntakhara munaveléla yanekhumi ya mmiso wawunkhela-- ni ya lókho-- ni ya muhakwa-- nave munahiya solimela sa malamulo-- ti othoriha wekhaikhai-- ni omorela ikharari-- ni nroromelo: nyenya ihe mwáphwanela wera-- ohihiya iha sene."
Matthew23:24 Ahóli évasi nyuwo-- ohukula ichechema-- nyenya ekamila munnamirya."
Matthew23:25 Ochilu wa nyuwo-- alipa‐orepa ni aFarisi-- ówoka! ntakhara munarapiha vate vaya va ekahi ni eparatho-- nyenya m’puwa’mmo yawo ennasareya ni wákha ni ohíványa."
Matthew23:26 MFarisi weyo-- évasi-- nkapacherya orapiha mpuwa mwa ekahi ni eparatho-- wi vate vaya’tho vakhale vawéla."
Matthew23:27 Ochilu wa nyuwo-- alipa‐orepa ni aFarisi-- ówoka! ntakhara munaphwanaphwana ntoko mahiye awuruleliwa ni kache awéla-- yewo anoneya orera vate vaya-- enasareya mpuwa’mmo ni makhuva a atchu ókhwa ni sotakhala sothe sene."
Matthew23:28 Hihá nyuwo’tho munoneya ékhaikhai va mithoni va atchu-- nyenya mpuwa muri ósareya ni owoka ni ohiléleya."
Matthew23:29 Ochilu wa nyuwo-- alipa‐orepa ni aFarisi-- ówoka! ntakhara munamaka ipa sa va mahiyeni a alipa‐miririmo-- nave munaryeherya mahiye a atchu ékhaikhai--"
Matthew23:30 ni wi-- Hiyo nakhanleke m’mahiku a makholo ahu-- hanikakhanle akhwaya a nikhami na alipa‐miririmo."
Matthew23:31 Vavo munnichichimiherya mekhinyu-- wi muri anamwane a yawo yíphale alipa‐miririmo."
Matthew23:32 Sariheryani nyuwo mweryo wa makholo anyu.
Matthew23:33 Inowa nyuwo-- anamwane nyu a namarawe-- munarwa‐muwerya hai otchawa olaka waya wa gehena?"
Matthew23:34 Ntakhara a ela-- onani-- kinaruma wa nyuwo alipa‐miririmo-- ni alipa‐miruku-- ni alipa‐orepa: akina a yawo munarwa‐muwipha-- mwathomeya; ni akina a yawo munarwa‐mwawashula mothukumanela mwanyu-- ni wahosha-- orwela witchokoni emoha-- ophiyerya witchokoni ekina:"
Matthew23:35 wawihiha wi n’rwe‐niphiye va nyuwo nikhami nothene-- noyehiwa velaponi ya vathi vano-- opacherya o nikhamini na Abele ékhaikhai owo-- ophiyerya o nikhamini na Zakariya mwana a Barakiya-- yowo mwámwiphalanyu véri va empa ya Muluku ni vohelavo iphepa vawe."
Matthew23:36 Tchiri kinalocha wa nyuwo-- Itchu sothene iha sinarwa‐siphiya va atchu ala a mutano."
Matthew23:37 Kha-- Yerusalemu-- Yerusalemu-- yowo anipha alipa‐miririmo-- ni ovonyerya maluku yawo órummwa wa yowo! ohai kinatchunaka miyo othukumanya vamoha anamwaneá-- ahe ntoko mwanakhu annathukumanya asanawe m’makuphelo awe-- nyenya nyuwo hemwákhwenle hoe!"
Matthew23:38 Onani-- empanyu yohiyiwa wa nyuwo ya milepe."
Matthew23:39 Vawi kinalocha wa nyuwo-- Hamurwa‐mukóna Miyo’tho-- opacherya hihano-- ophiyerya nyuwo munarwa‐mulocha. Órélihiwa ori Yowo anarwa mu nsina na Apwiya."
Matthew24:1 Nave Yesu ákhuma o m’pa ya Muluku; nave óhuserya’we yárwa omoniha matekelo a empa ya Muluku eyo.
Matthew24:2 Nyenya Yowo áhákhula ii wa yawo-- Hamunona iha sothene? Tchiri kinalocha wa nyuwo-- hevarwa‐vakhala wino nluku nimoha va nikhwaya-- nenlo han’rwa‐nimorihiwa."
Matthew24:3 Nave Yowo ákilanthiye-- va mwakoni wa Azitona-- óhuserya yámurwela va mekhiye-- elocha-- Mun’léle hiyo iho sinarwa‐sikhala lini? nave eneneryo ya ophiya wanyu ti sheni-- ni makutchuwelo a mahiku a vathi vano?"
Matthew24:4 Nave Yesu áhákhula ii wa yawo-- Weheryani-- ahohuweliheni mutchu."
Matthew24:5 Vawi anchipale enarwa‐ephiya mu nsina naka-- elocha-- Miyo ká Kristu-- nave enarwa‐yahuweliha atchu anchipale."
Matthew24:6 Nyenya nyuwo munarwa‐m’pacherya wiwa sa ekhocho-- ni ovuwa wa ekhocho: onani-- muhipe murima: vawi ori wophwanela wi iha sikhale; nyenya okutchuwa hophiyale."
Matthew24:7 Vawi nloko nimoha na atchu n’narwa‐n’roshana ni nloko nikina-- ni omwene ni omwene mukina; nave onarwa‐okhala etala ni ochikinyeya m’mapuro ori ori."
Matthew24:8 Nyenya sothene iha sinapacheryerya sososa.
Matthew24:9 Vavo enarwa‐yovelélani wuhoshiwani-- ewiphani: nave nyuwo munarwa‐mukhala awichiwa ti atchu a maloko othene-- ntakhara a nsina naka."
Matthew24:10 Nave vavo anchipale enarwa‐ekwachuliwa-- evelélana mukina ni mukhwawe-- yichana mukina ni mukhwawe."
Matthew24:11 Nave alipa‐miririmo ówoka anchipale enarwa evinya-- ehuweliha anchipale."
Matthew24:12 Nave ntakhara a wachasha wa óhiléleya-- osivelana wa atchu anchipale onarwa‐olala."
Matthew24:13 Nyenya yowo ólipiha wolipiha ophiyerya o makutchuwelo-- yowo anarwa‐avuluwa."
Matthew24:14 Nave mitchaka eyo ya Omwene enarwa‐elaleyeryiwa velaponi yothene ya vathi vano-- ekhale namona wa atchu a maloko othene; nave vavo enarwa‐ephiya makutchuwelo."
Matthew24:15 Ntakhara awe mwarwa‐mona yotakhala yotolosha elapo-- yeyo yálochiwe ti Danieli mulipa‐miririmo-- yemenle mu nipuroni nawéla (yowo álakhannye m’karatani asuwelashe:)"
Matthew24:16 vavo yawo ari m’Yudeya etchawele o miakoni:
Matthew24:17 yowo ori vasulu va nipatho ahikhuruwe otesha sa m’pa mwawe;
Matthew24:18 ni yowo a m’machani ahikoke okusha yawikhunela’we.
Matthew24:19 Nyenya ochilu akhalano yawo órupala-- ni awamwiha anamwane m’mahiku yawo!"
Matthew24:20 Nave vekelani wi otchawa wanyu ohikhale va mahiku a nakhutu-- nari va Sabata:"
Matthew24:21 vawi vavo vanarwa‐vakhala sohoshasha-- ntoko hevakhanle sawihihá-- opacherya elapo yápachenryaya-- ophiyerya hihano-- ahe nave hevarwa‐vakhala’tho."
Matthew24:22 Nave yaháhiyaleke okhuvihiwa mahiku ala-- hakávulushiwe mutchu mmoha: nyenya ntakhara a óthanliwa’wo mahiku yawo yákhuvihiwa."
Matthew24:23 Vavo mutchu alocha wa nyuwo-- Onani-- Kristu ori wino-- nari iwo-- muhimwakhulele;"
Matthew24:24 ntakhara aKristu ówoka enarwa‐evinya-- ni alipa‐miririmo ówoka-- enarwa‐yoniha ineneryo sitokotoko ni sotikiniha; wawihihá wi yawoke-- khwino onakhala woweryeya-- óthanliwa’wo."
Matthew24:25 Onani kiholélani khuluwi vahiphiyale.
Matthew24:26 Ntakhara awe yalocha wa nyuwo-- Onani-- Yowo ori m’takhwani; muhiye’wo. Onani-- ori m’pa; muhákhulele."
Matthew24:27 Vawi ntoko etari enarwela wiwo onakhuma nsuwa-- yoneya ophiyerya wiwo onanéla nsuwa; wawihihá onarwa‐okhala’tho ophiya wawe wa Mwana a mutchu."
Matthew24:28 Wiwo wothe wene ori murutchu-- marepo enathukumanela wiwo."
Matthew24:29 Nave vavo-- sivinre sohosha sa mahiku yawo-- nsuwa n’narwa‐nrípihiwa-- nave mweri horwa‐woniha omwaléla waya-- ni itheneri sinarwa‐simora-- orwela wirimu-- ni ikuru sa wirimu sinarwa‐sichikinyeya:"
Matthew24:30 nave vavo vanarwa‐voneya mwirimuni-- eneneryo ya Mwana a mutchu: nave maloko othene a velaponi ya vathi vano enarwa‐yisukutcha va nákhopeni-- yona Mwana a mutchu arikimórwa va mekuni a wirimu-- ni ikuru ni nchichimiho ntokotoko."
Matthew24:31 Nave Yowo anarwa‐arumiha angelo awe ni oruma otokotoko wa nipeka. Nave yawo enarwa‐ethukumanya óthanliwa awe witchekuni sheshe-- o makutchuwelo a erimu ophiyerya makutchuwelo aya makina."
Matthew24:32 Nyenya huseryani ni mukúkhu niphwanaphwaniho naya; vári hihano murai aya ori waphovo-- ophuwa makukhu aya-- munnasuwela wi eyita yohachamela; hiha’tho nyuwo--"
Matthew24:33 mwarwa‐mona hiho-- suwelashani wi Yowo ori vakhiviru-- ahe va milakoni."
Matthew24:34 Tchiri kinalocha wa nyuwo-- Atchu ala herwa‐ekutchuwa-- ophiyerya itchu sothene iha seriwe."
Matthew24:35 Erimu ni elapo ya vathi sinarwa‐sivinya’vo-- nyenya masu aka herwa‐evinya’vo hoe."
Matthew24:36 Nyenya sa nihiku nla ni elukuluku aya hanasuwela mutchu mukina-- nari angelo a Wirimu-- nari Mwana-- nyenya Atithi mekhaya."
Matthew24:37 Nave ntoko mahiku a Nowa-- wawihihá onarwa‐okhala ophiya wawe wa Mwana a mutchu."
Matthew24:38 Vawi ntoko m’mahiku yale-- ehiphiyale mahi-- atchu yámólya ni owurya-- yámthela ni otheliwa-- ophiyerya nihiku nenlo Nowa ávolowiliye m’mwacheyani’mmo--"
Matthew24:39 nave yawo heyásuwenle etchu-- ophiyerya mahi yárúlaya-- etolosha yawo othene-- wawihihá onarwa‐okhala ophiya wawe wa Mwana a mutchu."
Matthew24:40 Vavo enarwa‐ekhala eli m’machani; mmoha anarwa‐akushiwa-- ni mmoha anarwa‐ahiyiwa:"
Matthew24:41 eli enarwa‐ekhala óshila va’shiloni; mmoha anarwa‐akushiwa-- ni mmoha anarwa‐ahiyiwa."
Matthew24:42 Ntakhara awe lipelelani-- vawi hamunasuwela nihiku naya nophiya Apwiya anyu."
Matthew24:43 Nyenya suwelani ela-- wi mwanene empa ásuwenleke elukuluku tani mulipa‐wiya aniriye arwe-- yowo akáshisha-- nave hakémyerenrye wi vakhuvuliwe va’mpa vawe."
Matthew24:44 Ntakhara awe khalani nyuwo’tho awiryeherya; ntakhara mu elukuluku yeyo muhinupuwelanyu-- Mwana a mutchu anarwa."
Matthew24:45 Tani ori kapuro óroromeleya-- yowo pwiya’we ámkilathihaliye óweherya va nloko nawe-- wavaha sólya va elukuluku yaphama?"
Matthew24:46 A’kari kapuro’wo yowo pwiya’we-- vophiya-- anarwa‐amphwanya éraka yawihiha."
Matthew24:47 Tchiri-- kinalocha wa nyuwo-- wi anarwa‐amkilathiha yowo óweherya itchu sawe sothene."
Matthew24:48 Nyenya kapuro’wo ónanara alocha m’murimani mwawe-- Pwiya’ka annalekelasha;"
Matthew24:49 apacherya omana akapuro akhwawe-- alya ni owurya vamoha ni óhapaliwa;"
Matthew25:1 Vavo Omwene wa Wirimu onarwa‐ophwanaphwanihiwa ni asimwali khumi-- yawo yákunshe mithuko aya-- ekhuma okumana ni mulipa‐othela."
Matthew25:2 Nave athanu a yawo yári ólosowa-- ni athanu yári ówarála."
Matthew25:3 Vawi ólosowa’wo-- yákushalaya mithuko aya-- hayikushe?-?nryeno makhurwa:"
Matthew25:4 nyenya a miruku awo yákusha makhurwa mu itchupa saya-- vamoha ni mithuko aya."
Matthew25:5 Nave mulipa‐othela ásheleliwiye-- othene awo yáhoséla-- erupa."
Matthew25:6 Nyenya ohiyu eriyari vári okhuwela-- Onani-- mulipa‐othela! khumani okumanano."
Matthew25:7 Vavo yávinya asimwali othene ala-- eryeherya mithuko aya."
Matthew25:8 Nave ólosowa yáhi wa ówarála-- Nivaheni makhurwa’nyu makina; ntakhara mithuko ahu enamshipha."
Matthew25:9 Nyenya ówarála yáhákhula yi-- Akhweya enirimhikhwanela wa hiyo ni nyuwo: nyenya tchiriene rowani wa alipa‐otumiha marocha-- nave mwithumele mekhinyu."
Matthew25:10 Nave yawo erikimrowa othuma-- mulipa‐othela áphiya; nave óryeheryeya’wo yávolowano vamoha muthelani: nave áwala va milakoni."
Matthew25:11 Nyenya vachuli vaya yárwa’tho asimwali akina’wo-- yi-- Pwiya-- Pwiya-- munihulele hiyo."
Matthew25:12 Nyenya yowo áhákhula-- ii-- Tchiri kinalocha wa nyuwo-- nkinosuwelani nyuwo."
Matthew25:13 Ntakhara awe shishani-- vawi hamunasuwela nihiku naya-- nari elukuluku aya."
Matthew25:14 Vawi ntoko mutchu-- órowa o mukwahani-- áhítchana akapuro awe-- aveléla wa yawo muhakhu awe."
Matthew25:15 Nave wa mmoha ávaha icharama sa matalente thanu-- ni wa mukina pili-- ni wa mukina emoha; wa yawo othene ntoko miruku aya; arowa yowo."
Matthew25:16 Vavo yowo ákhenle icharama thanu-- árowa othuma marocha-- áchererya’vo icharama sikina thanu."
Matthew25:17 Emohamoha’tho owo a pili iho-- áháchererya sikina pili."
Matthew25:18 Nyenya yowo ákhenle emoha owo árowa-- akacha vathi-- avitha echarama ya pwiyawe."
Matthew25:19 Nave valekenle winchipale-- ákoka pwiya a akapuro awo-- álakhanyeryano vamoha."
Matthew25:20 Nave yowo ákhenle icharama sa matalente thanu árwa-- arino icharama sikina thanu-- alocha-- Pwiya-- mwákivaha icharama sa matalente thanu-- onani kiháchererya’vo icharama sikina thanu."
Matthew25:21 Pwiya’we áhi wa yowo-- Yaphama-- kapuro weyo aphama ni óroromeleya; wári óroromeleya ni itchu sikhani-- kinakilathiha weyo va itchu sinchipale: volowa weyo wuhakalalani wa pwiyá."
Matthew25:22 Nave owo’tho a icharama pili árwa-- ii-- Pwiya-- mwákivaha miyo icharama pili; onani-- kiháchererya’vo icharama sikina pili."
Matthew25:23 Pwiya’we áhi wa yowo-- Yaphama kapuro weyo aphama ni óroromeleya; wári óroromeleya ni itchu sikhani-- kinakilathiha weyo va itchu sinchipale: volowa weyo wuhakalalani wa pwiyá."
Matthew25:24 Nave yowo’tho ákhenle echarama emoha-- árwa-- ii-- Pwiya kihosuwelani nyuwo wi muri mutchu awuma-- ókakatcha wiwo mwahámisalanyu’wo-- ni óthukumanya wiwo mwaháverenlanyu’wo:"
Matthew25:25 kihóva miyo-- korowa-- kivitha vathi echarama’nyu: onani-- murino yawinyu."
Matthew25:26 Nyenya pwiya’we áhákhula-- ii wa yowo-- Kapuro weyo ónanara ni óyere-- wásuwela wi kinakakatcha wiwo kaháminsaka’wo--"
Matthew25:27 ni othukumanya wiwo kahávere?-?nlaka’wo-- ntakhara awe wáphwanela-- wi okáveléla icharama saka wa ópoleyiha icharama-- nave miyo vokóka nkákusha saka ni yawachererya’ya."
Matthew25:28 Ntakhara awe víhani wa yowo echarama eyo-- m’vahe wa owo orino icharama khumi."
Matthew25:29 Vawi wa yowo orino-- enarwa‐evahiwa-- nave yowo anarwa‐akhalano sawácha: nyenya wa yowo ahínono-- enarwa‐evíhiwa-- nari yeyo áriyeno."
Matthew25:30 Nave vonyani kapuro’wo a’theru wipiphini ya vate; wiwo onarwa‐okhala wunla ni okhuriha minno.
Matthew25:31 Nyenya Mwana a mutchu aniriye arwe mu nchichimiho nawe-- vamoha ni angelo othene-- vavo Yowo anarwa‐akilathi va munyukhuni mtokotoko wa wárya wawe:"
Matthew25:32 nave enarwa‐ethukumana va mithoni vawe atchu a miloko yothene: nave Yowo anarwa‐amwa?-?lanyiha yawo mukina ni mukina-- ntoko mukukhula anamwalanyihiye ipuchepuche ni ipuri:"
Matthew25:33 anarwa‐emesha ipuchepuche o ntatani nawe nolopwana-- nyenya ipuri o nothiana."
Matthew25:34 Vavo Mwene owo anarwa‐alocha wa yawo o ntatani nawe nolopwana-- Rwani wino nyuwo órélihiwa a Atithaka-- volowani mu Omweneni woryeheryiwa wa nyuwo va opacherya waya wa elapo ya vathi:"
Matthew25:35 vawi kávoliwa etala-- nave mwákivaha Miyo olya; kávoliwa ntchanana-- nave mwákiwuryiha Miyo; kári mulecho-- nave mwákakhela Miyo;"
Matthew25:36 epwitikiri Miyo-- nave mwákiwariha; káhicheliwa-- nave mwárwa warerya ni Miyo; kári mu kariposo-- nave mwárwa wa Miyo."
Matthew25:37 Vavo ékhaikhai enarwa‐emwakhula Yowo wi-- Apwiya-- náwonneni Nyuwo lini a’tala-- nave hiyo náhólyihani? nari antchanana-- nave hiyo náhówuryihani?"
Matthew25:38 Nave náwonneni Nyuwo lini mulecho-- nave náwákhelani-- nari epwitikiri-- nave náhowarihani?"
Matthew25:39 Nave náwonneni Nyuwo lini awicheliwa-- nari mu kariposo-- nave nárwa wa Nyuwo?"
Matthew25:40 Nave Mwene owo anarwa‐ákhula ii wa yawo-- Tchiri kinalocha wa nyuwo-- Ntakhara mwáherela mmoha a annaka-- nari akhanikhani ala-- mwákerenle yeyo Miyo."
Matthew25:41 Vavo Yowo anarwa‐alocha wa yawo o ntatani nothiana-- Vinyani wa Miyo awulumeliwa nyuwo-- o moroni wa ilukuluku sothene wawiseleliwa Musaserya ni arummwa’we:"
Matthew25:42 vawi kávoliwa etala-- nave hemwákivahile Miyo olya: kávoliwa ntchanana-- nave hemwákiwuryihale Miyo:"
Matthew25:43 kári mulecho-- nave hemwákákhenle Miyo: epwitikiri nave hemwákiwarihale Miyo: awicheliwa-- ni mu kariposo-- nave nyuwo hemwárúle warerya ni Miyo."
Matthew25:44 Vavo enarwa‐yakhula yawo’tho-- wi-- Apwiya-- náwonneni nyuwo lini a’tala-- nari antchanana-- nari mulecho-- nari epwitikiri-- nari mu kariposo-- nave hiyo hanóruménleni Nyuwo."
Matthew25:45 Vavo Yowo anarwa‐awakhula yawo wi-- Tchiri kinalocha wa nyuwo-- Ntakhara hamwérenle yeyo mmoha a ala akhanikhani-- hemwákerenle yeyo Miyo."
Matthew25:46 Nave yala enarwa‐eya wulakiwani wa mahiku othene; nyenya ékhaikhai wukumini wa mahiku othene.
Matthew26:1 Nave vári Yesu ámanliye masu othene yala-- áhi wa óhuserya’we--"
Matthew26:2 Munnasuwela wi vokona mahiku meli Paskha anaphiya-- nave Mwana a mutchu anirimveléliwa othomeyiwa va mwikimanyo."
Matthew26:3 Vavo yáthukumana alipa‐ephepa atokotoko-- ni atokwene a atchu-- o ntchachoni na mutokwene a ephepa-- nsina nawe Kayafa;"
Matthew26:4 evánela wi emphare Yesu ni owoka-- emwiphe."
Matthew26:5 Nyenya yálocha-- Va nihiku na yólya eyo hoe-- wi vahikhale onyakula wa atchu."
Matthew26:6 Nave Yesu áriye m’Betaniya-- m’pa mwa Simoni a marecha--"
Matthew26:7 árwa wa Yowo muthiana-- arino etchupa ya alabastero ya makhurwa awunkhela phama a esisapo yorekama-- amínela va muruni vawe-- Yowo arikimkilathi va yólya."
Matthew26:8 Nyenya óhuserya yónilaya-- yáhipa murima-- elocha-- Ntakhara sheni opahula wiwo?"
Matthew26:9 Vawi makhurwa’la ekátumihiwa ni icharama sinchipale-- sivahiwa atchu óhawa."
Matthew26:10 Nyenya Yesu ásuwenliye áhi wa yawo-- Munerela sheni sawukhula wa muthiana owo? vawi ákérela Miyo muteko waphama."
Matthew26:11 Ntakhara mahiku othene murino óhawa vamoha ni nyuwo; nyenya hamuri ni Miyo mahiku othene.
Matthew26:12 Vawi muthiana owo-- áhenliye makhurwa’la va mwílini vaka-- ákerela ela ovithiwa waka."
Matthew26:13 Tchiri kinalocha wa nyuwo-- Wothe wene mitchaka yaphama eniryaya elaleyeryiwe mwilaponi yothene ya vathi vano-- ela yeyo muthiana owo énriye enarwa‐yulumiwa’tho-- yomupuwelano yawe."
Matthew26:14 Vavo mmoha a khumi neli awo-- nsina nawe Yudase Isikariote-- árowa wa alipa‐ephepa atokotoko-- ii-- Munakhwela okivaha sheni-- nave miyo kinarwa‐kimveléla Yowo wa nyuwo?"
Matthew26:15 Nave yawo yámwálakhanyerya yowo icharama sawéla makhumi mararu.
Matthew26:16 Nave opacherya vavo yowo áhavyavya elukuluku yaphama yawi amveléle Yowo.
Matthew26:17 Nave nihiku nopacherya na epau yohikhala ni yoruruvaliha-- óhuserya yárwa wa Yesu-- yi-- Ti wowi munakhwelanyu naryeherye Paskha wi mwalye?"
Matthew26:18 Álocha Yowo-- Rowani o muchetcheni wa mutchu neshe-- mwaloche wa yowo-- Muhusiha ani-- Elukuluku aka ennáchamela; kinarwa‐kilya Paskha owannyu vamoha ni óhuserya’ka."
Matthew26:19 Nave óhuserya yáhéra ntoko énriye wáléla-- eryeherya Paskha."
Matthew26:20 Nave vophiya oshekuwa-- Yowo ámkilathi va yólya vamoha ni óhuserya khumi neli;"
Matthew26:21 Nave erikimólya-- Yowo áhi-- Tchiri kinalocha wa nyuwo-- mmoha a nyuwo anarwa‐akiveléla Miyo."
Matthew26:22 Nave yawo yáthanana otokotoko-- epacherya olochano mmoha mmoha-- Khwino ti miva nki-- Apwiya?"
Matthew26:23 Nave Yowo áhákhula ii-- Yowo anaryerya vamoha ni Miyo ntata nawe m’parathoni-- yola anarwa‐akiveléla Miyo."
Matthew26:24 Mwana a mutchu anarowaru-- ntoko wárepiwa sa Yowo; nyenya ochilu orino mutchu yowo anamveléle Mwana a mutchu! okákhala phama wa mutchu yowo aháyariweke."
Matthew26:25 Nave Yudase-- omveléla owo áhákhula ii-- Khwino ti miva nki-- Rabi? Yowo alochano-- Weyo wohihihá."
Matthew26:26 Nave yawo erikimólya-- Yesu ákusha epau-- aréliha-- ameya; nave ávahiliye wa óhuserya-- áhi-- Kushani-- lyani; ela ti mwíli aka."
Matthew26:27 Nave ákunshiye ekahi-- áthamalela-- avaha wa yawo-- alocha-- Muwurye ela nyuwo othene--"
Matthew26:28 vawi ela ti nikhami naka na olakana-- noheliwa ntakhara a atchu anchipale ovíha’vo sotcheka."
Matthew26:29 Nave kinalocha wa nyuwo-- nkirwa‐kiwurya’tho yawima ela ya mpesa-- ophiyerya nihiku nenlo kiniriaka kirwe‐kiwurye eyo yahihano-- vamoha ni nyuwo-- mu Omwene wa Atithaka."
Matthew26:30 Nave yípale ntchipo-- yákhuma oya o mwakoni wa Azitona."
Matthew26:31 Vavo Yesu álochano-- Nyuwo othene munarwa‐mukwachuliwa ntakhara a Miyo-- ohiyu yola: vawi worepiwa-- Kinarwa‐kimana mukukhula-- Nave sinarwa‐simwalamwala Ipuchepuche sa muloko’wo."
Matthew26:32 Nyenya kivinnye kinarwa‐kohólelani o Galileya.
Matthew26:33 Nyenya Petro álochano-- Khwino othene enarwa‐ekwachuliwa ntakhara a Nyuwo-- miyo nkirwa‐kikwachuliwaru nari."
Matthew26:34 Yesu áhi wa yowo-- Tchiriene kinalocha wa weyo-- wi ohiyu yola-- muthupi ohipale-- onarwa‐okikhocha Miyo oraru."
Matthew26:35 Petro álochano-- Nari miyo kinakhwa ni Nyuwo-- nkirwa‐kokhochani Nyuwo hoe. Yáhihihá’tho óhuserya othene."
Matthew26:36 Vavo Yesu árwa ni yawo o nipuroni notchuwiwa Getsemane-- alocha wa óhuserya’we-- Khalani nyuwo vava-- kirowe iwo kavekele."
Matthew26:37 Nave ákusha vamoha ni Yowo Petro ni anamwane eli a Zebedayo-- apacherya othanana ni ohawa winchipale m’murimani."
Matthew26:38 Vavo álochano-- Okumi aka ori wohuruweliwa ni othanana wophiyano wukhwani: khalani vava nave mushishe vamoha ni Miyo."
Matthew26:39 Nave áya vahólo tonto-- athipela eyuchi vathi-- avekela-- ii-- Atithi-- khwino onaweryeya-- ekahi ela epwahe va Miyo; nyenya tahi mummo kinakhwelelaka Miyo-- nyenya Nyuwo."
Matthew26:40 Nave árwa wa óhuserya-- áphwanya erikimrupa-- alocha wa Petro-- Mano tihihá? hamunawerya oshisha ni Miyo elukuluku emoha?"
Matthew26:41 Shishani ni ovekela-- wi muhivolowe mu wehiwa: munepa ori wokhwela tchiri-- nyenya mwíli wa enama ori wochetcheya."
Matthew26:42 Wili’tho árowa-- avekela-- ii-- Atithaka-- khwino ela enirimhipwaha-- nyenya kiwurye ela-- okhwela wanyu weriwe."
Matthew26:43 Nave ákoka’tho-- áphwanya erikimrupa-- vawi iyaphi saya sálimela ni ikhove."
Matthew26:44 Nave áháhiya wili’tho-- avekela elukuluku yaneraru-- íhihá’tho masu yawo."
Matthew26:45 Vavo árwa wa óhuserya-- alochano-- Konani elukuluku yohala-- mwitchuwe: onani-- elukuluku yophiya-- nave Mwana a mutchu oveléliwa m’matani mwa alipa‐otcheka."
Matthew26:46 Vinyani-- n’rowe-- nkonani okiveléla owo ori vakhiviru."
Matthew26:47 Nave Yowo arikimlocharu-- onani-- Yudase-- mmoha a khumi neli awo-- árwa-- nave vamoha ni yowo muloko mtokotoko wa atchu-- ni malema ni miuputcho-- orwela wa alipa‐ephepa atokotoko ni atokwene a atchu."
Matthew26:48 Nyenya ómveléla owo áhávaha eneneryo-- alocha-- Yowo kiniriaka kimunúle ti Yowo-- mumphare."
Matthew26:49 Nave vavo árwa wa Yesu-- ii-- Mosheliwa-- Rabi; amunúla."
Matthew26:50 Nave Yesu áhi wa yowo-- Mukhwaka-- ntakhara sheni orwelá weyo? Vavo yawo yárwa-- ephara Yesu ni mata-- emwakuviha."
Matthew26:51 Nave onani-- mmoha a yawo yári vamoha ni Yesu-- áhókola ntata nawe-- ahulula nlema nawe-- apopha kapuro a mutokwene a ephepa-- akwasa naru nawe."
Matthew26:52 Vavo Yesu álochano-- Nkakokiha nlema ná mu nrupeloni’mmo-- vawi othene óphara nlema enarwa‐etoloshiwa ni nlema."
Matthew26:53 Akhweya onupuwela wi nkiwerya ovekela Atithaka-- nave Yowo anakirumihela hihano vava miloko ya angelo opwaha khumi neli?"
Matthew26:54 Nyenya vawihihá sorepa sinarwa‐sikhwanelihiwa hai-- vawi-- ori wophwanela okhala hihá?"
Matthew26:55 Va elukuluku eyo Yesu áhi wa miloko eyo ya atchu-- Mwákhuma okikusha Miyo ni malema ni miuputcho-- ntoko mulipa‐ohuhula? Nihiku n’nihiku kámkhala va’mpa ya Muluku ohusiha; nave hemwákiphanre?"
Matthew26:56 Nyenya iha sothe sene sákhala-- wi sorepiwa sa alipa‐miririmo seriwe. Vavo óhuserya othene yámuhiya-- etchawa."
Matthew26:57 Nave óphara Yesu awo yámveléla wa Kayaía-- mutokwene a ephepa-- wiwo yáthukumannaya alipa‐orepa ni atokwene ene."
Matthew26:58 Nyenya Petro ámtchara ochaichai-- ophiyerya o ntchachoni na mutokwene a alipa‐ephepa-- avolowa’mo-- akilathi ni akapitao-- wi óne makutchuwelo."
Matthew26:59 Nave alipa‐ephepa atokotoko ni atokwene a milachu othene yáhávyavya namona awotha óvanyiha Yesu-- wi yamwiphe;"
Matthew26:60 nyenya heyámphwanyile-- nari anamona awotha anchipale yárwa."
Matthew26:61 Nyenya vachuli vaya yárwa eli-- yi-- Ola álocha-- Kinawerya opahula empa ya Muluku-- ni omaka’tho m’mahiku mararu."
Matthew26:62 Nave mutokwene a alipa‐ephepa áhémela-- ii wa Yowo-- Honákhula etchu? ti sheni ela yeyo enohelelaya?"
Matthew26:63 Nyenya Yesu árimkhala lakalaka. Nave mutokwene a alipa‐ephepa álochano-- Kinolupeliha Weyo va Muluku a okumi-- wi on’léle hiyo Weyo wári Kristu-- Mwana a Muluku."
Matthew26:64 Yesu áhi wa yowo-- Wohihihá-- nyenya’tho kinalocha wa weyo-- Opacherya hihano munarwa‐mona Mwana a mutchu arikimkilathi va ntatani nolopwana na ikuru-- ni ophiya va mekuni a wirimu."
Matthew26:65 Vavo mutokwene a alipa‐ephepa áháhulasha sowara sawe-- ii-- Anerela Muluku opwalu: n’návya hai anamona akina? Onani hihano mohiwa opwalu’wo."
Matthew26:66 Yawo yáhákhula yi-- Ori óphwanela omwipha."
Matthew26:67 Vavo yawo yámtaphela mara withoni wawe-- emuotopola: nave akina yámmana nipurata-- yi--"
Matthew26:68 Onanyiherye hiyo Kristu Weyo: Ómanne Weyo pani?
Matthew26:69 Nave Petro ákilathi vate o ntchachoni: nave mwali árwa wa yowo-- alocha-- Weyo’tho wári ni Yesu a Galileya."
Matthew26:70 Nyenya ákhocha va mithoni va atchu othene-- wi-- Yeyo onalochá nkinasuwela."
Matthew26:71 Nave ákhumaliye va milakoni-- muthiana mukina ámona-- ii wa yawo a vavo-- Owo’tho ári ni Yesu Mnazarayo."
Matthew26:72 Nave wili’tho ákhocha ni olupela-- wi-- Nkinasuwela mutchu’wo."
Matthew26:73 Nave evinre elukuluku tonto-- yawo awemela’vo yárwa-- yi wa Petro-- Eparipari-- weyo’tho ori a yawo ale; vawi malocheloá ennosuwanyeiha weyo."
Matthew26:74 Vava yowo ápacherya oruwana ni olupela-- wi-- Nkinasuwela mutchu’wo."
Matthew26:75 Nave vavo muthupi wáhípa. Nave Petro áhupuwela masu a Yesu álonchiye-- Ohipale muthupi onarwa‐okikhocha oraru. Nave ákhumela vate-- anla ni ososa murima."
Matthew27:1 Nave vaphiyalaya woshishelo-- alipa‐ephepa atokotoko ni atokwene a atchu othene yávánela somwerela Yesu-- wi emwiphe:"
Matthew27:2 nave yámmaka-- erowano-- emveléla wa Pilato chamasowa owo."
Matthew27:3 Vavo Yudase yowo ámvelénle-- ónniye wi Yowo ávanyihiwa wi akhwe-- átcharuwa-- akokiha icharama iho sawéla makhumi mararu wa alipa‐ephepa atokotoko ni atokwene--"
Matthew27:4 alocha-- Káhera yonanara miyo-- kávelénlaka nikhami nohitcheka. Nyenya yawo yáhi-- Ti sheni wa hiyo? wisonele mekhá."
Matthew27:5 Nave yowo áriha vathi icharama iho va’mpa ya Muluku-- avinya’vo-- íheya mekhiye va’shikoni."
Matthew27:6 Nave alipa‐ephepa atokotoko yákusha icharama iho-- yi-- Wohemyereryiwa wiyathi mu yothukumanyiherya icharama sa Muluku-- ntakhara ti oliva wa nikhami."
Matthew27:7 Nyenya yálakana-- ethumano emacha ya mulipa‐wúpa miapu-- ekhale mahiye a alecho."
Matthew27:8 Ntakhara awe emacha yela yátchuwiwa-- Emacha‐ya‐nikhami-- ophiyerya olelo vava."
Matthew27:9 Vavo yákhwanela yolochiwa ti Yeremiya mulipa‐miririmo-- ni wi-- Nave yawo yákusha icharama iho sawéla makhumi mararu-- Esisapo ya ole yawalakhanyeryiwa esisapo awe-- Yowo anamwane awo a Israyeli yálakhanyenryaya esisapo awe;"
Matthew27:10 Nave yáveléla othuma emacha ya mulipa‐wúpa miapu-- Ntoko ákilamulenliye miyo Apwiya."
Matthew27:11 Nave Yesu áhémela okhoveni wa chamasowa-- nave chamasowa owo ámkoha wi-- Weyo wá Mwene a aYuda?"
Matthew27:12 Nave Yesu áhi wa yowo-- Weyo wohihihá. Nave mu ohelela waya ni alipa‐ephepa atokotoko ni atokwene-- Yowo hákhunle etchu."
Matthew27:13 Vavo Pilato álochano-- Honiwa itchu sinchipale sawihiha enohelelaya Weyo?"
Matthew27:14 Nave hákhunle-- nari nsu nimoha-- wawihihá wi chamasowa átikhina."
Matthew27:15 Nave va Paskha chamasowa ákhovelela otaphulela atchu mmoha a mukariposo-- yowo yámukhwelaya."
Matthew27:16 Nave va mahiku yawo yári ni a mukariposo ósuwanyeya-- nsina nawe-- Baraba."
Matthew27:17 Ntakhara awe yáthukumannaya-- Pilato álochano-- Munakhwela ani wi kotaphuleleni? Baraba khwino Yesu-- ótchuwiwa Kristu?"
Matthew27:18 Vawi ásuwela wi yawo yámveléla Yowo mwa nrima.
Matthew27:19 Nave Pilato arikimkilathi va munyukhuni wothoriherya-- mwariye árumiha wa yowo olocha-- Muhere etchu ni mutchu ékhaikhai owo; vawi olelo mulohani kihukhuliwa winchipale ntakhara a Yowo."
Matthew27:20 Nyenya alipa‐ephepa atokotoko yátunyerya atchu wi eveke Baraba-- nyenya wi etoloshe Yesu."
Matthew27:21 Nyenya chamasowa áhi wa yawo-- Ovi a awo eli munakhwelanyu kotaphuleleni?"
Matthew27:22 Nave yawo yáhi-- Baraba. Pilato álochano-- Nki kini kere sheni ni Yesu-- ótchuwiwa Kristu? Othene yáhi-- Athomeyiwe va mwikimanyo."
Matthew27:23 Nave yowo áhi-- Ntakhara sheni? enre yonanara sheni? Nyenya yawo yákhuwelasha wopwaha-- Athomeyiwe va mwikimanyo."
Matthew27:24 Nyenya Pilato ónniye wi hákhwani?-?herya-- nyenya wi wápwaha onyakula-- ákusha mahi-- anyawa mata va mithoni va muloko’wo-- ii-- Miyo nkinono otcheka n’nikhami na mutchu’la ékhaikhai-- mwisonele mekhinyu."
Matthew27:25 Nave atchu othene yáhákhula-- ni wi-- Nikhami nawe n’ri va hiyo ni va anamwanahu."
Matthew27:26 Vavo yowo áhátaphulela Baraba-- nyenya áwashula Yesu-- amveléla wi emuthomeye va mwikimanyo."
Matthew27:27 Vavo asurutato a chamasowa yákusherya Yesu o ntchachoni na milachu-- emuthukumanyiherya muloko aya wothene."
Matthew27:28 Nave yárula malaya awe-- emuwariha malaya ósherya a omwene."
Matthew27:29 Nave yávathanya korowa awe a miwa-- emwiyathi va muruni vawe-- ni eheche mu ntatani nawe nolopwana; nave yákokhora vathi vahólo vawe-- emwerela elomwe-- yi-- Mosheliwa-- Mwene a aYuda:"
Matthew27:30 Emutaphela mara-- ekusha eheche-- emmana va muruni."
Matthew27:31 Nave yámanlaya omwerela elomwe-- yárula malaya’le-- emuwariha malaya’we a mwanene mekhiye-- emuhóliha omuthomeya va mwikimanyo."
Matthew27:32 Nave erikimkhuma yáphwanya mutchu a o Kurene-- nsina nawe Simoni-- emwakéleliha wi ateshe mwikimanyo awe."
Matthew27:33 Nave yárúlaya o nipuroni nsina naya Golgota-- yeyo eri yolocha--"
Matthew27:34 Nipuro‐na‐nikarakasa-- yámuwuryiha vinyo otakaherya ni wamwe; nave Yowo álawihaliye-- hákhwenle owurya."
Matthew27:35 Nave yámuthomeiyaya-- yákawana sowara sawe ni weherya ehako:"
Matthew27:36 ekilathi-- emulipelela wiwo."
Matthew27:37 Nave yáhiyathi vasulu va muru vawe nthowa nawe norepiwa: Ola ti Yesu Mwene a aYuda.
Matthew27:38 Vavo yáthomeya vamoha ni Yowo alipa‐ohuhula eli-- mmoha va ntatani nolopwana ni mukina va nothiana."
Matthew27:39 Nave atchu óvira’vo yámuruwana-- ni ochikinya miru aya--"
Matthew27:40 yi-- Nki Weyo ópahula empa ya Muluku-- ni omaka’tho m’mahiku mararu-- nkivulushe Weyo mekhá: wári Mwana a Muluku-- nkakhuruwa va mwikimanyo’vo."
Matthew27:41 Hihá’tho alipa‐ephepa atokotoko-- vamoha ni alipa‐orepa ni atokwene yámwerela elomwe-- yi-- Avulusha akina-- hawerya wivulusha mekhiye."
Matthew27:42 Ari Mwene a aYuda: akhuruwe vano va mwikimanyo-- nave n’naroromela va Yowo."
Matthew27:43 Annaroromela Muluku; Yowo amvulushe hihano-- ámkhwelaka: vawi áhi-- Miyo ká Mwana a Muluku."
Matthew27:44 Nave’tho alipa‐ohuhula’wo óthomeyiwano vamoha-- yámuroha ni masu manchipale."
Matthew27:45 Nave va ora anethanu namoha vári epiphi velaponi yothene-- ophiyerya ora anethanu nesheshe."
Matthew27:46 Nave vawachamela ora anethanu nesheshe-- Yesu ákhuwela ni masu matokotoko-- olocha-- Eli-- Eli-- Lama sabakitani? olocha waya ti wi-- Muluku aka-- Muluku aka-- mukihiyeryeni Miyo?"
Matthew27:47 Nave akina a yawo awemela wiwo-- yíwalaya-- yálocha-- Owo anitchana Eliya."
Matthew27:48 Nave vavo mmoha a yawo átchimaka-- akusha nihoche-- asariha ni vinyo osukumana-- iyathi va’hecheni-- amuwuryiha."
Matthew27:49 Nyenya akina yáhi-- Nkahiya-- none khwino Eliya anaphiya omvulusha."
Matthew27:50 Nave Yesu-- ákhuwenliye ni masu matokotoko-- áveléla munepa awe."
Matthew27:51 Nave onani-- ekuwo yotherya ya mu’mpa ya Muluku yáháhuwa ekawaneya veli orwela vasulu ophiyerya vathi; nave elapo yáchikinyeya-- nave maluku yáthaleya;"
Matthew27:52 nave mahiye yáhuleya-- ni mirutchu minchipale ya atchu awéla murima-- ókona khalai-- yávinya;"
Matthew27:53 nave yákhuma m’mahiyeni mwaya-- Yowo avinnye-- evolowa m’muchetcheni wawéla-- yoneya wa atchu anchipale."
Matthew27:54 Nave mutokwene a asurutato-- ni yawo yárino olipelela Yesu-- yónnaya ochikinyeya-- ni itchu sene seriwe-- yáhova winchipale-- elocha-- Tchiriene owo ári Mwana a Muluku."
Matthew27:55 Nave vári vavo athiana-- óweherya vorekamela-- yawo yámutchanre Yesu orwela o Galileya-- enamuruméla:"
Matthew27:56 mwa yawo mwári Mariya a Magadala-- ni Mariya amannya a Yakobo-- ni a Yose-- ni amai aya a anamwane a Zebedayo."
Matthew27:57 Nave váriaya oshekuwa-- árwa mutchu amuhakhu a o Arimateya-- nsina nawe Yosefe-- yowo’tho ári óhuserya a Yesu:"
Matthew27:58 yowo áya wa Pilato-- aveka murutchu wa Yesu. Vavo Pilato álamulela wi oveléliwe."
Matthew27:59 Nave Yosefe ákusha murutchu-- ahuruwela mu’kuwoni yochetcheya yawéla--"
Matthew27:60 avitha mu nihiyeni nawe nahihano-- nopatchiwa m’mwala-- apirikishela nluku va milakoni va nihiye-- avinya’vo."
Matthew27:61 Nave Mariya a Magadala ári vavo-- ni Mariya mukina owo-- yákilathi voluluwana-- vowehana n’nihiye nlo."
Matthew27:62 Nave omelo aya-- tinlo nihiku na vachuli vaya va Noryeherya-- alipa‐ephepa atokotoko ni aFarisi yáthukumanela wa Pilato--"
Matthew27:63 elocha-- Mwene-- nohupuwela hiyo-- wi ówoka ole áhi-- áriye mkumi-- Kinarwa‐kivinya’tho evinre mahiku mararu."
Matthew27:64 Ntakhara awe mulamule wi elipihashe va nihiyeni’vo-- ophiyerya nihiku naneraru nlo-- vawi akhweya óhuserya’we enarwe-- emwiya-- elocha wa atchu-- wi Yowo ávinya wa okhwa: nave owoka wokutchula onapwaha wopacherya iwo."
Matthew27:65 Pilato áhi wa yawo-- Kushani muloko wolipelela-- rowani-- khapelelani ntoko munasuwelelanyu."
Matthew27:66 Nave yawo yárowa-- ekhapelela nihiye-- yeyerya’vo eneneryo va nlukuni’vo-- yawo vamoha ni ólipelela’wo."
Matthew28:1 Nave nivinre nihiku na Sabata-- oyaka núsha-- nihiku nopacherya na Sabata-- yárwa Mariya a Magadala-- ni Mariya mukina owo-- orwa‐wona nihiye."
Matthew28:2 Nave onani-- vári ochikinyeya otokotoko; vawi ngelo a Apwiya ákhuruwa wirimu-- aphiya opirikisha nluku nlo-- akilathi vasulu vaya."
Matthew28:3 Woneya wawe wári ntoko etari-- nave yowara yawe yawélasha ntoko maralala;"
Matthew28:4 nave ni wopiha wawe ólipelela’wo yáthukumela-- ekhala ntoko atchu ókhwa."
Matthew28:5 Nyenya ngelo áhákhula-- ii wa athiana awo-- Muhóve nyuwo: vawi kosuwela nyuwo munavya Yesu-- yowo áthomeyiwe."
Matthew28:6 Yowo hámo munno hoe; vawi ávinya-- ntoko álonchiye. Rwani munno mone nipuro mummo ákonniye’mo Apwiya."
Matthew28:7 Nave akuvani orowa-- muléle óhuserya’we-- wi-- óvinya wa okhwa; nave onani-- anarowa muhólo mwanyu o Galileya; munarwa‐m’mona wiwo: onani-- kiholelani nyuwo."
Matthew28:8 Nave yáhákuva ovinya o nihiyeni-- ni wova ni ohakalala otokotoko-- etchimaka oléla óhuserya’we. Nave onani-- Yesu ákumanano-- alocha-- Mosheliwa."
Matthew28:9 Nave yawo yárwa-- emphara manani awe-- emuthamala."
Matthew28:10 Vavo Yesu álochano-- Muhóve: haweni mwaléle annaka-- wi erowe o Galileya-- nave enarwa‐ekóna Miyo wiwo."
Matthew28:11 Nave erikimrowa-- onani-- akina a ólipelela yáphiya o muchetcheni-- eléla alipa‐ephepa atokotoko sothe sene seriwe."
Matthew28:12 Nave yáthukumannaya vamoha ni atokwene-- yávanela-- evaha icharama sinchipale wa asurutato ale--"
Matthew28:13 yi-- Lochakani-- wi-- óhuserya’we yárwa ohiyu-- emwiya Yole hiyo n’rikimrupa."
Matthew28:14 Nave ela yiweya wa chamasowa-- hiyo n’narwa‐nimuthoriherya-- nave n’narwa‐niwerelani nyuwo wi muhipe murima."
Matthew28:15 Nave yawo yáhákhela icharama iho-- yera ntoko yáthoriheryiwaya: nave ovuwa iwo wávuwa mwa aYuda-- ophiyerya olelo vava."
Matthew28:16 Nyenya óhuserya khumi na mmoha’wo yárowa o Galileya-- o mwakoni wiwo Yesu álamulenliye."
Matthew28:17 Nave yámonnaya-- yámuthamala: nyenya akina yákhwa minikwa."
Matthew28:18 Nave Yesu árwa úlumano-- alocha-- Ikuru sothe sene sovahiwa wa Miyo Wirimu ni vathi vano."
Matthew28:19 Ntakhara awe rowani-- husihani atchu a maloko othene-- ni wabatisa yawo mu nsina na Atithi-- n’na Mwana-- n’na Munepa Wawéla:"
Matthew28:20 ni ohusiha yawo ekhapelele itchu sothe sene kólamulenlakani nyuwo: nave onani-- Miyo kiri vamoha ni nyuwo mahiku othene-- ophiyerya okutchuwa wa elukuluku ya vathi vano."
Mark1:1 Yopacherya aya ya Mitchaka Yaphama ya Yesu Kristu-- Mwana a Muluku."
Mark1:2 Ntoko morepiwa m’Yesaya Mulipa‐miririmo’wo-- Ona-- kinaruma órummwa aka vahólo va withoni wá-- Yowo anarwa‐aryeherya ephiroá;"
Mark1:3 Masu a ókhuwela mu’takhwani-- Ryeheryani nikhwála na Apwiya-- Lukamihani iphiro sawe;"
Mark1:4 Yohane árwa anabatisa mu’takhwani analaleyerya obatisa wa orukunuwa m’murima wawi ekhurumuweliwe sotcheka.
Mark1:5 Nave yákhuma wilaponi yothene ya Yudeya-- ni a o Yerusalemu othene-- enarwa wa yowo-- enabatisiwano m’muhicheni Yordano-- vawupulula sotcheka saya."
Mark1:6 Nave Yohane áwara mapururu a ekamila ni mukwachala wa nrapala mu’yununi mwawe-- alya nasope ni mahavu a mu’takhwani."
Mark1:7 Nave álaleyerya-- wi-- ókipwaha miyo ikuru anarwa vachuli vaka-- nkinaphwanela wurama otaphula mukwachala wa isapato sawe."
Mark1:8 Miyo kihobatisani ni mahi nyenya Yowo anarwa‐obatisani ni Munepa Wawéla.
Mark1:9 Nave wári m’mahiku yawo-- Yesu árwa orwela o Nazarete a Galileya-- abatisiwa ti Yohane mu Yordano."
Mark1:10 Nave vavo arikimuwela vákhumiye m’mahini-- áhona erimu yohuleya nave Munepa arikimukhuruwela va Yowo ntoko epompa;"
Mark1:11 nave masu yákhuma mwirimuni-- Mwana’ka ósiveliwa ti yowe-- mwa Yowe kinnahakalala phama."
Mark1:12 Nave vavo Munepa ámwakuviherya o’takhwani.
Mark1:13 Nave ákhala mu’takhwani mahiku makhumi masheshe-- awehiwa ti Satana; akhala ni inama-- nave angelo yámruméla."
Mark1:14 Nave aveléliwe Yohane-- Yesu árwa o Galileya-- alaleyerya Mitchaka Yaphama ya Muluku-- alocha--"
Mark1:15 Elukuluku yokhwanela nave omwene wa Muluku wohachamela; rukunuwani m’mirima nave roromelani Mitchaka Yaphama.
Mark1:16 Nave vawecha mu’shereshere mwa’nia ya Galileya áhona Simoni ni Andreya munnawe a Simoni-- erikimvonya mowaya mu’nia; vawi yawo yári alipa‐ototha."
Mark1:17 Nave Yesu álochano-- Hankeni vachuli vaka nave kinarwa‐kiwerani nyuwo alipa‐ototha a atchu."
Mark1:18 Nave vavo yáhiya miowaya’ya emutchara.
Mark1:19 Nave yénche vahólo tonto áhona Yakobo-- mwana a Zebedayo-- ni Yohane munnawe-- yawo’tho yári m’mwacheyani-- eryeheryaka miowaya’ya."
Mark1:20 Nave vavo áwitchana; nave yáhiya atithaya Zebedayo m’mwacheyani’mmo vamoha ni alipa‐muteko órempwa-- emutchara."
Mark1:21 Nave ávolowa m’Kapernao-- nave vavo va nihiku na Sabata ávolowa mothukumanela-- ahusiha."
Mark1:22 Nave yátikhina ni ehusiho awe; vawi áhusiha ntoko mwanene ikuru-- tahi ntoko alipa‐orepa’wo."
Mark1:23 Nave vavo vári mutchu mothukumanela mwaya ári ni munepa wotakhala;
Mark1:24 nave ákhuwela yowo wi-- N’ri ni sheni hiyo ni Nyuwo-- Yesu a o Nazarete? Morwa Nyuwo orwa‐on’tolosha hiyo? Kihosuwelani mwáni-- mwá awéla owo a Muluku."
Mark1:25 Nave Yesu ámlopola yowo wi-- Khala lakalaka nave okhume mwa yowo."
Mark1:26 Nave munepa wotakhala omwahunle ni okhuwela ni masu matokotoko-- wákhuma mwa yowo."
Mark1:27 Nave yátikhina othene wawihihá wi yákohana mwa yawo mekhaya wi-- Ela ti sheni? ehusiho yahihano! ni ikuru annalamulela nari minepa yotakhala nave ennamwiwelela."
Mark1:28 Nave ovuwa wawe wákhuma vavale wilaponi yothene ya Galileya yorukuryerya’vo.
Mark1:29 Nave vavo vokhuma mothukumanela’mmo-- yawo yávolowa empa ya Simoni ni Andreya vamoha ni Yakobo ni Yohane."
Mark1:30 Nave mpew’awe a Simoni ámkona awicheliwa nepwesha; nave vavo yámuléla sa yowo;
Mark1:31 nave árwa-- amphara ntata-- amvíha; nave nepwesha ámuhiya-- nave áháruméla yawo."
Mark1:32 Nave oshekuwa-- nsuwa n’nénle-- yámukusherya othene awicheliwa ni óphariwa ti minepa."
Mark1:33 Nave etchoko yothene yáthukumana va milakoni.
Mark1:34 Nave ápenusha atchu anchipale awicheliwa irecha sa miloko?-?miloko-- akumiha minepa minchipale; nave hémyile minepa eyo eloche ntakhara yámsuwela Yowo."
Mark1:35 Nave woshishelo aya ávinya ohiyuhiyu-- akhuma-- aya o’takhwani-- avekela wiwo."
Mark1:36 Nave Simoni ni akhwawe yawo yárino yámutchara-- emphwanya-- elochano-- Ennawavyani Nyuwo atchu othene."
Mark1:37 Nave álochano-- Hankeni okina witchokoni siri vakhiviru va--"
Mark1:38 wi kilaleyerye wiwo’tho; vawi korwela muteko yowo.
Mark1:39 Nave ávolowa mothukumanela mwaya mu Galileya mothe mwene alaleyerya-- akumiha minepa."
Mark1:40 Nave árwa wa Yowo awicheliwa marecha-- amveka-- amukokhorela-- ni olocha ni Yowo-- Mwákhwelaka-- munawerya okiryeherya."
Mark1:41 Nave Yesu ámoriwa ikharari-- ókola ntata-- amutannya yowo-- alochano-- Kinnakhwela; khala óryeheryiwa."
Mark1:42 Nave vavo marecha yámvinyerya-- nave áryeheryiwa."
Mark1:43 Nave ámulélasha-- amukumiha vavo-- alochano-- Ona-- ohinalocha etchu wa mutchu a’theru;"
Mark1:44 nyenya rowa wisoneihe wa mulipa‐ephepa-- oveléle va maryeheryeyo awá-- hiho Mose álamulenliye-- sikhale namona wa yawo."
Mark1:45 Nyenya yowo ákhuma-- apacherya olaleyerya tchiri ni ovuwiha masu yawo-- wawihihá wi Yesu háwenrye ovolowa’tho vokokoleya mwitchokoni nyenya ákhala okhwipi mu’takhwani; nave yárwa wa Yowo atchu a o mapuroni othene."
Mark2:1 Nave vovolowa’tho m’Kapernao-- evinre mahiku makina-- wáhiweya wi ori m’pa."
Mark2:2 Nave anchipale yáwomanyana wawihihá wi nipuro nárama-- nari va milakoni vene; nave álochano masu."
Mark2:3 Nave yárwa ómukusherya mutchu awicheliwa nanchetche-- óteshiwa ti atchu asheshe."
Mark2:4 Nave vári heyáwenrye ophiya ori Yowo-- ntakhara muloko wa atchu-- yámwarya nipatho vokhala Yowo; nave vári emanle othala-- yákurusha nipha mummo mwákona awicheliwa nanchetche owo."
Mark2:5 Nave Yesu vawona nroromelo naya-- álochano awicheliwa nanchetche-- Mwana-- sonanara sá sokhurumuweliwa."
Mark2:6 Nyenya yákhala’vo akina a alipa‐orepa awupuwela m’mirimani mwaya--"
Mark2:7 Mutchu’la anerela sheni hihá? anera opwalu; anawerya tani okhurumuwela sonanara nyenya mmoha-- ti Muluku?"
Mark2:8 Nave vavo Yesu ásuwenliye m’murimani mwawe wi enamupuwela hihá-- álochano--"
Mark2:9 Munupuwelela sheni itchu iha m’mirimani mwanyu? Yavakhiviru tivi akhweya oléla awicheliwa nanchetche wi-- Sonanara sá sokhurumuweliwa; akhweya wi-- Vinya-- oteshe nipha ná-- weche?"
Mark2:10 Nyenya vawi musuwele wi Mwana a mutchu ori mwanene olamulelo wokhurumuwela sonanara velaponi ya vathi (álochano mutchu awicheliwa)--"
Mark2:11 Kinoléla weyo-- Vinya-- oteshe nipha ná-- orowe owannyá."
Mark2:12 Nave ávinya yowo vavo-- atesha nipha-- akhuma va mithoni va yawo othene; wawihihá wi yátikhina othene-- echichimiha Muluku-- elocha wi-- Sawihiha hanónne ni khalai ene."
Mark2:13 Nave ákhuma’tho aya mu’shereshere mwa’nia; nave wárwa wa Yowo muloko wothene wa atchu nave áháhusiha.
Mark2:14 Nave arowaka áhona Levi-- mwana a Alifeyu ókhala vawakhelela mushokho-- nave álochano-- Tchara Miyo."
Mark2:15 Nave ávinya-- amutchara Yowo. Nave wári wi ákilathi vamoha ni Yesu va yólya m’pa mwawe nave alipa‐mushokho ni alipa‐otcheka anchipale yákilathi vamoha ni Yesu ni óhuserya’we; vawi yári anchipale nave yámutchara Yowo."
Mark2:16 Nave alipa‐orepa a wa aFarisi-- vawona wi anamulyano alipa‐otcheka ni alipa‐mushokho-- yálocha ni óhuserya’we-- Ola anamulya ni owuryano alipa‐mushokho ni alipa‐otcheka."
Mark2:17 Nave vari Yesu áhiwa ela-- álochano-- Ólipa henakhwela mulipa‐mureche nyenya awicheliwa; nkárwele orwa‐witchana ékhaikhai nyenya alipa‐otcheka."
Mark2:18 Nave óhuserya a Yohane ni aFarisi yámwinanela olya; nave yárwa-- elocha ni Yowo-- Eninanelela sheni olya óhuserya a Yohane ni óhuserya a aFarisi-- nyenya óhuserya anyu heninanela olya?"
Mark2:19 Nave Yesu álochano-- Mano ennawerya winanela olya amiravo a othela-- mulipa‐othela oriyeno vamoha? Vokhala arino mulipa‐othela vamoha-- henawerya winanela."
Mark2:20 Nyenya enarwa‐erwa mahiku vári mulipa‐othela anarwa‐avihiwa wa yawo nave vavo enarwa‐yinanela nihiku nenenlo.
Mark2:21 Havovo mutchu anachotcha epareya ya ekuwo ephya va yawikhunela yakhalai; akhweya yahihano yeyo eni eryeherye’vo-- enavíha’vo yakhalai ele-- nave ephaka enannuwa’vo."
Mark2:22 Nave havovo mutchu anamínela vinyo ahihano m’mirupani yakhalai; akhweya vinyo anarwa‐aphula mirupa nave anapahuwa vinyo-- ni mirupa ene; nyenya vinyo ahihano ennamínela m’mirupani yahihano."
Mark2:23 Nave wári wi ávira Yowo véri va imacha nihiku na Sabata; nave óhuserya’we vawecha yápacherya ovurula inuku sa tirigu.
Mark2:24 Nave aFarisi yálocha ni Yowo-- Nkona-- enerela sheni yohemyiwa wereya nihiku na Sabata?"
Mark2:25 Nave álochano-- Hamwálakhannyeru yeyo énre Davide-- vari áthowiwa-- avoliwa etala-- yowo ni yawo ene yárino vamoha?"
Mark2:26 Wi ávolowa empa ya Muluku mahiku a Abiyatare-- mulipa‐ephepa mutokwene-- nave álya ipau sawoniherya-- sohemyiwa olya-- nyenya alipa‐epheparu-- nave áhávaha’tho yawo áriyeno."
Mark2:27 Nave álochano-- Sabata ápakiwa ntakhara a mutchu-- tahi mutchu ntakhara a Sabata."
Mark2:28 Mwawihihá Mwana a mutchu ti mwanene nihiku na Sabata nene.
Mark3:1 Nave ávolowa’tho mothukumanela; nave mwári mutchu mummo ári ni ntata nawe nóphyororowa.
Mark3:2 Nave yámuweherya Yowo akhweya anarwa‐ampenusha nihiku na Sabata; wi emmake mulachu.
Mark3:3 Nave álocha ni mutchu ári ni ntata nóphyororowa-- Nkemela véri."
Mark3:4 Nave álocha wa yawo-- Onnemyereryiwa nihiku na Sabata wera saphama akhweya sonanara? ovulusha okumi akhweya wipha?"
Mark3:5 Nyenya yákhala lakalaka. Nave áwehile ni oshimwa ni othanana ntakhara a wuma wa mirima’ya-- álocha wa mutchu’wo-- Okola ntata ná."
Mark3:6 Nave áhókola-- nave nápenuwa ntata nawe. Nave aFarisi yákhuma nave vavo yávanela ni a Herode somtolosha Yowo."
Mark3:7 Nave Yesu ákoka’wo vamoha ni óhuserya’we-- aya o’nia-- nave wámutchara muloko mutokotoko wa o Galileya ni o Yudeya--"
Mark3:8 ni o Yerusalemu ni o Idumeya-- ni okhopela wa Yordano-- ni a vakhiviru va Turo ni Sidoni--"
Mark3:9 muloko mutokotoko-- vawiwa sitokotoko iho énriye-- wárwa wa Yowo. Nave álocha wa óhuserya’we wi mwá‐mwacheya amuwehe ntakhara a muloko’wo wi onamuwomanye."
Mark3:10 Vawi ápenusha anchipale wawihihá wi othene ókhalano sohosha yámuwomanya wi yamutannye.
Mark3:11 Nave minepa yotakhala-- yámonaya-- yámukokhorela ekhuwela-- yi-- Nyu mwá Mwana a Muluku."
Mark3:12 Nave áhálipiherya masu wi ehimupulule.
Mark3:13 Nave áwela m’mwakoni-- ísitchanela yawo ákhwenliye mwanene nave yárwa wa Yowo."
Mark3:14 Nave áthanla khumi neli wi ekhaleno-- wi árume olaleyerya--"
Mark3:15 ni wi ekhaleno olamulelo wokumiha masololo.
Mark3:16 Nave Simoni ámutchuwa Petro;
Mark3:17 ni Yakobo mwana a Zebedayo-- ni Yohane munnawe a Yakobo-- awo áhátchuwa Boanerge-- ti wi anamwane a etari;"
Mark3:18 ni Andreya ni Filipo-- ni Bartolomeyo-- ni Mateyu-- ni Tomasi ni Yakobo mwana a Alifeyo-- ni Tadeyo-- ni Simoni a o Kanane--"
Mark3:19 ni Yudase Isikariote-- ti yowo ámvelénle."
Mark3:20 Nave ávolowa m’pa. Nave atchu anchipale yáthukumana’tho wawihihá wi heyáwenrye nari olya epau.
Mark3:21 Nave ahimawe yíwalaya-- yárwa omphara; vawi yáhi-- Ohaluwa murima."
Mark3:22 Nave alipa‐orepa yawo yákhuruwale o Yerusalemu yálocha wi-- Ókhalano Beelzibule nave ni mutokwene aya a masololo-- annakumiha masololo."
Mark3:23 Nave vári áwitchana yawo-- álochano m’maphwanaphwaniho--"
Mark3:24 Satana anawerye hai okumiha Satana?
Mark3:25 Nave omwene wakawaneya va owo mekhaya-- howerya otikitheryeya. Nave empa yakawaneya va eyo mekhaya hewerya otikitheryeya empa eyo."
Mark3:26 Nave Satana avinya va mwanene mekhiye-- akawaneya-- hawerya otikitheryeya nyenya anakokhowa."
Mark3:27 Nyenya tchiri havovo mutchu anawerya ovolowa empa ya mwanene ikuru-- ni ohuhula mirichi awe-- nyenya apacherye ommaka mwanene ikuru yowo-- nave vavo anarwa‐ahuhula sa m’pa mwawe."
Mark3:28 Tchiri kinalocha ni nyuwo-- Sinarwa‐sikhurumuweliwa sotcheka sothene sa anamwane a atchu ni sopwalu sothene eniriaya yereno opwalu;"
Mark3:29 nyenya mutchu yowo anarwa‐erela Munepa Wawéla opwalu hanono okhurumuweliwa mahiku othene-- nyenya árosharu yotcheka yohimala;"
Mark3:30 ntakhara yálocha-- Ori ni munepa wotakhala."
Mark3:31 Nave yárwa amannya ni annawe yemela okhwipi-- emurumela órummwa omwitchana."
Mark3:32 Nave atchu anchipale yákilathi vathi omricha; nave yálocha wa Yowo-- Onani-- aminyu ni anninyu ari okhwipi ennawavyani Nyuwo."
Mark3:33 Nave áwakhula-- alocha-- Amaiaka ni annaka tani?"
Mark3:34 Nave áwehaweha awo yámurinche awo alocha-- Nkonani amai aka ni annaka."
Mark3:35 Vawi mutchu yowo anera yokhwela ya Muluku-- yowo ti munnaka-- ni murokora-- ni amai."
Mark4:1 Nave ápacherya’tho ohusiha va’shereshere va’nia. Nave wámuthukumanela muloko mutokwene wawihihá wi ávolowa m’mwacheyani-- akilathi mu’nia; nave muloko wothene wákilathi va mokoni mu’shereshere mwa’nia."
Mark4:2 Nave áháhusiha itchu sinchipale m’maphwanaphwaniho-- nave álochano muhusiha mwawe-- Wiryanani;"
Mark4:3 Nkonani mulipa‐omisa ákhuma omisa;
Mark4:4 nave ámisiye-- mukina wámora mukhwipi mwa’phiro-- nave ipalame sárwa simala olya."
Mark4:5 Nave mukina wámora va’tchayani ya va mwala-- vavo vahári etchaya yinchipale; nave vavo wámela-- ntakhara hawárino etchaya yokhwanela;"
Mark4:6 nave niwenle nsuwa-- wávya; nave ntakhara hawárino mitathari wáwitipana."
Mark4:7 Nave mukina wámora va miwani-- nave miwa yáhunnuwa-- enyoka-- nave hawimihale sawima."
Mark4:8 Nave mukina wámora va’tchayani yaphama; nave wáhimiha sawima-- ni wunnuwa ni wacha; nave wáhima orukunushela makhumi mararu-- ni makhumi mathanu na nimoha-- ni makhumi khumi."
Mark4:9 Nave álocha-- Yowo orino maru awiwa-- íwe."
Mark4:10 Nave vári ákhala va mekhiye yawo yárino vakhiviru vamoha ni khumi neli awo yámukoha sa maphwanaphwaniho.
Mark4:11 Nave álochano-- Wa nyuwo sovahiwa sokhuweya sa Omwene wa Muluku; nyenya wa amalapo awo sothene sineriwa m’maphwanaphwaniho;"
Mark4:12 wi wona yone nave ehisuwele; nave wiwa yiwe nave ehisuwelashe; wi akhweya eni etcharuwe nave sinakhurumuweliwe wa yawo.
Mark4:13 Nave álochano-- Hamunasuwela niphwanaphwaniho nla? Osuwela muni mwere hai maphwanaphwaniho othene?"
Mark4:14 Mulipa‐omisa anamisa masu.
Mark4:15 Nave awo tawo a mukhwipi mwa’phiro momisiwa’mo masu; nave yiwale-- vavo annarwa Satana avíha’mo masu omisiwa mwa yawo."
Mark4:16 Nave mummo’tho awo tawo ene enamisiwa va mwala-- yíwale masu ennakhela vavo ni otheya;"
Mark4:17 nave hanono mitathari mwa yawo mekhaya-- nyenya ennakhala tonto; vavo vorwa sawukhula akhweya sohosha ntakhara a masu-- vavo ennakwachuliwa."
Mark4:18 Nave akina tawo omisiwa o miwani;
Mark4:19 awo ti yawo yíwale masu-- nave maupuwelo a vathi vano ni owoka wa muhakhu ni minkhela ya itchu sikina-- sinnavolowa’mo-- sinanyoka masu-- nave ennakhala othowiwa yawima."
Mark4:20 Nave yale omisiwa va’tchayani yaphama tawo awihiha’la-- awiwa masu-- yakhela-- yimiha sawima sorukunushela makhumi mararu-- ni makhumi mathanu na nimoha-- ni makhumi khumi."
Mark4:21 Nave álocha ni yawo-- Mano ennakusha onyari wi yakhunéle ni muno-- akhweya yiyathi vathi va okamani-- ohi mano yiyathi va yawiyatherya’vo aya."
Mark4:22 Vawi heyavovo etchu yovitheya nyenya wi erwe‐yonihiwe; akhweya heyavovo etchu yári yokhuweya nyenya wi yupululiwe.
Mark4:23 Mutchu yowo orino maru awiwa-- íwe."
Mark4:24 Nave álochano-- Weheryani yeyo muniwanyu-- ni mweryo yowo muneryanyuno-- onarwa‐weryiwa wa nyuwo; nave onarwa‐wachereryiwa wa nyuwo."
Mark4:25 Vawi wa yowo orino etchu-- enarwa‐evahiwa; nave wa yowo ahinono etchu-- enarwa‐evíhiwa nari etchu yeyo oriyeno."
Mark4:26 Nave álochano-- Omwene wa Muluku ori wawihihá-- ntoko si mutchu áriha mmiso va’tchayani;"
Mark4:27 akona-- avinya ohiyu ni othana-- nave mmiso wámela-- wunnuwa-- yowo hanasuwela wera waya oni hai."
Mark4:28 Etchaya enimiha sawima saya mekhaya; onapacherya muropo-- enatchara mivelo-- nave inuku sokhomála m’miveloni’mmo."
Mark4:29 Vawitchwa sawima-- vavo anarumiha yokaka?-?tchelano-- vawi okhupa wophiya."
Mark4:30 Nave álocha-- N’narwa‐niphwaniherya sheni Omwene wa Muluku? akhweya n’narwa‐n’likanya n’niphwanaphwaniho nawisheni?"
Mark4:31 Ntoko mmiso wa evai yowo wámisiwe va’tchayani-- nari onnayeva ni mimiso yothene ya velaponi--"
Mark4:32 nyenya vári omisiwe-- onnamela wunnuwa-- opwaha makukhu othene-- okhalano mirai mitokotoko; wawihihá wi ipalame sa wirimu sinnawerya okilathi m’murulini mwaya."
Mark4:33 Nave ni maphwanaphwaniho awihiha’la manchipale áhulumano masu-- ntoko yáweryelaya wiwa;"
Mark4:34 nave húlumaleno wohikhala niphwanaphwaniho; nyenya okhwipi áthoriherya sothene wa óhuserya’we.
Mark4:35 Nave nihiku nenenlo-- vophiya oshekuwa-- álocha wa yawo-- N’lapuwele okhopela."
Mark4:36 Nave vohiya muloko’wo-- yámukusha eroweno-- ntoko mummo áriye m’mwacheyani."
Mark4:37 Nave vári amwacheya akina vamoha ni Yowo. Nave vávinya etcheku etokotoko-- nave machumusha yátekhumela m’mwacheyani-- mwawihihá wi mwacheya ápacherya osareya."
Mark4:38 Nave Yowo mwanene ári ochuli wa mwacheya-- arupa va yohamela muru; nave yámvíha elochano-- Muhusiha-- hamunathokororya wi n’nariméla hiyo?"
Mark4:39 Nave ávinya-- asamela etcheku alocha wa enia wi-- Mála-- khala chuu."
Mark4:40 Nave etcheku yámála-- nave wáhera chuu winchipale. Nave álochano-- Munovela sheni? ophiyerya hihano hamwinono nroromelo?"
Mark4:41 Nave yawo yákhala ni wova otokotoko-- elocha mukina ni mukhwawe-- Nki ola tani-- nari etcheku ni enia sinnamwiwelela."
Mark5:1 Nave yáphiya okhopela wa’nia-- wilaponi ya aGerasa."
Mark5:2 Nave vákhumaliye m’mwacheyani-- vavo ákumanano ókhuma o mahiyeni mutchu a munepa wotakhala-- yowo énre empa’we o mahiyeni;"
Mark5:3 nave havovo mutchu áwenrye ommaka’tho-- nari ni onyoro ene mano;"
Mark5:4 vawi ámakiwa wiliwili ni etuputu ni onyoro-- nave áhánula onyoro-- áthikila‐thikila etuputu; nave havovo mutchu ári ni ikuru somukhoveleliha."
Mark5:5 Nave mahiku othene ohiyu ni othana ákhala m’mahiyeni ni m’miakoni-- akhuwela-- ísethetha ni maluku."
Mark5:6 Nave ámonniye Yesu ochai-- átchimaka-- amuthamalela-- nave ákhuwela ni masu ólipiha--"
Mark5:7 alocha-- Kiri ni sheni miyo ni Nyuwo-- Yesu Mwana a Muluku Mtokotoko? Kinolupelelani Muluku-- muhikihoshe."
Mark5:8 Vawi álocha wa yowo-- Khuma weyo-- munepa wotakhala mwa mutchu’la."
Mark5:9 Nave ámukoha-- Nsina ná wáni? Nave ámwakhula-- Nsina naka ká Legio; ntakhara n’ri anchipale."
Mark5:10 Nave ámveka winchipale wi áhákumihe mwilaponi’mmo.
Mark5:11 Nave vári vavo muloko mtokotoko wa ikupa sirikimulya o mwakoni.
Mark5:12 Nave yámveka wi-- N’rumiheni hiyo mu ikupani iho-- wi nivolowe’mo."
Mark5:13 Nave áhemyererya. Nave minepa yotakhala yákhuma-- evolowa mu ikupani; nave muloko wákhuruwa ni wupuwa votherereya ni ovolowa mu’nia-- (sári ntoko masanaru makhumi meli;) nave sánéla mu’nia."
Mark5:14 Nave alipa‐okukhula yátchawa-- elokoha mwitchokoni ni mwimachani."
Mark5:15 Nave yárwa wi yone yériwe’yo. Nave yárwa wa Yesu-- emona mulipa‐ophariwa masololo’wo akilanthe vathi-- ówara ni a miruku awe yaphama-- ti yowo ári ni Legio; nave yáhóva."
Mark5:16 Nave yónil’awo-- yáháthoriherya yeyo énriye ni óphariwa masololo’wo-- ni sa ikupa iho."
Mark5:17 Nave yápacherya omveka wi avinye m’munlano aya.
Mark5:18 Nave vavo ávolowiye m’mwacheyani-- ámveka mulipa‐masololo’le wi akhaleno."
Mark5:19 Nave hámwemyerenrye-- nyenya álochano-- Rowa owannyá wa anná-- nave wáléle itchu sitokotoko áwerenlá Apwiya-- nave wi áhomorela ikharari."
Mark5:20 Nave árowa-- apacherya olaleyerya o Dekapoli itchu sitokotoko Yesu ámwerenliye-- nave atchu othene yátikhina."
Mark5:21 Nave vári Yesu álapuwa’tho m’mwacheyani okhopela-- muloko mtokotoko wámuthukumanela; nave ári va’shereshere va’nia."
Mark5:22 Nave arwa’wo mmoha a atokwene a mothukumanela-- nsina nawe Yairo; Nave ámonniye-- ákokhora va manani awe-- amveka winchipale;"
Mark5:23 alocha wi-- Mwá‐mwanaka a nahano anamkokhowa: kinovekani Nyuwo m’phiye’wo-- mwiyathi mata’nyu va yowo-- wi avuluwe nave akhale mukumi."
Mark5:24 Nave árowano vamoha; nave muloko mtokotoko wámutchara-- nave wámuwomanya."
Mark5:25 Nave muthiana mukina yowo ári ni erecha yochonya nikhami miyakha khumi na mili--"
Mark5:26 nave áhona sovoreya sinchipale ni alipa‐mureche anchipale-- alivela sothene áriyeno--"
Mark5:27 nave hápenuwale ni vakhani vene-- nyenya tchiriene erecha’we yáhunnuwa-- vavo íwaliye ovuwa wawe wa Yesu-- árwa m’mulokoni ochuli wawe-- atannya yowara yawe."
Mark5:28 Vawi yowo álocha-- Katannya nari sowara sawe-- kinarwa‐kivulushiwa."
Mark5:29 Nave vavo ehime ya nikhami nawe yáweléla nave ásuwelasha m’mwílini wi ápenushiwa yawukhula ele.
Mark5:30 Nave vavo Yesu ásuwenliye mekhiye wi ikuru sámukuluwa-- árukunuwa m’mulokoni alocha-- Atannyile tani sowara saka?"
Mark5:31 Nave óhuserya’we yálochano-- Munnona wi muloko wa atchu onamuwomanyani Nyuwo-- nave munnalocha-- Akitannyile tani?"
Mark5:32 Nave áwehaweha omona yowo énre ela.
Mark5:33 Nyenya muthiana owo áhóva ni othukumela vosuwela yeyo yámwereyenle-- arwa-- amukokhorela-- amuléla yeparipari yothene."
Mark5:34 Nave áhi wa yowo-- Mwana mwa muthiana we nroromelo ná nihovulusha weyo; rowa m’murecheleni-- okhale ópenuwa yawukhulá."
Mark5:35 Vári arikimulocharu-- yáphiya ó’mpa ya mutokwene a mothukumanela-- elocha wi-- Mwaná ókhwa; onamukhulelani’tho Muhusiha?"
Mark5:36 Nyenya Yesu óhithokororya masu ólochiwa awo-- álocha wa mutokwene a mothukumanela-- Ohóve-- wirimuroromelaru."
Mark5:37 Nave hémyerenrye mutchu mukina otchananano nyenya Petro-- ni Yakobo ni Yohane munnawe a Yakobo."
Mark5:38 Nave áphiya o’mpa wawe wa mutokwene a mothukumanela; nave áhiwa niwowo ni alipa‐wunla eyinlo-- ni atchu ókhuwela anchipale."
Mark5:39 Nave ávolowiliye-- álochano-- Munanyakula ni wunlela sheni? Mwana hakhwile nyenya anamrupa."
Mark5:40 Nave yámutheya ryaryarya. Nyenya áhákumiha othene-- akusha atithi a mwana-- ni amannya-- ni yawo áriyeno-- avolowa mummo mwári mwana owo."
Mark5:41 Nave áphara ntata nawe na mwana-- alochano-- Talita koumi; ti olocha votaphulela-- Nahano-- kinalocha ni weyo-- Vinya."
Mark5:42 Nave vavo nahano’wo ávinya-- écha; vawi ári a miyakha khumi na mili. Nave yátikhina vavo ni otikhina otokotoko."
Mark5:43 Nave áhálamulela winchipale wi ahikhale’vo mutchu anasuwele ela-- nave áháléla wi emvahe olya."
Mark6:1 Nave Yowo ákhuma wiwo; aphiya wilaponi yowannyawe; nave óhuserya’we yámutchara.
Mark6:2 Nave vophiya nihiku na Sabata-- ápacherya ohusiha mothukumanela; nave anchipale yámwiwa-- etikhina-- elocha-- Ola ákushale wowi iha; miruku yovahiwa wa mutchu’la ti yawihai ni sa ikuru sawihiha saweriwa ni mata’we?"
Mark6:3 Tahi mulipa‐iracha a miri ola-- mwana a Mariya-- munnawe a Yakobo ni Yose ni Yuda ni Simoni? Nave arokorawe hari ni hiyo vava? Nave yákwachuliwa ntakhara a Yowo."
Mark6:4 Nave Yesu álochano-- Mulipa‐miririmo hanakhala othowa mahala nyenya mwilaponi yowannyawe-- ni véri va annawe ni m’pa mwawe."
Mark6:5 Nave wiwo háwenrye Yowo wera sa ikuru nari tontoru-- nyenya wi áhiyathi mata’we va atchu awicheliwa awalakhanyeya-- ápenusha."
Mark6:6 Nave átikhina ntakhara a ohiroromela waya. Nave áhechecha mwitchokoni sorukuryerya’vo-- ahusiha."
Mark6:7 Nave áhisitchanela khumi neli awo-- apacherya wáruma eli eli; ávaha ikuru sokumiha minepa yotakhala;"
Mark6:8 nave áháléla wi ehikushe etchu ya va mukwahani nyenya mutokosoru; ehikushe ipau-- nari murupa-- nari icharama m’mukwachalani mwaya;"
Mark6:9 nyenya eware isapato; nave áhi muhiware malaya meli.
Mark6:10 Nave álochano-- Wiwo wothe wene munirianyu m’volowe m’pa-- khalani wiwo ophiyerya ovinya’wo."
Mark6:11 Nave va nipuroni vothe vene eniriaya ehiwakheleni-- nari wiwelela nyuwo-- vovinya wiwo-- tathani ntchupi n’ri vathi va manani anyu-- nikhale namona a wa yawo."
Mark6:12 Nave yákhuma elaleyerya wi atchu erukunuwe m’mirima.
Mark6:13 Nave yákumiha minepa yonanara minchipale-- ewóchiha makhurwa atchu anchipale awicheliwa-- yápenusha."
Mark6:14 Nave mwene Herode áhiwa iha; vawi nsina nawe náhiweya; nave álocha-- Yohane Mbatisi óvinya wa okhwa-- nave ntakhara awe sa ikuru iha sinneriwa ti yowo."
Mark6:15 Nyenya akina yálocha wi-- Ti Eliya. Yáhi akina’tho. Ti mulipa‐miririmo-- ntoko si mmoha a alipa‐miririmo awo."
Mark6:16 Nyenya Herode vavo íwaliye-- álocha-- Yohane yowo kimuthikinlaka muru-- óvinya."
Mark6:17 Vawi Herode-- mwanene mekhiye áruma-- amphara Yohane-- ammaka mu kariposo-- ntakhara a Herodiya mwara a Filipo munnawe; ntakhara ámuthela yowo."
Mark6:18 Vawi Yohane álocha wa Herode-- Honemyereryiwa wa weyo okhalano mwara a munná."
Mark6:19 Nave Herodiya ámwicha nave ákhwela omwipha; nave háwenrye;
Mark6:20 vawi Herode ánamova Yohane-- vosuwela wi ori mutchu ékhaikhai ni awéla murima-- nave ámukhapelela."
