Luke5:1 Nave vári-- vomuwomanya Yowo muloko wa atchu-- wiwa masu a Muluku-- wi Yowo ámwemela mu’shereshere mwa enia ya Genesarete;"
Luke5:2 nave áhona amwacheya eli yári mu’shereshere mwa enia: nyenya alipa‐ototha ihopa yávinya’mo-- erikimrapiha miowaya’ya."
Luke5:3 Nave ávolowa m’mwacheyani mmoha-- ti wawe wa Simoni-- amveka yowo akakhe vakhani. Nave ákilathi mummo-- ahusiha m’mwacheyani miloko eyo ya atchu."
Luke5:4 Nave ámálihaliye olocha-- áhi wa Simoni-- Kakhela wa wisha-- muvonye miowaya’nyu wi mutothe."
Luke5:5 Nave Simoni áhákhula-- ii-- Apwiya-- nápharasha muteko ohiyu wothene ohiphara etchu-- nyenya mulonchanyu kina?-?vonya miowaya."
Luke5:6 Nave yénraya ela-- yávirela ihopa sinchipale; nave miowaya’ya yámwáhuwa;"
Luke5:7 nave yáhúvela akhwaya a m’mwacheyani mukina owo-- erwe yákhaviherye. Nave yárwa-- esariha amwacheya ópili-- mwawihihá wi yámunéla."
Luke5:8 Nyenya Simoni Petro-- ónniye-- áhúwa vathi va makuthani awe a Yesu-- alocha-- M’vinye va miyo-- Apwiya-- ntakhara ká mutchu ótcheka."
Luke5:9 Vawi átikhina-- nave’tho othene yawo yárino-- va ototha iwo wa ihopa iho yáphanraya;"
Luke5:10 nave emohamoha’tho Yakobo ni Yohane-- ana a Zebedayo-- yawo yári akhwawe a Simoni. Nave Yesu áhi wa Simoni-- Ohóve-- opacherya hihano onarwa‐okhala mulipa‐ototha atchu."
Luke5:11 Nave yápurulenlaya amwacheya’ya va mokoni-- yáhiya sothe sene-- emutchara Yowo."
Luke5:12 Nave vári-- Yowo áriye mwitchokoni ekina ya’theru-- wi nkona-- mutchu ósareya marecha; nave ónniye Yesu-- áthipela eyuchi vathi-- amveka-- alocha-- Apwiya-- mwákhwelaka munawerya okiryeherya."
Luke5:13 Nave Yowo áhókola ntata nawe-- amutannya-- alocha-- Kinnakhwela-- nkaryeheryeya. Nave vavo marccha yámvinyerya."
Luke5:14 Nave Yowo ámulélasha-- wi ahiléle mutchu a’theru; nyenya orowe wisonihe mekhá wa mulipa‐ephepa-- oveléle ephepa ya wa maryeheryeyo awá-- ntoko álamulela Mose-- okhale namona wa yawo."
Luke5:15 Nyenya tchiriene ovuwa wawe wa Yowo wáhiweya: nave miloko minchipale ya atchu yáthukumana orwa‐wiwelela-- ni openushiwa irecha saya."
Luke5:16 Nyenya Yowo áhíta-- aya mu’takhwani-- anámvekela."
Luke5:17 Nave vári nihiku nimoha na mahiku ala-- wi Yowo ámuhusiha; nave yámukhala’vo aFarisi ni ahusiha a malamulo-- yawo yárwenle witchokoni sothene sa Galileya-- ni Yudeya ni Yerusalemu: nave ikuru sa Apwiya sári ni Yowo sawapenusha."
Luke5:18 Nave onani-- atchu erikimtesha va okamani mutchu ananchetche; enakhwela‐khwela omvolíha-- ni omwi?-?yathi o’khoveni wawe."
Luke5:19 Nave yáhiphwannyaya vovolowano-- ntakhara a muloko wa atchu-- yáwela vasulu va nipatho-- emukurusha yowo m’phakani mwa ichurwa sa nipatho ni okama’we-- empisha véri vavo vahólo va Yesu."
Luke5:20 Nave Yowo-- vawona nroromelo naya-- áhi-- Mutchu we-- sotcheka sá sokhurumuweliwa wa weyo."
Luke5:21 Nave alipa‐orepa ni aFarisi-- yápacherya wupuwelela?-?upuwelela m’murimani mwaya-- wi-- Tani ola analocha sawcrela Muluku opwalu? Tani mano anáwerye okhurumuwela sotcheka-- nyenya Mulukuru?"
Luke5:22 Nyenya Yesu ásuwela sawupuwelela‐upuwelela saya-- ákhula-- ii wa yawo-- Munupuwelela‐upuwelela hai m’mirimani mwanyu?"
Luke5:23 Yavakhiviru tivi-- olocha-- Sokhurumuweliwa wa weyo sotcheka sá; akhweya olocha-- Nkavinya-- weche?"
Luke5:24 Nyenya wi musuwele wi Mwana a mutchu okhalano ikuru vathi vano sokhurumuwela sotcheka-- (áhi Yowo wa ananchetche owo--) Kinalocha wa weyo-- Nkavinya-- wireye okamá-- orowe o’mpa wá."
Luke5:25 Nave vavo áhémela va’khoveni vaya-- íreya yele ákonenliye-- avinya’vo-- oya o’mpa wawe-- óchichimiha Muluku."
Luke5:26 Nave otikhina yákhalano atchu othene-- nave yáchichimiha Muluku; wova owachela-- elocha wi-- Olelo nihona sotikiniha."
Luke5:27 Nave simanle iha Yowo ákhuma-- óna mutchu mulipa‐mushokho-- nsina nawe Levi-- arikimkilathi vawakhelela mushokho-- ii wa yowo-- Okitchare Miyo."
Luke5:28 Nave yowo áhiya sothe sene-- avinya-- amutchara."
Luke5:29 Nave Levi ámryeheryela Yowo yólya etokotoko o’mpa wawe; nave vári muloko mtokotoko wa alipa‐mushokho-- ni akina yawo yámuhámela va yólya vamoha ni Yowo."
Luke5:30 Nave aFarisi ni alipa‐orepa aya yáchénya wa óhuserya’we-- elocha-- wi-- Hai munalyanyu ni owurya vamoha ni atchu amushokho ni ótcheka?"
Luke5:31 Nave Yesu áhákhula-- ii wa yawo-- Yowo analipa hanakhwela mulipa‐mureche; nyenya awicheliwa."
Luke5:32 Nkárwele Miyo witchana ékhaikhai-- nyenya ótcheka wi erukunuwe murima."
Luke5:33 Nave yawo yáhi wa Yowo-- Óhuserya a Yohane enamwinanela olya wili wili-- ni ovekela; emohamoha’tho yawo a aFarisi; nyenya awinyu Nyuwo enamólyaru-- enamuwuryaru."
Luke5:34 Nyenya Yesu áhi wa yawo-- Mano munawerya ohíha amiravo a othela wi ehilye-- mulipa‐othela oriyeno vamoha?"
Luke5:35 Nyenya mahiku enarwa‐ephiya; nave mulipa‐othela anarwa‐avíhiwa wa yawo-- vavo enarwa‐yinanela olya m’mahiku yawo."
Luke5:36 Nave Yowo álocha’tho niphwanaphwaniho wa yawo-- wi-- Havovo mutchu anáhula epareya ya malaya maphya-- apareya va malaya akhalai; ntakhara íhiha-- anamwahulasha maphya’wo-- nave’tho epareya ele yorwela wa maphya’wo herwa‐ephwanelelana ni akhalai awo."
Luke5:37 Nave havovo mutchu anamínela vinyo ahihano m’mirupani yakhalai; ntakhara íhiha-- vinyo ahihano’wo anarwa‐aphula mirupa-- nave yowo anarwa‐ayeheya-- nave mirupa enarwa‐epahuwa."
Luke5:38 Nyenya onaphwanela omínela vinyo ahihano m’mirupani yahihano.
Luke5:39 Nave havovo mutchu awunrye vinyo akhalai anakhwela ahihano: vawi analocha-- Akhalai ori ósiva."
Luke6:1 Nave wári nihiku na Sabata-- wi Yowo ámvira véri va imacha sa tirigu; nave óhuserya’we yámvurula inuku sa tirigu-- echikitcha m’matani mwaya-- elya."
Luke6:2 Nyenya aFarisi akina yáhi-- munerelani yohemyiwa wereya nihiku na Sabata?"
Luke6:3 Nave Yesu áhákhula ii wa yawo-- Hamwálakhannyeru nari ela’tho énriye Davide-- vavale ávoliwiye etala-- yola ni yawo yárino vamoha;"
Luke6:4 wi ávolowa mu empa ya Muluku-- akusha ipau sawoniherya-- alya-- avaha’tho wa yawo áriyeno; hiha sohemyiwa olya atchu a’theru nyenya alipa‐epheparu?"
Luke6:5 Nave Yowo álochano-- wi-- Mwana a mutchu ori Pwiya a nihiku na Sabata."
Luke6:6 Nave wári nihiku nikina na Sabata-- Yowo ávolowa mothukumanela-- ahusiha. Nave mwári mutchu mummo-- nave ntata nawe nolopwana nári nóphyororowa."
Luke6:7 Nave alipa‐orepa ni aFarisi yámlipelela khwino anarwa‐apenusha nihiku na Sabata; wi yaphwanye yomuhelela.
Luke6:8 Nyenya Yowo ásuwela maupuwelo aya; nave áhi wa mutchu’wo a ntata nawe nóphyororowa-- Nkavinya-- wemele véri’vo."
Luke6:9 Nave yowo ávinya-- émela. Nave Yesu áhi wa yawo-- Kinokohani nyuwo-- onnemyereryiwa nihiku na Sabata-- wera saphama-- akhweya wera sonanara? ovulusha okumi akhweya otolosha?"
Luke6:10 Nyenya áwehile‐wehile othene awo-- áhi wa yowo-- Okola ntata ná. Nave yowo áhihihá-- nave ntata nawe nákokela mummo."
Luke6:11 Nyenya yale yákhala ni anepa; elocha mukina ni mukhwawe enarwe‐emwerele Yesu sheni.
Luke6:12 Nave wári mahiku ala-- Yowo ákhuma aya o mwakoni ovekela; nave áshisha ohiyu wothene avekelaka wa Muluku."
Luke6:13 Nave oshile-- áhitchana óhuserya’we; nave áthanla mwa yawo khumi neli-- yawo’tho átchuwaliye nsina naya arummwa:"
Luke6:14 Simoni-- yowo ámutchuwaliye’tho Petro-- ni Andreya munnawe-- ni Yakobo-- ni Yohane-- ni Filipo-- ni Bartolomeyo--"
Luke6:15 ni Mateyu-- ni Tomasi-- ni Yakobo mwana a Alifeyo-- ni Simoni aweriwa Zelote--"
Luke6:16 ni Yuda mwana a Yakobo-- ni Yudase Isikariote-- yowo ári omveléla."
Luke6:17 Nave Yowo ákhuruwano-- émela va nlahani ni muloko mtokotoko wa óhuserya’we ni muloko mtokotoko wa atchu a o Yudeya othene ni Yerusalemu-- ni a o’shereshere wa cnia ya o Turo ni Sidoni-- yawo yárúle omwiwa Yowo ni openushiwa irecha saya;"
Luke6:18 nave awukhuliwa ti minepa yotakhala yápenushiwa--"
Luke6:19 nave muloko wothene ole wákhwela omutannya; ntakhara mwákhuma ikuru mwa Yowo-- sipenusha othene ala."
Luke6:20 Nave Yowo áweliha mitho awe wa óhuserya’we alocha-- Óréla óhawa nyuwo; ntakhara ori wawinyu omwene wa Muluku."
Luke6:21 Óréla nyuwo óvoliwa etala hihano; ntakhara munarwa‐m’vona. Óréla nyuwo awunla hihano; ntakhara munarwa‐mutheya.
Luke6:22 Óréla nyuwo-- atchu yarwa‐ewichani-- yomwalanyani-- yorohani-- eriha nsina nanyu ntoko nonanara-- ntakhara a Mwana a mutchu."
Luke6:23 Hakalalani nihiku nenlo-- tchapelani ni otheya; vawi onani-- samahala sanyu ti sitokotoko Wirimu; vawi makholo aya yáwerela alipa‐miririmo ntoko hiho."
Luke6:24 Nyenya ochilu wa nyuwo anene muhakhu! ntakhara mohakhela yohakalaliha’nyu.
Luke6:25 Ochilu wa nyuwo óvona hihano! ntakhara munarwa‐m’voliwa etala. Ochilu wa nyuwo-- ótheya hihano; ntakhara munarwa‐munla eyinlo ni wunla mithori."
Luke6:26 Ochilu wa nyuwo-- atchu othene yarwa‐yolochelani saphama! vawi makholo aya yáwihihá mummo alipa‐miririmo ówoka."
Luke6:27 Nyenya kinalocha wa nyuwo awiwa-- Sivelanani ni amwichani anyu;"
Luke6:28 erelani saphama yawo awicha nyuwo-- rélihani yawo awulumela nyuwo-- vekelelani yawo enawerelani clomwe."
Luke6:29 Yowo anomana weyo va nramani nimoha omvahe nikhwaya’tho; nave yowo anákha yawikhunelá-- ohimuwatele malayá."
Luke6:30 Mutchu mukina óveka etchu-- omvahe; nave yowo anákha sawá-- ohimveke’tho."
Luke6:31 Nave ntoko munakhwelelanyu nyuwo wi atchu enarwa‐ewerelani-- muwerele yawo mwawihihá yenyu mkhatinyu."
Luke6:32 Nave mwasivela yawo ósivelana ni nyuwo-- munarwa‐mwakhela othamaliwa wawisheni? vawi ahe alipa‐otcheka mkhataya enasivela yawo enasivelanayano."
Luke6:33 Nave mwawerela saphama yawo enawerelani saphama-- munarwa‐mwakhela othamaliwa wawisheni? vawi ahe atchu ótcheka mkhataya enera hihá."
Luke6:34 Nave mwápoleya atchu yawo munaweheryanyu wakhela’tho-- munarwa‐mwakhela othamaliwa wawisheni? vawi ahe atchu ótcheka ennapoleya ótcheka akhwaya-- wi yakhele’tho sokokihiwa hiho."
Luke6:35 Nyenya nkasivelanani ni amwichani anyu-- nave erelani saphama-- nave poleyani óhiweheryerya etchu nari; nave yamahala’nyu enarwa‐ekhala etokotoko-- nave nyuwo munarwa‐mukhala anamwane awe a Mtokotokosha owo; ntakhara Yowo anerela sorera atchu óhithamala ni ónanara."
Luke6:36 Khalani nyuwo aikharari ntoko Atithinyu ari aikharari.
Luke6:37 Nave muhithorihe-- nave nyuwo hamurwa‐muthorihiwa. Nave muhivanye-- nave hamurwa‐m’vanyihiwa."
Luke6:38 Taphulani-- nave munarwa‐mutaphuliwa. Vahani-- nave onarwa‐ovahiwa wa nyuwo; mweryo waphama wokhicheleya wometa woyeheryeya-- atchu enarwa‐yovahani m’matani mwanyu. Vawi onarwa‐weryiwa wa nyuwo ni mweryo yowo muneryanyuno."
Luke6:39 Nave Yowo álochano’tho niphwanaphwaniho-- Mano mutchu évasi anawerya ohóla mukhwawe évasi? herwa‐emorela ópili mu’khokweni?"
Luke6:40 Óhuserya hanakhala mtokotoko ni muhusiha’we; nyenya-- aryeheryiwe murima-- anarwa‐aphwanaphwana ni muhusiha’we."
Luke6:41 Nave onaweherya sheni mwékokhola ori mu nithoni na munná-- nyenya mwiri wa mu nithoni na weyo mwanene honasuwelasha?"
Luke6:42 Akhweya onawerya hai olocha wa munná-- Munna weyo-- hiya kithanle’mo mwékokhola ori mu nithoni ná-- ohiweherya weyo mwanene mwiri ori mu nithoni ná? Ówoka weyo! pacherya othanla’mo mwiri owo mu nithoni ná-- nave vavo onarwa‐owehasha phama ovíha’mo mwékokhola a mu nithoni na munná."
Luke6:43 Vawi hawivovo mwiri waphama wovaha sawima sawúcha; akhweya’tho mwiri wonanara wovaha sawima saphama.
Luke6:44 Vawi mwiri onasuwanyeya ni yawima’ya. Vawi atchu henarukula makúkhu va míwani-- akhweya va marulani hcnarukula mpesa."
Luke6:45 Mutchu aphama anakumiha saphama mu yaphama ya murima’we; nave mutchu ónanara anakumiha sonanara mu yonanara’we: vawi muwanoni mwawe anamlocha mwa wacha wa murima’we.
Luke6:46 Nave munakiromolelani Miyo-- Apwiya-- Apwiya-- ni ohera hiho kinalochaka?"
Luke6:47 Mutchu órwa wa Miyo-- ni wiwa masu aka-- ni wera yawo-- kinothonyeryani yowo anaphwanaphwaniyeno."
Luke6:48 Yowo anaphwanaphwana ni mutchu óteka empa-- yowo áthimpe vathi tchiri-- amaka othipela wa empa eyo va mwala: nave mahi yárúlaya-- muhiche wákusaka va empa eyo-- nave hiwáwenrye ochikinya; ntakhara yámakeya phama."
Luke6:49 Nyenya yowo aníwa-- ni ohera-- anaphwanaphwana ni mutchu ómaka empa va’tchayani-- yohikhala ni votikitheryeya; va yeyo muhiche wákusaka-- nave yáhúwa vavo; nave okumuwa waya wa empa eyo wári otokotoko."
Luke7:1 Yesu ámanliye masu awe othene m’maruni mwa atchu-- ávolowa m’Kapernao."
Luke7:2 Nave kapuro a Kenturiyo ósivelanano-- áhicheliwa-- anaháwela okokhowa."
Luke7:3 Nave yowo íwaliye sa Yesu-- áruma wa Yowo atokwene a aYuda-- emukoha Yowo wi arwe omvulusha kapuro awe."
Luke7:4 Nave yawo-- yáphiyalaya wa Yesu-- yámveka momuthunyerya-- yi-- Annaphwanela yowo wi m’mwerele ela:"
Luke7:5 vawi annasivela nloko nahu-- nave án’tekela hiyo empa yothukumanela’mo."
Luke7:6 Nave Yesu árowano. Nave vano arikimphiya Yowo vakhiviru va empa awe-- kenturiyo’wo áruma wa Yowo anthamwene awe-- olocha wa Yowo-- Apwiya-- muhisúkhule; vawi nkinaphwanela miyo wi murwe‐m’volowe vathi va nipatho naka:"
Luke7:7 ntakhara awe miyo nkisenre mekhaka óphwanela orwa wa Nyuwo; nyenya lochani masu-- nave mmiravo aka anapenushiwa."
Luke7:8 Vawi miyo’tho kiri mutchu awiwelela atokwene aka-- kokhalano asurutato awiwelela miyo: nave kinalocha wa ola-- Rowa-- nave annarowa; ni wa mukina-- Rwa-- nave annarwa; nave wa kapuro aka-- Nkera ela-- nave annera."
Luke7:9 Nyenya Yesu íwaliye hiho átikhina-- arukunuwa wa atchu ómutchara-- ii-- Kinalocha wa nyuwo-- nkiphwannye-- nari mwa Israyeli-- nroromelo ntokotoko nawihiha."
Luke7:10 Nave vokokela o’mpani órummwa’wo-- yáphwanya kapuro’wo apenuwale tchiri."
Luke7:11 Nave wári-- evinre elukuluku-- wi Yowo árowa witchokoni-- nsina naya Nayini; nave óhuserya’we ni muloko mtokotoko wa atchu yátchananano."
Luke7:12 Nave yáchamenlaya o mukhorani wa etchoko eyo-- onani-- yámtesha mutchu ókhwa-- mwana mwamulopwana mmoharu-- amannya ti námukhwele; nave atchu anchipale a witchokoni yárino vamoha."
Luke7:13 Nave Apwiya ámonniye-- ámoriwa ikharari ntakhara a yowo-- alochano-- Ohinle."
Luke7:14 Nave áháchamela-- atannya ntethe-- nave ótesha’wo yáhémela."
Luke7:15 Nave Yowo áhi-- Mmiravo weyo-- kinalocha wa weyo-- Nkavinya. Nave ókhwa owo ávinya-- apacherya wuluma. Nave ámveléla wa amannya."
Luke7:16 Nave wova wáhaphiyerya othene awo; nave yáchichimiha Muluku-- elocha wi-- Mulipa‐miririmo mtokotoko ovinya mwa hiyo; nave Muluku oharerya ni atchu awe."
Luke7:17 Nave ovuwa wawe wiwo wáhiweya o Yudeya wothe wene-- ni wilaponi yothene yawachamela."
Luke7:18 Nave óhuserya a Yohane yámuléla sothe sene iha.
Luke7:19 Nave Yohane áhitchana eli a óhuserya’we-- áruma wa Apwiya-- alocha-- Khwino mwá órwa owo-- akhweya niweheryerye mukina?"
Luke7:20 Nave yáphiyalaya wa Yowo atchu ale-- yáhi-- Yohane Mbatisi on’ruma hiyo wa nyuwo-- wi-- Khwino mwá órwa owo-- akhweya niweheryerye mukina?"
Luke7:21 Elukuluku yeyo ápenusha atchu anchipale irecha saya-- ni sawukhula-- ni minepa yonanara; nave atchu évasi anchipale áwoniha’tho."
Luke7:22 Nave áhákhula-- ii wa yawo-- Haweni-- muléle Yohane monnanyu-- nave mwiwalanyu; atchu évasi enakhela wona waya-- órakala mecho ennechecha-- amarecha ennaryeheryiwa-- óchiyana enniwa-- ókhwa ennavíhiwa-- wa óhawa ennalaleyeryiwa Mitchaka Yaphama."
Luke7:23 Nave óréla ori yowo ahinakwachuliwa ntakhara a Miyo.
Luke7:24 Nave echimunle mitchaka awe ya Yohane-- Yowo ápacherya olocha sa Yohane wa atchu ale-- ii-- Mwákhumale oya o’takhwani wona sheni?"
Luke7:25 Eheche yochikinyeya ni etcheku? Nyenya mwákhumale wona sheni? Mutchu ówara sowara sochetcheya? Onani-- yawo ówara sorera-- ni ókhala ólyólya-- ari mu’hano mwa mamwene."
Luke7:26 Nyenya mwákhumale wona sheni? Mulipa‐miririmo? Ai-- kinalocha wa nyuwo-- nave topwaha mulipa‐miririmo."
Luke7:27 Ola ti yowo wárempwe sa yowo-- Ona-- kinaruma Miyo órummwa’ka vahólo va withoni wá-- Yowo anarwa‐aryeherya ephiroá vakhoveni vá."
Luke7:28 Kinalocha wa nyuwo-- wi-- Mwa óyariwa ti athiana havovo mutchu mtokotoko ómpwaha Yohane; nyenya yowo ori mwamukhani mu Omwene wa Muluku ori mtokotoko ómpwaha yowo."
Luke7:29 Nave atchu othene ni alipa‐mushokho ene-- yíwalaya-- yáhákhulela wi Muluku ari ékhaikhai-- ntakhara yábatisiwa yawo ni obatiso wa Yohane."
Luke7:30 Nyenya aFarisi ni alipa‐malamulo yávanyiha othoriha wa Muluku wa yawo mekhaya-- ntakhara hiyábatisiwe ti yowo."
Luke7:31 Nave-- kinarwa‐kiphwaniherya ni sheni atchu óyariwa a mutano? nave enaphwanaphwana ni sheni?"
Luke7:32 Enaphwanaphwana ni anamwane ókhala va ntchachoni na marocha ni witchanana mukina ni mukhwawe-- ni olocha-- Hiyo náwopelani kaviriko-- nave nyuwo hamwínale hoe; náhinla eyinlo-- nave hamwánlale hoe."
Luke7:33 Vawi Yohane Mbatisi ophiya óhilya epau ni óhiwurya vinyo; nave munalocha-- Ori ni nsololo."
Luke7:34 Mwana a mutchu ophiya ólya ni ówurya; nave munalocha-- Onani-- mutchu óluluwa ni ówuryawurya vinyo-- nthamwene a alipa‐mushokho ni atchu ótcheka!"
Luke7:35 Nave miruku eneriwa yekhaikhai ni anamwane aya othene.
Luke7:36 Nave mmoha a aFarisi ámwitchana Yowo wi alyeno. Nave ávolowa m’pa mwa mFarisi-- ahámela va yólya."
Luke7:37 Nave onani-- muthiana ótcheka-- yowo ári mwitchokoni’mmo; nave ásuwenliye wi Yesu ámuhámela va yólya m’pa mwa mFarisi-- ákusha etchupa ya alebastero ya makhurwa awunkhela phama--"
Luke7:38 nave áhémela ochuli iwo-- va manani awe-- anla-- apacherya ochonyeriha mithori va manani awe úkutcha ni mihi a muru awe-- anúlasha manani awe-- óchiha ni makhurwa’wo awunkhela phama."
Luke7:39 Nyenya mFarisi-- yowo ámwitchanne-- ónniye-- áhi mwa mekhiye-- alocha-- Akhanleke mulipa‐miririmo ola akásuwelasha ori ani-- ni awisheni muthiana owo ómutannya owo-- ntakhara ori ótcheka."
Luke7:40 Nave Yesu áhákhula ii wa yowo-- Simoni-- kiri ni etchu yolocha ni weyo. Nave yowo áhákhula-- Muhusiha-- nkalochani."
Luke7:41 Mutchu ópoleyiha icharama árino alipa‐opoleya eli: mmoha owo ápoleya irupiya masana mathanu-- nyenya mukhwawe makhumi mathanu."
Luke7:42 Vawi hiyárino yokokiherya yawo-- áhákhurumuwela ópili. Wawihihá-- tani a yawo anarwa‐apwaha omusivela?"
Luke7:43 Simoni áhákhula-- ii-- Kinera wi-- yowo ákhurumuweliwe sopwaha."
Luke7:44 Nave áhi wa yowo-- Wothoriha phama. Nave árukunuwaliye wa muthiana owo-- áhi wa Simoni-- Onnamona muthiana yola? Kávolowa m’pa mwá-- hewákivahile mahi órapiha manani aka; nyenya ola ánaniha manani aka ni mithori-- úkutcha ni mihi awe."
Luke7:45 Hewákivahile onúla wa onthamwene; nyenya ola hahiyale onúla manani aka-- ovolowa wovolowa munno Miyo."
Luke7:46 Hawóchihale muru aka makhurwa; nyenya ola áhochiha manani aka makhurwa awunkhela phama.
Luke7:47 Ntakhara awe-- kinalocha wa nyuwo-- Sotcheka sawe-- tiho sinchipale-- sokhurumuweliwa; ntakhara ásivela winchipale; nyenya mutchu yowo anamkhurumuweliye tonto-- yowo anasivela tonto."
Luke7:48 Nave áhi wa muthiana-- Sotcheka sá sokhurumuweliwa."
Luke7:49 Nave yawo óhamelano va yólya yápacherya olocha mwa mekhaya-- Ola tani anakhurumuwela’tho sotcheka?"
Luke7:50 Nave Yowo áhi wa muthiana owo-- Nroromelo ná nihovulusha weyo; rowa ni murechele."
Luke8:1 Nave wári-- vavinre elukuluku wi áhechecha o michetcheni ni witchokoni-- olaleyerya ni wáléla Mitchaka Yaphama ya Omwene wa Muluku-- nave vamoha ni Yowo khumi neli awo--"
Luke8:2 ni athiana akina yawo yápenushiwe minepa yonanara ni sokhulumuwa-- tawo-- Mariya aweriwa Magadalene-- yowo masololo mathanu na meli yámukhumenle--"
Luke8:3 ni Yohana-- mwariye a Kuza kapitao a Herode-- ni Susana-- ni akina anchipale-- yawo yámuruménle ni muhakhu aya."
Luke8:4 Nave muloko mtokotoko wa atchu wáthukumannaya-- nave atchu a witchokoni sothene yáphiyalaya wa Yowo-- áhi mwa niphwanaphwaniho:"
Luke8:5 Akhuma mulipa‐omisa omisa mmiso awe; nave ámisiye mukina wámora mukhwipi mwa ephiro; nave wányikaliwa-- nave ipalame sa musulu sámala othupa."
Luke8:6 Nave mukina wámora va mwala; nave vomela wáhákuva onyála-- ntakhara hiwárino etchaya yonanela."
Luke8:7 Nave mukina wámora véri va míwa; nave míwa eyo yámelano vamoha-- enyoka."
Luke8:8 Nave mukina wámora va’tchayani yorera-- nave wámela-- wima sawíma sa makhumi khumi. Álonchiye iha Yowo ákhuwela-- Yowo ori ni maru awíwa íwe."
Luke8:9 Nave óhuserya’we yámkoha-- wi-- Niphwanaphwaniho nla n’ri nawisheni?"
Luke8:10 Nave Yowo áhi-- Wovahiwa wa Nyuwo osuwelasha sokhuweya sa Omwene wa Muluku; nyenya wa akina a’theru kinalocha mwa maphwanaphwaniho; wi vawona ehone-- ni vawiwa ehisuwelashe."
Luke8:11 Nyenya niphwanaphwaniho nla n’nihiha:
Luke8:12 Mmiso owo ti masu a Muluku. Nave owo wa mukhwipi mwa ephiro ti atchu yawo yiwale; vavo annarwa Musaserya-- avíha masu m’mirimani mwaya-- wi enirimroromela ni ovuluwa."
Luke8:13 Nave wa va mwala tawo-- vawiwa-- enákhela masu ni ohakalala nave yawo hiyanono mutathári-- enaroromela vakhani-- nave va mahiku awehiwa ennahapuwa."
Luke8:14 Nave ole wámonre o miwani-- tawo yiwale-- nave mu okhala waya ennanyokiwa ni wipa murima-- ni muhakhu-- ni sohakalaliha sa okumi-- nave henakhomáliha sawima sa mpurukumene."
Luke8:15 Nave ole wa mu’tchayani yorera-- tawo yiwale masu ekhapelela m’murimani worera ni waphama-- yima sawima ni ovilela."
Luke8:16 Nave havovo mutchu-- aparihale onyari-- anakhunéla ni yokusherya-- akhweya wiyathi vathi va okama; nyenya aniyathi va yawiyatherya’vo-- wi yawo enavolowa’mo yone omwaléla wu."
Luke8:17 Vawi hiyavovo etchu yovitheya-- yeyo herwa‐ekhala yawoneya; akhweya yokhuweya yeyo herwa‐esuwanyeya ni okhala vawoneya."
Luke8:18 Ntakhara awe weheryani miwelo anyu; vawi onarwa‐ovahiwa wa yowo orinono; nave wa yowo ohinono-- onarwa‐ovihiwa nari ele anoneyiye ntoko annakhalano."
Luke8:19 Nave yárwa wa Yowo amannya ni annawe-- nave heyáwenrye omwachamela-- ntakhara a muloko wa atchu."
Luke8:20 Nave yámuléla Yowo-- wi-- Aminyu ni anninyu enamwemela okhwipi-- enakhwela owonani."
Luke8:21 Nyenya Yowo áhákhula-- ii wa yawo-- Amai aka ni annaka ari yawo eniwa Masu a Muluku-- enera."
Luke8:22 Nave vári nimoha na mahiku ala-- wi Yowo ávolowa m’mwacheyani-- ni óhuserya’we; nave áhi wa yawo-- N’lapuwele ekhopela ele ya enia; nave yáhotowela."
Luke8:23 Nave erikimrowa va mahini Yowo árupa. Nave vákhuruwela va enia etcheku etokotoko; nave mahi yámsareya-- enámóva."
Luke8:24 Nave yárwa wa Yowo-- emvíha-- elocha-- Apwiya-- Apwiya-- n’nariméla. Nave ávinya-- asamela etcheku ni machumusha’ya a mahi; nave sámála."
Luke8:25 Nave wáhera chú. Nave Yowo áhi wa yawo-- Nroromelo nanyu n’ri wowi? Nave yóvaya yátikhina-- elocha mukina ni mukhwawe-- Nki ola tani-- wi anamulamulela etcheku ni mahi-- nave sinam’mwiwelela."
Luke8:26 Nave yawo yápurulela va’shereshere wilaponi ya Gerasa-- tiyo yowehana ni Galileya."
Luke8:27 Nave ákhumenliye va mokoni-- áhopanano mulopwana a witchokoni-- yowo árino masololo; nave mahiku manchipale háwara yowara-- nave hákhala m’pa-- nyenya m’mahiyeni."
Luke8:28 Nave ámonniye Yesu yowo ákhuwela-- úwela vathi vahólo vawe-- ii ni masu matokotoko-- Kirino sheni ni Nyuwo-- Yesu Mwana a Muluku Mtokotokosha?"
Luke8:29 Kinovekani Nyuwo muhikihoshe? Vawi Yowo álamulela munepa wotakhala okhume mwa mutchu’wo. Vawi ilukuluku sinchipale wámphara; nave atchu yámmaka ni onyoro ni etuputu omkhapelela; nave áthikila véri somakela iho-- atchawihiwa ti nsololo nlo o’takhwani."
Luke8:30 Nave Yesu ámkoha-- wi-- Nsina ná wáni? Nave áhi-- Legio-- ntakhara masololo manchipale yávolowa mwa yowo."
Luke8:31 Nave yámveka Yowo-- wi ahilamulele evinye ovolowa o’pherini."
Luke8:32 Nave vári vavo muloko wa ikupa sinchipale sirikimulya m’mwakoni. Nave yámveka Yowo wi-- emyererye-- evolowe mu iho. Nave áhemyererya."
Luke8:33 Nave masololo awo yákhuma mwa mutchu evolowa mu ikupani: nave muloko’wo wákhuruwa ni wupuwa votherereya ni ovolowa mu’nia’mmo-- simiryiwa."
Luke8:34 Nave alipa‐okukhula’wo yonilaya yeyo yériwe-- yátchawa-- elokoha witchokoni ni m’mawani mwaya."
Luke8:35 Nave yawo yákhuma wona yeyo yériwe; nave yárwa wa Yesu-- emphwanya mutchu’wo-- mwa yowo masololo yákhumalaya-- akilanthe vathi va manani awe a Yesu ówara ni amiruku awe; nave yawo yáhóva."
Luke8:36 Nave yónil’awo yáháléla yawo mapenusheryo aya a óphariwa ti nsololo’wo.
Luke8:37 Nave atchu a miloko yothene a elapo ya Agerasa yawachamela yámkoha Yowo avinye wa yawo; ntakhara yawo yákhala ni wova otokotoko.
Luke8:38 Nave Yowo ávolowa m’mwacheyani-- akóka."
Luke8:39 Nave mutchu’wo mwa yowo masololo yákhumalaya ámveka Yowo akhaleno; nyenya ámuléla arowe-- alocha-- Kókela o’mpa wá-- othoriherye sitokotoko iho Muluku áwerenlá. Nave yowo ávinya-- alaleyerya witchokoni wothe wene sitokotoko iho Yesu ámwerenliye."
Luke8:40 Nave vókóka Yesu-- muloko wa atchu wámwakhela; vawi othene yámmuweherya."
Luke8:41 Nave onani-- várwa mutchu nsina nawe Yairo-- nave yowo ti mutokwene a empa yothukumanela; nave áhúwa va manani awe a Yesu-- amveka wi arwe o’mpa wawe;"
Luke8:42 ntakhara árino mwana mwamuthiana mmoharu-- a miyakha’we ntoko khumi na mili-- nave ámókhwa. Nyenya árowiye Yowo atchu a miloko yáwomanyanano."
Luke8:43 Nave muthiana-- ári ni erecha yokhuma nikhami miyakha khumi na mili-- yowo áphánrye alipa‐mureche sa okumi awe sothe sene--"
Luke8:44 nave háwenrye openushiwa ti mmoharu-- árwa ochuli wawe-- atannya maroso a yowara’we: nave vavo ochonya nikhami wawe wáhiya."
Luke8:45 Nave Yesu áhi-- Tani akitannyile Miyo? Nyenya othene yárunalaya-- Petro ni yawo áriyeno yáhi-- Apwiya-- atchu a miloko enamkakhana va Nyuwo ni owomanyana."
Luke8:46 Nyenya Yesu áhi-- Mukina okitannya Miyo; vawi kosuwela wi ikuru sokhuma mwa Miyo."
Luke8:47 Nave muthiana owo ónniye wi hawerya okhuweya-- árwa ni othukumela-- úwa vahólo va Yowo-- alokoha va mithoni va atchu othene awo nthowa naya ámutannye?-?nryiye-- ni wi ápenushiwa vavo."
Luke8:48 Nave Yowo áhi wa yola-- Mwanaka-- nroromelo ná nihovulusha; rowa ni murechele."
Luke8:49 Yowo arikimlocharu-- árwa mukina órwela wa mutokwene a mothukumanela-- alocha-- Mwaná ókhwa; ohimukhule Muhusiha."
Luke8:50 Nyenya Yesu áhiwa-- amwakhula yowo-- wi-- Ohóve; wirimroromelaru-- nave yowo anavulushiwa."
Luke8:51 Nave Yowo áphiyaliye o’mpa iwo-- hemyerenrye mukina ovolowano vamoha-- nyenya Petro-- ni Yohane-- ni Yakobo-- ni atithi a mwana owo-- ni amannya."
Luke8:52 Nave atchu othene yámmunlela ni wisukutcha va nakhopeni. Nyenya Yowo áhi-- Muhinle; vawi hakhwile-- nyenya anamrupa."
Luke8:53 Nave yámutheya ryaryarya vosuwela wi áhókhwa.
Luke8:54 Nave Yowo áphara ntata nawe-- itchana-- ii-- Nahano-- nkavinya."
Luke8:55 Nave munepa’we wákóka-- nave ávinya vavo; nave Yowo áháléla wi emvahe etchu yólya."
Luke8:56 Nave atithinnya ni amannya yátikhina: nave áhálamulela yawo ehiléle mutchu a’theru yeyo yériwe.
Luke9:1 Nave Yowo áhitchana vamoha khumi neli awo ávaha ikuru ni olamulelo va masololo-- ni sopenusha irecha."
Luke9:2 Nave áháruma yawo olaleyerya Omwene wa Muluku-- ni openusha atchu awicheliwa."
Luke9:3 Nave Yowo álochano-- Muhiteshe etchu ya mukwaha-- nari mutokoso-- nari murupa-- nari epau-- nari icharama; nave muhikhaleno malaya meli."
Luke9:4 Nave m’pa mothe mwene mwavolowa’mo-- khalani wiwo-- nave mwavinyeryeke wiwo."
Luke9:5 Nave othene yawo eni ehiwakheleni nyuwo-- mwákhumaka mwitchokoni yeyo-- tathani ntchupi na va manani anyu-- akhale namona a va yawo."
Luke9:6 Nave yawo yákhuma-- evira etchoko ni etchoko-- ni olaleyerya Mitchaka Yaphama-- ni openusha vothe vene."
Luke9:7 Nave Herode kamphumu’wo áhiwa ovuwa waya wa sothe sene sériwe; nave sámuhaléliha-- ntakhara wi yálocha atchu akina-- wi Yohane ávinya wa okhwa;"
Luke9:8 nyenya akina-- wi Eliya áhoneya; nave akina-- wi mulipa‐miririmo mukina a akhalai ale ávinya’tho."
Luke9:9 Nave Herode áhi-- Yohane kámuthikila muru miyo; nyenya ola tani kiniwaka sawihiha sa Yowo. Nave ákhwelakhwela omóna."
Luke9:10 Nave yákonkaya arummwa-- yámuthoriherya sothe sene yénraya. Nave Yowo áhákusha-- arowano va mekhaya witchokoni nsina naya Betsaida."
Luke9:11 Nyenya muloko wa atchu-- wásuwenlaya-- wámutchara; nave Yowo áwakhela-- alochano sa Omwene wa Muluku-- apenusha yawo yahawela openushiwa."
Luke9:12 Nyenya nsuwa náthitimana; nave khumi neli awo yárwa-- yi wa Yowo-- Nkalélani miloko ya atchu erowe-- wi eye witchokoni sawachamela ni m’mawani-- wavya vokona-- ni ophwanya sólya; ntakhara n’ri o nipuroni na’takhwa wino."
Luke9:13 Nyenya áhi wa yawo-- mwavahe olya yenyu. Nyenya yáhi-- Hiyo haninono ipau-- nyenya thanuru ni ihopa piliru; nyenya akhweya n’rowe wáthumela atchu ala sólya."
Luke9:14 Vawi yári alopwana ntoko masana makhumi mathanu. Nyenya Yowo áhi wa óhuserya’we-- Kilathihani yawo vathi miloko miloko-- ntoko makhumi mathanu-- makhumi mathanu."
Luke9:15 Nave yáhihihá-- yakilathiha vathi othene ala."
Luke9:16 Nave Yowo-- ákunshiye ipau thanu iho ni ihopa pili iho-- áweha wirimu-- aréliha-- akawa-- avaha wa óhuserya eveléle wa atchu awo."
Luke9:17 Nave yálya-- evona othene ala; nave yárola sawahalela inyenyeri-- makali khumi na meli."
Luke9:18 Nave wári-- Yowo arikimvekela va mekhiye-- wi óhuserya yákhalano; nave áhákoha-- wi-- Miloko eyo ya atchu enalocha wi Miyo káni?"
Luke9:19 Nave yáhákhula yi-- Yohane Mbatisi; nyenya akina-- Eliya; nave akina-- wi ávinya’tho mmoha a alipa‐miririmo akhalai."
Luke9:20 Nave áhi wa yawo-- Nyenya nyuwo munalocha wi Miyo káni? Nave áhákhula Petro-- ii-- Kristu a Muluku."
Luke9:21 Nave áhálélasha-- álamulela wi ehiloche ela wa mutchu a’theru;"
Luke9:22 ii-- Ori wophwanela wi Mwana a mutchu óne sososa sinchipale-- ni okhochiwa ti atokwene-- ni alipa‐ephepa atokotoko-- ni alipa‐orepa-- ni wiphiwa-- ni ovinya’tho nihiku naneraru."
Luke9:23 Nave Yowo álocha wa othene-- Mutchu ákhwelaka orwa vachuli vaka-- írohe mekhiye-- íreye mwikimanyo awe nihiku n’nihiku-- akitchare Miyo."
Luke9:24 Vawi mutchu yowo anakhwela ovulusha okumi awe-- anarwa‐ariha yola; nyenya mutchu yowo anariha okumi awe-- ntakhara a Miyo-- anarwa‐avulusha yola."
Luke9:25 Vawi mutchu anarukunushelani-- íphwanyerya elapo yothene ya vathi íriha’vo akhweya oliva’vo okumi awe?"
Luke9:26 Vawi mutchu yowo anúliwa muru ntakhara a Miyo ni masu aka-- Mwana a mutchu anarwa‐úliwa muru ntakhara a Yowo-- aniriye aphiye ni nchichimiho nawe n’na Atithi-- n’na angelo awéla."
Luke9:27 Nyenya Miyo kinalocha ni nyuwo separipari-- Ori akina a yawo awemela vava-- yawo herwa‐elawiharu okhwa-- ophiyerya yónne Omwene wa Muluku."
Luke9:28 Nave emanle ntoko mahiku mathanu na mararu alonche masu yala-- Yowo ákusha Petro ni Yohane ni Yakobo eroweno-- ewela m’mwakoni ovekela."
Luke9:29 Nave arikimvekela-- woneya wa withoni wawe wáthatuwa-- nave yowara yawe yáhéla nave yáhárya."
Luke9:30 Nave onani-- yámlochelanano alopwana eli-- tawo Mose ni Eliya;"
Luke9:31 yawo yóneiye mu nchichimiho-- elocha sa orowa wawe wiwo áhaweliye okutchula o Yerusalemu."
Luke9:32 Nyenya Petro ni yawo áriyeno yálimeliwa ni ikhove; nyenya yonaya tchiri-- yáhona nchichimiho nawe-- ni alopwana eli awo awemelano vamoha--"
Luke9:33 Nave vári erikimmwalanano yala ni Yowo-- Petro áhi wa Yesu-- Apwiya-- ti waphama wi n’ri vava; nave nimake mikotcha miraru-- mmoha wa Nyuwo-- ni mmoha wa Mose-- ni mmoha wa Eliya; ahisuwelaka yeyo analochiye."
Luke9:34 Nave arikimlocha iha-- nákhala néku-- nawahuruwela yawo: nave yáhóva yávolowaya mu nekuni’mmo."
Luke9:35 Nave mwákhuma masu mu nekuni’mmo ólocha-- Ola ti Mwana’ka-- óthanliwa owo; mwiweleleni."
Luke9:36 Nave yénre hihá masu awo Yesu áphwanyiwa ari mekhiye. Nave yawo yákhala lakalaka-- nave hiyálénle mutchu a’theru etchu emoha ya iho yónnaya mahiku yale."
Luke9:37 Nave vári-- omelo aya-- akhuruwale m’mwakoni-- muloko mtokotoko wa atchu wákumanano."
Luke9:38 Nave onani ákhuwela mutchu a m’mulokoni’mmo-- alocha-- ii-- Muhusiha-- kinovekani-- weheryani mwana’ka; ntakhara wi ori mmoharu a miyo:"
Luke9:39 nave onani-- onnamphara munepa-- nave wi nyahu annakhuwela; nave onnamwahula ni omwavuwiha niphoru vawanoni-- ovinya mwa yowo mopharula-- omuntakanya."
Luke9:40 Nave káveka óhuserya’nyu wi ekumihe; nave heyáwenrye.
Luke9:41 Nave Yesu áhákhula-- ii-- Kha-- atchu óhiroromela ni amarapwa nyuwo-- kinakhala ni nyuwo elukuluku yawisheni-- ni wohiyereryani? nkamurúhe wino mwaná."
Luke9:42 Nave yowo arikimórwa-- nsololo nlo námukuha-- nimwahulasha. Nyenya Yesu ásamela munepa wotakhala owo-- ampenusha mmiravo-- amkokiha wa atithinnya."
Luke9:43 Nave othene yátikhina va otokwene awe wa Muluku. Nyenya othene erikimtikhina ni sothe sene énriye-- Yowo áhi wa óhuserya’we--"
Luke9:44 Evolowe masu ala m’maruni mwanyu: vawi Mwana a mutchu anirimveléliwa m’matani mwa atchu.
Luke9:45 Nyenya yawo heyásuwenlesha masu ala-- nave yákhuwiwa wa yawo-- wi ehisuwele; nave yáhóva omukoha sa masu ala."
Luke9:46 Nave yápacherya ovanyihana wi-- mtokotoko mwa yawo pani?"
Luke9:47 Nyenya Yesu ónniye ovanyihana wa mirima’ya-- ákusha mwámwana-- amwemesha vakhwipi vawe--"
Luke9:48 ii wa yawo-- Mutchu yowo anákhela mwámwana ola mu nsina naka anákhela Miyo; nave yowo anákhela Miyo anákhela Yowo ákirumme Miyo: vawi yowo ókhala mukhanikhani a nyuwo othene-- yola ti mutokwene."
Luke9:49 Nave Yohane áhákhula ii-- Apwiya-- náhóna mukina akumihaka masololo mu nsina nanyu; nave námuhiha-- ntakhara hanatcharana ni hiyo."
Luke9:50 Nyenya Yesu áhi wa yawo-- Muhimuhíhe-- vawi yowo ahinovanyihani anamokhaviheryani."
Luke9:51 Nave vári-- yápachenryaya okhwanela mahiku awi ákheliwe Yowo Wirimu-- Yesu átitelela owehiha withoni wawe oya o Yerusalemu--"
Luke9:52 arumiha mitchaka vahólo vawe; nave yárowa-- evolowa mwitchokoni ya aSamariya-- omuryeheryela nipuro."
Luke9:53 Nave yawo heyámwakhenle-- ntakhara withoni wawe wári wowehasha oya o Yerusalemu."
Luke9:54 Nave óhuserya’we Yakobo ni Yohane yónnaya-- yáhi-- Apwiya-- munakhwela wi n’léle moro okhuruwe wirimu ni watchupula yawo?"
Luke9:55 Nyenya Yowo árukunuwa álopola.
Luke9:56 Nave árowa witchokoni ya’theru.
Luke9:57 Nave yawo erikimwecha m’phironi-- mutchu áhi wa Yowo-- Miyo kinotcharani Nyuwo wothe wene munaviranyu’wo."
Luke9:58 Nave Yesu áhi wa yowo-- Ananthala arino mihikhwe-- ni ipalame sa wirimu ipuru-- nyenya Mwana a mutchu hanono vohamela muru."
Luke9:59 Nave áhi wa mutchu mukina-- Kitchare Miyo. Nyenya yowo áhi-- Mukemyererye Apwiya-- kipacherye orowa kavithe murutchu wa atithaka."
Luke9:60 Nyenya áhi wa yowo-- Hiya atchu ókhwa evithe alipa‐okhwa a yawo mekhaya; nyenya rowa weyo ovuwihe ovuwa waya wa Omwene wa Muluku."
Luke9:61 Nave mukina’tho áhi-- Apwiya kinotcharani Nyuwo; nyenya mupacherye okemyererya kalanyaneno a o’mpa waka."
Luke9:62 Nyenya Yesu áhi wa yowo-- Havovo mutchu aphanre ehipa etokwene-- anaweha’tho sochuli-- anaphwanela Omwene wa Muluku."
Luke10:1 Simanle iha Apwiya áthanla akina makhumi mathanu na meli-- áruma yawo eli eli muhólo mwawe witchokoni sothe sene ni o mapuroni wothe wene wiwo áháweliye ophiya’wo mwanene."
Luke10:2 Nave álochano-- Olya wohácha-- nyenya alipa‐muteko háchile; wawihihá vekani mwanene olya-- wi akakhele alipa‐muteko wukhupani wawe."
Luke10:3 Rowani; nkonani-- Miyo kinorumani ntoko asana a ipuchepuche véri va anapíli."
Luke10:4 Muhiteshe murupa wa icharama nari murupa wa iphika-- nari isapato; nave muhilochele mutchu va’phironi."
Luke10:5 Nave m’pa mothe mwene mwavolowa’mo m’pacherye olocha-- Murechele okhale o empa ela."
Luke10:6 Nave akhala’wo mwana a murechele wiwo-- murechele anyu onarwa‐witchuwa va yowo; nyenya áhivovo-- onarwa‐wokokelani."
Luke10:7 Nave m’pa mummo khalani-- ni olya ni owurya sa wiwo; vawi mulipa‐muteko anaphwanela yamahala’we; muhiyéke empa ela ni ela."
Luke10:8 Nave mwitchokoni mothe mwene mwavolowa’mo-- nave enawakhelani-- lyani hiho enovahayani;"
Luke10:9 nave penushani awicheliwa ari mummo-- nave mulocheno-- Omwene wa Muluku wowachamelani."
Luke10:10 Nyenya witchokoni wothe wene mwavolowa’mo-- nave henawakhelani-- mukhumale o makhwála’ya nkalochani--"
Luke10:11 Nari ntchupi norwela witchokoni wanyu-- nawakélela o manani wahu ninnotathelani-- nyenya suwelashani ela-- wi Omwene wa Muluku wohachamela."
Luke10:12 Kinalocha ni nyuwo wi nihiku nenlo o Sodoma onarwa‐ovileleya opwaha etchoko yeyo.
Luke10:13 Ochilu wa weyo-- Korazini! ochilu wa weyo Betsaida! wi séreiyeke m’Turo-- ni Sidoni-- saikuru iha seriwe wa nyuwo-- ekátcharuwa khalai ni okilathi vathi ewanre eshakhwi ni makhala."
Luke10:14 Nyenya o Turo ni Sidoni onarwa‐ovileleya mu othoriha-- opwaha nyuwo."
Luke10:15 Nave weyo-- Kapernaumu-- mano onarwa‐owelihiwa ophiyerya wirimu?"
Luke10:16 Onarwa‐okurushiwa ophiyerya o Hade. Mutchu awiwelela nyuwo-- anaki?-?welela Miyo; nave ókhocha nyuwo-- anakikhocha Miyo; nave ókikhocha Miyo anamukhocha Yowo ákirumale."
Luke10:17 Nave makhumi mathanu na meli ale yákóka mohakalala-- elocha-- Apwiya-- nari masololo yán’lapa hiyo mu nsina nanyu."
Luke10:18 Nave áhi wa yawo-- Káhóna Satana arikimmora ntoko etari orwela wirimu."
Luke10:19 Nkonani-- kihovahani olamulelo wonyikala va inowa ni iyalala ni va ikuru sothe sene sa mwichani owo; nave hiyawowo etchu enovulaliheni nari."
Luke10:20 Nyenya muhihakalaleno wi minepa yáhólapani-- nyenya hakalalani wi masina’nyu árempwa wirimu."
Luke10:21 Elukuluku yeyo áhakalala ni Munepa Wawéla-- ii-- Kinawakhulelani Nyuwo-- Atithi-- Apwiya a wirimu ni elapo-- wi iha mwáhákhuwela alipa‐miruku ni osuwelasha-- nave mwáhupululela anamwane a makwiya; Ahe-- tchiri-- Atithi-- wi wawihihá wáhakalaliha va’khoveni vanyu."
Luke10:22 Sothe sene soveléliwa wa Miyo ti Atithaka; nave havovo mutchu anasuwelasha Mwana ori ani-- nyenya Atithi; nave Atithi ari ani-- nyenya Mwana-- ni wa yowo Mwana anakhweliye omupululela."
Luke10:23 Nave árukunuwaliye wa óhuserya’we-- va mekhaya áhi-- Óréla mitho awo awona iha munonanyu."
Luke10:24 Vawi kinalocha ni nyuwo wi alipa‐miririmo ni mamwene manchipale yákhwela wona munonanyu iha-- nave hayónile; ni wiwa muniwanyu iha-- nave hayíwale."
Luke10:25 Nave nkonani-- mulipa‐malamulo mukina ávinya amweha-- alocha-- Muhusiha-- Kinarwa‐kivolowa okumi wohimala ni wera sheni?"
Luke10:26 Nave áhi wa yowo-- M’malamulo murempwe sheni?"
Luke10:27 Onalakhanya hai? Nave yowo áhákhula ii-- Osiveleke Apwiya Mulukuá ni murimá wothene-- ni okumiá wothene-- ni ikuru sá sothene-- ni mirikuá yothene-- ni muhimá ntoko weyo mwanene."
Luke10:28 Nave áhi wa yowo-- Wohakhula phama; era ela-- nave onakhala ni okumi."
Luke10:29 Nyenya yowo-- vokhwela wisera mekhiye ékhaikhai-- áhi wa Yesu-- Nave muhimaka tani?"
Luke10:30 Nave Yesu ámwákha masu-- ii-- Mutchu mukina ákhuruwa orwela o Yerusalemu oya o Yeriko; nave ávolowa m’matani mwa alipa‐ohuhula yawo yámurunle sowara-- emuwashula-- evinya’vo emuhiyale aháwelaka okhwa."
Luke10:31 Nave wáhihihá wi mulipa‐ephepa mukina ákhuruwa ephiro yeyo-- nave ámonniye ávira makupa makina."
Luke10:32 Mwawihihá’tho mLevi-- áphiyaliye va nipuroni’vo-- ámóna-- avira makupa makina."
Luke10:33 Nyenya mSamariya mukina ari va mukwahani vawe áphiya vavo áriye’vo; nave ámonniye-- ámoriwa ikharari--"
Luke10:34 arwa wa yowo-- amaka makhwacha’we ahela’vo makhurwa ni vinyo; nave ámwiyathi va’namani vawe ya yowo mekhiye-- arwano o’mpa ya alecho-- amukhapelela."
Luke10:35 Nave omelo aya ákumiha irupiya sa meya pili amunnya mwanene empa ya alecho-- ii-- Mukhapelele yowo-- nave etchu yeyo onamvahá mopwahiha-- miyo-- kikónke-- kinokokiherya."
Luke10:36 Ovi a ala araru-- onerá akhala muhima a yole ámorenle m’matani mwa alipa‐ohuhula? Nave áhi-- Ámmorenle ikharari owo."
Luke10:37 Nave Yesu áhi wa yowo-- Hawe-- were weyo hihá."
Luke10:38 Nave erikimwecha mukwaha’ya Yowo ávolowa mwitchokoni ekina; nave muthiana mukina nsina nawe Malita ámwakhela o’mpa wawe.
Luke10:39 Nave árino munnawe ótchuwiwa Mariya-- tuwo’tho ákilanthe va manani a Apwiya-- iwa masu awe."
Luke10:40 Nyenya Malita áweyiwa ni oruméla winchipale; nave árwa’wo ii-- Apwiya-- Hamunathokororya wi munnaka okihiya kiruméleke mekhaka?"
Luke10:41 M’muléle vano wi akikhaviherye. Nyenya Apwiya áhákhula ii wa yowo-- Malita-- Malita-- onípa murima ni wukhuwa ni itchu sinchipale;"
Luke10:42 nyenya enathowa etchu emoha; vawi Mariya áthanla nipatusho norera nenlo han’rwa‐nivíhiwa wa yowo.
Luke11:1 Nave wári-- vokhala Yowo va nipuroni vakina ni ovekela-- áhiyaliye-- mukina a óhuserya’we áhi wa Yowo-- Apwiya-- nihusiheni hiyo ovekela-- ntoko’tho Yohane áhusiha óhuserya’we."
Luke11:2 Nave áhi wa yawo-- Mwávekelaka lochani-- Atithi-- Nsina nanyu nélihiwe; Omwene anyu orwe;"
Luke11:3 Nivaheni hiyo nihiku n’nihiku yólya ya va nihikuni.
Luke11:4 Nave munikhurumuwele hiyo sotcheka sahu; vawi’tho hiyo mekhihu ninnakhurumuwela mutchu yowo ananipoleya. Nave muhinikusherye hiyo mu wehiwa.
Luke11:5 Nave áhi wa yawo-- Tani a nyuwo anarwa‐akhala ni nthamwene awe-- aya wa yowo ohiyu eriyari-- ii wa yowo-- Nthamwene-- kipoleye ipau raru;"
Luke11:6 vawi okirwela nthamwene aka órwela va mukwahani-- nave nkinono yomvaha;"
Luke11:7 nave owo a mpuwa’mmo vawakhula ani-- Ohikukhule; va milakoni ti vowaliwa hihano-- nave anamwane aka ari ni miyo vamoha vokona; nkiwerya ovinya ni wovaha weyo?"
Luke11:8 Kinalocha ni nyuwo-- nari harwa‐avinya ni omvaha-- ntakhara wi ori nthamwene awe-- nyenya ntakhara a nthiti nawe anavinya amvaha itchu sothe sene sinamuthowa."
Luke11:9 Nave Miyo kinalocha ni nyuwo-- Vekani-- nave onarwa‐ovahiwa wa nyuwo; avyani-- nave munarwa‐m’phwanya; okotchani-- nave munarwa‐muhuleliwa."
Luke11:10 Vawi óveka owo annákhela; nave awavya owo annaphwanya; nave awokotcha owo annahuleliwa.
Luke11:11 Nave tani a nyuwo ari atithi-- mwanawe arwa‐amveka epau-- anamvaha nluku? akhweya ehopa-- amunnya enowa mu nipuroni mwa ehopa?"
Luke11:12 akhweya’tho arwa‐amkoha noche anamvaha eyalala?
Luke11:13 Vawihihá-- khwino nyuwo-- ókhala ónanara-- munasuwela wávaha anamwane anyu samahala saphama-- wopwaha wawihai nki Atithinyu a wirimu anarwa‐avaha Munepa Wawéla wa yawo ómveka Yowo."
Luke11:14 Nave ámkumiha nsololo nohilocha. Nave wári-- nsololo nikhumale-- óhilocha owo álocha; nave miloko ya atchu yátikhina."
Luke11:15 Nyenya akina a mwa yawo yáhi-- Ni Beelzibuli mutokwene a masololo-- anakumiha masololo."
Luke11:16 Nyenya akina yámweha-- ekhwela wa Yowo eneneryo yorwela wirimu."
Luke11:17 Nyenya Yowo-- ásuwenliye sawupuwelela saya-- áhi wa yawo-- Omwene wothene wokawaneya vovanyihana va mekhaya onamwaryeya; nave empa yakawaneya wivanyiha mekhaya enúwa."
Luke11:18 Nave’tho Satana akawaneya wivanyiha mwanene-- onemela hai omwene awe? vawi munalocha wi kinakumiha masololo ni Beelzibuli."
Luke11:19 Nyenya Miyo kákumihaka masololo ni Beelzibuli-- anamwane anyu enakumiha náni? Mwa ela yawo enakhala óthoriha anyu."
Luke11:20 Nyenya Miyo kákumihaka masololo ni munwe wa Muluku-- vavo omwene wa Muluku wohophiyeryani."
Luke11:21 Vothe vene mwanene ikuru anaweheryiye va’tchachoni vawe itchu sawe siri m’murecheleni;
Luke11:22 nyenya vothe vene aniriye amurwele ómpwaha ikuru-- amurushiha-- anamvíherya mavaka’we othene yawo ílipihenryiyeno-- akawa sohuhula sawe."
Luke11:23 Yowo óhakhulelana ni Miyo anavanyihana ni Miyo; nave yowo óhithukumanya vamoha ni Miyo annamwaramwasha.
Luke11:24 Vothe vene munepa wotakhala onakhumaya mwa mutchu onnavira opwaha mapuro órama mahi onavya witchuwa; nave wáhi?-?phwanya onnalocha-- Kinakokela o’mpa waka wiwile kákhumalaka’wo;"
Luke11:25 nave vophiya-- onnaphwanya yoveliwa ni yoryeheryiwa."
Luke11:26 Vavo onnarowa okusha minepa mikina mithanu na mili yonanara yompwaha yowo mwanene; nave ennavolowa ekhala wiwo; nave makhalelo awe ókutchulela a mutchu’la ennananara opwaha ópacherya’wo.
Luke11:27 Nave wári-- alonche iha Yowo-- muthiana mukina a m’mulokoni mwa atchu áweliha masu-- ii wa Yowo-- Yóréla erukulu ela yóyanreni-- ni mapele yawo mwámwilanyu."
Luke11:28 Nyenya Yowo áhi-- Ai-- nyenya óréla tawo awiwa masu a Muluku ekhapelela."
Luke11:29 Nave yáthukumannaya vamoha miloko ya atchu-- ápacherya olocha-- Atchu ala tachu ónanara; enakhwela eneneryo-- nave eneneryo herwa‐evahiwa wa yawo nyenya eneneryo ya Yona."
Luke11:30 Vawi ntoko Yona ári eneneryo wa aNinevi-- wawihihá’tho anarwa‐akhala Mwana a mutchu wa atchu ala."
Luke11:31 Mwene mwamuthiana a witchekuni ya murupi anarwa‐avinya va mulachuni wokutchula vamoha ni alopwana a atchu ala-- áványiha; wi árwa orwela o makutchuwelo a elapo orwa‐wiwa miruku ya Solomoni; nave onani-- ómpwaha Solomoni ori vava."
Luke11:32 Alopwana a o Ninevi enarwa‐evinya va mulachuni wokutchula vamoha ni atchu a mahiku ala-- yáványiha; vawi yawo yátcharuwa ni olaleyerya wa Yona; nave onani ómpwaha Yona ori vava."
Luke11:33 Havovo mutchu-- aparihale onyari-- aniyathi m’pa ya vathi-- akhweya vathi va mweryo-- nyenya va yawiyatheryavo aya-- wi yawo óvolowa’mo yone omwaléla."
Luke11:34 Onyari wa mwíli ti nitho ná: vothe vene nitho ná n’riaya nophameya mwíliá wothene onamwaléla’tho mothe mwene’mmo; nyenya nakhala nonanara-- nave mwíliá ori wepiphiru."
Luke11:35 Wawihihá weherya omwaléla ori mwa weyo onirimkhala epiphi.
Luke11:36 Vavo-- mwíliá wothene wámwalélaka wohikhalano nipatusho naya nepiphi-- onarwa‐okhala womwaléla mothe mwene’mmo-- ntoko onyari ni warya waya onomwalélaya weyo."
Luke11:37 Nave alonche Yowo-- mFarisi ámkoha wi alyeno; nave ávolowa ahámela olya."
Luke11:38 Nave átikhina mFarisi owo-- ónniye wi ápacherya sólya ahinyawile."
Luke11:39 Nyenya Apwiya áhi wa yowo-- Hihano nyuwo aFarisi munéliha vate vaya va ekahi ni eparatho-- nyenya mpuwa mwaya munasareya sawákha ni sonanara."
Luke11:40 Ólosowa nyuwo Yowo úpale vate húpale’tho mpuwa mwaya?
Luke11:41 nyenya vahani yamahala ya ikharari sa mpuwa’mmo; nave onani-- sothe sene siri soryeheryiwa wa nyuwo."
Luke11:42 Nyenya ochilu wa nyuwo-- aFarisi! ntakhara munaveléla yanekhumi aya ya mwámmiso awunkhela-- ni mwámmiso osiviha yólya ni mathapa othene-- nave munnahiya othoriha ni osivela wa Muluku; mukáhera iha-- ni ohihiya sikina iho."
Luke11:43 Ochilu wa nyuwo-- aFarisi! ntakhara munasivela minyukhu yamahala mu ipa sothukumanela ni olocheliwa m’matchachoni a marocha."
Luke11:44 Ochilu wa nyuwo! ntakhara muri ntoko mahiye óhoneya-- nave atchu awechecha vasulu vaya henasuwela."
Luke11:45 Nave mmoha a alipa‐malamulo áhákhula-- alochano-- Muhusiha-- munalochanyu iha-- munan’lamwiha hiyo’tho."
Luke11:46 Nave áhi-- Ochilu wa nyuwo’tho-- alipa‐malamulo nyuwo! ntakhara munawireyiha atchu mirichi yohosha votesha-- nave nyuwo mkhatinyu hamunatannya mirichi’yo ni munwe anyu mmoha."
Luke11:47 Ochilu wa nyuwo! ntakhara munnamaka sa va mahiyeni a alipa‐miririmo-- nave makholo anyu yáwipha yawo."
Luke11:48 Hihá muri anamona-- nave munnákhulela miteko ya makholo anyu; ntakhara yawo tchiri yáwipha-- nyenya nyuwo munnámakela yawo sa va mahiyeni."
Luke11:49 Mwa ela’tho miruku ya Muluku yáhi-- Kinarwa‐kirumiha wa yawo alipa‐miririmo ni arummwa; nave akina a yale enarwa‐ewipha-- yáhosha;"
Luke11:50 wi nikhami na alipa‐miririmo othene-- n’chonyihiwe opacherya okilatheya wa elapo ya vathi navyiwe wa atchu a mahiku ala;"
Luke11:51 opacherya va nikhamini na Abele ophiyerya va nikhamini na Zakariya-- yowo yámwiphalaya véri vohelavo ephepa ni empa ya Muluku. Tchiri-- kinalocha wa nyuwo n’narwa‐navyiwa wa atchu a mahiku ala."
Luke11:52 Ochilu wa nyuwo-- alipa‐malamulo! ntakhara mwávíha’vo yohulela ya miruku; nyuwo hemwávolowile’mo mekhinyu-- nave mwáhíha yawo yávolowa."
Luke11:53 Nave Yowo ákhumaliye mummo-- alipa‐orepa ni aFarisi yápacherya omutunyerya winchipale-- ni omulochiha sa itchu sinchipale;"
Luke11:54 emuróra Yowo wiphini wi yakukuchele etchu yokhuma m’wano mwawe.
Luke12:1 Vavo atchu anchipalesha a muloko yáthukumannaya vamoha-- wawihihá wi yányikalana-- Yowo ápacherya olocha wa óhuserya’we-- vopacherya-- Nkamwiwaraliheni mekhinyu ni yoruruvaliha ipau ya aFarisi-- yeyo eri owoka."
Luke12:2 Nyenya heyavovo etchu yokhuneliwa yeyo herwa‐yupululiwa; ni yokhuweya yeyo herwa‐esuwanyeya.
Luke12:3 Ntakhara awe sothe sene mulonchanyu mwipiphini sinarwa‐siweya vokokoleya; nave yeyo mwálonchanyu mu naruni-- mu ipa sa mpuwa-- enarwa‐elaleyeryiwa va mapatho a ipa."
Luke12:4 Nave kinalocha wa nyuwo-- anthamwene aka-- Muhóve yawo enipha mwíli-- nave emanle ela heyanono etchu ya’theru eniryaya ewerye wera."
Luke12:5 Nyenya kinothoriheryani yowo munirianyu m’moveke: nkovani Yowo ani amanle wipha ari ni ikuru sovonya ni o gehena-- ahe-- kinalocha wa nyuwo-- ovani yowo."
Luke12:6 Iphera thanu hasinathuma asikhopiri eli? nave heyavovo emoha ya iho enachiwaleya va mithoni va Muluku;
Luke12:7 nyenya’tho nari mihi othene a va muruni vanyu ahalakhanyiwa. Muhóve-- munnapwaha esisapo aya ya iphera sinchipale."
Luke12:8 Nave kinalocha wa nyuwo-- Mutchu yowo anákhulela Miyo va mithoni va atchu-- ahe-- Mwana a mutchu anarwa‐amwákhulela yowo va mithoni va angelo a Muluku;"
Luke12:9 nyenya yowo ókikhocha Miyo va mithoni va atchu-- yowo anarwa‐akhochiwa va mithoni va angelo a Muluku."
Luke12:10 Nave mutchu yowo anarwa‐alochela Mwana a mutchu sonanara anarwa‐akhurumuweliwa; nyenya yowo analochela Munepa Wawéla sopwalu harwa‐akhurumuweliwa.
Luke12:11 Nave vothe vene eniryaya yokeriheni o mulachuni wa mothukumanela ni wa atokwene-- ni wa ólamulela-- muhipe murima ni wi munírúhe hai-- nave ni masu awisheni-- akhweya munaloche sheni;"
Luke12:12 vawi Munepa Wawéla anarwa‐ohusihani va elukuluku yeyo munaphwanelanyu olocha.
Luke12:13 Nave mutchu a m’mulokoni’mmo áhi wa Yowo-- Muhusiha-- lélani munnaka akawane ni miyo muhakhu wohiyiwa."
Luke12:14 Nyenya áhi wa yowo-- Mutchu we-- tani ákiyathile Miyo kikhale óthoriha-- nari awokawelani?"
Luke12:15 Nave Yowo áhi wa yawo-- Weheryani-- mwikhapelele osepa okhalela nrima wothe wene; ntakhara okumi awe wa mutchu honalikana ni wacha wa itchu sawe oriyeno."
Luke12:16 Nave álochano niphwanaphwaniho-- wi-- Emacha’we ya mutchu mwanene muhakhu yáruwerya phama."
Luke12:17 Nave áhupuwela‐upuwela mwa mekhiye alocha-- Kini kere sheni miyo-- vawi nkinono mokhapelela’mo sawima saka?"
Luke12:18 Nave áhi-- Kini kere hiha: Kinamwarya makhupi aka-- ni omaka’tho matokotoko-- nave kinakhapelela’mo olya waka wothene-- ni muhakhu aka."
Luke12:19 Nave kinalocha wa okumi aka-- Okumi weyo-- orino muhakhu mwinchipale wokhapeleliwa ophiyerya miyakha minchipale-- nkítchúwa’tho-- olye-- owurye-- ohakalale."
Luke12:20 Nyenya Muluku áhi wa yowo-- Ólosowa weyo-- ohiyu yola onakhweliwa okumiá; nave itchu iho wáryehenryá sini sikhale sa wani?"
Luke12:21 Anihihá mutchu awithukumanyerya muhakhu mwanene mekhiye óhikhalano muhakhu wa wa Muluku.
Luke12:22 Nave Yowo áhi wa óhuserya’we-- Ntakhara awe kinalocha ni nyuwo-- muhipe murima ni okumi anyu-- yeyo munirianyu mulye; akhweya ni mwíli anyu-- yeyo munirianyu muware."
Luke12:23 Vawi okumi ori wopwaha yólya-- nave mwíli onnapwaha yowara."
Luke12:24 Anyiheryani anakhuku-- wi henamisaru-- akhweya ohihacharu; hiyanono empa yokhapelela’mo; akhweya nikhupi; nave Muluku annályiha: nki nyuwo hamunapwaha ipalame winchipale!"
Luke12:25 Nave tani a nyuwo-- ni wipa murima anáwerye wachererya muwono va wunnuwa wawe?"
Luke12:26 Wawihihá mwáhiweryaka nari ekhanikhani-- munipelani murima ntakhara a sikina ihe?"
Luke12:27 Anyiheryani ithutu-- mannuwelo aya: hasinapharasha muteko ni ohiviya; nyenya kinalocha wa nyuwo-- Nari Solomoni mu nchichimiho nawe nothene háwanre ntoko emoha ya iha."
Luke12:28 Nyenya Muluku awariha wawihiha manashi a o’takhwani ókhala olelo-- nave omelo ennavonyiwa vikho; nki nyuwo harwa‐awunnyani wopwaha-- nyuwo óroromela tonto?"
Luke12:29 Nave nyuwo muhitchunetchune yeyo munirianyu mulye-- ni yeyo munirianyu muwurye; nave muhikhwe minikwa m’murimani."
Luke12:30 Vawi iha sothe sene maloko a atchu a vathi vano ennatchunatchuna; nyenya Atithinyu annasuwela wi iha sinnothowani.
Luke12:31 Nyenya’tho nkatchunatchunani Omwene awe-- nave iha sinachereryiwa wa nyuwo."
Luke12:32 Muhóve-- mwamuloko a ipuchepuche nyuwo; ntakhara Atithinyu annasivela wovahani Omwene."
Luke12:33 Tumihani itchu murianyuno-- m’vahe samahala saikharari; mwiryeheryele mirupa ya icharama yeyo ehinathála-- muhakhu wohimala wirimu-- wiwo alipa‐wiya ehináchamelaya’wo-- nave asocholo henapahula."
Luke12:34 Vawi wiwo ori muhakhu anyu-- wiwo onarwa‐okhala murimanyu’tho."
Luke12:35 Khalani awimakela mu’yununi-- nave onyari anyu okhale wovarela;"
Luke12:36 nave nyuwo mekhinyu khalani óphwanaphwana ni atchu óweherya pwiya’ya-- aniriye akóke orwela wuthelani; wi vorwa yowo-- okotcha-- emuhulele vavo."
Luke12:37 Óréla akapuro yawo-- pwiya’ya aniriye arwe-- anáphwanya ólipelela; tchiri kinalocha ni nyuwo-- wi yowo anarwa‐imakela mu’yununi-- ákilathiha vathi olya-- arwa-- áruméla."
Luke12:38 Nave arwa olipelela wanawili-- akhweya waneraru-- áphwanya erikihihá-- óréla ti yawo."
Luke12:39 Nyenya suwelashani ela-- wi mwanene empa ásuwenleke elukuluku aya yorwela mulipa‐wiya-- akálipelela-- nave hakémyerenrye empa’we ekhuvuliwe."
Luke12:40 Khalani awiryeherya nyuwo’tho: ntakhara elukuluku yeyo muhinanyiheryanyu-- Mwana a mutchu anarwa."
Luke12:41 Nave Petro áhi-- Apwiya-- niphwanaphwaniho nla khwino mun’lochenle hiyo-- akhweya’tho wa othene?"
Luke12:42 Nave Apwiya áhi-- Tani vano ori nahota óroromeleya ni amiruku-- yowo pwiya’we anarwa‐amwera kapitao a va emusi awe-- wávaha yawo iphika saya va elukuluku aya?"
Luke12:43 Óréla kapuro ola yowo pwiya’we aniriye aphiye-- anamphwanya éraka yawihihá."
Luke12:44 Kinalocha ni nyuwo separipari-- wi anarwa‐amwera kapitao a va sothe sene oriyeno."
Luke12:45 Nyenya kapuro’la alocha m’murimani mwawe-- Pwiyaka annalekelasha orwa; nave anirimpacherya omana amiravo ni asimwali ni olya ni owurya-- ni ohapaliwa;"
Luke12:46 pwiya a kapuro’wo anirimphiya nihiku nenla ahinamulipeleliye-- nave elukuluku yela ahinasuweliye-- amuthikilanya véri-- íyathi nipatusho nawe vamoha ni atchu óhiroromela."
Luke12:47 Nave kapuro’wo-- ósuwela okhwela wa pwiya’we-- nave háryehenrye-- nave hénre ntoko sa okhwela wawe iwo-- anarwa‐awashuliwa ni iwashushu sinchipale."
Luke12:48 Nyenya yowo ahásuwenle-- nave áhera sophwanela iwashushu anarwa‐awashuliwa tonto. Nave wa mutchu yowo ámvahiliye sinchipale-- wa yowo anarwa‐akhwela sinchipale; nave yowo ámunnyerenryiye sinchipale-- anarwa‐amuléla akokiherye sopwaha."
Luke12:49 Kárwa Miyo ovonya moro vathi vano; nave kinakhwela sheni wámanlaya oparihiwa?
Luke12:50 Nyenya kiri ni obatiso kini kibatisiweno; nave kinahawelela Miyo ophiyerya oniriaya okutchuliwe!
Luke12:51 Munanyiherya wi kárwela ovaha murechele vathi vano? Kinalocha wa nyuwo-- Hoe-- tchiri-- nyenya’tho omwalana;"
Luke12:52 vawi opacherya hihano enarwa‐ekhala mu empa emoha atchu athanu-- araru enarwa‐evanyihana ni eli-- nave eli enarwa‐evanyihana ni araru."
Luke12:53 Anarwa‐avanyihana atithi ni mwanawe-- nave mwana ni atithinnya; amai anarwa‐avanyihana ni mwana mwamuthiana-- nave mwana mwamuthiana ni amannya-- apwiya‐mwana anarwa‐avanyihana ni mwara a mwanawe-- nave mwara owo ni apwiya‐mwana awe."
Luke12:54 Nyenya Yowo álocha’tho wa miloko ya atchu awo-- Vothe vene munonanyu néku nowela wiwo onanéla nsuwa-- vavo munnalocha-- wi-- Epula ennórwa; nave ennihihá tchiri."
Luke12:55 Nave enopaya etcheku ya witchekuni ya murupi-- munnalocha-- wi-- Onakhala oviha tchiri; nave onnihihá’tho."
Luke12:56 Ówoka nyuwo-- munnasuwela osuwelasha withoni waya wa elapo ni wa wirimu; nyenya hai muhinasuwelanyu osuwelasha mahiku yala?"
Luke12:57 Nave nyuwo’tho-- va mekhinyu munahiyeryani othoriha wekhaikhai?"
Luke12:58 Vawi orikimrowano mukhwá a mulachu-- wa mulipa‐othoriha-- akuva va’phironi okutchula mulachu ni yowo-- wi anopurulele weyo wa mulipa‐othoriha-- nave mulipa‐othoriha owo anáveléle weyo wa musurutato-- nave musurutato anovonye weyo mu kariposo."
Luke12:59 Miyo kinalocha wa weyo-- Horwa‐okhuma’moru ophiyerya olimve mwékhopiri ókutchula."
Luke13:1 Nave yákhala’wo elukuluku yeyo-- atchu akina yawo yámulénle sa aGalileya-- yawo Pilato átakahenryiye nikhami naya ni iphepa saya."
Luke13:2 Nave Yowo áhákhula ii wa yawo-- Munanyiherya wi aGalileya ale yári atchu ótcheka opwaha aGalileya othene-- ntakhara yáhona sososa iha?"
Luke13:3 Kinalocha wa nyuwo-- Hoe tchiri; nyenya nyuwo mwáhirukunuwa murima-- munarwa‐mutholowa mothe mwene ntoko hihá."
Luke13:4 Akhweya yale khumi ni athanu nararu-- yawo empa yorekama ya m’Siloamu yáwuwenlaya ni owipha; munanyiherya wi yawo yári ótcheka opwaha atchu othene ókhala m’Yerusalemu?"
Luke13:5 Kinalocha wa nyuwo-- Hoe tchiri; nyenya mwáhirukunuwa murima munarwa‐mutholowa othene nyu emohamoha."
Luke13:6 Nave Yowo álocha niphwanaphwaniho nla; Mutchu mukina ári ni mukúkhu wawaliwa mithe m’machani mwawe mwa mpesa. Nave árwa ávya yawima va yowo-- nave áphwanya ehivovo."
Luke13:7 Nave áhi wa ókhapelela emacha ya mpesa-- Nkona-- evinre miyakha miraru kirikimórwa miyo wavya yawima va mukúkhu’la-- nave kinaphwanya ehivovo: nkúha; onananarihelani etchaya yaphama siyo ene?"
Luke13:8 Nave yowo áhákhula alochano-- Pwiya-- nkahiyani toko nari muyakha yolaru-- ophiyerya kithipenle ryú-- kihele’vo echúrwa;"
Luke13:9 nave warwa‐wima opacherya vavo-- yaphama; nyenya wahihihá-- munarwa‐múha tchiri."
Luke13:10 Nave ámuhusiha mu empa ekina yothukumanela’mo-- nihiku na Sabata."
Luke13:11 Nave muthiana árino munepa wawicheliwa‐icheliwa miyakha khumi na mithanu na miraru; akhala ókulama-- nave hárino ikuru nari sawinnuwela."
Luke13:12 Nave Yesu ámonniye-- ámwitchana-- alochano-- Muthiana we-- wotaphuliwa wicheliwa wá."
Luke13:13 Nave áhiyathi mata’we va yowo; nave vavo áhokowa’tho-- achichimiha Muluku."
Luke13:14 Nave mutokwene a empa yothukumanela áhukhuliwa m’murima-- ntakhara Yesu ápenusha nihiku na Sabata-- ákhula-- alocha wa muloko’wo-- Arivo mahiku mathanu na nimoha-- mummo atchu ennaphwanela ophara muteko-- ntakhara awe rwani wi m’penushiwe mahiku yawo-- nave tahi nihiku na Sabata."
Luke13:15 Nyenya Apwiya ámwakhula yowo-- ii-- Owoka nyuwo-- mutchu mukina a mwa nyuwo hanataphula enyope awe-- nari púru awe-- o yólyela’mo-- nihiku na Sabata-- orowano wi awuryihe mahi?"
Luke13:16 Nave muthiana ola-- ti mwana a Abrahamu-- yowo Satana ámmankiye-- onani-- miyakha khumi na mithanu na miraru-- manki honaphwanela-- wi ataphuliwe nikwekweso nawe nenla nihiku na Sabata?"
Luke13:17 Nave Yowo álonchiye hihá-- othene ale óvanyihanano yáhulihiwa muru; nave atchu othene a m’mulokoni yáhakalala ni itchu sothe sene sa nchichimiho iho Yowo énriye."
Luke13:18 Vavo álocha-- Omwene wa Muluku onaphwanaphwana ni sheni? nave kinarwa‐kiphwaniherya ni sheni?"
Luke13:19 Onaphwanaphwana ni mwámmiso a evai-- yowo mutchu ákunshiye-- ariha m’machani mwawe-- nave wámela-- wáhunnuwa mwiri; nave ipalame sa wirimu sákilathi m’mirai aya."
Luke13:20 Nave’tho áhi-- Kinarwa‐kiphwaniherya Omwene wa Muluku ni sheni?"
Luke13:21 Onaphwanaphwana ni yoruruvaliha ipau-- yeyo muthiana ákunshiye-- avitha m’mieryo miraru ya’shima-- ophiyerya yáruruvala yothene’yo."
Luke13:22 Nave Yowo ávira véri va michetche ni itchoko-- ahusiha-- écha mukwaha orowaru o Yerusalemu."
Luke13:23 Nave mutchu áhi wa Yowo-- Apwiya-- óvulushiwa tawala?-?khanyeya khwino?"
Luke13:24 Nyenya Yowo áhi wa yawo-- Ereryashani ovolowa va milakoni vonimuwa; ntakhara atchu anchipale-- kinolélani-- enarwa‐ekhwelakhwela ovolowa’mo-- nave herwa‐ewerya."
Luke13:25 Vári avinnye mwanene empa awala va milakoni-- nave nyuwo munarwa‐m’pacherya wemela va ntchachoni-- ni wokotcha va nseleni-- ni olocha-- Apwiya nihuleleni hiyo; nave Yowo anarwa‐ákhula ii wa nyuwo-- Nkinasuwela nyuwo wiwo munarwelanyu’wo;"
Luke13:26 vavo munarwa‐m’pacherya olocha-- Hiyo nálya nave náwurya vakhoveni vanyu-- nave mwáhusiha m’makhwála ówahu:"
Luke13:27 nave yowo anarwa‐alocha-- Kinalocha wa nyuwo-- Nkinasuwela wiwo munarwelanyu’wo; vinyani’vo va miva-- othene awera sohikhala sekhaikhai."
Luke13:28 Onarwa‐okhala wiwo wunla ni okhuriha minno-- munirianyu mone Abrahamu-- ni Isake-- ni Yakobo-- ni alipa‐miririmo othene-- mu Omwene wa Muluku-- nyenya nyuwo mekhinyu mukumiheryiwe vate."
Luke13:29 Nave atchu enarwa‐erwela wiwo onakhuma nsuwa-- ni wiwo onanéla nsuwa-- ni wiwo onaya etcheku ya murupi-- ni wiwo onarwela etcheku ya murupi-- ekilathi mu Omwene wa Muluku."
Luke13:30 Nave onani-- arivo ókiserya yawo enarwa‐ekhala ópacherya-- nave arivo ópacherya enarwa‐ekhala ókiserya."
Luke13:31 Va elukuluku yeyo yárwa’vo aFarisi akina-- elochano-- Khumani-- nave vinyani’wo wino; ntakhara Herode anahawela owiphani."
Luke13:32 Nave Yowo áhi wa yawo-- Haweni mwamuléle nanthala owo-- Nkonani kinakumiha minepa yonanara-- kinakutchula openusha olelo ni omelo-- nave omurocho kinakokholiwa."
Luke13:33 Nyenya’tho kinnaphwanela kirowe mukwaha’ka olelo ni omelo ni omurocho-- ntakhara honemyereryiwa wi mulipa‐miririmo atholowe okhwipi waya wa Yerusalemu."
Luke13:34 Yerusalemu-- Yerusalemu-- weyo awipha alipa‐miririmo-- ni awavonya maluku yawo enarummwa wa weyo! manki wili wili kákhwela othukumanya anamwaneá-- ntoko mwanakhu ni asana’we vathi va makuphelo awe-- nave hemwákhwenle hoe!"
Luke13:35 Onani empa’nyu enahiyiwa wa nyuwo-- ya milepe; nave kinalocha wa nyuwo-- wi-- Hamurwa‐mukona Miyo-- ophiyerya munarwa‐mwi-- Órélihiwa Yowo anarwa mu nsina na Apwiya."
Luke14:1 Nave vári Yowo ávolowiliye mu empa ya mmoha a aFarisi nihiku na Sabata-- olya epau-- yawo yámmurora. Nave onani-- vári okhoveni wawe mutchu a epúlu."
Luke14:2 Nave Yesu áhákhula ii wa alipa‐malamulo ni aFarisi-- alocha--"
Luke14:3 Onnemyiwa nihiku na Sabata openusha-- akhweya hoc?"
Luke14:4 Nyenya yawo yákhala lakalaka. Nave ámukusha yowo ampenusha-- amuléla arowe."
Luke14:5 Nave áhi wa yawo-- Tani a nyuwo púru awe nari enyope awe emorenle mwihimeni-- nave harwa‐akumiha vavo nihiku na Sabata?"
Luke14:6 Nave yawo heyáwenrye okokiha masu va itchu iha.
Luke14:7 Nave Yowo álocha niphwanaphwaniho wa yawo yítchaniwe wi alyeno-- vawona wi yámwithanlela minyukhu ya mahala--"
Luke14:8 alochano-- Vothe vene onitchaniwá weyo ti mutchu o yólya ya othela ohihamele va munyukhuni wa mahala; wi akhweya mukina a mahala awopwaha weyo anirimwitchaniwa ti yowo--"
Luke14:9 nave aniriye aphiye yowo áwitchanne ni ola-- anirimlocha wa weyo-- Mvahe ola nipuro; nave vavo onarwa‐opacherya wuliwa muru vokilathi va munyukhuni wokiserya."
Luke14:10 Nyenya vothe vene onitchaniwá weyo-- hawe wakilathi o nipuroni nokiserya; wawihihá wi arwile yowo áwitchanne weyo-- anirimlocha ni weyo-- Nthamwene aka-- susa-- wela wino: vavo onarwa‐okhala ni nchichimiho va mithoni va othene okhala va yólya vamoha ni weyo."
Luke14:11 Ntakhara mutchu yowo anisinnuwiha anarwa‐ayevihiwa; nave awiyeviha anarwa‐annuwihiwa.
Luke14:12 Nave álocha’tho wa yowo ámwitchanne-- Onaryeheryá yólya ya othana akhweya ya oshekuwa-- ohitchane anthamweneá-- nari anná-- nari a nihimo ná-- nari ahimá anene muhakhu; wi akhweya yawo’tho enakokiherya owitchana weyo-- nave onarwa‐okhalano yamahala."
Luke14:13 Nyenya wáryeheryaka yólya witchane óhawa-- órakala-- ótuthunya-- évasi;"
Luke14:14 nave onarwa‐okhala óréla; ntakhara yawo hiyanono yokokiherya weyo yamahala: vawi enarwa‐ekokiheryiwa yamahala va ovinya’tho wa ékhaikhai murima.
Luke14:15 Nave mukina a yawo óhamela va yólya vamoha ni Yowo íwaliye iha-- áhi wa Yowo-- Óréla yowo anarwa‐alya ipau mu Omwene wa Muluku."
Luke14:16 Nyenya áhi wa yowo-- Mutchu mukina áryeherya yólya etokotoko; ítchana atchu anchipale;"
Luke14:17 nave árumiha kapuro awe va elukuluku ya yólya olokoha wa awitchaniwa’wo-- Rwani-- ntakhara sothe sene soryeheryiwa hihano."
Luke14:18 Nave othene ni murima mmoha yápacherya ohuchukula. Ópacherya áhi wa yowo-- Miyo kothuma emacha-- nave kinaphwanela kikhume kóne; kinnoveka okemyererye miyo nkiya’wo."
Luke14:19 Nave áhi mukina-- Miyo kothuma inyope sa mapisi mathanu-- nave kinarowa wi keryerye; kinnoveka okemyererye miyo nkiya’wo."
Luke14:20 Nave áhi mukina-- Miyo kothela muthiana-- nave va nthowa nenla nkiwerya orwa."
Luke14:21 Nave kapuro’wo ákokiliye áléla pwiya’we itchu iha. Vavo mwanene empa áshimwa-- ii wa kapuro awe-- Akuva okhuma-- hawe o makhwála ni o’phironi sa muchetche-- wárúhe munno óhawa ni órakala ni évasi ni ótuthunya."
Luke14:22 Nave kapuro’wo áhi-- Apwiya-- yeyo mwálamulenlanyu yoheriwa-- nave nipuro ninnahalaru."
Luke14:23 Nave pwiya álocha wa kapuro’wo-- Khuma-- oye o ramphani ni iphiro sa o’machani owákelelihe atchu evolowe-- wi empa’ka esareye."
Luke14:24 Vawi kinalocha wa nyuwo-- wi havovo mmoha a alopwana awitchaniwa’le enarwa‐elawiha yólya’ka."
Luke14:25 Nave miloko minchipale ya atchu yámuhóla Yowo; nave Yowo árukunuwa-- ii wa yawo--"
Luke14:26 Mutchu arwa wa Miyo-- óhícha atithinnya ni amannya-- ni mwariye-- ni anamwane-- ni anna-- ni arokorawe-- ahe ni okumi awe ene wa yowo mwanene-- hanawerya okhala óhuserya’ka."
Luke14:27 Nave mutchu yowo ahinatesha mwikimanyo awe wa mwanene mekhiye-- ni orwa vachuli vaka-- hanawerya okhala óhuserya’ka."
Luke14:28 Vawi tani a nyuwo anahawela oteka empa yorekama-- hanalika okilathi-- álakhanyerya esisapo aya-- one árino sovelihano?"
Luke14:29 Wi akhweya áhinohiha-- atikithenrye vathi maluku a othipela waya-- nave ahiwerya oveliha-- atchu othene óvarerya enapacherya omutheya yowo-- ni olocha wi--"
Luke14:30 Mutchu’la ápacherya oteka-- nave hawenrye oveliha."
Luke14:31 Akhweya mwene tani arikimrowa okumana ni ekhocho ya mwene mukhwawe-- hanalika okilathi-- akohana ni atokwene áriki awerye ni asurutato awe masana makhumi khumi owanano ole anamórwa owo owanano ni asurutato masana makhumi khumi meli?"
Luke14:32 Nyenya áhiwerya anarumiha achamasowa-- vavo mukina owo oriye ochiwene-- akoha sa murechele."
Luke14:33 Ntakhara awe vano mutchu mukina a mwa nyuwo ahinaleva sothe sene oriyeno hanawerya okhala óhuserya’ka.
Luke14:34 Wawihihá mwapa ori wosiva; nyenya mwapa owo wonwa onasivihiwa ti sheni?
Luke14:35 Honaphwanela oheliwa va’machani nari va’chúrwani-- onayehiwa vate. Yowo orino maru awíwa iwe."
Luke15:1 Nyenya alipa‐mushokho othene ni atchu ótcheka yámwachamela orwa omwiwa.
Luke15:2 Nave yáchénya aFarisi ni alipa‐orepa-- yi-- Ola anakhela atchu ótcheka-- analyano."
Luke15:3 Nyenya álochano niphwanaphwaniho nla-- ii--"
Luke15:4 Mutchu tani a nyuwo orino ipuchepuche makhumi khumi-- nave voriméla emoha ya iho-- manki hanahiya mu’takhwani sikina iho makhumi mathanu na masheshe ni sowapula thanu na sheshe-- atcharatchara yoriméla eyo ophiyerya aphwannye?"
Luke15:5 Nave aphwannye-- anireya va makhatani awe óhakalala."
Luke15:6 Nave aphiyale o’mpa wawe anawopa anthamwene awe ni ahimawe-- alochano-- Hakalalani ni miyo-- ntakhara káphwanya epuchepuche aka yoriméla eyo."
Luke15:7 Kinalocha wa nyuwo-- wi wawihihá onarwa‐okhala otheya wirimu ntakhara a mulipa‐otcheka mmoha órukunuwa murima-- opwaha ni atchu ékhaikhai makhumi mathanu na masheshe ni ówapulaya athanu na sheshe-- yawo ohináthowa orukunuwa murima."
Luke15:8 Akhweya muthiana tani orino icharama sawéla khumi-- yariméla emoha-- hapariha onyari-- avela empa’we-- avyavya mwawitchalela ophiyerya aphwannye?"
Luke15:9 Nave aphwannye anawopa anthamwene awe ni ahimawe-- alocha-- Hakalalani ni miyo-- ntakhara káphwanya echarama kárimélihalaka eyo."
Luke15:10 Hihá-- kinalocha wa nyuwo-- ori otheya va mithoni va angelo a Muluku ntakhara a mutchu ótcheka mmoha yowo anarukunuwa murima."
Luke15:11 Nave Yowo áhi-- Mutchu mukina ári ni anamwane asilopwana eli;"
Luke15:12 nave mukhani owo áhi wa atithinnya-- Atithi-- kikaweleni khuluwi saka sa va muhakhu anyu."
Luke15:13 Nave yowo áhákawela sokumi awe. Nave evinre mahiku awalakhanyeya mwana mwamukhani owo áthukumanya sothe sene-- arowa mukwaha’we wilaponi yochiwene; nave wiwo ápahula muhakhu awo ni makhalelo óhuwa."
Luke15:14 Nave ámanliye sawe sothe sene-- vákhala etala etokotoko mwilaponi mule-- nave yowo ápacherya othowiwa."
Luke15:15 Nave árowa ílisha wa nethi mmoha a elapo ele; nave ola ámurumiha o nikuwani wawe okukhula ikupa.
Luke15:16 Nave áhawela ovoniha erukulu awe ni ikakhara hiho ikupa sinalyaya-- nave havovo mutchu ámunnyile etchu."
Luke15:17 Nyenya úpuwenliye m’murimani-- áhi-- Alipa‐muteko óliveliwa anchipale a atithaka arino ipau sawácha-- nave miyo kinnariméla wino ni etala?"
Luke15:18 Kinavinya kirowe wa atithaka-- nave kinalochano-- Atithi kátchekela wirimu ni va mithoni vanyu:"
Luke15:19 nkinakhala óphwanela’tho nari weriwa mwaninyu; mukere miyo ntoko mmoha a alipa‐muteko anyu.
Luke15:20 Nave yowo ávinya-- arwa wa atithinnya. Nyenya árwiye worekama-- atithinnya ámóna-- amoriwa ikharari-- atchimaka-- amuwela va’shikoni vawe-- amunúlasha."
Luke15:21 Nave mwana owo áhi wa yowo-- Atithi kátchekela Wirimu ni va mithoni vanyu-- nkinakhala óphwanela’tho nari weriwa mwaninyu."
Luke15:22 Nyenya atithi owo álocha wa akapuro awe-- Akuvani okumiha musopero worerasha-- m’muwarihe; nave m’vaheni munela o ntatani nawe ni isapato o manani awe:"
Luke15:23 nave rwannoni mwana a’nyope óneneva-- m’mwiphe-- nave n’lye-- n’theye:"
Luke15:24 ntakhara mwana’ka ola ári ókhwa-- nave anakhala’tho mkumi; ári óriméla-- nave ophwanyiwa. Nave yápacherya otheya."
Luke15:25 Nyenya mwanawe mtokotoko ári o’machani. Nave arikimkóka yowo ni wachamela o’mpa-- áhiwa wipa ni wina."
Luke15:26 Nave áhitchana mmoha a amiravo-- amukoha-- Itchu iha ti sawisheni?"
Luke15:27 Nave yola áhi wa yowo-- Munná mukhani ophiya; nave atithá yámwipha mwana a’nyope óneneva owo-- ntakhara ámwakhela yowo ari mkumi."
Luke15:28 Nyenya áshimwa-- nave hákhwenle ovolowa. Nave atithinnya ákhuma amuchenyerya."
Luke15:29 Nyenya áhákhula ii wa atithinnya-- Onani miyo kákhala kapuro anyu miyakha minchipale yawihiha-- nave nkátchenke va nlamulo nanyu ilukuluku sothe sene; nave hemwákivahile miyo omoha mano mwasana a’puri-- wi kitheye ni anthamwene aka."
Luke15:30 Nyenya áruliye mwaninyu ola-- ómala sokumi anyu ni athiana a mlavilavi mwámwiphela mwana a’nyope óneneva."
Luke15:31 Nyenya yowo álochano-- Mwanaka-- weyo ori ni miyo mahiku othene-- nave saka sothe sene siri sawá."
Luke15:32 Nyenya wáphwanela wi nihakalale ni otheya: ntakhara munná mukhani ola ári ókhwa nave ori mkumi; áriméla-- nave ophwanyiwa."
Luke16:1 Nave Yowo álocha’tho wa óhuserya’we-- Vári mutchu mwanene muhakhu-- ári ni kapitao awe; nave yola álokoheryiwa wa yowo wi anampahula muhakhu awe."
Luke16:2 Nave ámwitchana-- ii wa yowo-- Ela ti sheni kiniwaka sa weyo? Okithoriherye sa okapitaoá; vawi howerya okhala’tho kapitao."
Luke16:3 Nave kapitao ola áhi m’murimani mwawe-- Kini kere sheni miyo-- ntakhara pwiya’ka anakikumiha‐okapitao? olima nkinono ikuru-- ovekaveka onnakuliha muru."
Luke16:4 Kinnasuwela yeyo kiniriaka kere-- wawihihá wi akikumiha mu okapitao-- atchu yakakhele’tho o’mpa waya."
Luke16:5 Nave áhisitchanela mmoha ni mmoha a alipa‐opoleya othene a pwiya’we-- alocha wa ópacherya-- Wápoleiye sheni wa pwiya’ka?"
Luke16:6 Nave áhi-- Mino ya makhurwa nsana nimoha. Nave yowo álochano-- Kusha ekaratá-- wakuve okilathi-- orepele-- makhumi mathanu."
Luke16:7 Vavo áhi wa mukina-- Nave weyo orino sopoleya sawihai? Nave yola áhi-- Makali a tirigu nsana nimoha. Yowo álochano-- Kusha ekaratá orepele makhumi mathanu na mararu."
Luke16:8 Nave pwiya’we áthamala kapuro owoka ole-- wi áhera mwa miruku; ntakhara anamwane a mahiku a vathi vano ari a miruku mu nloko naya opwaha anamwane a omwaléla."
Luke16:9 Nave Miyo kinalocha wa nyuwo-- Mwisere nyuwo mekhinyu anthamwene ni muhakhu wohikhala wekhaikhai; wi wothowani-- yawo yawakheleni nyuwo mu ipa sa’kuwo sohithála."
Luke16:10 Yowo anaroromeleya mwikhanikhani ori’tho ororomeleya mwitokotoko; nave yowo ahikhanle ékhaikhai mwikhanikhani hakhanle’tho ékhaikhai mwitokotoko.
Luke16:11 Ntakhara awe mwáhikhanle óroromeleya m’muhakhuni wohikhala wekhaikhai-- tani anarwa‐ororomelani nyuwo ni muhakhuhakhu?"
Luke16:12 Nave mwáhikhanle óroromeleya ni sawe sa mukina-- tani anarwa‐ovahani nyuwo sa nyuwo anene?"
Luke16:13 Havovo mmiravo a m’pa anawerya okhala kapuro a apwiya eli; vawi akhweya anarwa‐ichana ni mukina-- asivelana ni mukhwawe; akhweya anarwa‐atchara mukina-- avevula mukhwawe owo. Hamuwerya okhala kapuro a Muluku ni a Muhakhu."
Luke16:14 Nyenya aFarisi-- tawo ósivela icharama-- yáhiwa iha sothe sene; nave yámutheya."
Luke16:15 Nave áhi wa yawo-- Nyuwo-- mwá awisera mekhinyu ékhaikhai va mithoni va atchu; nyenya Muluku annasuwelasha mirima’nyu; ntakhara ela enannuwihiwa mwa atchu eri yotakhala va mithoni va Muluku."
Luke16:16 Malamulo ni alipa‐miririmo yákhala’vo ophiyerya va Yohane; opacherya vavo enalaleyiwa Mitchaka Yaphama ya Omwene wa Muluku-- nave atchu othene ennákelela ovolowa’mo."
Luke16:17 Nyenya ti wokhweya wi erimu ni elapo sivinye’vo opwaha wi yorempwa ekhani emoha ya malamulo yúwe.
Luke16:18 Mutchu ómunnya nnashi mwariye-- athela mukina-- anamraruwa; nave yowo anathela awunnyiwa nnashi owo ti iyawe-- anamraruwa."
Luke16:19 Nave vári mutchu mwanene muhakhu ámuwara koveka ni shúkha-- anámutheya-- anámólya mahiku othene;"
Luke16:20 nave óvekaveka mukina-- nsina nawe Lazaro-- ákuhiwa va milakoni vawe ósareya makhwacha--"
Luke16:21 nave ákhwela ovona ni somora va ehasari ya mwanene muhakhu’wo; nyenya’tho anapwa yárwa elata makhwacha’we.
Luke16:22 Nave wári wi óvekaveka owo ákhwa-- ni wi ákushiwa yowo ti angelo o nakhopeni a Abrahamu; nave mwanene muhakhu’wo áhokhwa’tho-- avithiwa mu nihiyeni."
Luke16:23 Nave m’Hade áweliha mitho awe-- ákhanliyeno masoso-- óna Abrahamu vachai-- ni Lazaro mu nakhopeni mwawe."
Luke16:24 Nave áweliha masu ii-- Atithi Abrahamu-- kimoreleni ikharari miyo-- m’murume Lazaro-- wi ataphe ethoka ya munwe awe m’mahini-- ariryihe nlumi naka; wi kinnahoshiwa tchiri m’moshoni wa moro ola."
Luke16:25 Nyenya Abrahamu áhi-- Mwana-- upuwela wi wáhakhela sosiva sá wáriá mukumi weyo-- mummo’tho Lazaro sonanara; nave hihano yowo annahakalalihiwa vava-- nyenya weyo onnahoshiwa tchiri."
Luke16:26 Nave’tho-- véri va hiyo ni nyuwo votikitheryeya eshephwa etokotoko-- wawihihá wi yawo ókhwela olapuwa orwela wino oya wa nyuwo hewerya-- nari orwela owannyu iwo olapuwa orwa wa hiyo-- hewerya’tho."
Luke16:27 Nyenya áhi-- Vavo kinovekani-- Atithi-- wi m’murume o’mpa wa atithaka;"
Luke16:28 vawi kirino anna athanu; awerele namona wi yawo’tho enirimorwa o nipuroni nla na masoso.
Luke16:29 Nyenya Abrahamu áhi-- Ari ni Mose ni alipa‐miririmo; ewiwelele yawo."
Luke16:30 Nyenya áhi-- Hoe-- Atithi Abrahamu-- nyenya’tho mukina aya wa yawo órwela wa alipa‐okhwa enarwa‐erukunuwa murima."
Luke16:31 Nyenya áhi wa yowo Yáhiwelela Mose ni alipa‐miririmo-- herwa‐eleketcheya murima nari mukina avinnye wa alipa‐okhwa."
Luke17:1 Nave áhi wa óhuserya’we-- Honaweryeya wi sotchekiha sihirwe; nyenya ochilu yowo anarwano."
Luke17:2 Okákhala phama wa yowo nluku na nshilo náma?-?keleleiye va’shikoni vawe-- nave akávonyiwa yowo mu’nia-- opwaha wi akátchekiha mmoha a akhani ala."
Luke17:3 Waralakani mekhinyu; atcheka munná omulopole; atcharuwa-- omukhurumuwele."
Luke17:4 Nave ótchekela othanu na wili va nihiku naya-- nave órwela othanu na wili ni olocha-- Kotcharuwa miyo; onarwa‐omukhurumuwela."
Luke17:5 Nave arummwa yáhi wa Apwiya-- Munachererye nroromelo."
Luke17:6 Nyenya Apwiya áhi-- Mwárino nroromelo ntoko mwámmiso a evai-- mwalocha wa mwiri ola wa mukúkhu-- Opholiwe-- waliwe mithe mu’nia; nave okáhiwelela nyuwo."
Luke17:7 Nyenya tani a nyuwo orino kapuro ólima-- akhweya ókukhula ipuchepuche-- yowo aniriye akóke orwela o’machani anarwa‐alochano-- Volowa hihano kilathi olye;"
Luke17:8 ohilochano tchiriene-- Okiryeheryele yólya miyo-- wimakele-- okiruméle ophiyerya kilyile ni owurya-- nave kimanle miyo onarwa‐olya ni owurya weyo?"
Luke17:9 Mano anamuthamala kapuro’wo ntakhara áhera solamuleliwa?
Luke17:10 Wawihihá nyuwo’tho mwenre sothe sene solamuleliwa nyuwo-- lochani-- Hiyo ná akapuro a’theru-- n’rimwera iha n’naphwanelahu wera."
Luke17:11 Nave wári-- arikimrowa o Yerusalemu wi Yowo ámvira véri va Samariya ni Galileya."
Luke17:12 Nave ávolowiliye mwitchokoni ekina-- yáhopanano alopwana khumi a marecha-- yawo yémenle ochiwene;"
Luke17:13 nave yawo yáweliha masu-- elocha-- Yesu-- Pwiya-- munimorele ikharari."
Luke17:14 Nave áwonniye áhi wa yawo-- Haweni-- mwisonihe mekhinyu wa alipa‐ephepa."
Luke17:15 Nave wári-- erikimrowa-- yáryeheryiwa. Nave mmoha a yawo-- ónniye wi ápenushiwa ákokela muchuli-- achichimiha Muluku ni masu matokotoko--"
Luke17:16 nave áthipela eyuchi vathi o manani awe-- amuthamala Yowo; nave yowo ári mSamariya."
Luke17:17 Nave Yesu áhákhula ii-- Heyáryeheryiwe khumi? nyenya ari wowi athanu nasheshe ale?"
Luke17:18 Ókóka ochichimiha Muluku haphwanyiwe mmoha mano-- nyenya mulecho’la?"
Luke17:19 Nave áhi wa yowo-- Vinya-- orowe; nroromelo ná nihovulusha weyo."
Luke17:20 Nave aFarisi yámukohilaya wi-- Omwene wa Muluku onarwa lini-- áwakhula-- ii-- Omwene wa Muluku honarwa ni woneya: nave herwa‐elocha-- Nkonani ola-- nari owo!"
Luke17:21 Vawi-- nkonani-- Omwene wa Muluku ori mpuwa mwa nyuwo."
Luke17:22 Nave áhi wa óhuserya’we-- Enarwa‐erwa mahiku-- yawo munirianyu murwe‐mukhale ni minkhela wona nimoha na mahiku a Mwana a mutchu-- nave hamurwa‐mona."
Luke17:23 Nave enarwa‐elocha ni nyuwo-- Nkonani nlo! nkonani nla! muhivinye nari muhatchare;"
Luke17:24 vawi ntoko etari enaverunya orwela okina vathi va erimu-- emwaléla ophiyerya okina vathi va erimu-- wawihihá anarwa‐akhala Mwana a mutchu mu nihiku nawe."
Luke17:25 Nyenya anaphwanela wona sososa sinchipale arohiwe ti atchu ala.
Luke17:26 Nave ntoko mwákhala m’mahiku a Nowa-- mummo munarwa‐mukhala’tho m’mahiku a Mwana a mutchu."
Luke17:27 Yálya-- yáwurya-- yáthela-- yátheliwa-- ophiyerya nihiku nlo Nowa ávolowiliye m’mwacheyani mtokotoko-- nave yárwa mahi-- etolosha othene ala."
Luke17:28 Ntoko mummo’tho mwákhalelaya m’mahiku a Loti; yálya-- yáwurya-- yáthuma-- yátumiha-- yáhála-- yáteka ipa;"
Luke17:29 nyenya nihiku nlo Loti ákhumaliye mSodomo wárupa moro ni sulfure sorwela wirimu-- nave sátolosha othene ala;"
Luke17:30 ntoko mummo onarwa‐okhala nihiku nawupululuwa Mwana a mutchu.
Luke17:31 Nihiku nenlo yowo anarwa‐akhala vasulu va nipatho-- nave mirichi awe m’pa-- ahikhuruwe okusha ela; nave yowo ori m’machani emohamoha ahikóke o sawe sa muchuli."
Luke17:32 Upuwelani mwara a Loti.
Luke17:33 Mutchu yowo anakhwelasha okhapelela okumi awe anarwa‐ariha-- nyenya mutchu yowo anariha-- anarwa‐akhapelela."
Luke17:34 Kinalocha ni nyuwo-- Ohiyu yowo enarwa‐ekhala eli va okamani mmoha; mmoha anarwa‐akushiwa-- nave mukina anarwa‐ahiyiwa."
Luke17:35 Vanarwa‐vakhala athiana eli óshila vamoha-- mmoha anarwa‐akushiwa-- nave mukina anarwa‐ahiyiwa."
Luke18:1 Nave áhálochela niphwanaphwaniho nawi enaphwanela yawo ovekela mahiku othene-- óhivela;"
Luke18:2 alocha-- Mwitchokoni móri mwári mulipa‐othoriha óhóva Muluku-- ni óhithokororya mutchu."
Luke18:3 Nave mwitchokoni’mmo mwári námukhwele; nave árwa wa yowo alocha-- Okithoriherye mulachu wa óvanyihana ni miyo."
Luke18:4 Nave hákhwenle vopacherya vaya; nyenya vakhani ni vakhani áhi mwa mekhiye-- Nari kihóvaka Muluku-- nari othokororya mutchu;"
Luke18:5 nyenya ntakhara a okúkhula miyo námukhwele owo kinamuthoriherya mulachu-- wi anakiveliha ni orwórwa wawe."
Luke18:6 Nave Apwiya áhi-- Nkiwelelani álonchiye mulipa‐othoriha óhikhala ékhaikhai."
Luke18:7 Nave Muluku harwa‐erela ekhaikhai óthanliwa awe yawo enamwitchana othana ni ohiyu-- vawi annálevela murima?"
Luke18:8 Kinalocha ni nyuwo-- Anarwa‐akuva owerela ekhaikhai. Nyenya Mwana a mutchu aniriye arwe anarwa‐aphwanya nroromelo velaponi?"
Luke18:9 Nave áhi’tho wa akina yíroromela mwa mekhaya wi ari ékhaikhai-- evevula othene akina-- niphwanaphwaniho nla--"
Luke18:10 Atchu eli yáwela oya o’mpa ya Muluku ovekela; mukina owo mFarisi ni mukhwawe mulipa‐mushokho.
Luke18:11 MFarisi owo áhémela avekela iha mwa mekhiye-- Muluku-- kinnothamalani wi nkiri ntoko atchu akina othene-- óhuhula‐huhula-- óhikhala ékhaikhai-- óraruwa-- akhweya’tho ntoko mulipa‐mushokho’la;"
Luke18:12 kininanela yólya wili sabata mmoha; kinaveléla yanekhumi ya sothe sene kiriákano.
Luke18:13 Nyenya mulipa‐mushokho’wo arikimwemela vachivene hákhwenle nari oweliha mitho wirimu-- nyenya’tho áhisúkutcha va nakhopeni vawe alocha-- Muluku-- mukimorele ikharari miyo ótcheka."
Luke18:14 Kinalocha ni nyuwo-- ákhuruwela o’mpa wawe aweriwa ékhaikhai yola’tho-- ohi ole hoe; wi mutchu awisinnu?-?wiha mekhiye a narwa‐ayevihiwa; nyenya awiyeviha mekhiye anarwa‐annuwihiwa."
Luke18:15 Nave yámukusherya Yowo anamwane a makwiya wi átannye; nyenya óhuserya yónnaya-- yáhásamela."
Luke18:16 Nyenya Yesu áwitchana-- alocha-- Emyani anamwane erwe wa Miyo-- nave muháhihe: vawi Omwene wa Muluku ori wa awihiha."
Luke18:17 Tchiri kinalocha wa nyuwo-- Mutchu anahakhele omwene wa Muluku ntoko mwana-- havolowa’mo tchiri."
Luke18:18 Nave mutokwene mukina ámukoha Yowo-- alocha-- Muhusiha aphama-- kere sheni-- wi kivolowe okumi wohimala?"
Luke18:19 Nyenya Yesu áhi wa yowo-- Hai onakerá Miyo aphama? havovo aphama-- nyenya mmoha-- ti Muluku."
Luke18:20 Onnasuwela malamulo-- Ohiraruwe; Ohiphe; Ohiye; Ohere namona awotha-- Chichimiha atithá ni amayá."
Luke18:21 Nyenya áhi-- Iha sothe sene kákhapelela opacherya va onamwane aka."
Luke18:22 Nyenya Yesu íwaliye-- áhi wa yowo-- Enothowa etchu emoha: tumiha sothe sene oriáno-- okawele óhawa; nave onarwa‐okhalano muhakhuhakhu wirimu; nave hanke wino-- kitchare Miyo."
Luke18:23 Nyenya vawiwa iha áthananasha winchipale; vawi ári mwanene muhakhu mwinchipale.
