Colossians2:4 Ela kinalocha-- wi mutchu ahohuweliheni nyuwo ni masu óleketcha‐leketcha."
Colossians2:5 Vawi nari kiriaka okina m’mwílini-- nyenya m’munepani kiri vamoha ni nyuwo-- óhakalala kinonáka oryeheryiwa wanyu-- ni olipiherya wa nroromelo nanyu na wa Kristu."
Colossians2:6 Ntakhara awe ntoko mummo mwámwakhelenlanyu Kristu Yesu Apwiya--"
Colossians2:7 mweche mwa Yowo-- óthipela mitathari ni ótchukeleliwa mwa Yowo-- ni awitikitherya mu nroromelo-- ntoko mwáhusihiwanyu-- ni wáchiha mathamalelo."
Colossians2:8 Wehani wi vahikhale mukina ówákhani nyuwo ntoko muhakhu-- ntoko munasivelelanyu miruku-- ni owoka watherutheru-- wotchara ekano ya atchu-- votchara selapo ya vathi-- tahi vomutchara Kristu;"
Colossians2:9 vawi mwa Yowo tunikhalelaya osareya wa oMuluku m’mwílini--"
Colossians2:10 nave mwa ósareya mwa Yowo-- ti muru a otokwene wothene ni olamulelo;"
Colossians2:11 mwa Yowotho nyuwo mwáthikiliwanyu ni othikiliwa woheriwa ni mata-- voruliwa wa mwíli-- muthikiliwa wa Kristu;"
Colossians2:12 ntakhara mwávithiwa mu nihiyeni vamoha ni Yowo mubatisoni-- mummotho mwávíhiwanyu vamoha ni Yowo mu nroromelo na opaka wa Muluku-- yowo ámvíhale Yowo wukhwani."
Colossians2:13 Nave nyuwo-- murianyu ókhwéne mu sotcheka ni othatuwa wa mwíli anyu áhovahani okumi vamoha ni Yowo ánikhurumuwenliye sonanara sothene;"
Colossians2:14 amanle onshipiherya ya va hiyo eyo yeyo yárempwe mu solamuleliwa iho-- yeyo yári yoványana ni hiyo: nave ánivíherya véri’vo-- ni ochoma yela va mwikimanyo;"
Colossians2:15 arunle otokwene ni olamulelo-- áhátheteya vokokoleya; álapiheryano."
Colossians2:16 Ntakhara awe mutchu mukina ahothoriheni nyuwo mu yólya-- nari yowurya-- nari sa nihiku na yólya etokotoko-- nari nihiku nawoneya mweri-- nari na Sabata;"
Colossians2:17 ti múruli wa sinórwa iho; nyenya mwíli ti wa Kristu.
Colossians2:18 Mutchu mukina ahowokeni ni owakhani yamahala anyu ni wiroha mwanene mekhiye-- ni wakokhorela angelo-- ikhalihaka mu iha ahónniye-- awithamala mahaléne ni sawanyiherya-- sa mwíli awe--"
Colossians2:19 ahinapharasharu muru’wo-- orwela wa Yowo mwíli wothene-- wokhaviheryiwa ni olucheleliwa vamoha mwa mashikha ni misiphe-- tunannuwaya ni mannuwelo a Muluku."
Colossians2:20 Mwákhwilanyu vamoha ni Kristu omwalanano sopacherya selapo ya vathi-- hai munalapanyu solamuleliwa iho-- wi ntoko okumi anyu munakhalano mwilaponi ya vathi--"
Colossians2:21 (ohiniyathi’vo ntata-- ohinalawiha-- ohinatannya-- ti sothe sene sopahuwa vawerano)--"
Colossians2:22 ntoko mwa mathoriheryo ni sohuserya sa atchu?
Colossians2:23 hiho sirinonotho olocha wa miruku sinarumélaya okhwela wa mwanene awe-- ni wiroha-- ni ohithokororya mwíli; nyenya hisanono ikuru nariru sohíha ovoniha wa mwíli."
Colossians3:1 Ntakhara awe mwávíhiwanyu vamoha ni Kristu-- tchunani sa wirimu-- wiwo ori Kristu ókhala va ntatani nolopwana na Muluku."
Colossians3:2 Upuwelelani sa wirimu tahi sa velaponi hoe.
Colossians3:3 Vawi mwákhwa-- nave okumi anyu wovithiwa vamoha ni Kristu mwa Muluku."
Colossians3:4 Kristu aniriye arwe‐oneye-- ti okumi ahu-- vavo nyuwotho munarwa‐moneya vamoha ni Yowo mu nchichimiho."
Colossians3:5 Ntakhara awe mwiphihe sam’mwílini hiho siri velaponi; ochapaheya-- onyala-- yotchuna yawuliha muru-- minkhela yonanara-- ni okhalela nrima-- wiwo ori othamala sophwaniherya;"
Colossians3:6 ntakhara a iha tinarwaya esara ya Muluku va anamwane óhiléleya;
Colossians3:7 hiho mwánchanyu’mo nyuwotho khalai-- mwárianyuno okumi anyu mummo."
Colossians3:8 Nyenya hihano rihani nyuwotho sothene iha: esara-- onanariwa-- nlala-- opwalu-- sotakhala sokhuma mwano mwanyu:"
Colossians3:9 muhotheryaneke mukina ni mukhwawe; vawi mwámurula mutchu akhalai vamoha ni miteko awe--"
Colossians3:10 nave mwámuwara ahihano-- yowo onaryeheryeya mwahihano-- wi akhaleno osuwelasha-- ntoko mwa yophwaniherya ya Yowo ámpachunshe Yowo;"
Colossians3:11 Vava hivavovo mHelene ni mYuda othikiliwa ni ohithikiliwa-- aweriwa mmalapo-- mSkuti-- kapuro-- nethi-- nyenya Kristu tari sothe sene-- ni mu sothe sene."
Colossians3:12 Ntakhara awe warani-- ntoko óthanliwa a Muluku-- awéla murima ni ósiveliwa-- murima wa ikharari-- epewe-- wiroha-- witchachala-- ovilela;"
Colossians3:13 wemyeryeryana mukina ni mukhwawe-- ni okhurumuwelana anene mekhinyu-- mukina ákhanleno nthowa ni mukhwawe; ntokotho Apwiya ókhurumuwenliyeni nyuwo-- mwerekeno hihá nyuwotho;"
Colossians3:14 nyenya opwaha iha sothene khalannoni osivela-- ti yotchukelela ya murima mpurukuméne."
Colossians3:15 Nave murechele wa Kristu olamuleleke m’mirima mwanyu-- olakelelatho wiwo timwítchaniwanyu m’mwílini mmoha; nave khalani óthamala."
Colossians3:16 Masu a Kristu yitchále mwa nyuwo mwawáchasha m’miruku yothene-- ni ohusiha ni olemeihana anene mekhinyu ni masalmo ni mathamalelo ni matchipo a munepa-- ni omwipela Muluku ni ikharari m’murimani mwanyu."
Colossians3:17 Nave etchu yeyo munirianyu mwere m’masu nari m’mutekoni-- erani sothe sene mu nsina na Apwiya Yesu-- ni omuthamala Muluku Atithi mwa Yowo."
Colossians3:18 Athiana nyu-- muwiweleleke asíyanyu-- ntoko onaphwanelelaya Apwiya."
Colossians3:19 Alopwana nyu-- sivelani árinyu-- nave muhinanariwekeno."
Colossians3:20 Anamwane nyu-- muwiweleleke alipa‐awoyarani mu sothe sene-- ntakhara ela Apwiya tanahakalaliyeno."
Colossians3:21 Asitithi nyu-- muharosheke anamwane anyu-- wi ani yeremuhaléla."
Colossians3:22 Akapuro nyuwo-- mwiweleleke mu sothe sene yawo ari wa nyuwo apwiya ntoko mwa mwíli-- tahi okapuro wa va mithoni-- ntoko óhakalaliha atchu-- nyenya ni muriméne mmoha-- ómova Apwiya;"
Colossians3:23 etchu yeyo munirianyu mwere-- pharani muteko morwela m’murimani-- ntoko mwa Apwiya-- tahi wa atchu hoe:"
Colossians3:24 musuwelaka wi munarwa‐mwakhela wa Apwiya yamahala ya mikelampa; munamurumélanyu Apwiya Kristu mwa okapuro.
Colossians3:25 Vawi yowo onerano monanara onarwa‐akhela yonanara énriye’yo; nave nthalu hinavovo.
Colossians4:1 Asapwiya nyuwo-- muwereleke akapuro anyu yekhaikhai ni yawereryana; musuwelaka wi nyuwotho mokhalano Pwiya wirimu."
Colossians4:2 Titelelani ovekela-- muweheryeke mummo ni othamala;"
Colossians4:3 ni onivekelela hiyotho vavo-- wi Muluku anihulele hiyo va milakoni va masu-- wi nulumeke yawiphíni ya Kristu; yeyotho kinakhalelaka mu kariposo--"
Colossians4:4 wi konihe yela ntoko kinaphwanelelaka wuluma.
Colossians4:5 Mwecheke m’mirukuni ni amalapo awo-- mwerakano mwa mvai mahiku enívire siyo."
Colossians4:6 Masu anyu akhale mu ikharari-- ósiva mwapa-- wi nyuwo musuweleno wakhula wanyu wa wa mmoha ani ereno hai."
Colossians4:7 Sothe sene sa wa miyo anolélashani Tukiko-- munna ósiveliwa ni óruméla óroromeleya ni kapuro mukhwaka mwa Apwiya:"
Colossians4:8 yowo kimurummaka wa nyuwo ntakhara a nthowa nenla-- wi musuwelashe sa wa hiyo-- ni wi amálihe mirimányu;"
Colossians4:9 vamoha ni Onesimo-- munna óroromeleya ni ósiveliwa-- yowo ori a wa nyuwo. Sothe sene sa wino enolélashani."
Colossians4:10 Aristarko amukariposo mukhwaka annolochelani nyuwo-- ni Marko-- musulahumu a Barnaba (wa yowo mwákhenlanyu solamulela sawe; aphiya wa nyuwo-- m’mwakhele)--"
Colossians4:11 ni Yesu-- aweriwa Yusto-- ti óthikiliwa-- yaworu talipa‐muteko akhwaka a mumwene wa Muluku-- ti yawo enakhala yokimáliha murima."
Colossians4:12 Epafra annolochelani-- ti a wa nyuwo-- ti kapuro a Yesu Kristu-- ótitelelasha ntakhara a nyuwo m’mavekelo awe mahiku othene-- wi mwemele murutchu ene ni ósareya mukhwela wothene wa Muluku."
Colossians4:13 Ntakhara kinnamwerela namona wi annikhulumulano muteko ntakhara a nyuwo-- ni yawo a mu Laodikaya-- ni yawo a mu Herapoli."
Colossians4:14 Annolochelani Luka mulipa‐mureche ósiveliwa-- ni Dema."
Colossians4:15 Lochelani anna awo a mu Laodikaya-- ni Numfa-- ni muloko’wo wa’mpa mwaya."
Colossians4:16 Nave mwalakhannye ekarata ela-- yalakhanyiwetho m’mulokoni wó Laodikaya-- nave nyuwotho mwalakhanye yó Laodikaya."
Colossians4:17 Nave muloche ni Arkipo-- manki othokororyeke ni oruméla wiwo wákhenlá mwa Apwiya-- wi okhwánye."
Colossians4:18 Olochela ni ntata naka-- wa miyo Paulo. Upuwelelani makwekweso aka. Ikharari sikhale ni nyuwo. Amen."
1Thessalonians1:1 Paulo-- ni Silvano-- ni Timoteo wa muloko wa aTesalonika mwa Muluku Atithi ni Apwiya Yesu Kristu: Ikharari wa nyuwo ni murechele."
1Thessalonians1:2 Ninnamuthamala Muluku mahiku othene ntakhara a nyuwo othene-- ni owupuwelani nyuwo m’mavekelo ahu;"
1Thessalonians1:3 ni wupuwelela wohihiyeryerya muteko anyu wa nroromelo-- ni osivela wa muteko-- ni ovilela woweheryerya wa Apwiyahu Yesu Kristu-- va mithoni va Muluku Atithihu;"
1Thessalonians1:4 musuwelaka-- anna ósiveliwa ti Muluku--"
1Thessalonians1:5 othanliwa wanyu-- wi Mitchaka Yaphama heyárúle wa nyuwo m’masuru-- nyenyatho mwa ikuru-- ni mwa Munepa Wawéla-- ni wácha otokotoko; ntoko munasuwelanyu wi nári ntoko awihai mwa nyuwo ntakhara a nyuwo."
1Thessalonians1:6 Nave mwápacherya okhala óntakiheryáhu-- ni a Apwiya-- mwákhenlanyu masu awo m’masóso manchipale-- ni otheya wa Munepa Wawéla;"
1Thessalonians1:7 wawihihá wi mwápacherya okhala nyuwo yotakiherya wa othene yawo enaroromela m’Makedoniya-- ni mu Akaya."
1Thessalonians1:8 Vawi okhuma wa nyuwo wáhiweya masu a Apwiya-- tahi m’Makedoniyaru ni mu Akayaru-- nyenya m’mapuroni mothe mwene nroromelo nanyu na wa Muluku nákhumenlaya; wawihihá honakhweleya wa hiyo wuluma etchu."
1Thessalonians1:9 Vawi yawo mkhataya enalaleya sa hiyo-- mavolowelo ahu a wa nyuwo yári awihai; ni wi mwárukunuwela wa Muluku omwalanano sophwaniherya-- omuruméla Muluku enesha mukumi--"
1Thessalonians1:10 ni omuweherya Mwanáwe arwele wirimu-- yowo ámvíhaliye wukhwani-- Yesu-- anivulushe hiyo wa esara enórwa eyo."
1Thessalonians2:1 Vawi-- anna-- munnasuwela mkhatinyu mavolowelo ahu a wa nyuwo-- wi heyári etheru ene;"
1Thessalonians2:2 nyenya nari nónnahu masóso khalai-- nave yánroha-- ntoko munasuwelanyu-- o Filipi-- nányesererya mwa Muluku ahu wuluma ni nyuwo Mitchaka Yaphama ya Muluku muványa otokotoko."
1Thessalonians2:3 Ntakhara ochényerya wahu honarwela o marimélelo-- nari wunyalani-- nari muwoka;"
1Thessalonians2:4 nyenya ntoko Muluku ánemyeryenryiye oninnyeryerya Mitchaka Yaphama-- wawihihá tinnu?-?lumahu; tahi ntoko awahakalaliha atchu-- nyenya Muluku; yowo anererya mirimáhu."
1Thessalonians2:5 Vawi hanéncheno masu órera eyano mahiku othene-- ntoko munasuwelanyu-- nari okhuwa okhalela nrima-- namonáya ti Muluku;"
1Thessalonians2:6 nari hanári ókhwela nchichimiho na wa atchu-- nari wa nyuwo-- nari wa akina-- nari náriahuno ikuru sawovelihani ntoko arummwa a Kristu."
1Thessalonians2:7 Nyenya nári awitchachala véri va nyuwo-- ntoko mulipa‐olela onawupariye anamwane awe a yowo mekhiye;"
1Thessalonians2:8 wawihihá hiyo vawotchunashani nyuwo-- náhemyeryerya mohakalala oveléla wa nyuwo tahi Mitchakaru Yaphama ya Muluku-- nyenyatho okumi ahu-- ntakhara mwári ósiveliwa ahu."
1Thessalonians2:9 Vawi munnupuwela-- anna-- weranosha wahu ni weteteya wahu; vawerano ohiyu ni othana-- wi n’námvelihe mmoha a nyuwo-- nálaleyenryahu wa nyuwo Mitchaka Yaphama ya Muluku."
1Thessalonians2:10 Nyuwo mwa anamona-- ni Mulukutho-- wi nári awéla murima ni ékhaikhai ni óhotchekelani nyuwo alipa‐ororomela;"
1Thessalonians2:11 ntoko munasuwelanyu wi náherela mukina a nyuwo va mekhiye-- ntoko tithi anereliye anamwane awe a yowo mekhiye-- ni wochényeryani-- ni wohakalalihani ni werela namona--"
1Thessalonians2:12 wi mwecheke momphwanelela Muluku-- yowo anawitchanani nyuwo wi mvolowe omwene awe wa Yowo mekhiye-- ni nchichimiho."
1Thessalonians2:13 Nave mwa elatho hiyo ninnamuthamala Muluku mohihiyeryerya-- wi-- mwákhenlanyu masu a Mitchaka ya Muluku-- hemwákhenle ntoko masu a atchu-- nyenya nto ntoko akhanlaya tchiri-- masu a Muluku-- yawotho anoneya mwa nyuwo alipa‐ororomela."
1Thessalonians2:14 Vawi nyuwo-- anna-- mwápachenrye okhala ótchara miloko ya Muluku yeyo eri m’Yudeya mwa Kristu Yesu; ntakhara hiha mónenlanyu masóso nyenyu m’matani mwa a nloko nanyu na nyuwo mkhatinyu-- ntoko yawotho m’mataní mwa aYuda;"
1Thessalonians2:15 yawo yámwiphaletho Apwiya Yesu-- ni alipa‐miririmo-- enanihochahocha hiyo-- nave henamuhakalaliha Muluku-- enaványanano atchu othene;"
1Thessalonians2:16 enanihíha hiyo wi nihulumeke ni amalapo wi evulushiwe; ósareya sotcheka saya mahiku othene; nyenya oshimwa wophiya va yawo ophiyerya makutchuwelo.
1Thessalonians2:17 Nyenya hiyo-- anna-- nari yánivíhalaya’vo omwalana ni nyuwo tonto-- óhonanaru-- nyenya omwalana murima hoe-- náhereryasha wopwaha wi nóne ethoi anyu ni minkhela minchipale;"
1Thessalonians2:18 ntakhara nákhwela orwa wa nyuwo-- yomi nto Paulo koherano hihá omoha nari wili; nyenya Satana ánihíha."
1Thessalonians2:19 Vawi yoweheryeryáhu-- nari otheya-- nari koroa awithamalelano ti sheni? tahi nyenyu nki-- va mithoni va Apwiyahu Yesu vorwa vawe?"
1Thessalonians2:20 Vawi nyuwo mwa nchichimiho nahu ni otheya wahu.
1Thessalonians3:1 Ntakhara awe-- nihiweryaka ohiyeryeryatho-- náhemya m’murima wi enihiye mekhihu o Atene;"
1Thessalonians3:2 nave námuruma Timoteo-- munnihu’wo ni óruméla a Muluku m’Mitchaka Yaphama ya Kristu-- wi oshekuryeni nyuwo-- ni womálihani nyuwo sa nroromelo nanyu;"
1Thessalonians3:3 wi mukina ahisuseye ni sohósha iha-- ntakhara munnasuwela mekhinyu wi hiyo náthanleliwa werano iha."
1Thessalonians3:4 Vawitho-- náriahu ni nyuwo náholélani khuluwi wi n’narwa‐nona masóso; ntoko wereiyaya-- ntokotho munasuwelanyu."
1Thessalonians3:5 Mwa ela miyotho-- vohihiyeryeryatho-- káruma wi kiróre nroromelo nanyu-- wi akhweya mulipa‐weha owo anaweheni-- nave wukhuwa wahu onúkhule etheru ene."
1Thessalonians3:6 Nyenya vano Timoteo áphiyaliye wenno arwelaka wa nyuwo-- anthoriherya ovuwa waphama wa nroromelo ni osivela wanyu-- ni wi munnanupuwela phama mahiku othene-- munakhwelasha onóna hiyo-- ntokotho yehu owonani nyuwo;"
1Thessalonians3:7 Ntakhara a ela nihohakalalelani-- anna-- mu weteteya wahu wothene ni ohóshiwa wahu wothene-- mwa nroromelo nanyu;"
1Thessalonians3:8 ntakhara hihano na akumi-- nyuwo mwithipeleru mwa Apwiya."
1Thessalonians3:9 Ntakhara ninnawerya okokiherya wa Muluku othamala wawihai ntakhara a nyuwo-- va otheya wothene ninnahakalalano mwa nyuwo va mithoni va Muluku ahu;"
1Thessalonians3:10 ni wáchiha mavekelo ahu ohiyu ni othana wi n’rwe‐none ethoi anyu-- ni okhwánya hiho inayeléla va nroromelo nanyu?"
1Thessalonians3:11 Nyenya Muluku Atithihu mwanene mekhiye-- ni Apwiyahu Yesu anihóle mphiro wophiyano wa nyuwo;"
1Thessalonians3:12 nyenya Apwiya awunnuwiheni nyuwo-- awáchiheni musivelana mukina ni mukhwawe ni wa atchu othene-- ntoko hiyotho n’nerahu hihá wa nyuwo;"
1Thessalonians3:13 wi akhomálihe mirimányu yohikhalano nthowa mu wéla va mithoni va Muluku Atithihu-- anarwiye Apwiyahu Yesu vamoha ni awéla murima awe othene."
1Thessalonians4:1 Vokutchula vaya nto-- anna-- ninnovekani ni wochényeryani mwa Apwiya Yesu-- wi-- ntoko mwákhenlanyu wa hiyo makhalelo órera-- munnaphwanela wechatho ni omutheiha Muluku-- ntoko munechelanyu-- achani wopwaha mummo."
1Thessalonians4:2 Vawi munnasuwela mathoriheryo yawo nóvahilahuni mwa Apwiya Yesu.
1Thessalonians4:3 Vawi wu ti otchuna wa Muluku-- nari wéla wanyu-- wi mwithanle wuchapaheyani;"
1Thessalonians4:4 mukina ni mukina a nyuwo asuwele okhalano yokusheryáwe mu wéla ni nchichimiho--"
1Thessalonians4:5 tahi okhwela minkhela yotakhala-- ntokotho amalapo yawo ehinamusuwela Muluku;"
1Thessalonians4:6 mutchu ahipwahe’vo-- ni owoka munneni mummo-- ntakhara Apwiya tawunlela ekuhu iha sothe sene-- ntokotho nólénlahuni khuluwi-- nave nákhalela namona."
1Thessalonians4:7 Ntakhara Muluku hánitchanne hiyo wi n’tchare onyala-- nyenya wéla."
1Thessalonians4:8 Ntakhara awe yowo onanyemula ela-- hananyemula mutchu-- nyenya Muluku-- yowo anovahani nyuwo Munepáwe Wawéla."
1Thessalonians4:9 Nyenya volocha sosivelana wa anna honakhweleya wi murepeliwe; ntakhara awohusihani ti Muluku-- wi musivelane mukina ni mukhwawe;"
1Thessalonians4:10 ntakhara mwáwerelatho ela anna othene a m’Makedoniya mothe mwene.
1Thessalonians4:11 Nyenya ninnochényeryani-- anna-- mwáchevosha wopwaha-- ni wi mwereryashe okhala ómála ni wera sa nyuwo anene ni ophara muteko ni matányu-- ntoko nólénlahuni;"
1Thessalonians4:12 wi mwecheke mweparipari murima wa amalapo awo-- ni okhala óhiháwelelaru etchu."
1Thessalonians4:13 Nyenya hannakhwela-- anna-- wi mukhale óhisuwela salipaorupa’wo; wi muni munleke ntoko akinako aya awo-- yawo ehikhanleno oweheryerya."
1Thessalonians4:14 Vawi naroromela wi Yesu ákhwa-- avinya-- wawihihátho Muluku anarwa‐akusha vamoha ni Yowo yawo enakona mwa Yesu."
1Thessalonians4:15 Vawi ela n’nalocha wa nyuwo m’masu a Apwiya-- wi yehu n’ri akumi-- awikhalelaru ophiyerya orwatho wa Apwiya-- hanrwa‐náhólela alipa‐orupa’wo."
1Thessalonians4:16 Vawi Apwiya anarwa‐akhuruwa wirimu mwanene mekhiye ni ekutcho-- ni masu a mungelo mtokotoko-- n’nipeka na Muluku; nave yawo yákhwile mwa Apwiya enarwa‐epacherya ovinya;"
1Thessalonians5:1 Nyenya sa mahiku yawo ni ilukuluku hiho-- anna-- hinakhweleya wi nikahorepelani."
1Thessalonians5:2 Vawi nyuwo mekhinyu munnasuwela phama wi nihiku na Apwiya n’ni‐nrwe ntoko mulipa‐wiya ohiyu.
1Thessalonians5:3 Vavo eniriaya eloche-- Murechele ni ohúkhuwa-- vavo yotolosha yophachuwa’vo tiniriaya yáphachuwele-- ntoko masóso a muthiana órupala; nave herwa‐evuluwaru."
1Thessalonians5:4 Nyenya nyuwo-- anna-- hamuri mwipiphini-- wi nihiku nlo n’ni‐norweleni ntoko mulipa‐wiya;"
1Thessalonians5:5 ntakhara nyuwo othene mwa anamwane a omwaleya-- ni anamwane a othana;"
1Thessalonians5:6 hanri a ohiyu-- nari a epiphi; ntakhara yela nihirupe ntoko akinako aya awo nto-- nyenya nlipeleleke-- nave nihihapaliwe."
1Thessalonians5:7 Ntakhara yawo enarupa ’wo enarupa ohiyu; nave yawo enahapaliwa’wo enahapaliwa ohiyu.
1Thessalonians5:8 Nyenya hiyo n’riahu a othana nihihapaliwe-- niwanre ya va nakhopeni ya nroromelo ni osivela; ni echipwatcha yeyo eri oweheryerya wa ovulushiwa."
1Thessalonians5:9 Vawi Muluku hánithanlile hiyo wi nlawihe esara-- nyenya wi nákhele ovulushiwa mwa Apwiyahu Yesu Kristu--"
1Thessalonians5:10 yowo ákhwile mu nipuroni mwa hiyo-- wi-- nari nlipelelaka-- nari nrupaka-- n’rwe‐nikhale akumi vamoha ni Yowo."
1Thessalonians5:11 Mwa ela lopolanani-- nave mwitchukelele mukina ni mukhwawe-- ntoko munerelanyu."
1Thessalonians5:12 Nyenya-- anna-- ninnovekani-- suwelani yawo enapharasha muteko mwa nyuwo-- ekhala atokwene anyu mwa Apwiya-- enovahani nruku;"
1Thessalonians5:13 nave mwachichimiheke mopwahasha musivela-- ntakhara a muteko aya. Khalani m’murecheleni mwa nyuwo mekhinyu."
1Thessalonians5:14 Nyenya ninnochényeryani nyuwo anna-- mwávaheke nruku óhithokororya-- mwalipiheke awova m’murima-- khomálihani alipa‐ochétcheya-- ni ovilelano othene."
1Thessalonians5:15 Vareryani wi mukina ahimwerele yonanara mukhwawe yowo ámwerenle yonanara; nyenya mahiku othene mutchareke yorera-- wa akhwinyu-- ni wa othene."
1Thessalonians5:16 Hakalalani mahiku othene;
1Thessalonians5:17 Vekelani mohihiyeryerya;
1Thessalonians5:18 Mu sothe sene thamalani; ntakhara ela ti yotchuna ya Muluku ya wa nyuwo-- mwa Kristu Yesu."
1Thessalonians5:19 Muhishipihe Munepa owo;
1Thessalonians5:20 Muhinyemule wulumelela masu;
1Thessalonians5:21 Ereryani sothe sene-- khapelelani yorera eyo--"
1Thessalonians5:22 Mwasepáni woneya wothene wa yonanara.
1Thessalonians5:23 Nave Muluku a murecheleru awéliheni nyuwo mothe mwene; nave munepa anyu ni okumi anyu ni mwíli anyu sikhapeleliwe sampurukuméne-- sohikhalano murala aniriye arwe Apwiyahu Yesu Kristu."
1Thessalonians5:24 Yowo onawitchanani ori óroromeleya-- yowotho onarwa‐erano."
1Thessalonians5:25 Anna mwanivekelelani hiyo.
1Thessalonians5:26 Lochelani anna othene ni onula wawéla.
1Thessalonians5:27 Kinnolupelelani wa Apwiya wi ekarata ela yalakhanyiwe wa anna othene.
1Thessalonians5:28 Ikharari sa Apwiyahu Yesu Kristu sikhale ni nyuwo. Amen.
2Thessalonians1:1 Paulo-- ni Silvano-- ni Timoteo wa muloko wa aTesalonika mwa Muluku Atithihu ni Apwiya Yesu Kristu:"
2Thessalonians1:2 Ikharari wa nyuwo ni murechele wa wa Muluku Atithi ni Apwiya Yesu Kristu.
2Thessalonians1:3 Ninnamuthamala Muluku mahiku othene ntakhara a nyuwo-- anna-- ntoko onaphwanelelaya; ntakhara wi nroromelo nanyu ninnannuwasha-- nave osivela wa nyuwo othene onnácha-- mukina ni mukhwawe;"
2Thessalonians1:4 wawihihá wi hiyo mkhatihu ninnithamalano sa nyuwo m’miloko ya Muluku-- ntakhara a ovilela wanyu-- ni nroromelo nanyu-- muhóshiwa wanyu wothene ni masóso awo munonanyu;"
2Thessalonians1:5 ti olipiherya wothoriha wekhaikhai ya Muluku; wi mwáhalakhanyeryiwa óphwanelela omwene wa Muluku-- yowotho munonelanyu masóso;"
2Thessalonians1:6 ntakhara ti wekhaikhai wa Muluku ókokiherya yohósha wa yawo enohóshani--"
2Thessalonians1:7 ni wa nyuwo munona yohósha witchúwa vamoha ni hiyo-- vawupululuwa Apwiya Yesu orwela wirimu vamoha ni angelo a ikuru sawe--"
2Thessalonians1:8 mu nikalume na moro-- ni wunla ekuhu wa yawo ehinamusuwela Muluku-- ni yawo ehiniwelela Mitchaka Yaphama ya Apwiyahu Yesu;"
2Thessalonians1:9 yawo eni‐erwe‐elakiwe-- ti opahuwa wohimala wawámwalanya ni ethoi ya Apwiya-- ni o nchichimiho na ikuru sawe--"
2Thessalonians1:10 aniriye arwe‐aphiye ochichimihiwa mwa awéla murima awe-- ni okhala ótikhiniwa mwa othene yawo enaroromela (ntakhara mwároromela namonáhu a wa nyuwo) mu nihiku nenle."
2Thessalonians1:11 Mwawihihá ninnovekelelanitho mahiku othene-- wi Muluku ahu awereni nyuwo óphwanelela witchaniwa wanyu-- ni okhwánya yomurerela yothene-- ni muteko wa nroromelo mu ikuru;"
2Thessalonians1:12 wi nsina na Apwiyahu Yesu nchichimihiwe mwa nyuwo-- ni nyuwo mwa Yowo-- ntoko mwa ikharari sa Muluku ahu ni Apwiya Yesu Kristu."
2Thessalonians2:1 Nave-- ninnovekani anna-- ntakhara a marwelo awe a Apwiyahu Yesu Kristu-- ni othukumana wahu vamoha mwa Yowo;"
2Thessalonians2:2 wi muhákuveke ochikinyeya murima ni oyeha wupuwelela wanyu-- nari wopopihiwa-- mwa munepa nari mwa masu; nari mwa ekarata-- ntoko yeyo erempwe ti hiyo--"
2Thessalonians2:3 wi ntoko nihiku na Apwiya n’rimphiya-- Mutchu ahowokeniru-- wi hanrwa-- nyenya omwaryeya iwo olike ophiya-- úpululuwe mutchu óhiléleya--"
2Thessalonians2:4 mwana épahuwelo-- yowo onaványa?-?nano-- írumiha va sothe sene hiho sineriwa sa Muluku-- nari sothamaleya; wawihihá wi ntoko anamkilathi mu’mpa ya Muluku-- isoniherya mekhiye wi ti Muluku."
2Thessalonians2:5 Nna hamunupuwelaru-- wi káriaka ni nyuwo-- kihákuvale ovinya’vo-- káholélani iha?"
2Thessalonians2:6 Nave vano munnasuwela yeyo enamuhíha-- wi úpululuwe yowo m’mahiku awe a yowo mekhiye."
2Thessalonians2:7 Ntakhara yawiphíni yohiléleya yopacheryerya wereya; vavaru vari ómuhíha hihano-- ophiyerya amvíhale’vo véri vaya."
2Thessalonians2:8 Nave vavo onarwa‐upululiwa óhiléleya owo-- yowo Apwiya aniriye arwe‐amkokhole ni munepa wa va’wanoni vawe-- nave onarwa‐amtolosha ni woneya wa marwelo awe;"
2Thessalonians2:9 ti yawo orwa wawe ori ntoko werano waya wa Satana-- mwikuru sothe sene-- ni ineneryo ni sotikiniha sawotha;"
2Thessalonians2:10 ni owoka wothene wohikhala wekhaikhai wa alipa‐opahuwáwo-- ntakhara osivela weparipari heyákhenle-- wi yawo yavulushiwe."
2Thessalonians2:11 Nave va nthowa nenla Muluku annarumiha wa yawo sawereya sohuweliha-- wi eroromele wotha;"
2Thessalonians2:12 wi othene ethorihiwe yawo yahároromenle eparipari-- nyenya yámuhakalalano hiho ihikhanle sekhaikhai."
2Thessalonians2:13 Nyenya hiyo ninnaphwanelela omuthamala Muluku mahiku othene ntakhara a nyuwo-- anna ósiveliwa ti Apwiya-- wi Muluku áhothanlani nyuwo opacherya vopacherya-- mwakhele ovulushiwa mwa méliheryo a Munepa ni nroromelo neparipari;"
2Thessalonians2:14 wiwo mwítchaneliwanyu’wo mwa Mitchaka ahu Yaphama-- wi mwakhele nchichimiho na Apwiyahu Yesu Kristu."
2Thessalonians2:15 Va nthowa nenla nto-- anna-- mwithipeleni-- khapelelashani ikano hiho nohusihalahuni-- nari mwa masu-- nari mwa ekarata ahu."
2Thessalonians2:16 Nave Apwiyahu Yesu Kristu-- ni Muluku Atithihu yowo ánsivenle anivaha otheya wohimala ni oweheryerya worera mwa ikharari--"
2Thessalonians2:17 tanáhakalalihe mirimányu-- ni wokilathihani nyuwo m’muteko wothene ni masu othene aphama."
2Thessalonians3:1 Vokutchula vaya-- anna-- munivekeleleke-- wi masu a Apwiya yakuveyeke-- ochichimihiweke-- ntoko muneranyuno;"
2Thessalonians3:2 nave wi nákihiwe m’matani mwa atchu óhiphwanelela ni ónanara; ntakhara othene hanono nroromelo.
2Thessalonians3:3 Nyenya Apwiya tororomeleya yowo ani ókilathiheni nyuwo-- anolipelelani omuhíha ónanara owo;"
2Thessalonians3:4 nyenya ninnaroromela mwa Apwiya sa nyuwo-- wi munnerano-- navetho munarwa‐mwerano hiho n’nolamulelahuni."
2Thessalonians3:5 Nave Apwiya ahóle phama mirimányu wi evolowe musivela wa Muluku ni mwivilelelo ya Kristu.
2Thessalonians3:6 Nave ninnolamulelani-- anna-- mu nsina na Apwiyahu Yesu Kristu-- wi mwímwalanye ni munna mukina yowo onecha mohithoriheya-- yowo ohinatchara ekano yeyo ákhenliye wa hiyo."
2Thessalonians3:7 Ntakhara munnasuwela mkhatinyu mummo munaphwanelelanyu ontakiherya hiyo;
2Thessalonians3:8 ntakhara henári óhithoriheya mwa nyuwo; nari henánlye epau siyo va ntatani na mutchu mukina-- nyenya ni wukhuwa ni weteteya-- náphanrahu muteko ohiyu ni othana-- wi n’námvelihe mukina a nyuwo;"
2Thessalonians3:9 tahi wi hinanono olamulelo-- nyenya wi níveléle mekhihu nikhale wa nyuwo yotakiheryányu-- wi mwahintakiheryeke hiyo."
2Thessalonians3:10 Ntakhara náriahu ni nyuwo náholamulelani ela-- Mutchu áhikhwelaka ophara muteko-- ahilyetho."
2Thessalonians3:11 Ntakhara ninniwa sa akina mwa nyuwo wi ennecha mohithoriheya-- óhiphararu muteko-- nyenya taweteteya vakina ni vakina."
2Thessalonians3:12 Nyenya awihiha ala ninnálamulela ni wáchényerya mwa Apwiya Yesu Kristu-- wi ephareke muteko mómála-- nave elyeke yólya yawaya‐yawaya."
2Thessalonians3:13 Nyenya nyuwo-- anna-- muhivele vawera saphama."
2Thessalonians3:14 Nyenya mukina áhiwelela masu ahu mwikarata ela-- muróreni yowo-- wi muhátáneno-- wi muru omúle."
2Thessalonians3:15 Nyenya muhimwere mwichani-- nyenya m’mukhovelele ntoko munna."
2Thessalonians3:16 Nave Apwiya a murecheleru anivahe hiyo murechele mahiku othene-- mothe mwene’mmo. Apwiya akhale ni nyuwo othene."
2Thessalonians3:17 Olochela ni ntata naka Paulo; tiri eneneryo mwikarata sothe sene; ti orepa waka.
2Thessalonians3:18 Ikharari sa Apwiyahu Yesu Kristu sikhale ni nyuwo othene. Amen.
1Timothy1:1 Paulo murummwa a Kristu Yesu ntoko mwa nlamulo na Muluku Mvulusháhu-- nna Kristu Yesu-- oweheryerya wahu:"
1Timothy1:2 wa Timoteo mwanaka‐nakasha mu nroromelo: Namutchucha-- ikharari-- murechele sa wa Muluku Atithi ni wa Kristu Yesu Apwiyahu."
1Timothy1:3 Ntoko kóchényenryaka weyo wi wikhaleleru mu Efeso-- miyo kiyaka o Makedoniya-- kinihihátho-- wi wálamulele akina awo wi ehihusihe etchu ekina--"
1Timothy1:4 nari ehithokororye miaha yatheru-- ni walakhanyerya wohihiyeryerya wa mahimo a makholo-- ti yawo enarosha okohana-- tahi sa onahota wa Muluku yowo ori mu nroromelo;"
1Timothy1:5 nyenya makutchuwelo a malamulo ti osivela worwela m’murima wawéla ni yawupusherya‐ya‐murima yorera ni nroromelo nohiwoka;
1Timothy1:6 hiho-- akina vothekela yáhapuwa otchara masu achapuwa;"
1Timothy1:7 ekhweleka okhala ahusiha a malamulo nari ehisuwelaka hiho enalochaya-- nari hiho enachichimiheryaya iha."
1Timothy1:8 Nyenya munnasuwela wi malamulo taphama-- mutchu érano ntoko mwa malamulo--"
1Timothy1:9 n’suwelaka ela wi-- nlamulo hannapakeliwa mutchu ékhaikhai-- nyenya óhiléleya ni óhiwelela malamulo-- óhithamalela-- ni ótcheka-- óhichichimiha ni amuroho-- awipha atithi ni awipha amai-- awipha akhwaya--"
1Timothy1:10 óraruwa-- awera sonanara ni alopwana-- awiya atchu-- awotha-- ólipela sawotha-- nave wári etchu ekina yoványanano ohusiha wokwasulela;"
1Timothy1:11 ntoko mwa Mitchaka Yaphama ya nchichimiho na Muluku nochichimiheya nenlo ákinnyeryenryiye.
1Timothy1:12 Kinnamuthamala Yowo anakivaha miyo ikuru-- ti Kristu Yesu."
1Timothy1:13 Apwiyahu-- wi ákera óroromeleya-- akiyathi wuruméla-- nari khalai káriaka ópwalu-- ni óhochahocha-- ni elomwe; nyenya ákimorela ikharari-- ntakhara káherano ni ohisuwela-- óhiroromela;"
1Timothy1:14 nyenya ikharari sa Apwiyahu sáháchasharu vamoha ni nroromelo ni osivela wiwo ori mwa Kristu Yesu.
1Timothy1:15 Masu ala ari óroromeleya ni óphwanelela tchiri wi yakheliwe-- wi Kristu árwa velaponi ya vathi wavulusha alipa‐otcheka; a yala miyo kipwahile;"
1Timothy1:16 nyenya mwa ela ákimorela ikharari-- wi mwa miyo-- opacherya-- Yesu Kristu ónihe oleva wawe wothene okhale yotakiherya ya wa yawo enirwe‐emuroromele Yowo muhólo ophiyerya okumi wohimala."
1Timothy1:17 Nave wa Mwene óhikutchuwa-- óhúcha-- óhoneya-- Muluku a vamekhayaru-- okhale mahala ni nchichimiho-- ophiyerya ilukuluk sa ilukuluku. Amen."
1Timothy1:18 Nlamulo nla kinavelélaka wa weyo mwanaka Timoteo-- wi-- ntoko sawuluma sóhónlaya weyo khalai-- owaneno ekhocho yaphama;"
1Timothy1:19 ni okhalano nroromelo ni yawupusherya‐ya‐murima yorera-- yeyo akina yákankhaya-- nroromelo naya tináriménlaya;"
1Timothy1:20 a yawo ti Humenayo ni Alesandro-- yawo kávelénlaka wa Satana-- wi ehuserye ohuluma sopwalu."
1Timothy2:1 Kinnachényerya nto vopacherya vene-- wi yeriweke mathamalelo-- mavekelo-- mépeseryo-- ni othamala-- ntakhara a atchu othene;"
1Timothy2:2 ntakhara a mamwene ni othene yawo enalamulela; wi mukumini mwahu nikhale ómála ni awitchachala vomuchichimiha Muluku-- mochichimiheya tchiri."
1Timothy2:3 Vawi ela ti yorera ni yawakheleya va mithoni va Muluku Mvulusháhu:
1Timothy2:4 Yowo anakhwela wi atchu othene evuluwe-- wi ephiye voróra eparipari."
1Timothy2:5 Ntakhara vari Muluku mmoha-- ni awakiha mmoha véri va Muluku ni atchu-- ti mutchu-- Kristu Yesu."
1Timothy2:6 Yowo ívelénle mekhiye wi akhale wopola mu nipuroni mwa othene;
1Timothy2:7 namona mwilukuluku aya; yowo kiyátheryiwaka mulipa‐olaleyerya awe ni murummwa (kinalocha eparipari-- nkinotharu miyo)-- muhusiha a amalapo mu nroromelo ni mwiparipari."
1Timothy2:8 Va nthowa nenla kinnakhwela wi alopwana awo evekeleke m’mapuroni mothe mwene-- ni oweliha mata awéla-- ehina‐khalano esara nari wakhulana."
1Timothy2:9 Mummotho-- athiana yiwarihe mekhaya ni yowara yophwanela-- ni wuliwa muru-- ni wíhíha; tahi ni mihi óvathanyiwa-- ni mivira nari ni iracho-- nari malaya a esisapo aya yowalamela;"
1Timothy2:10 nyenya (yeyo enarerela athiana yawo enemyeryerya omuthamala Muluku)-- mwa miteko yaphama."
1Timothy2:11 Muthiana ahuserye okhala chú ni wiwelela wothe wene.
1Timothy2:12 Nyenya miyo nkinemya wi muthiana ahusiheke-- nari omulamulela mulopwana; nyenya akhaleke chú."
1Timothy2:13 Ntakhara Adamu tápachenrye opachushiwa-- vavo nto Hava;"
1Timothy2:14 nave Adamu háwokiwe-- nyenya muthiana owo áwokiwiye avolowa mu sotcheka;"
1Timothy2:15 nyenya anarwa‐avulushiwa voyara mwana-- íkhalela mu nroromelo ni osivela ni wéla vamoha ni wíhíha."
1Timothy3:1 Masu ala ari óroromeleya-- mutchu átchunaka onahota wa wa mulipa‐oweherya-- onnakhwela muteko waphama."
1Timothy3:2 Nave onnaphwanelela wi mulipa‐oweherya ahikhaleno murala-- mulopwana a muthiana mmoha-- awikhapelela-- awíhíha-- óthoriheya-- ósivela ówakhela alecho-- ówerya ohusiha;"
1Timothy3:3 tahi óhapaliwa-- nari amarápwa; nyenya awitchachala-- óhikhala marapwa-- óhitchunasha muhakhu;"
1Timothy3:4 óthoriha phama empáwéne-- ókhalano anamwane awe óléleya ni óchichimiheya wothene."
1Timothy3:5 Nyenya mutchu áhisuwela othoriha empáwe-- ani akhapelele hai muloko wa Muluku?"
1Timothy3:6 Ahikhale óphucha-- wi vawirumiha oni ommorele mulachu wa musaserya."
1Timothy3:7 Onnaphwanelelatho wi amalapo awo eweryeke omwerela namona aphama; wi oni ommorele muroho-- ni murákho wa musaserya."
1Timothy3:8 Mwawihihátho alipa‐oruméla ekhale óchichimiheya-- óhirera mwaha-- óhiwuryasha vinyo-- óhikhalano nrima notakhala;"
1Timothy3:9 ókhalano yawiphíni ya nroromelo mu yawupusherya‐ya‐murima yeparipari.
1Timothy3:10 Nyenya yawotho epacherye wehiwa; vavo nto eruméleke-- ehikhalenoru nthowa."
1Timothy3:11 Mwawihihátho athiana ekhale óchichimiheya-- óhisasa-- awikhapelela-- óroromeleya mu sothe sene."
1Timothy3:12 Alipa‐oruméla ekhale mulopwana a muthiana mmoha-- awathoriha phama anamwane aya-- ni a’mpa mwaya ene."
1Timothy3:13 Ntakhara yawo enaruméla phama ennitothela mekhaya ovuwa waphama-- ni wumihasha murima mu nroromelo na mwa Kristu Yesu."
1Timothy3:14 Kinnorepelani iha ni oweheryerya orwa wa weyo vahilekenle--"
1Timothy3:15 nyenya kalekela-- wi osuwele ophwanelela waya vokhala mu’mpa ya Muluku-- ti muloko wa Muluku mukumi-- nivacha ni mushéryo weparipari."
1Timothy3:16 Nave vawemyeryerya yawiphíni yomwerela Muluku nchichimiho wi tiri etokotoko; Yowo óneiye m’mwílini-- áhériwa ékhaikhai m’munepani-- áhoniwa ti angelo-- alaleyiwa mwa amalapo-- óroromeliwa mwilaponi ya vathi-- awakheliwa mu nchichimiho."
1Timothy4:1 Nyenya Munepa annalocha molochasha-- wi m’mahiku ókutchula akina enarwa‐eriha nroromelo-- ni othokororya minepa yohuweliha ni sohusiha sa masololo--"
1Timothy4:2 mu woneya wowoka wa yawo enalocha sawotha-- óhisiwa mu yawupusherya‐ya‐murima aya ntoko ni muthipo wa moro;"
1Timothy4:3 óhíha othela-- óhíha sólya sikina-- hiho Muluku ápachunshiye wi alipa‐ororomela ni ósuwelasha eparipari yakhele ni mathamalelo."
1Timothy4:4 Ntakhara sopachushiwa sothene sa Muluku ti saphama-- nave heyavovo etchu yeyo-- enaphwanela oyeheya--"
1Timothy4:5 yakheliwaru ni othamala; ntakhara ennélihiwa ni masu a Muluku ni ovekela.
1Timothy4:6 Wawupusheryaru anna itchu iha-- onakhalá mulipa‐oruméla aphama a Kristu Yesu-- óphuwiwa m’masu yawo a nroromelo-- ni mathoriheryo aphama yawo wátchanrá;"
1Timothy4:7 nyenya miaha yatheru‐theru ni ya athiana awuluvala okhocheke. Nave olemeyeno wera machichimiheryo:
1Timothy4:8 Ntakhara olemeyano sa mwíli orino yawiphwanyerya ekhani-- nyenya machichimiheryo enniphwanyerya sothe sene. Ntakhara ennakhalano nlakano nokumi yola-- n’nokumi onórwa owo."
1Timothy4:9 Masu ala tororomeleya ni ophwanelela wakheliwa wothene.
1Timothy4:10 Ntakhara volipelela yeyo ninnapharasha muteko ni wereryasha-- ntakhara oweheryerya wahu tinriahuno wa Muluku mukumi-- yowo ori Mvulusha a atchu othene-- tchiriene a alipa‐ororomela."
1Timothy4:11 Lamulela iha-- navetho ohusihe."
1Timothy4:12 Mutchu ahinyemule onamwaneá; nyenya okhale yotakiherya wa yawo enaroromela awo-- m’masu-- m’makhalelo-- musivela-- mu nroromelo-- mu wéla murima."
1Timothy4:13 Ophiyerya kiniriaka kirwe miyo-- othokororyeke walakhanya-- okhomáliha-- othoriherya."
1Timothy4:14 Ohithanye yamahala yeyo eri mwa weyo-- wávahiwá mwa olochela-- vamoha ni othateya wa mata a atokwene."
1Timothy4:15 Iha othokororyashe-- mwa iha wikhalele; wi wunnuwa wá murima woneye wa othene."
1Timothy4:16 Wiweheryerye mekhá-- ni mahusiheryo awo. Wikhalelekeru mu iha; ntakhara oniriá wereke iha onarwa‐wivulusha mekhá ni yawo enawiwa weyo."
1Timothy5:1 Mutokwene ohimulopole-- nyenya omuchényerye ntoko atithi; amiravo ntoko anna;"
1Timothy5:2 athiana atokwene ntoko asamai; athiana akhani ntoko arokora-- ni wéla murima wothene."
1Timothy5:3 Wachichimiheke anámukhwele yawo ari anámukhwele tchiriene.
1Timothy5:4 Nyenya námukhwele mukina árinono anamwane nari asuluawe yawo epacherye ohuserya wachichimiha a mu emusi aya-- ni wakokiherya yawo yáyanre; ntakhara ela ti yawakheleya va mithoni va Muluku."
1Timothy5:5 Nyenya yowo ori námukhwele tchiriene-- ímuhiyiwa mekhiye-- anamuroromela Muluku-- anikhalelaru m’mathamalelo ni m’mawekelo ohiyu ni othana."
1Timothy5:6 Nyenya yowo onatchara somuhakalaliha ohókhwa-- nari ari mukumi."
1Timothy5:7 Nave iha olamulele-- wi ehikhaleno murala."
1Timothy5:8 Nyenya mukina áhivakulelaka empáwesha-- tchiriene yawo a mu emusi awe yowo takhonchiye nroromelo-- nave tanananariye ompwaha yowo ohinaroromela."
1Timothy5:9 Ahalakhanyeryiwe námukhwele ahiphiyenrye miyakha makhumi mathanu na nimoha-- akhanle muthiana a mulopwana mmoha--"
1Timothy5:10 óvuwa ni miteko yaphama; áphuwale anamwane-- ári awahayiha alecho-- ávanse manani a awéla murima-- ákhavihenrye óhóshiwa-- átchanreru miteko yothene yaphama."
1Timothy5:11 Nyenya anámukhwele akhani wakhocheke; ntakhara enapacheryaya omwerela elomwe Kristu tanakhwelaya otheliwa;
1Timothy5:12 ariayano oványa-- ntakhara yáriha nroromelo naya nopacherya."
1Timothy5:13 Nave ennahuserya’votho okhala oyere-- awecha nílapo; nyenya tahi oyereru-- nyenyatho ennalocha itherutheru-- enerano sikinako saya-- awuluma sohiphwanelela."
1Timothy5:14 Va nthowa nenla kini anámukhwele akhani etheliweke-- yayareke anamwane-- ethokororyeke empa-- óhimvaha ekari mwichani owo yonyemula;"
1Timothy5:15 ntakhara akina yápacherya ohapuwa ni omutchara Satana.
1Timothy5:16 Khwino muthiana mukina óroromela árinono anámukhwele-- yowo ákhaviheryeke-- nave muloko’wo ohihokoliwe; wi wakhaviheryeke yawo ari anámukhwele tchiri."
1Timothy5:17 Atokwene óthoriha phama yeriweke óphwanelela óchichimihiwa waweriwano wili-- tchiriene yawo enúkhuwasha m’masu ni muhusiha."
1Timothy5:18 Ntakhara sorempwa sini-- Ohinaphuta enyope yeyo enipitcha trigu. Nave-- Mulipa‐muteko annaphwanela wakhela wawe."
1Timothy5:19 Ohinákhela yomuhelela mutokwene-- nyenya vakhale anamona eli nari araru."
1Timothy5:20 Yawo enatcheka wasameleke va mithoni va othene-- wi akinako aya awo yoveke."
1Timothy5:21 Kinnawerela namona va mithoni va Muluku-- ni Kristu Yesu-- ni angelo óthanliwa-- wi okhapelele iha mohithanlela-- ohinerano etchu ntoko mwa nthalu."
1Timothy5:22 Ohákuveke wiyathi mata va mutchu-- nari ohátáneno sonanara sa anene; wikhapelele mekhá awéla murima."
1Timothy5:23 Ohikhaletho owurya mahiru-- nyenya owuryeke vinyo vakhani-- ntakhara a m’mirimani mwá ni sokhulumuwa sa hiho inorwela wili wili."
1Timothy5:24 Sotcheka sa atchu akina sohoneya khuluwi-- sinnahóla oya o mulachuni; nyenya akinatho sinnátchara."
1Timothy5:25 Mwawihihátho vari miteko yorera yeyo yóneiye khalai; nave mikina yeyo ehikhanle yawihiha henawerya okhuweya.
1Timothy6:1 Othene yawo ari akapuro a mu nipisini ewere asápwiya a yawo mekhaya óphwanelela óchichimihiwa wothe wene-- wi nsina na Muluku ni mahusiheryo sihereliwe opwalu."
1Timothy6:2 Nave yawo arinono asápwiya óroromela-- ehávevule-- ntakhara ari anna; nyenya tchiriene yáruméle-- ntakhara ari óroromela ni ósiveliwa-- awátánano va yorera eyo. Iha wahusiha-- nave okhomáliheke."
1Timothy6:3 Mutchu ahusiha sikina-- ahinemyeryeryaru masu ókumi awo a Apwiyahu Yesu Kristu-- ni mahusiheryo yawo ari ntoko mwa mathamalelo:"
1Timothy6:4 yowo ohírumiha-- ahisuwelakaru-- nyenya onnáluwela murima sokoha ni soványana sa masu-- wiwo onarwela nrima-- owana-- sopwalu-- manyiheryo ónanara;"
1Timothy6:5 oványana watherutheru wa atchu ópahuwa miruku ni óvíheryiwa ekhaikhai-- awera wi mathamalelo tanaphwanyerya etchu."
1Timothy6:6 Nyenya mathamalelo vamoha ni wítchála tanaphwanyeryaya etchu vatokotoko;
1Timothy6:7 ntakhara hinákunshe etchu nivolowaka elapo ya vathi-- navetho hannawerya orowano etchu n’navinyahu’vo vava;"
1Timothy6:8 nyenya n’nakhalahuno sólya ni sawikhunelano-- iha sinikhwáne."
1Timothy6:9 Nyenya yawo enatchuna okhala amuhakhu ennamorela muwehiwa ni m’murákhoni-- ni m’minkhela minchipale yolosowa ni yawichela-- sawihiha ntoko hiho inanéliha atchu mupahuwa ni m’marimélelo."
1Timothy6:10 Ntakhara mutathári wa sonanara sothe sene ti osivela wa va’charama; wiwo akina yákhalenlaya minkhela-- yáhuwela-- eriha nroromelo yihoma ni masóso manchipale."
1Timothy6:11 Nyenya weyo-- mutchu a Muluku we-- tchawa iha; otchare ekhaikhai-- mathamalelo-- nroromelo-- osivela-- evilelelo-- witchachala."
1Timothy6:12 Wanano ekhocho yaphama ya nroromelo-- pharasha okumi wohimala-- yowo wítchaneliwá-- nave wohemyeryerya wemyeryerya waphama va mithoni va anamona anchipale."
1Timothy6:13 Kinnolamulela va mithoni va Muluku-- yowo anavaha itchu sothe sene okumi-- ni Kristu Yesu-- yowo érenle namona wemyeryerya waphama wa Pontio Pilato;"
1Timothy6:14 wi okhapelele nlamulo nlo-- nohikhalano nthepa-- nohikhalano murala-- ophiyerya woneya wa Apwiyahu Yesu Kristu;"
1Timothy6:15 nenlo aniriye arwe‐onihe m’mahiku a Yowo mekhiye-- yowo ori Mwanene Ikuru óréla ni a va mekhiye-- ti Mwene a mamwene ni Pwiya a asápwiya;"
1Timothy6:16 Yowo mkhatiye orinono okumi wohimala-- yowo anakhala mu omwaléla wohiweryeya opisherya’wo; yowo mutchu ahámonniye-- nari hanaweryaru omona; wa Yowo okhale nchichimiho ni ikuru sohimala. Amen."
1Timothy6:17 Wálamulele yawo ari amuhakhu m’mahiku yala a vathi vano-- wi ehirumiheke-- nari ehiweheryeryeke muhakhu wohisuwanyeya okhala waya-- nyenya Muluku-- yowo ananivaha hiyo sothe sene mwawáchasha-- wi nihakalalekeno;"
1Timothy6:18 wi yereke saphama-- yáche ni miteko yaphama-- ehakalaleke wakawela akina-- nave yátáneke;"
1Timothy6:19 yithukumanyerye mkhataya mathipelo órera a mahiku enórwa awo-- wi epharashe okumi‐kumi owo."
1Timothy6:20 Timoteo we-- weherya wánnyeryeryiwá eyo-- ni osepa miaha yatherutharu ni soványana sa ela eneriwa miruku mowoka;"
1Timothy6:21 yeyo akina yémyeryenryaya tiyátchenkaya ni oriha nroromelo. Ikharari sikhale ni weyo. Amen.
2Timothy1:1 Paulo murummwa a Kristu Yesu mwa okhwela wa Muluku-- ntoko mwa nlakano nokumi wa m’Kristu Yesu--"
2Timothy1:2 wa Timoteo-- mwanaka ósiveliwa: Namutchucha-- ikharari-- murechele wa wa Muluku Atithi ni Kristu Yesu Apwiyahu."
2Timothy1:3 Kinnamuthamala Muluku-- yowo kinamurumélaka opacherya makhalelo aka-- ni yawupusherya‐ya‐murima yawéla-- wi kinnawupuwela weyo mohihiyeryerya m’mavekelo mwaka--"
2Timothy1:4 votchunasha ohiyu ni othana owona weyo-- ni wupuwela mithoriá-- wi kisaryeyeno otheya;"
2Timothy1:5 kinupuwelaka nroromelo nohiwoka nenlo n’ri mwa weyo-- nenlo nápachenrye okhala mwa amunná Loisi-- ni mwa amaiá Yunike-- nave-- kóleketcheya murima-- mwa weyotho."
2Timothy1:6 Vava kinawupushaka weyo wi wiséle yamahala ya Muluku-- yeyo eri mwa weyo mwa wiyathi wa matáka."
2Timothy1:7 Ntakhara Muluku hánivahile Munepa wawóva; nyenya wa ikuru ni osivela ni wíhíha.
2Timothy1:8 Vawihihá muru ohiwúleru va namona a Apwiyahu-- nari va miyo amukariposo awe; nyenya wone sohósha ni Mitchaka Yaphama-- ntoko mwa ikuru sa Muluku;"
2Timothy1:9 yowo ánivulunshe hiyo-- anitchana hiyo ni witchana wawéla-- tahi ntoko mwa miteko ahu-- nyenya ntoko mwa otiteleliha murima wa Yowo mekhiye-- ni ikharari-- sovahiwa wa hiyo mwa Kristu Yesu sihipachenrye ilukuluku sohipacherya--"
2Timothy1:10 nyenya sohonihiwa hihano ni woneya wa Mvulusháhu Kristu Yesu-- yowosha ávelihale okhwa-- óniha vokokoleya okumi ni ohúcha mwa Mitchaka Yaphama--"
2Timothy1:11 yowo kithanleliwaka okhala mulipa‐olaleyerya-- ni murummwa ni muhusiha awe."
2Timothy1:12 Ntakhara a yela káhona masóso ala; nyenya muru honakúla; ntakhara kinnamusivela Yowo kinamuroromelaka-- nave kinnaleketcheya murima wi ori a ikuru solipelelano yeyo ákinnyeryenryiye eyo ophiyerya nihiku nenlo."
2Timothy1:13 Phara yotakiherya ya masu ókumi-- yawo wíwalá wa miyo-- mwa nroromelo ni osivela wiwo ori mwa Kristu Yesu."
2Timothy1:14 Yawunnyeryeryiwa yorera eyo olipeleleke mwa Munepa Wawéla yowo anítchála mwa hiyo.
2Timothy1:15 Ela onnasuwela-- wi othene a mu Asiya yákóka omwalana ni miyo; a yawo ti Fugelo ni Hermogene."
2Timothy1:16 Apwiya amorele ikharari emusi ya Onesiforo; ntakhara ákihihimula miyo wili wili-- nave muru hewáwúnle ni onyoro aka;"
2Timothy1:17 nyenya áríye m’Roma ákavyavya miyo ni nthiti-- akiphwanya."
2Timothy1:18 (Apwiya amvahe yowo wi aphwanye ikharari ni Apwiya nihiku nenlo); ni vavale ákiruménliye mu itchu sinchipale mu Efeso-- weyo onnasuwela phama."
2Timothy2:1 Nave weyo-- mwanaka-- lipiha mwikharari sa m’Kristu Yesu."
2Timothy2:2 Nave hiho wíwalá wa miyo mwa anamona anchipale-- hiho owunnyererye atchu óroromeleya-- yawo eni ewerye wahusiha akinatho."
2Timothy2:3 Wone masóso vamoha ni miyo ntoko musurutato aphama a Kristu Yesu.
2Timothy2:4 Musurutato hanaweyiwa ni miteko phyakala-- wi ahimutheihe yowo ámurempe osurutato."
2Timothy2:5 Nyenya mukina éryeryanano muchapha wa othata-- hanawarihiwa koroa áhéreryanano ntoko ávánenliye."
2Timothy2:6 Mulipa‐emacha yowo anapharasha muteko tanaphwanela okhala ópacherya wakhela sawima iho.
2Timothy2:7 Anyiherya yeyo kinalochaka; ntakhara Apwiya anarwa‐óvaha osuwelasha mu sothe sene.
2Timothy2:8 Mupuwele Yesu Kristu-- yowo ávinnye wukhwani-- árwele owo mwipyo ya Davide-- ntoko mwa Mitchaka Yaphama;"
2Timothy2:9 mummo kinonaka masóso ophiyerya makwekweso-- ntoko mulipa‐otcheka; nyenya masu a Muluku henamakeya."
2Timothy2:10 Hihá kinnavilelano sothe sene-- ntakhara a óthanliwa-- wi yawotho yahiphwanye ovulushiwa iwo wa mwa Kristu Yesu-- vamoha ni nchichimiho nohimala."
2Timothy2:11 Masu ala tororomeleya: ntakhara nakhwa mwa Yowo-- n’narwa‐nikhalatho akumi ni Yowo:"
2Timothy2:12 navilela-- n’narwa‐nlamulatho vamoha ni Yowo: namukhócha Yowo-- Yowotho anarwa‐anikhócha hiyo:"
2Timothy2:13 nakhala óhiroromeleya-- Yowo taríye óroromeleya; ntakhara hanawerya wikhócha mekhiye."
2Timothy2:14 Owupushe iha-- ni owerela namona va mithoni va Apwiya-- wi ehiványeke ni masu óhiphwanyeryano etchu-- nyenya yawo enawuwiha alipa‐wiwa’wo."
2Timothy2:15 Okhaleno mvai wisoneiha óthoriheya wa Muluku-- mulipa‐muteko óhikhalano nthowa nomúliha muru-- óluluwelano phama masu éparipari."
2Timothy2:16 Nyenya sepa miaha yatherutheru; ntakhara sinarwa‐sipwaherya otchara ohithamalela--"
2Timothy2:17 nave masu aya enarwa?-?etathareya okhala namukosho; a yawo ti Humenayo ni Fileto;
2Timothy2:18 ti yawo yáhuwenle vohilocha eparipari-- yálochaya wi ovinya wukhwani wohereya khalai-- epahula nroromelo na akina."
2Timothy2:19 Nyenya tchiriene mathipelo a Muluku ahemeshiwa votikitheryeya-- ni okhalano eneneryo ela-- Apwiya annáróra yawo ari awawe; nave-- Ithanle va yohikhala ekhaikhai yowo onaromola nsina na Apwiya."
2Timothy2:20 Nyenya mu’mpa etokotoko hamuri sokusherya sa mivira ni sa prataru-- nyenyatho sa miri ni sa’tchaya; nave sikina sochichimiheya-- nyenya sikina sohichichimiheya."
2Timothy2:21 Vava nto mutchu íséliha mekhiye va iha-- onarwa‐akhala yokusherya yochichimiheya-- yothanliwa-- yophareli?-?washa muteko ti pwiyáya-- yoryeheryela miteko yothene yorera."
2Timothy2:22 Nyenya tchawa minkhela yomiravo-- otchare ekhaikhai-- nroromelo-- osivela-- murechele-- vamoha ni yawo enítchana Apwiya ni mirima yawéla."
2Timothy2:23 Nyenya osepe sokoha solosowa ni sohisuwanyeya-- osuwelaka wi sinnarúha marápwa."
2Timothy2:24 Nave kapuro a Apwiya hanaphwanela okhala marápwa-- nyenya akhale óphwanelela-- épewe wa othene-- ósuwela ohusiha-- óleva--"
2Timothy2:25 awathoriherya yawo enaványana mwawitchachala; wi akhweya Muluku ávahe yawo matcharuwelo wi yahisuweleno eparipari--"
2Timothy2:26 nave yahívulushe o murakhoni wa musaserya-- yowo onaphara ni olakelela wawe."
2Timothy3:1 Nyenya róra ela-- wi m’mahiku ókutchula sinarwa‐siphiya ilukuluku sohósha."
2Timothy3:2 Ntakhara atchu enarwa‐ekhala awisivela mkhataya-- ósivela icharama-- awithamala-- awirumiha-- ópwalu-- óhiwiwelela yawo yáyanre-- óhithamala-- óhéla murima--"
2Timothy3:3 óhikhalano osivela wophachuwano-- óhátányiheya-- ósasa-- óhiwerya wíhíha-- óshimwa-- óhásivela aphama--"
2Timothy3:4 amakhuche-- ókakamela-- awúra-- awirumiha murima-- ósivela hiho sinatheiha mutchu-- óhikhala ómusivela Muluku;"
2Timothy3:5 óhikhalano woneya wa mathamalelo-- nyenya ikuru saya tiyákhonchaya; wa yawotho withanle."
2Timothy3:6 Ntakhara mwa yawo muri alipa‐witela ipa-- enaphara athiana-- yawo eníreya mirichi ya sonanara saya-- ókushiwa ni minkhela ya miloko miloko;"
2Timothy3:7 óhuserya mahiku othene-- nyenya henaweryaru ophiya o miruku yeparipari."
2Timothy3:8 Nave ntoko Yane ni Yambre yáványannayano Mose-- hihatho yawo ennaványanano eparipari; ti atchu awúchasha murima-- óhithoriheya va nroromelo."
2Timothy3:9 Nyenya herwa‐epwaha’vo; ntakhara olosowa waya onarwa‐woneya wa othene-- ntoko olosowa wa yale."
2Timothy3:10 Nyenya weyo tutchanretchanre ohusiha waka-- makhalelo-- otiteleliha murima-- nroromelo-- oleva-- osivela-- evilelelo--"
2Timothy3:11 sohósha-- wona masóso; sawihiha ntoko kéreliwaka mu Antiokeya-- mu Ikoniya-- m’Lustro-- sohósha sawihiha ntoko kónnaka; nave mu sothe sene iha Apwiya tákákihaliye’mo."
2Timothy3:12 Nave othene yawo enakhwela okhala óthamalela mukumini mwa Kristu Yesu enarwa‐yona sohósha.
2Timothy3:13 Nyenya atchu ónanara ni ówoka-- enarwa‐yimunanararu okhala wokhala-- óhuweliha ni óhuwelihiwa."
2Timothy3:14 Nyenya weyo wikhaleleru mwíha hiho ohusenryá-- nave witikitheryeno murima-- omusuwelaka yowo óhusihale;"
2Timothy3:15 ni wi opacherya ori nikwiya wosuwela sorempwa sawéla-- sowerya wóvaha miruku ophiyerya ovulushiwa-- mwa nroromelo na mwa Kristu Yesu."
2Timothy3:16 Sorempwa sothene sávereliwe ti Muluku-- nave sinnaphwanyerya etchu vohusiha-- oványa-- maryeheryo-- mathoriheryo a wikhaikhai:"
2Timothy3:17 wi mutchu a Muluku akhale óphwanelela-- óryeheryeya werano miteko yothene yaphama."
2Timothy4:1 Kinnawerela namona va mithoni va Muluku ni Kristu Yesu-- yowo ani arwe‐athorihe akumi ni alipa‐okhwa-- ni va woneya wawe ni omwene awe;"
2Timothy4:2 laleyerya masu; erano velukuluku aya-- vahinakhala elukuluku aya; ványa-- samela-- lopola-- ni oleva wothene ni ohusiha."
2Timothy4:3 Ntakhara enarwa‐ephiya mahiku vavo eniriaya ehemyeryerye ohusiha worérela; nyenya vónéniwa o’waruni enarwa‐yithukumanyerya alipa‐ohusiha ntoko mwa minkhela ya yawo mekhaya:
2Timothy4:4 nave enarwa‐yikuphyiha mwaíni veparipari-- nave enarwa?-?ehapuwa otchara ithale satherutheru."
2Timothy4:5 Nyenya weyo-- onaka mu sothe sene-- onaka masóso-- phara muteko wa mulipa‐olaleyerya a Mitchaka Yaphama-- khwaniheryaka oruméla wá."
2Timothy4:6 Ntakhara kinamuheliwa ephepa hihano-- nave mahiku ótháma waka áphiya."
2Timothy4:7 Kówana ekhocho yaphama-- kóveliha ephiro eyo-- kókhapelela nroromelo:"
2Timothy4:8 Vano ókivithela koroa ékhaikhai-- yowo Apwiya-- óthoriha ékhaikhai-- aniriye arwe‐akinnye nihiku nenlo: nave tahi wa miyo mkhatakaru-- nyenyatho wa othene yawo yásivenle woneya wawe."
2Timothy4:9 Nkereryasha wákuva orwa wa miyo: Ntakhara Dema ókihiya-- asivela elapo ela ya vathi-- arowa o Tesalonika;"
2Timothy4:10 Kresike o Galatiya-- Tito o Dalimatiya."
2Timothy4:11 Lukaru tari vamoha ni miyo. Omukushe Marko-- arwe vamoha ni yowe; ntakhara onnaphwanela okiruméla."
2Timothy4:12 Nyenya Tukiko kimurummaka o Efeso.
2Timothy4:13 Yawikhunélano ele káhiyalaka o Trowa wa Karpo-- orweno oniriá orweke-- ni alivro-- tchiriene ishapala sorempwa ihe."
2Timothy4:14 Alesandro muli‐pa‐ohana enyachu ákerela sonanara sinchipale: Apwiya anarwa‐amukókiherya ntoko mwa miteko awe;
2Timothy4:15 yowo weyotho owaráleno; ntakhara áványanano masu ahu.
2Timothy4:16 Vawírúha vaka vopacherya havovo mmoha nari ákikhavihenrye-- nyenya othene yákihiya; yeyo ehalakhanyeryiwe ntoko yawáványa."
2Timothy4:17 Nyenya Apwiya áhémela vamoha ni miyo akivaha ikuru; wi mwa miyo olaleyerya ovuwe mothe mwene-- nave amalapo othene yiwe; nave káhákihi‐wa mwano mwa mwacho."
2Timothy4:18 Apwiya anarwa‐akákiha o mitekoni yothene yonanara-- akivulusha miyo ovolowa omwene awe wa wiri‐mu; wa Yowo okhale nchichimiho ilukuluku sa ilukuluku. Amen."
2Timothy4:19 Lochela Priska ni Akula-- ni emusi ya Onesiforo."
2Timothy4:20 Erasto áhíkhalelaru m’Korinto; nyenya Trofimo kimuhiyale arikimwi‐cheliwa o Mileto.
2Timothy4:21 Nkereryasha orwa ehákuvale ophiya mahiku a nakhutu. Annolochela weyo Eubulo-- ni Pude-- ni Lino-- ni Klaudiya-- ni anna othene."
2Timothy4:22 Apwiya akhale ni munepá. Ikharari sikhale ni weyo. Amen.
Titus1:1 Paulo-- kapuro a Muluku-- ni murummwa a Yesu Kristu-- ntoko mwa nroromelo na alipa‐othanliwa a Muluku-- ni marórela épari‐pari yawo ari ntoko mwa mathamalelo--"
Titus1:2 muweheryerya wa okumi wohimala-- yowo Muluku ahinótha owo-- ávánenliye sihakuvale opacherya ilukuluku sohipacherya;"
Titus1:3 nyenya va mahiku a Yowo mekhiye áhoniha masu awe mulaleyerya wiwo ákinnyeryenryiye miyo-- ntoko mwa nlamulo na Mvulushahu Muluku:"
Titus1:4 wa Tito mwanaka‐nakasha ntoko mwa nroromelo na hiyo othene: Ikharari ni murechele sa wa Muluku Atithi ni Kristu Yesu Mvulushahu.
Titus1:5 Va nthowa nla kóhiyenryaka m’Krete-- wi wahithorihe hiho sinayeleka-- nave othanlele atokwene m’michetcheni yothene-- ntoko kólamulenlaka;"
Titus1:6 mukina ári óhikhalano murala-- mulopwana a mwariye mmoha-- yowo orinono anamwane óroromela-- óhipahula sawawe-- nari yowo ohinakhócha wiwelela masu."
Titus1:7 Ntakhara mulipa‐oweherya onaphwanela wi ahikhaleno murala-- ntoko nahota a Muluku; óhikhala awúra-- óhákuva onanariwa-- óhikhala a nlala-- óhikhala a marapwa-- óhikhala a nrima notakhala;"
Titus1:8 nyenya ókhovelela wahayiha alecho-- ókhovelela saphama-- awithoriha-- ékhaikhai-- awéla murima-- awíhíha;"
Titus1:9 awákélela masu óroromeleya ntoko mwa mahusiheryo-- wi aweryeke olopola m’mahusiheryo órérela-- ni wáványa yawo enamvanya."
Titus1:10 Ntakhara ákhala anchipale yawo ehinaroromela masu-- awuluma satherutheru-- ni owoka-- tchirieme yawo ari a alipa‐othikiliwa-- yawo enaphwanela omálihiwa;"
Titus1:11 yawo enapahula imusi sothene-- ni ohusiha sohiphwanelela ntakhara a okhalela nrima wotakhala."
Titus1:12 Mukina a mwa yawo-- ti mulipa‐miririmo awaya-- áriye-- AKrete talipa‐wotha okhala wokhala-- inama sonanara-- ólova-- óyere."
Titus1:13 Namona ola ori awotha.
Titus1:14 Mwa yela walopole moshimwa-- wi ekhaleke órérela mu nroromelo-- óhithokororya ithale satherutheru sa aYuda-- ni malamulo a atchu ómwaryeya omwalanano eparipari."
Titus1:15 Sothe sene sinnéla wa yawo enéla murima; nyenya wa yawo ari órípihiwa ni óhiroromela hiwawowo etchu yawéla; nyenya miruku aya yórípihiwa ni yawupusheryáyéne‐ya‐murima.
Titus1:16 Ennemyeryerya wi ennamusuwela Muluku-- nyenya ni miteko aya ennamukhócha Yowo-- ntakhara ari ótakhalasha-- ni óhiwelela-- ni va miteko yothene yaphama óhithoriheya."
Titus2:1 Nyenya weyo-- uluma hiho sinaphwanelela mahusiheryo órérela:"
Titus2:2 Asimahumu ekhale awikhapelela-- óchichimiheya-- awíhíha-- óthoriheya mu nroromelo-- musivela-- mwivilelelo."
Titus2:3 Mwawihihátho asimahano ekhaleno makhalelo awaphwanelela atchu awéla-- óhisasa-- óhiheyiwano osivela wa vinyo-- óhusiha sorera;"
Titus2:4 wi yathoriheryeke athiana akhani wi esiveleke asíyaya-- yasivele anamwane aya-- ekhale awíhíha-- ómála--"
Titus2:5 ókhapelela ipa saya-- ówiwelela asíyaya a yawo mkhataya-- wi masu a Muluku enereliwe opwalu."
Titus2:6 Mwawihihátho amiravo wachenyerye ekhale awíhíha;
Titus2:7 mu sothe sene wisoneihe mekhá yotakiherya ya miteko yaphama;
Titus2:8 m’mahusiheryoá woniheke yohúcha-- óchichimiheya-- masu órérela óhiványiwa; wi yowo onaványa uliwe muru-- ahikhalakano etchu yonanara yonihelela hiyo."
Titus2:9 Akapuro ewiweleleke asapwiyáya a yawo mkhataya-- yatheiheke mu sothe sene; óhikhocha masu aya;"
Titus2:10 óhihavula itchu saya-- nyenya yoniheke ororomeleya wothene waphama; wi yahirerihe mahusiheryo a Mvulushahu Muluku mwitchu sothe sene."
Titus2:11 Ntakhara sohoneya ikharari sa Muluku-- sawavulusha atchu othene--"
Titus2:12 ni onihusiha hiyo wi-- vokhocha makhalelo óhithamalela ni minkhela yelapo ya vathi-- nikhale akumi mwilaponi yela awíhíha-- ni ékhaikhai-- ni óthamamalela;"
Titus2:13 óweha oweheryerya worela-- ni woneya wa nchichimiho na Muluku mutokwene ni Mvulushahu Yesu Kristu;"
Titus2:14 yowo ívelénle mehkiye mu nipuroni mwa hiyo-- wi ahinopole hiyo wa sonanara sothene-- nave íséliherye mekhiye atchu wi ekhale awawesha-- amvai va miteko yorera."
Titus2:15 Iha uluma-- nave olopole-- osame ni olamulelo wothene. Mutchu ahonyemule."
Titus3:1 Owupusherye yawo yalapeke atokwene-- ni alipa‐olamula-- ekhaleke awiwelela-- óryeheryeya va miteko yothene yaphama;"
Titus3:2 ehimwereleke mutchu opwalu-- ehikhaleke amarapwa-- ekhaleke amahala-- yoniheke witchachala wothene wa atchu othene."
Titus3:3 Ntakhara khalai hiyotho nári ólosowa-- óhiwelela-- ókhalela okapuro minkhela ni sohakalaliha sa milokomiloko-- ókhala mu nlala ni mu nrima-- awichiwa-- awichana mukina ni mukhwawe."
Titus3:4 Nyenya epewe-- ni osivela wa wa atchu-- wa Mvulushahu Muluku sóneiyaya--"
Titus3:5 tahi sorwela m’mitekoni yekhaikhai-- yeyo hiyo náphanrahu-- nyenya ntoko mwa ikharari sawe tánivulunshiye-- mwa ovasa woyariwatho ni maryeheryo a Munepa Wawéla--"
Titus3:6 yowo ánimínenle hiyo mwawachasha-- mwa Yesu Kristu Mvulushahu;"
Titus3:7 wi vaweriwa ékhaikhai ni ikharari sa Yowosha-- naheriwe mikelampa ntoko mwa oweheryerya wa okumi wohimala."
Titus3:8 Óroromeleya masu ala-- nave sa iha kinakhwelaka wi olipiherye masu-- wi yawo enamuroromela Muluku yiweheryerye wi ekhaleru aholi a miteko yaphama. Iha ti sorera ni sawaphwanyerya atchu etchu aya;"
Titus3:9 nyenya sepa sokoha solosowa-- ni walakhanyerya wa mahimo-- ni marapwa-- ni ovanyana wa va malamulo; ntakhara hasinaphwanyerya etchu-- nave siri etherutheru."
Titus3:10 Mutchu óhiya nroromelo-- omuloponle omoha nari wili--"
Titus3:11 omukumihe’mo-- osuwelaka wi awihiha owo óthatuwa tchiri-- atcheka-- akhala awiványa mekhiye."
Titus3:12 Kamuruma Artema wa weyo-- nari Tukiko-- wakuve orwa wa miyo o Nikopoli: ntakhara kotiteleliha murima orupasa’wo mahiku a nakhutu."
Titus3:13 Zena-- ng’wope a milachu-- ni Apolo wakuve waryeheryela sa mukwaha-- wi ehithoiwe."
Titus3:14 Nave atchu ahu ehu?-?seryetho wi ekhapelele miteko yaphama yokhweleya-- wi ehíkhaleleru óhíma sawima."
Titus3:15 Ennolochela weyo othene yawo enakhala vamoha ni miyo. Lochela yawo enansivela awo mu nroromelo. Ikharari sikhale ni nyuwo othene.
Philemon1:1 Paulo amukariposo a Kristu Yesu-- ni Timoteo munna owo-- wa Filemoni ósiveliwa owo ni mulípa‐muteko mukhwihu--"
Philemon1:2 ni wa Apiya murokora owo-- ni Arkipo musurutato mukhwihu-- ni wa muloko yowo ori m’pa mwá:"
Philemon1:3 Ikharari wa nyuwo ni murechele wa wa Muluku Atithihu ni Apwiya Yesu Kristu.
Philemon1:4 Kinnamuthamala Muluku aka mahiku othene-- ni owupuwela weyo m’mavekeloni mwaka--"
Philemon1:5 kiniwaka sa osivela wá ni nroromelo nenlo oriáno nolakelela wa Apwiya Yesu-- ni wa awéla murima othene;"
Philemon1:6 wi eyátáno ya nroromelo ná yahikhale ya ’kuru vosuwela yaphama yeyo eri mwa nyuwo-- ya wa Kristu."
Philemon1:7 Ntakhara kákhalano otheya otokotoko ni ohakalala ntakhara osivela wá-- ntakhara mirima ya awéla murima tihihimuwalaya mwa weyo munna."
Philemon1:8 Mummo-- nari kiriakano onyesererya otokotoko mwa Kristu wolamulela yeyo enaphwanelela--"
Philemon1:9 nyenya tchiriene-- kinnachenya mosivela-- kiriaka hiha Paulo mwamuhumu-- nave hihano amukariposotho a Kristu Yesu;"
Philemon1:10 kinnochenyerya ntakhara a mwanaka-- yowo kimuyanraka mukariposo-- Onesimo--"
Philemon1:11 yowo khalai ahóphwa‐phwanyenrye etchu-- nyenya vano óniphwanyerya etchu morera weyo ni miyo;"
Philemon1:12 ti yowotho kókokihenryaka-- ti murimasha wa yomi."
Philemon1:13 Yowo nkanakhwela omuwehiha wi akhale ni miyo-- wi mu nipuroni mwá akákiruméla miyo m’kariposo sa Mitchaka Yaphama:"
Philemon1:14 nyenya kihisuwenle murimá nkinakhwela wera etchu; wi epewá ehikhale ntoko mwawakeleliha nyenya mwa mahala.
Philemon1:15 Ntakhara akhweya amwalanyiwe ni weyo va mahiku aya ntakhara a ela-- ni wi werekemkhalanoru mahiku othene;"
Philemon1:16 vanotho tahi ntoko kapuro-- nyenya ómpwaha kapuro-- munna ósiveliwa-- tchiriene ti yomi-- nyenya mopwahashatho ti yowe-- m’mwílini-- navetho mwa Apwiya."
Philemon1:17 Wákéraka nto okhovelelana ni weyo omwakhele yowo ntoko yomi mkhataka.
Philemon1:18 Nyenya khwino árimotchekela etchu-- kahi ápoleya etchu-- okalakhanyerye miyo yeyo;"
Philemon1:19 yomi Paulo kinarepa ni ntata naka-- kinarwa‐kikokiherya; wi kihiloche ni weyo wi weyo wa mulipa‐okipoleya aka."
Philemon1:20 Ahe-- munna-- kihakalale ni weyo mwa Apwiya: ohihimule murimáka mwa Kristu."
Philemon1:21 Kinaroromelaka wiwelela wá kinnorepela weyo-- kinasuwelaka wi onarwa‐weranotho opwahiha momu kinalochelaka ’mu."
Philemon1:22 Nyenya okiryeheryeletho vokona’vo; ntakhara kinnaweheryerya wi mwa mavekelo anyu kinarwa‐kivahiwa wa nyuwo.
Philemon1:23 Epafra amukariposo mukhwaka mwa Kristu Yesu annolochela weyo;
Philemon1:24 aneranotho hiha-- Marko-- Aristarko-- Dema-- Luka alipa‐muteko akhwaka."
Philemon1:25 Ikharari sa Apwiyahu Yesu Kristu sikhale vamoha ni munepanyu. Amen.
Hebrews1:1 Khalai Muluku áhuluma ni makholo mwa alipa‐miririmo vakhani vakhani-- ni olocha wamiloko miloko--"
Hebrews1:2 nyenya vokutchuwa vaya va mahiku yala áhuluma ni hiyo ni Mwana yowo ámuthanliliye okhala mukelampa a sothe sene-- mwa Yowotho tápachunshiye ilapo ni sa wirimu sene;"
Hebrews1:3 yowo-- oriye warya wa nchichimiho nawe-- ni eneneryosha ya makhalelo awe-- atesha sothe sene ni masu a ikuru sawe-- vavo élihaliye sonanara-- akilathi va ntatani nolopwana na Otokwene wirimu--"
Hebrews1:4 akhanle awapwaha angelo-- ntoko ámorenliye mikelampa ni nsina nawapwaha yawo."
Hebrews1:5 Ntakhara wa mungelo tani álonchiyeno okhala wokhala-- Weyo wa Mwanaka-- Olelo Miyo kihoyara Weyo? navetho-- Miyo kinarwa‐kikhala wa Yowo Atithi-- Nave Yowo anarwa‐akhala wa Miyo Mwana?"
Hebrews1:6 Nave anakushiyetho ópacherya oyariwa ovolowano mwilaponi-- tanalochiye-- Nave emukokhorele Yowo angelo othene a Muluku."
Hebrews1:7 Nave sa angelo tanalochiye-- Yowo anawera angelo awe minepa-- Nave yawo enamuruméla ekhale nikalume na moro;"
Hebrews1:8 Nyenya analochiye sa Mwana-- ani-- Munyukhu womwene anyu-- Muluku-- onnikhalelaru okhala wokhala; Nave echikopa yomwene yawokowa ti echikopa yomwene anyu."
Hebrews1:9 Mosivela ekhaikhai-- mwichanano yonanara; Mwa ela Muluku-- ti Muluku anyu-- ówóchihani Makhurwa a ohakalala wenesha wapwaha akhwinyu."
Hebrews1:10 Nave-- Nyuwo-- Apwiya-- vopacherya vene mwáhiyathi mathipelo aya a elapo-- Nave erimu ti muteko wa matányu;"
Hebrews1:11 Yeyo enarwa‐eriméla; nyenya Nyuwo munnik?-?halelaru; Nave iho sothe sene sinarwa‐sukuluwa ntoko malaya;
Hebrews1:12 Nave ntoko yawikhunelano munarwa‐mwapánya Ntoko malaya-- nave sinarwa‐sithatuwa; Nyenya Nyuwo mwá Yowosha-- Nave miyakhányu herwa‐emala."
Hebrews1:13 Nyenya sa mungelo tani álonchiyeno okhala wokhala-- Khala va ntatani naka nolopwana-- Ophiyerya kiwiyanthe amwichaniá okhala munyukhu wa mananiá?"
Hebrews1:14 Yothene tahi mineparu yoruméla-- yorummwa wi eruméleke yawo eni erwe‐evoshiwe mikelampa ya ovulushiwa?"
Hebrews2:1 Mwa ela ninnaphwanela othokororyasha hiho níwalahu iha wi akhweya nni neremkushiwa ni omwalanano.
Hebrews2:2 Ntakhara masu yawo yálochiwe ti angelo yári ókilatheya-- nave sotchekela sothene ni sohiléleya sákhela phatamari ékhaikhai--"
Hebrews2:3 nni nrwe‐nivuluwe hai hiyo-- nahithokororya ovulushiwa otokotoko wawihihá? wiwo Apwiya álikaliye olocha-- nave yawo yíwale awo yánchichimiheryela hiyo;"
Hebrews2:4 vawerano namona vamoha Mulukutho ni ineneryo-- ni sotikiniha ni ikuru sa miloko miloko ni sokawela sa Munepa Wawéla-- ntoko ni okhwela wawe."
Hebrews2:5 Ntakhara hálapihenrye angelo elapo enorwa eyo-- yeyo n’nalochahu ela."
Hebrews2:6 Nyenya mukina áherela namona vakina-- ii-- Mutchu ti sheni wi munamupuwela? Akhweya mwana a mutchu wi munareryano?"
Hebrews2:7 Mwámuyeviha vakhani opwaha angelo-- Mwámuwariha yowo koroa a nchichimiho ni mahala-- Nave mwámwiyathi yowo oweherya miteko ya matányu;"
Hebrews2:8 Mwálapiha sothe sene vathi va manani awe. Vawi vavale ámulapihenryiye sothe sene-- háhiyaletho etchu yohimulapa Yowo. Nyenya hihano hannona sothe sene simulapaka."
Hebrews2:9 Nyenya ninnamona Yowo ámuyevihale vakhani opwaha angelo-- ti Yesu-- ntakhara a masóso a okhwa-- ówara koroa a nchichimiho ni mahala-- wi ni ikharari sa Muluku alawihe okhwa mu nipuroni mwa mutchu phyakala."
Hebrews2:10 Ntakhara wámphwanelela Yowo sothe sene enakhalelaya ntakhara a Yowo-- ni sothe sene mwa Yowo-- vawakusha anamwane anchipale evolowe mu nchichimiho-- omuryeherya murutchu ene muhóli ópacherya awavulusha waya mwa masóso."
Hebrews2:11 Ntakhara Yowo anéliha ni yawo enélihiwa othene enarwela mwa mmoha;
Hebrews2:12 va nthowa nenla muru honamúla owéra yawo anna-- ni wi-- Kinarwa‐kivuwiha nsina nanyu wa annaka-- Véri va muloko kinarwa‐kiwipelani."
Hebrews2:13 Navetho-- Kinarwa‐kimuroromela Yowo. Navetho-- Nkonani-- miyo ni anamwane yawo Muluku ákivahiliye."
Hebrews2:14 Vawona nto wi anamwane ti anikhami ni ethai-- Yowotho mwawihihá álawihano makhalelo yawo wi mwa okhwa ampahule yowo árinono ikuru sa okhwa-- ti musaserya;"
Hebrews2:15 átaphule othene yawo-- ntakhara a wova okhwa-- mukumini mwaya mothene tiyámakiwaya okhala akapuro."
Hebrews2:16 Ntakhara tchiriene hanákhela angelo-- nyenya anákhela epyo ya Abrahamu--"
Hebrews2:17 Mwawihihá wámphwanelela ophwanaphwana ni anna mu sothe sene-- wi ahikhale Mutokwene a ephepa aikharari ni óroromeleya mwitchu sa wa Muluku-- wi aveléle oliva wa sonanara sa atchu."
Hebrews2:18 Ntakhara ónniye masóso-- éhiwe mkhatiye-- annawerya wakhaviherya yawo enéhiwa."
Hebrews3:1 Mwawihihá-- anna awéla murima-- awakhelano vamoha witchaniwa wa wirimu-- anyiheryani sa Murummwa ni Mutokwene a alipa‐ephepa a wemyeryerya wahu-- Yesu;"
Hebrews3:2 Yowo ári óroromeleya wa Yowo ámuthanlile owo-- wi ntoko-- Mose m’pa mwawe mothe mwene."
Hebrews3:3 Ntakhara Yowo oheriwa óphwanelela ochichimihiwa wompwaha Mose-- wi ntoko yowo átenke empa oriyeno ochichimihiwa wopwaha empa eyo."
Hebrews3:4 Ntakhara empa yokhalano mulipa‐otekáya; nyenya oteka sothe sene ti Muluku.
Hebrews3:5 Nave Mose ári óroromeleya m’pa mwawe mothe mwene-- ntoko mmiravo-- wi akhalele namona hiho sini sirwe?-?silochiwe iho;"
Hebrews3:6 nyenya Kristu ntoko mwana-- ókhapelela empa awe; empa awe ti yehu-- nakhalashano omaka murima ni withamalelela oweheryerya iwo weranoru ophiyerya makutchuwelo."
Hebrews3:7 Hihá-- ntoko Munepa Wawéla analocheliye-- Olelo mwíwa masu awe--"
Hebrews3:8 Muhúmihe mirimányu-- ntoko moshimwiha-- Ntoko mu nihiku nawehiwa nle mu’takhwani--"
Hebrews3:9 Wiwo makholo anyu yákéhilayano-- Ekiróra-- Yona miteko aka miyakha makhumi masheshe."
Hebrews3:10 Hihá káshimwano nloko nenlo-- Nave káriye-- Mahiku othene tinahuwelaya m’murimani; Nyenya heyárónrashe iphiro saka yala;"
Hebrews3:11 Ntoko kálipenlaka mwisaráka-- Mano enarwa‐evolowa vawitchuwela vaka."
Hebrews3:12 Nkamwisoveni-- anna-- wi onirimkhala mwa mukina a nyuwo murima wonanara wohiroromela-- womwalanano Muluku mukumi;"
Hebrews3:13 nyenya muchenyeryaneke mkhatinyu nihiku n’nihiku-- vaneriwaya-- Olelo; wi anirimkukumalihiwa mukina a nyuwo ni ophyaka wa sotcheka;"
Hebrews3:14 ntakhara hiyo na awakhelano vamoha Kristu-- nakélelaru mapacheryeryo a ororomela wahu opharasharu ophiyerya makutchuwelo;"
Hebrews3:15 vava tivanalochiwaya-- Olelo mwíwa masu awe-- Muhúmihe mirimányu-- ntoko moshimwiha."
Hebrews3:16 Ntakhara tani-- yawo yíwale-- yárúhale esara? Tahi othene yala yákhumale mu Aigupto ni Mose?"
Hebrews3:17 Nyenya áshimwale náni miyakha makhumi masheshe? Tahi ni yawo yátchenke awo-- yawo míli aya yámonre mu’takhwani?"
Hebrews3:18 Nave álipenle ani wi ehivolowe vawitchuwela vawe?
Hebrews3:19 Tahi óhiléleya awo? Nave n’nona wi heyáwenrye ovolowa ntakhara ohiroromela.
Hebrews4:1 Ntakhara yela nóve wi akhweya nahala nlakano novolowa vawitchuwela vawe-- mukina a nyuwo anoneye ntoko áyeléla."
Hebrews4:2 Ntakhara wa hiyotho wolaleyiwa Mitchaka Yaphama-- ntokotho wa yawo; nyenya yala heyáphwanyenryeno etchu masu ólokohiwa awo-- ntakhara heyákanyeryeiye ni nroromelo mwa yawo yíwale."
Hebrews4:3 Ntakhara hiyo yehu nroromenle ninnavolowa vawitchuwela’vo-- ntoko válochiwaya-- Ntoko kilipenlaka mwisaráka-- Mano enarwa‐evolowa vawitchuwela vaka: nari miteko eyo yákutchuliwe opacherya othipeliwa waya welapo ya vathi."
Hebrews4:4 Ntakhara ólocha vakina sa nihiku nanethanu n’nawili-- wi-- Nave Muluku áhítchúwa nihiku nanethanu n’nawili-- ohiya miteko awe yothene."
Hebrews4:5 Nave mummotho-- Mano enarwa‐evolowa vawitchuwela vaka."
Hebrews4:6 Vava nto vahanle wi akina enavolowa’mo-- ni wa yawo Mitchaka Yaphama yálokohiwaya heyávoloiye’mo ntakhara ohiwelela--"
Hebrews4:7 annathoriheryatho nihiku nikina-- ni olocha mwa Davide-- valekenlevosha-- ntoko olochiwaya khalai-- Olelo mwíwa masu awe-- muhúmihe mirimányu."
Hebrews4:8 Ntakhara Yosua áwítchúwihale-- hakalonche muhólo mwaya’mmo sa nihiku natheru."
Hebrews4:9 Vava tivanahalaya witchuwa wa Sabata wa atchu a Muluku.
Hebrews4:10 Ntakhara yowo ávoloiye vawitchuwela vawe-- áhítchúwatho mwanenáwe va miteko awe-- ntokotho Muluku va sawawe sa Yowo."
Hebrews4:11 Va nthowa nenla-- nikhaleno mvai wovolowela vawitchuwela’vo wi mukina anamorele mu yotakiherya yeyo yohiwelela."
Hebrews4:12 Ntakhara masu a Muluku ari makumi-- ni awupa-- ni awétha opwaha nlema nawétha wu ni wu-- enathorola ophiyerya omwalanya okumi ni munepa-- ni mashikha ni makhurwa a m’makhuvani-- arórihasha sawanyiherya ni sawupuwelela sa murima."
Hebrews4:13 Nave hiyavovo yopachushiwa yohoneya va mithoni vawe-- nyenya sothe sene sinakhala sepwitikiri ni sokhunuliwa va mithoni vawe va Yowo n’nerahuno."
Hebrews4:14 Vava nriahuno Mutokwene a alipa‐ephepa mtokotoko-- ópwaha erimu-- Yesu Mwana a Muluku-- nákélelashe wemyeryerya wahu."
Hebrews4:15 Ntakhara hinanono Mutokwene a alipa‐ephepa óhiwerya omorela ikharari sokhulumuwa sahu; nyenya áhéhiwa mu sothe sene wi ntoko yehu-- nyenya óhitchekaru."
Hebrews4:16 Vawihihá numihe murima nachamele munyukhu womwene wa ikharari-- wi nakhele ikharari ni ophwanya namutchucha ónikhaviherya mwilukuluku yothoiwa."
Hebrews5:1 Vawi Mutokwene mukina a alipa‐ephepa-- ókushiwa mwa mutchu-- annathanleliwa ntakhara a atchu mwitchu sa wa Muluku-- wi aveléle samahala-- navetho iphepa-- ntakhara sotcheka:"
Hebrews5:2 akhale ówerya othananela óhísuwela ni ótcheka-- ntakhara yowo mkhatiye annahuruweliwa ni okhulumuwa;"
Hebrews5:3 nave va nthowa nenla annaphwanelela-- ntoko mu nipuroni mwa atchu awo-- hihátho mu nipuroni mwa yowo mkhatiye-- oveléla ephepa ntakhara sotcheka."
Hebrews5:4 Nave havovo mutchu anikusherya nchichimiho nlo mwanene-- nyenya yowo ítchaniwe ti Muluku-- ntoko ákhaleliye Aroni."
Hebrews5:5 Mwawihihátho Kristu híchichimihale mekhiye wi ti Mutokwene a alipa‐ephepa-- nyenya Yowo áloncheno-- Mwanaka ti Yowe-- Olelo Miyo kihoyara Weyo;"
Hebrews5:6 Ntoko analochiyetho vakina-- Weyo wa mulipa‐ephepa a mahiku othene Ntoko mwa mathoriheryo a Melikizedeke."
Hebrews5:7 Yowo-- m’mahiku a mwíli awe áveléla mavekelo ni mathamalelo vamoha ni wunla otokotoko ni mithori wa Yowo áwenrye omvulusha Yowo wukhwani-- nave áhíwiwa ntakhara ámova Muluku--"
Hebrews5:8 nari áríye Mwana-- ahuserya wiwelela ni iha ónniyeno masóso;"
Hebrews5:9 nave áryeheryiwiye mpurukumene akhala wa othene ómwiwelela Yowo ntakhara ovulusha wohikutchuwa:
Hebrews5:10 ótchuwiwa ti Muluku Mutokwene a alipa‐ephepa ntoko mwa mathoriheryo a Melikizedeke.
Hebrews5:11 Sa Yowo nokhalano masu manchipale n’naháwelahu olocha-- ni ónivaha votaphulela-- ntakhara mochiyana owaruni."
Hebrews5:12 Ntakhara nari m’phwanelenlanyu okhala alipa‐ohusiha ntakhara a mahiku yala-- mokhalanotho othoiwa wi mukina óhusiheni nyuwo sopacherya samapacheryeryo sa solocha sa Muluku; nave mukhale ntoko ótchuna mapele-- tahi yólya yeyo enakhúriwa."
Hebrews5:13 Ntakhara yowo onalya mapele hanakhovelela masu ékhaikhai; ntakhara ori nikwiya.
Hebrews5:14 Nyenya yólya yeyo enakhúriwa ti yátchu atokwene-- yawo vaweranosha yákhoveleliha masuwelelo aya ohiyaniha yaphama ni yonanara."
Hebrews6:1 Mwa ela-- nimwalanakano masu a mapacheryeryo a Kristu-- n’tcharekeru otokwene-- óhiyathitho mathipelo ótcharuwa murima omwalanano miteko yokhwa-- ni a nroromelo na va Muluku--"
Hebrews6:2 a mahusiheryo óbatiso-- a wiyathi mata-- óvinya wukhwani-- ni a mathoriheryo óhimala."
Hebrews6:3 Nave ela n’narwa‐nerano-- Muluku anemyererya."
Hebrews6:4 Ntakhara honaweryeya waryeheryatho-- etcharuwe m’murima-- yawo yámwaléliwe velukuluku aya-- elawiha yamahala ya wirimu-- ekhala awakhelano Munepa Wawéla--"
Hebrews6:5 elawiha masu órera a Muluku-- ni ikuru selukuluku enorwa eyo--"
Hebrews6:6 nyenya yamorela mwirimélelo; ntakhara enníthomeyela mekhaya Mwana a Muluku-- emúliha muru vokokoleya."
Hebrews6:7 Vawi etchaya yeyo enawurya epula yeyo enarupela’vo wili wili-- ennavaha makukhu awaphwanelela yawo yálimme-- tinákhelaya oréliha worwela wa Muluku:"
Hebrews6:8 nyenya yameliha miwa ni marula-- ennanyemuliwa; nave enahala vakhani wulumeliwa; makutchuwelo aya ti weyeliwa."
Hebrews6:9 Nyenya-- ósiveliwa-- noleketcheya murima wi sawinyu siri sopwaha itchu hiho sinaphitana ni ovulusha-- nari n’nalochahu hihá;"
Hebrews6:10 ntakhara Muluku hari óhikhalano ekhaikhai wi anachiwala muteko anyu-- ni osivela iwo mónihalanyu va nsina nawe-- mwénranyuno waruméla awéla murima ni warumélaru."
Hebrews6:11 Nyenya ninnatchunasha wi mukina ni mukina a nyuwo ónihe mvai yola woya wuweheryerya wokhwánela ophiyerya makutchuwelo;
Hebrews6:12 wi muhikhale óyere-- nyenya awátchara yawo enákhela malakano mwa nroromelo ni ovilela."
Hebrews6:13 Ntakhara Muluku álakanniyeno Abrahamu-- ntakhara hárinono mutokwene ópwaha ómulipelela-- ílupenle Yowo mkhatiye--"
Hebrews6:14 ii-- Tchiri oréliha kinarwa‐kóréliha weyo-- nave tchiri orelana kinarwa‐kórelanya weyo."
Hebrews6:15 Nave mwawihihá avilenle áhákhela malakano yawo.
Hebrews6:16 Vawi atchu enamulupelela mutokwene; nave muványa waya wothene olipela tunakutchula ochichimiherya.
Hebrews6:17 Mwawihihá Muluku-- ákhwenliye woniha mwawachasha wa mikelampa ya malakano wi okhwela wawe honákakhanyeya-- ávolowa véri ni olipela;"
Hebrews6:18 wi mwa itchu pili sohákakhanyeya-- mummo Muluku ahinaweryiye wotha-- nikhaleno yonlopola yolipa-- hiyo yehu nátchaiye ophara oweheryerya wawiyathiwa va mithoni vahu;"
Hebrews6:19 yeyo nriahuno ntoko ankora ókumi-- yotikitheryeya ni yolipatho-- ni yovolowa mpuwapu?-?washa mwa yawikitcha;"
Hebrews6:20 mummo Yesu mulipa‐ohóla ávolowiliye’mo ntakhara a hiyo-- akhanle Mutokwene a alipa‐ephepa a mahiku óhikutchuwa ntoko mwa mathoriheryo a Melikizedeke."
Hebrews7:1 Vawi Melikizedeke yola-- Mwene a Salemu-- mulipa‐ephepa a Muluku Mtokotokosha-- yowo ópanne ni Abrahamu-- akókaka áwiphaliye mamwene ale-- amuréliha--"
Hebrews7:2 yowotho Abrahamu ámukawenliye nimoha na mapatusho khumi na sothe sene (ti votaphuleya-- vopacherya-- ori Mwene ékhaikhai-- vavotho Mwene a Salemu-- ti wi-- Mwene a murechele;"
Hebrews7:3 óhikhalano atithinnya-- óhikhalano walakhanyerya wa oyariwa wawe-- óhikhalano mapacheryeryo a mahiku awe nari makutchuwelo a okumi awe-- óphwanaphwa‐nihiwa ni Mwana a Muluku)-- yowo tari mulipa‐ephepa mohikutchuwa."
Hebrews7:4 Nyenya nkonani otokwene awe wa yola-- yowo Abrahamu-- nikholo ntokotoko-- ámvahiliye nimoha na mapatusho khumi na sothanliwa sókhochoni."
Hebrews7:5 Nave yawo mwa anamwane a Levi awákhela muteko wohela ephepa tárinono nlamulo nawi ekusheke nimoha na mapatusho khumi wa atchu ntoko mwa malamulo-- ti wa annaya-- nari yákhummaya muyununi mwa Abrahamu;"
Hebrews7:6 nyenya yowo walakhanyeryiwa wa oyariwa wawe ohinarwelaya wa yawo-- tákunshiye nimoha na mapatusho khumi wa Abrahamu-- amuréliha yowo árinono malakano."
Hebrews7:7 Nave vohiványeyaru mukhani tanárélihiwe ti mutokwene.
Hebrews7:8 Nave vava atchu yawo enokhwa tanákhelaya nimoha na mapatusho khumi-- nyenya vavo yowo-- támwerenliye namona wi ti mukumi."
Hebrews7:9 Nave vari ntoko olocha-- Mwa Abrahamu Levitho yowo anákhela nimoha na mapatusho khumi ávelélatho nimoha na mapatusho khumi;"
Hebrews7:10 ntakhara vavale ári muyununi mwa atithinnya-- vava Melikizedeke ópanniyeno."
Hebrews7:11 Nave vákhanle’vo ophameya mwa ohela ephepa wa aLevi (ntakhara mummo atchu tiyákhenlaya’mo malamulo)-- vakákhala’vo oyeleka wawihai wi avinye mulipa‐ephepa mukina ntoko mwa mathoriheryo a Melikizedeke-- aweriwa ntoko mwa mathoriheryo a Aroni?"
Hebrews7:12 Ntakhara vawakakhanyeya mahelelo éphepa-- vannakhweleyatho wi malamulo yakakhanyiwe."
Hebrews7:13 Ntakhara Yowo iha sinalochiwaya sa Yowo-- anakhala a nihimo nikina-- a nenla havovo mutchu áruménleru eyupo yephepa."
Hebrews7:14 Ntakhara wosuwanyeyasha wi Apwiyahu ákhumale mwa Yuda; sa nihimo nla Mose hálonche etchu sa ephepa.
Hebrews7:15 Nave wosuwanyeyasha wopwaha tchiri-- arikiavinye mulipa‐ephepa mukina ntoko mophwanaphwana ni Melikizedeke--"
Hebrews7:16 yowo ori tahi ntoko mwa nlamulo nolamuleliwa wa wa mwíli-- nyenya ntoko mwa ikuru sókumi wohipahuwa;"
Hebrews7:17 ntakhara tanamwerelaya namona-- Weyo wa mulipa‐ephepa a mahiku óhikutchuwa Ntoko mwa mathoriheryo a Melikizedeke."
Hebrews7:18 Ntakhara tivákhanlaya’vo oriméla wa nlamulo nárúle khali nlo-- ntakhara a ochetcheya waya-- ni ohiphwanyerya etchu waya--"
Hebrews7:19 (ntakhara malamulo hayérihale etchu okhala yophameya)-- nyenya varivo ovolowano oweheryerya wopwaha-- wiwo n’náchamelahuno wa Muluku."
Hebrews7:20 Nave ntoko wahéreiyaya vahikhanlevo olipela;
Hebrews7:21 (ntakhara yawo tiyeriwaya alipa‐ephepa vahikhanlevo olipela; nyenya Yowo ni olipela mwa Yowo tálonchiyeno-- Álipela Apwiya nave harwa‐atcharuwa-- Weyo wa mulipa‐ephepa a mahiku óhikutchuwa)."
Hebrews7:22 Mwawihihátho Yesu tákhanliye Mulipa‐wurya a nlakano nopwaha.
Hebrews7:23 Nave yawo tanchiene yawo yári alipa‐ephepa-- ntakhara okhwa tiwáhíhale wi ehíkhaleleru;"
Hebrews7:24 nyenya Yowo ntakhara annikhalelaru okhala wokhala okhalano mahelelo ephepa óhakakhanyeya--"
Hebrews7:25 orwela vava annawerya wavulusha mothe mwene yawo enáchamela wa Muluku mwa Yowo-- ntakhara Yowo ókhalanoru okumi awe okhala wokhala wowepeseryano yawo."
Hebrews7:26 Ntakhara Mutokwene a alipa‐ephepa awihiha tániphwanelenliye hiyo-- awéla murima-- óhikhalanoru yonanara-- óhirípihiwa-- óhiyana nalipa‐otcheka-- awikhalelaru ópwaha erimu;"
Hebrews7:27 yowo ahinono nthowa nohelela ephepa nihiku n’nihiku ntoko atokwene a alipa‐ephepa-- yopacherya ni nthowa na sonanara sa yawo mkhataya-- ekina eyo ntakhara a sonanara sátchu; ntakhara yela ténriyeno omoha-- khwana-- ívelénliye mekhiye."
Hebrews7:28 Ntakhara malamulo tanathanla atokwene ahu a alipa‐ephepa-- yawo arinono okhulumuwa; nyenya masu a olipela iwo-- yawo yárúle malamulo elamuliwe-- tanamuthanla Mwana-- aweriwa óhikhalano murala okhala wokhala."
Hebrews8:1 Nyenya etchu aya nlochenlahu iha tíla: Nókhalano Mutokwene a alipa‐ephepa awihiha-- yowo ori va ntatani nolopwana na munyukhu womwene wa Otokwene wirimu--"
Hebrews8:2 Mulipa‐oruméla a nipuro nawéla-- ni a tabernákulo éparipari-- yowo Apwiya átenkiye-- tahi mutchu hoe."
Hebrews8:3 Vawi mutokwene a alipa‐ephepa anathanliwa wi aveléleke samahala-- navetho ephepa; vawihiha vannakhweleya wi yowo akhalenotho etchu yoveléla."
Hebrews8:4 Nave Yowo ákhanle velaponi-- hakakhanleru mulipa‐ephepa-- ntakhara vokhala akina yawo enaveléla samahala ntoko mwa nlamulo;"
Hebrews8:5 yawo enaruméla yophwaniherya ni muruli wa sawirimu iho ntoko áthoriheryiwiye Mose ákhweliye oteka tabernákulo: vawi-- Onasha-- tálonchiye-- wereno sothe sene ntoko mwa yotakiherya eyo wonihiwá mwakoni."
Hebrews8:6 Nyenya vano Yowo tákhenliye marumélelo óvuwa ópwaha-- mummotho taríye Mulipawurya a nlakano naphama nopwaha-- nenlo n’natikitheryeya va malakano ópwaha."
Hebrews8:7 Ntakhara nopacherya nle nahákhanleno murala hinakatchuniwe nipuro na nanawili nlo.
Hebrews8:8 Ntakhara vawaphwanyerya nthowa-- tanalochiye-- Nkonani-- mahiku annorwa-- Apwiya tanalochiye-- Nave kinarwa‐kivánela nlakano nahihano ni empa ya Israyeli-- ni empa ya Yuda--"
Hebrews8:9 Tahi ntoko nlakano kávánenlaka ni makholo aya-- Va nihiku nenlo káphanraka ntata wáhóla wi ekhume mwilaponi ya Aigupto; Wi yawo heyákhanleru mu nlakano naka. Nave Miyo nkáthokoronrye yawo-- Apwiya tanalochiye."
Hebrews8:10 Ntakhara nla ti nlakano kiniriaka kivánele ni empa ya Israyeli-- Ekutchuwale mahiku yawo-- Apwiya tanalochiye; Kinarwa‐kivaha malamulo aka okeriha m’miruku mwaya-- Nave va murimani vaya kinarwa‐kirepela’vo. Nave kinarwa‐kikhala wa yawo Muluku-- Nave yawo enarwa‐ekhala wa Miyo atchu:"
Hebrews8:11 Nave mukina harwa‐amuhusiha musuweli awe-- Nave mukina munneni-- ni wi-- Omusuwelashe Apwiya. Ntakhara othene enarwa‐ekisuwela Miyo-- Opacherya mukhani ophiyerya mutokwene a yawo."
Hebrews8:12 Wi kinarwa‐kimorela ikharari óhikhala ékhaikhai-- Nave sonanara saya nkirwa‐kupuwelatho."
Hebrews8:13 Yowo analochiye-- Nahihano-- nopacherya nlo áhísáliha. Nyenya yeyo enúsála ni othuluwa ennachamela oriméla."
Hebrews9:1 Nave tchiri nlakano nopacherya nlo tinákhanlayano solamuleliwa sa olapa-- n’nipuro nawéla na velaponi ya vathi."
Hebrews9:2 Ntakhara tabernákulo átekiwe-- ópacherya ole-- mummo mwári yawiyathi’vo onyari-- ni ehasari-- ni epau yotheteya; vavale veriwa Nipuro Nawéla:"
Hebrews9:3 Nyenya mpuwa mwa yotherya yanawili-- tabernákulo aweriwa Nipuro Nawélasha;"
Hebrews9:4 nokhala’mo eparatho ya sotchuwiha ya mivira ni ekasha ya nlakano-- yohuruweliwa yothenéyo ni mivira-- mummo mwári mwapu wa mivira mokhapelela’mo mana ni echikopa ya Aroni yáphuwaléle-- ni ihasari sa nlakano;"
