Hebrews9:5 ni vasulu vaya akerubi a nchichimiho órúha muruli va yawakiherya’vo; sa iha vano hannawerya olocha va mekhaya’vo.
Hebrews9:6 Nave iha siryeheryiwe mwawihihá-- alipa‐ephepa yánavolowa mu tabernákulo ópacherya mahiku othene-- enerano olapa iwo;"
Hebrews9:7 nyenya ovolowa mwanawili-- mutokwene a alipa‐ephepa omoha va muyakhani-- tahi ahikhanleno nikhami-- nenlo áveléliye ntakhara a mwanene mekhiye-- ni sotcheka sa atchu;"
Hebrews9:8 Munepa Wawéla éyeryaka’vo eneneryo-- wi mphiro wovolowano o nipuroni nawéla wári ohákuvale wonihiwa-- tabernákulo ópacherya owo arimwemelaru hihá;"
Hebrews9:9 ti yoshipela ya mahiku yala-- vava samahala ni iphepatho sáveléliwaya sihinawerya omwera óphameya mulipa‐olapa owo-- n’nalochahu sa yawupusherya‐ya‐murima."
Hebrews9:10 Ntakhara taríye sawiyathiwa sa mwíliru (ni sólya-- ni sowurya-- ni orapa wa miloko miloko)-- sawiyatheryiwa ophiyerya mahiku óryeheryatho."
Hebrews9:11 Nyenya aphiyale Kristu Mutokwene a alipa‐ephepa a itchu sorera sinorwa iho-- mwa tabernákulo mtokotoko ni óphameya ópwaha-- óhitekiwa ni mata-- ti olocha wi-- tahi a mapachusheryo yala--"
Hebrews9:12 nari mwa nikhami na’puri ni asána a’nyope-- nyenya mwa nikhami na Yowo mkhatiye távoloiyiye omoha-- o nipuroni nawéla-- akhanle’vo wopola wohimala."
Hebrews9:13 Ntakhara nikhami na’puri n’na’nyope selopwana-- ni makhala a’nyope yethiana hiho sámisiwamisiwa yawo yári órípihiwa-- nánéliha ophiyerya méliheryo a mwíli;"
Hebrews9:14 wopwaha wawihai nki nikhami na Kristu yowo ílemve mekhiye óhikhalano murala wa Muluku mwa Munepa wawikhalelaru-- n’narwa‐néliha yawupusheryányu‐ya‐murima omwalanya ni miteko yokhwa-- ni omuruméla Muluku mukumi?"
Hebrews9:15 Nave mwa ela ori Mulipa‐wurya a nlakano nahihano-- wawihihá wi-- ntakhara vakhanle’vo okhwa wawopola sotcheka sa va nlakano nopacherya-- alipa‐witchaniwáwo yakhele ovánela wa mikelampa yawikhalelaru."
Hebrews9:16 Ntakhara vavo vari yoryeheryela khuluwi vanakhweleya vaphiye toko okhwa wa mulipa‐oryeheryela khuluwi owo.
Hebrews9:17 Ntakhara yoryeheryela khuluwi enóna ikuru mwanene owo akhwile; tiwi hiyanono ikuru nariru mulipa‐oryeheryela khuluwi owo oríye mukumi;
Hebrews9:18 mwawihiha yopacherya eyotho hiyáryeheryiwe ehikhanleno nikhami.
Hebrews9:19 Vawi Mose álonchiye wa atchu othene nlamulo nikina ntoko mwa malamulo-- tákushiye nikhami na asána a’nyope n’napuri-- vamoha ni mahi ni mapururu órumála ni hisope-- amiserya livro owo-- ni atchu othene--"
Hebrews9:20 alocha wi-- Nla ti nikhami na nlakano Muluku ólamulenliyeni."
Hebrews9:21 Navetho tabernákulo ni sokusherya sothe sene sa marumélelo ámiseryatho n’nikhami nlo.
Hebrews9:22 Nave ntoko mwa malamulo sinahala itchu vakhani sohélihiwa n’nikhami-- nave vahikhanle’vo ochonyiha nikhami otaphuwatho hiwavovo."
Hebrews9:23 Vavo vanakhweleya wi sophwaniherya sa itchu sa wirimu sélihiwe ni iha; nyenya sawirimu senesha sélihiwe ni iphepa sopwaha iha.
Hebrews9:24 Ntakhara Kristu hávoloiye mu nipuroni nawéla notekiwa ni mata-- notakiherya neparipari nlo; nyenya nto wirimu mkhataya-- woneya hihano va mithoni va Muluku ntakhara a hiyo;"
Hebrews9:25 tahi wi íveléle mekhiye wili wili; ntoko Mutokwene a alipa‐ephepa ávolowiye mu nipuroni nawéla muyakha ni muyakha n’nikhami nohikhala nawawe;
Hebrews9:26 yéreya hihá-- okáphwanelela wona masóso wili wili opacherya othipeliwa wothipeliwa elapo ya vathi; nyenya vano omoharu va makutchuwelo a mahiku aya tóneiyiye ovíha’vo sotcheka mwa ephepa ya Yowo mkhatiye."
Hebrews9:27 Nave wáryeheryiwaya wa atchu wi ekhwéke omoha-- nave akhwile-- othorihiwa nto;"
Hebrews9:28 mwawihihá Kristutho aveléliwe ephepa omoha ni wireya sotcheka sa anchipale-- anarwa‐oneya vanawili vaya-- ahikhanleno sotcheka-- wa yawo enamlipelela-- ophiyerya ovulushiwa."
Hebrews10:1 Ntakhara malamulo-- ariayano muruli wa itchu sorera sinorwa iho-- óhikhala yophwaniheryasha ya itchu iho-- hanaweryaru-- ni iphepa hiha muyakha ni muyakha-- hiho sinaveléliwa mohihiya-- owéra óphameya yawo enáchamela."
Hebrews10:2 Vahákhanle hihá-- hekáveléla hiho-- ntakhara alipa‐oruméláwo heyakakhanleno yawupusherya‐ya‐murima ya sotcheka-- ntakhara yáhélihiwa omoha?"
Hebrews10:3 Nyenya mwa iha mokhala’mo wupuwelela wa sotcheka muyakha ni muyakha.
Hebrews10:4 Ntakhara honaweryeya wi nikhami na’nyope selopwana-- nnapuri nivíhe’vo sotcheka."
Hebrews10:5 Mwa ela anavolowiye mwilaponi ya vathi-- tanalochiye-- Ephepa ni yoveléla ti muhinatchunanyu-- Nyenya mwíli mwákiryeheryenlanyu Miyo."
Hebrews10:6 Iphepa sopahiwa mpurukumene sa sotcheka ti mwáhihakalanlanyuno;
Hebrews10:7 Vavo káriye-- Nkonani-- kórwa-- (Va muru vaya va livro tivarempwaya sa Miyo)-- Wi kereno okhwela wanyu-- Muluku."
Hebrews10:8 Vanalochiwaya vasulu va-- wi-- Iphepa ni soveléla ni iphepa sopahiwa mpurukumene sa sotcheka wi himwákhwenle-- nari otheyano (hiho sinaveléliwa ntoko mwa nlamulo)--"
Hebrews10:9 vavo talonchiye-- Nkonani-- kirúle werano okhwela wanyu. Anavíha’vo yopacheryéyo-- wi atikitherye yanawilíyo."
Hebrews10:10 Ni okhwela wiwo nélihiwahu ni oveléliwa wa mwíli wa Yesu Kristu-- omoha-- pothe."
Hebrews10:11 Nave mulipa‐ephepa mukina ni mukina tanémeliye nihiku n’nihiku-- anaruméla-- anaveléla iphepa hiha wili wili-- hiho sihinaweryaru ovíha’vo sotcheka;"
Hebrews10:12 nyenya Yowo-- ávelénliye ephepa emoha ntakhara sotcheka-- áhíkhalelaru okhala wokhala va ntatani nolopwana na Muluku;"
Hebrews10:13 opacherya vavo tanaweheryiye-- ophiyerya amwichani awe eniriaya yiyathiwe ekhale munyukhu wa manani awe."
Hebrews10:14 Ntakhara ni oveléla omoha áwériha óphameya okhala wokhala yawo ari awélihiwa.
Hebrews10:15 Nyenya Munepa Wawélatho annanerela namona; ntakhara tálonchiye--"
Hebrews10:16 Nla ti nlakano kiniriaka kirwe‐kilakaneno-- Evinre mahiku yawo-- Apwiya tanalochiye; Kinarwa‐kiveléla malamulo aka ekhale va murima vaya; Nave va miruku aya kinarwa‐kirepela’vo;"
Hebrews10:17 Nave sotcheka saya ni ohiléleya waya nkirwa‐kupuwelatho.
Hebrews10:18 Nyenya vavo nroromelo na sotcheka nriaya’vo hivavovotho yoveléla ya sotcheka.
Hebrews10:19 Nave nriahuno-- anna-- wumiha murima wovolowano mu nipuroni nawéla-- n’nikhami na Yesu--"
Hebrews10:20 va’phironi yahihano ni yokumi-- yeyo ánryeheryenliye-- mwa yawikitcha-- tiri mwíli awe;"
Hebrews10:21 nave nriahuno mulipa‐ephepa mtokotoko yowo anakhapelela empa ya Muluku;
Hebrews10:22 náchamele ni murima weparipari mu nroromelo nokhwánela-- ni mirimáhu yomisiwa ovíherya’vo yawupusherya yonanara‐ya‐murima-- ni míli ahu yorapihiwa ni mahi awéla;"
Hebrews10:23 nákélelashe wemyeryerya wohichikinyeya wa oweheryerya wahu-- ntakhara mulipa‐ovánela owo ori óroromeleya;"
Hebrews10:24 nave nanyiheryane mukina ni mukhwawe wi nákuvihaneke o masivelelo ni o mitekoni yaphama--"
Hebrews10:25 nihihiyeke othukumana wahu vamoha-- ntoko akina enéraya-- nyenya nchenyeryane-- nave mopwahasha munonanyu nihiku nrikimwachamela."
Hebrews10:26 Ntakhara hiyo mkhatihu natcheka-- nákhenle masuwelelo éparipari-- henahalatho ephepa ya sotcheka--"
Hebrews10:27 nyenya oweheryerya okina wawopiha wa othorihiwa-- ni weyela waya wa moro wotolosha yawo enaványanano."
Hebrews10:28 Mutchu yowo ányemula malamulo a Mose-- ámókhwa va anamona eli nari araru:"
Hebrews10:29 nave munihai-- olaka wopwaha wawihai nki aniriye arwe‐eriwe óphwanelela yowo ámunyikalenle Mwana a Muluku-- éra nikhami na nlakano nenlo élihiwiyeno-- etheru ene-- aroha Munepa wa ikharari;"
Hebrews10:30 ntakhara ninnamusuwela Yowo áriye-- Wunla ekuhu ti waka-- Miyo kinarwa‐kikokiherya. Navetho Apwiya anarwa‐athoriha atchu awe."
Hebrews10:31 Omorela m’matani mwa Muluku mukumi ti wawopiha.
Hebrews10:32 Nyenya nkamupushanani mahiku akhalai-- mummo mwámwaleiwanyu’mo mwávilelano ekhocho etokotoko ya masóso;"
Hebrews10:33 vakina mwériwanyu etchu yawoneleliwa mwa onyemuliwa ni sohósha; vakinatho mwátánányuno yawo yereliwa sawihiha.
Hebrews10:34 Vawi mwáhámorela ikharari yawo yári mu kariposo-- nave mwáhémya mohakalala wakhiwa muhakhu anyu-- musuwelaka wi mokhalano nyuwo mkhatinyu muhakhu wopwaha wawikhalelaru."
Hebrews10:35 Mwawihihá muhirihe onyesererya wanyu-- wiwo orinono okokiherya otokotoko wa phatamari."
Hebrews10:36 Ntakhara munnathowiwa ovilela-- wi mwenreno okhwela wa Muluku-- mwákhele nlakano."
Hebrews10:37 Ntakhara ehanle elukuluku ekhanikhani-- Nave mulipa‐orwa owo anarwa‐aphiya-- ahisheleliwaru."
Hebrews10:38 Nyenya ékhaikhai aka owo anarwa‐akhala mukumi orwela mu nroromelo: Nave akókela ochuli-- okumi aka horwa‐ohakalalano."
Hebrews10:39 Nyenya hiyo tahi a yawo enakókela muchuli ni ovolowa marimélelo; nyenya a yawo enaroromela mavulushelo a okumi.
Hebrews11:1 Nyenya nroromelo ti ochichimiherya wa itchu hiho sinawe‐heryeryiwa-- malipelelelo a itchu hiho sihinoneya."
Hebrews11:2 Ntakhara mwawihiha atokwene tiyéreliwaya namona.
Hebrews11:3 Ni nroromelo ti n’narórahu wi ilapo ni sa wirimu sene ti sáryeheryiwaya ni masu a Muluku-- mwawihihá wi itchu sawoneya hesápachushiwe orwela mwa sawoneya iho."
Hebrews11:4 Ni nroromelo Abeli távelénliye wa Muluku ephepa yopwaha ya Kaini-- yeyo éreliwiyeno namona wi ári ékhaikhai; Muluku erelaka namona samahala sawe; nave mwawihiha yowo-- nari ákhwiliye onnalocharu."
Hebrews11:5 Ni nroromelo Enoke tákushiwiye wi ahone okhwa; nave háphwanyiwe-- ntakhara Muluku ámukusha: ntakhara ahákuvale omkusha-- téreliwiye namona wi onamuhakalaliha Muluku;"
Hebrews11:6 nyenya vahikhanle’vo nroromelo hevanaweryeya omuhakalaliha; ntakhara yowo onarwa wa Muluku onaphwanelela ororomela wi ókhala-- ni wi ori ókókiherya phatamari yawo enamukhwela Yowo."
Hebrews11:7 Ni nroromelo Nowa-- álopoliwiye ti Muluku sa itchu hiho sahákuvale woneya-- nave óvaka-- támutenkiye mwacheya mtokotoko awavulusherya’mo yawo yári a’mpa mwawe; ni yeyo ávánnyiyeno elapo ya vathi-- akhala mukelampa a ekhaikhai yeyo eri ntoko mwa nroromelo."
Hebrews11:8 Ni nroromelo Abrahamu-- ítchaniwiye-- tíwelenliye okhuma oya o nipuroni nenlo aniriye arwe ákhele ntoko mikelampa; nave ákhuma ahisuwelaka wiwo áyiye’wo."
Hebrews11:9 Ni nroromelo tákhanliye mulecho mwilaponi ya nlakano-- yeyo yahári yawawe-- anakhala mwipa sa’kuwo vamoha ni Isake ni Yakobo-- mikelampa mikhwawe ya nlakano nenlo;"
Hebrews11:10 ntakhara táweheryeryiye muchetche wokhalano mathipelo-- khachiri aya ni mulipa‐otekáya ti Muluku."
Hebrews11:11 Ni nroromelo Sara yowo ákhenle ikuru sawi arupaleno-- mahiku awe epwahile ntakhara támwenriye óroromeleya Yowo ávánenleno owo;"
Hebrews11:12 mwa elatho tiwárwenlaya wa mmoha-- tiwi ntoko ókhwéne-- anchiene ntoko itheneri sa wirimu-- nave ntoko eháva yeyo eri mu’shereshere mwa’nia-- óhálakhanyeya."
Hebrews11:13 Othene yawo yákhwa mu nroromelo-- ehákhelaru malakano-- nyenya yáhóna ni wulumano vachaichai-- yemyeryerya wi ti alecho ni óhaya velaponi."
Hebrews11:14 Ntakhara yawo enalocha sawihiha tanonihaya wi enakhwela elapo ekhale yawaya.
Hebrews11:15 Nave yúpuwelenleru yele yákhumalaya’mo ele ekahóna mphiro wokókelano’wo.
Hebrews11:16 Nyenya vano enatchunasha ekina yopwaha-- ti yawirimu; mwa ela Muluku hanúliwano muru aneriwiye Muluku aya; ntakhara aháryeheryela muchetche."
Hebrews11:17 Ni nroromelo Abrahamu-- éhiwiye-- támvelénliye ephepa Isake-- nave yowo ákhenle malakano ámveléla mwanawe mmoharu;"
Hebrews11:18 sa yowo sálochiwaya-- wi-- Mwa Isake epyoá tiniriaya erwe‐yitchaniwe:"
Hebrews11:19 ónaka yowo wi Muluku tanawerya wávíha-- nari wukhwani; orwela wiwo-- voshipela-- ámwákhelatho."
Hebrews11:20 Ni nroromelo Isake tárélihaliye Yakobo ni Esau-- nari va itchu hiho inórwa."
Hebrews11:21 Ni nroromelo Yakobo-- ahawelaka okhwa-- tárélihaliye anamwane ópíli a Yosefe; athamala ahámenle vasulu va echikopáwe."
Hebrews11:22 Ni nroromelo-- Yosefe-- akhwaka-- táromonliye sa okhuma waya wa anamwane a Israyeli; alamulela sa makhuváwe."
Hebrews11:23 Ni nroromelo Mose-- ayariwe-- távithiwiye mieri miraru talipa‐omuyara-- yónnaya wi ti mwana órera; nave hayómve nlamulo na mwene."
Hebrews11:24 Ni nroromelo Mose-- annuwale tákhonchiye weriwa mwanawe a mwana mwamuthiana a Fareo;"
Hebrews11:25 athanla wereliwa sonanara vamoha ni atchu a Muluku-- ahikhwelaru sohakalaliha sa sonanara nari vakhani mano;"
Hebrews11:26 álakhanyerya munyemu wa Kristu wi muhakhu wopwaha marérelo a Aigupto; ntakhara áweheryerya yokokiherya ya phatamari.
Hebrews11:27 Ni nroromelo távinnyiye’mo mu Aigupto-- ahóvaru esara ya mwene; ntakhara távilenliye wopwaha-- ntoko ámmona mulipa‐ohoneya owo."
Hebrews11:28 Ni nroromelo ténriyeno Paskha-- ni omisa wa nikhami-- wi awátolosha anamwane ómwali ahátannye yawo."
Hebrews11:29 Ni nroromelo tiyálapuiyaya Emaka Yosherya evira ntoko va mokoni: tiwi a Aigupto yérenryayatho yánéla.
Hebrews11:30 Ni nroromelo ishiri sa Yeriko tisákumuwalaya sirukuryeryiwe mahiku mathanu na meli.
Hebrews11:31 Ni nroromelo Rahabi chapaheya ole tahátolo?-?sheryiwiye vamoha nalipa‐ohiroromeláwo-- ntakhara áwákhela alipa‐ohocha mwa murechele."
Hebrews11:32 Nave kiloche shenitho? ntakhara nkóna elukuluku yawi kithorihe sa Gideoni-- Baraki-- ni Samueli ni alipa‐miririmo;"
Hebrews11:33 yawo mwa nroromelo yálapihale omwene-- yénreno ekhaikhai-- yákhenle malakano-- yámanke iyano sa amwacho--"
Hebrews11:34 eshipiha ikuru sa moro-- evuluwe nlema nawetha-- yawo yálipihiwe yáriaya ókhulumuwa-- yákhala ikuru o’khochoni-- yáhíkara miloko ya’khocho ya anawóthe."
Hebrews11:35 Athiana yáwákhela alipa‐okhwáya evíhiwe wukhwani; nave akina yáwashuliwa-- ehemyaru wopoliwa; wi yákhele ovinya wopwaha;"
Hebrews11:36 nyenya akina yáthorihiwa monyemuliwa ni iwáshushu-- navetho makwekweso-- ni owaleliwa mu kariposo;"
Hebrews11:37 yávonyiwa maluku-- yákwasanyiwa eriyari-- yáhéhiwa-- yáhiphiwa ni nlema-- yáhéchécha ewaraka ishapala sa ipuchepuche-- ni ishapala sa’puri-- ekhala óthoiwa-- óhóshiwa-- awereliwa sonanara--"
Hebrews11:38 (yawo elapo ya vathi yaháphwanelelaya): óhuwela mu’takhwani-- ni m’miakoni-- ni m’makhukuni-- ni m’malichini a elapo."
Hebrews11:39 Nave othene yawo yéreliwe namona mwa nroromelo-- heyákhenleru nlakano nlo--"
Hebrews11:40 ntakhara Muluku tánryeheryenliye hiyo etchu yopwaha-- wi yawo ehériwe ómalela hiyo nihikhanle’vo."
Hebrews12:1 Va nthowa nenla hiyotho-- nónaka wi nohuruweliwano neku ntokotoko nawihiha na namona-- nrihe yeyo eri yohokola-- ni yotcheka yeyo enanivirela-- nave ntchimake ni evilelelo wupuwa wiwo nivahiwahu--"
Hebrews12:2 nimvareryakaru ópachererya ni ókiserya a nroromelo nahu-- Yesu-- yowo-- ntakhara otheya ávahiwiye va mithoni vawe-- távilenliyeno mwikimanyo-- aroha wuliwa muru-- akhala va ntatani nolopwana na munyukhu womwene wa Muluku."
Hebrews12:3 Vano nkamupuweleleni Yowo ávilenleno alipa‐otcheka óványanano mwawihiha-- wi muhivele ni oshupha múkumini mwanyu."
Hebrews12:4 Hamukhónche ophiyerya okhwa-- muwanakano sotcheka;"
Hebrews12:5 nave mochiwala okhomaliha wiwo onalocha ni nyuwo ntoko ni anamwane-- Mwanaka-- ohinyemule olaka wa Apwiya-- Nari ohituthuwe anósameliye;"
Hebrews12:6 Ntakhara yowo Apwiya anamusiveliye tanamula?-?kiye-- Amuwashula mwana yowo anamwákheliye."
Hebrews12:7 Mwavilela ophiyerya olakiwa Muluku anokhalihani nyuwo wi ntoko anamwane; ntakhara mwana tani yowo atithinnya ahinamulakiye?
Hebrews12:8 Nyenya mwakhala óhilakiwa-- wiwo othene yereliwaya-- vavá nyuwo mwa óraruiwa-- tahi anamwane hoe."
Hebrews12:9 Nyenyatho-- nákhalano asitithi a mwíli ahu yawo yánlaka-- nave nánáchichi?-?miha; nki hanrwa‐nlapa Atithi a minepa mopwaha wi nikhale akumi?"
Hebrews12:10 Ntakhara yawo nto yánlaka va mahiku awalakhanyeya ntoko wárérelaya; nyenya Yowo taneriyeno hihá wi aniphwanyeryihe etchu-- wi nákheleno vamoha va wéla wawe."
Hebrews12:11 Olaka wothene-- oneriwaya-- hononeya wohakalaliha-- nyenya wawichela; nyenya omanle-- onnavaha yawima yamurechele-- wa yawo ekhovelenleno-- ti wekhaikhai."
Hebrews12:12 Va ela lipihani mata ókhoropowa-- ni makutha óchétcheya;"
Hebrews12:13 nave ereryanyani arampha awokowa mummo muni munecha’mo manani anyu-- wi yorakala eyo ehikakhiwe’mo m’phironi’mmo-- nyenya epenushiwe."
Hebrews12:14 Tcharani murechele ni atchu othene-- ni wéla-- wiwo-- wáhikhala’vo-- havovo mmoha ani arwe‐amone Apwiya;"
Hebrews12:15 ni wiwehererya wi ani akhale’vo mukina óyeléla ikharari sa Muluku-- wi mutathari mukina wowáwa ophuwale oni owukhulekeni nyuwo-- nave anchiene enírípihiweno;"
Hebrews12:16 wi vanákhale mulipa‐oraruwa-- nari a munyemu-- ntoko Esau-- yowo átumihale otokwene awe woyariwano ni mvikiri mmoha wa sólya."
Hebrews12:17 Ntakhara munnasuwela wi yowotho áháweliye ovolowa muréliha iwo-- ákhóchiwa (ntakhara háphwannye epuro yotcharuwela)-- nari átchunniyesha ni mithori."
Hebrews12:18 Ntakhara hamwáchamenle mwako wotannyeya-- ni wovarela moro-- nari vorípa’vo phii-- ni epiphi-- ni etcheku etokotoko--"
Hebrews12:19 ni oruma wa nipeka-- ni olocha wa masu-- olocha wiwo yawo yíwáwo yávenkaya wi eháchereryiwetho masu atheru; ntakhara heyáwenrye ovilelano yálamuliwéyo."
Hebrews12:20 Nari enama yatannya mwakówo-- enarwa‐evonyiwa maluku;"
Hebrews12:21 nave woneya iwo wári wawopihasha-- wi Mose álocha wi-- Kinnova tchiri ni othukumela."
Hebrews12:22 Nyenya mwáchamenlanyu mwako wa Ziyoni-- ni muchetche wa Muluku mukumi-- Yerusalemu a wirimu--"
Hebrews12:23 ni wa muloko wawácha wa angelo-- ni o nikhucheni na othene-- ni muloko wa anamwane ómwali órempwa wirimu ni wa Muluku Kalapa a othene-- ni wa minepa ya atchu ékhaikhai aweriwa óphameya--"
Hebrews12:24 ni wa Yesu Mulipa‐wurya a nlakano nahihano-- ni wa nikhami nomisiwa nawuluma yorera yopwaha nikhami na Abeli."
Hebrews12:25 Móne wi muhimukhóche yowo anuluma owo. Ntakhara yala yahávuluiyaya-- yámukhonchaya yowo áloponle velaponi-- tchiriene hiyo hanrwa‐nivuluwa-- yehu n’nithanla wa awirimu owo;"
Hebrews12:26 yowo masu awe yáchikinnye elapo vavo; nyenya vano távánenliye-- ni wi-- Omohatho kiniriaka kirwe‐kichikinye-- tahi elaporu-- nyenyatho wirimu."
Hebrews12:27 Nave ela-- yawi omohatho-- enoníha osuseya waya wa itchu hiho inachikinyeya-- ntoko sa itchu sopachushiwa-- wi itchu hiho ihinachikinyeya síkhalele."
Hebrews12:28 Vavá n’nákhelahu omwene wohichikinyeya-- nikhaleno ikharari-- hiho n’niriahu nimurumélekeno Muluku momuhakalaliha-- ni omuchichimiha ni omova."
Hebrews12:29 Ntakhara Muluku ahu ti moro wonyewa.
Hebrews13:1 Osivela wa va anna wikhaleleru. Muhichiwale wahayiha alecho;
Hebrews13:2 ntakhara vawerano hiho akina yáháhayiha angelo mohisuwela.
Hebrews13:3 Mwawupuwelani amukariposo-- ntoko ómakiwano vamoha; awereliwa sonanara-- ntoko ti nyuwo mekhinyutho m’mwílini."
Hebrews13:4 Othela ochichimihiweke ti othene-- ni vava vanako?-?niwa’vo vakhale vohirípihiwa; ntakhara achapaheya ni alipa‐oraruwa Muluku anarwa‐áthoriha."
Hebrews13:5 Murimányu okhale wohisivela muhakhu-- hiho murianyuno sokhwánelekeni; ntakhara Yowo tálonchiye-- Nkirwa‐kohiyaru nari-- nari woriha-- nkirwa‐koriha tchiri."
Hebrews13:6 Mwawihiha nlocheke mwawumiha murima-- Mulipa‐okikhaviheryaka ti Apwiya; nkirwa‐kóva; Mutchu ani arwe‐akerele sheni?"
Hebrews13:7 Mwawupuwelani ahóli anyu-- yawo yálonche ni nyuwo masu a Muluku; nave mwanyiheryaka makutchuwelo a mechelo aya mutakiheryeke nroromelo naya."
Hebrews13:8 Yesu Kristu ti yowo osilo-- ni olelo ni mahiku othene--"
Hebrews13:9 muhikushiweke ni ohusiha wa miloko miloko-- ni wohisuwanyeya; ntakhara ti worera wi murima otikitheryeye ni ikharari; tahi ni sólya-- hiho yawo yátchanre yaháphuchunlayano etchu."
Hebrews13:10 Nókhalano eyupo yephepa-- yeyo yawo enaruméla tabernákulo ehikhanlayano olamulelo wolya’mo."
Hebrews13:11 Ntakhara míli ya’nama hiho nikhami naya nákushiwa ti mutokwene a alipa‐ephepa ovolowano mu nipuroni nawéla-- ntakhara sonanara-- tinéyeliwaya vate va mukotcha."
Hebrews13:12 Vavá Yesutho-- wi awélihe atchu awo n’nikhami na Yowo mkhatiye tónniye masóso vate va mukhora."
Hebrews13:13 Hihá nikhume oya wa Yowo vate va mukotcha níreiye munyemu awe.
Hebrews13:14 Ntakhara vava hinanono muchetche wolekelaru-- nyenya n’natchu?-?natchuna onórwa owo."
Hebrews13:15 Vawihiha-- mwa Yowo-- nivelélekeru ephepa yomuthamalano Muluku-- ti yawima ya minuphi yawemyeryerya nsina nawe."
Hebrews13:16 Nyenya muhichiwaleke werela sorera ni wakawela akina; ntakhara iphepa sawihiha Muluku tanahakalaliyeno.
Hebrews13:17 Mwawiwelelani ahóli anyu-- nave mwáchichimiheke; ntakhara tanaweherya okumi anyu-- ntoko óthoriha; wi yereno ni otheya-- tahi mothanana; ntakhara yela henophuchulihani etchu."
Hebrews13:18 Munivekeleleke hiyo; ntakhara nóleketcheya murima wi nókhalano yawupusherya‐ya‐murima yorera-- n’nakhwelahu okhalano makhalelo aphama."
Hebrews13:19 Nave kinnochenyeryani mopwaha wi mwerekeno yela-- wi okókela waka wa nyuwo wakuvihiwe."
Hebrews13:20 Nyenya Muluku a murechele yowo árúleno ókhuma mukhwani mukukhula mtokotoko a ipuchepuche n’nikhami na nlakano nohimala-- ti Apwiyahu Yesu--"
Hebrews13:21 awereni nyuwo óhikhalano murala mu itchu sothe sene sorera-- wi mwerekeno okhwela wawe; ni werano mwa hiyo yomuhakalaliha va mithoni vawe-- mwa Yesu Kristu; wa Yowo okhale nchichimiho mahiku othene. Amen."
Hebrews13:22 Nyenya kinnochenyeryani nyuwo-- anna-- mwémyáni masu óchenyerya; ntakhara kórepenlakani mokhuveiha."
Hebrews13:23 Suwelashani wi munnihu Timoteo ótaphuliwa; vamoha ni yowo-- ákuvaru orwa-- kinarwa‐kiwonani nyuwo."
Hebrews13:24 Lochelani ahóli anyu othene-- ni awéla murima othene. A o Italiya ennolochelani."
Hebrews13:25 Ikharari sikhale ni nyuwo othene. Amen.
James1:1 Yakobo-- kapuro a Muluku ni a Apwiya Yesu Kristu-- wa maloko khumi na meli yawo yámwalamwanle: kinnolochelani."
James1:2 Mwére wi ti otheya-- annaka-- munamorelanyu mu sawehiwa sa miloko miloko;"
James1:3 musuwelaka wi wehiwa wa nroromelo nanyu onarúha ovilela.
James1:4 Nyenya ovilela okhaleno muteko aya wophameya-- wi mukhale óphameya ni óhikhalano murala-- óhithoiwaru etchu."
James1:5 Nyenya mukina a nyuwo athoiwa miruku-- aveke wa Muluku-- yowo anavaha othene ni muriméne-- ni óhókotchela; nave anarwa‐amvaha."
James1:6 Nyenya aveke ni nroromelo-- óhikhwaru minikwa; ntakhara yowo onakhwa minikwa onaphwanaphwana ni ntchumusha na mu’nia nenlo n’nakushiwa ni etcheku ni opirikishiwa."
James1:7 Ntakhara ahányiherye mutchu yola wi anarwa‐akhela etchu wa Apwiya;
James1:8 mutchu a mirima mili onakhala ókhwa minikwa va iphiro sawe sothe sene.
James1:9 Nyenya munna óhasuwa íthamalele ni otokwene awe;
James1:10 ni mulipa‐muhakhu va yeyo onahasuwiyeno; ntakhara onarwa‐avira ntoko ethutu ya nnashi.
James1:11 Vawi nsuwa nókhuma ni oviha waya-- nave nohumiha nnashi; nave ethutu aya ennashophowa-- ni orera wa woneya waya onnapahuwa; mwawihihátho mulipa‐muhakhu onarwa‐anyála m’mechelo awe."
James1:12 Óréla ti mutchu yowo onavilela vawehiwa; ntakhara éhiwe-- onarwa‐akhela koroa ókumi-- yowo Apwiya álakanenliye yawo enamusivela Yowo."
James1:13 Mutchu onéhiwiye-- ahiloche-- Kinehiwa ti Muluku; ntakhara Muluku hanawerya wehiwa ni sonanara-- nave Yowo mwanene hanamweha mutchu:"
James1:14 nyenya mutchu onéhiwa vava minkhela ya mwanene owo enamurérelaya-- emuwoka."
James1:15 Vavo minkhela eyo esaseiye-- ennarúha sonanara; nave sotcheka-- sinnuwale-- sinnarúha okhwa."
James1:16 Muhiwokiwe-- annaka ósiveliwa."
James1:17 Yamahala yaphama-- ni phatamari óphameya sinarwela wirimu sinakhuruwa wa Atithi a omwalela-- yowo ahinathatuwa-- nari okhalano muruli wa marukunuwelo."
James1:18 Ni okhwela wawe mwanene tániyanriye hiyo ni masu éparipari-- wi hiyo nikhale ntoko sawima solipula sa sopachushiwa sawe."
James1:19 Munnasuwela-- annaka ósiveliwa. Nyenya mutchu akhaleke ówirianasha-- awitchálela olocha-- óhákuva onanariwa."
James1:20 Ntakhara esara ya mutchu henerano ekhaikhai ya Muluku.
James1:21 Mwa ela-- murunle yotakhala yothene ni oyeheryeya wa sonanara-- akhelani ni wítchachala masu yawo yáliwe mwa nyuwo-- yawo enawerya ovulusha okumi anyu."
James1:22 Khalani awerano masu-- tahi awiwaru-- ni wiwoka mekhinyu."
James1:23 Ntakhara mutchu akhala awiwa masu-- ahikhala awerano-- yowo onaphwanaphwana ni mutchu awiweherya ethoi awe yoyariwano veweheryo;"
James1:24 ntakhara onniweherya mekhiye-- avinya’vo-- achiwala vavá wi ári awihai."
James1:25 Nyenya yowo onaweha mu nlamulo nophameya nonéthi-- ítchálasha mummo-- yowo-- ohikhanliye mulipa‐wiwa óchiwala-- nyenya awerano muteko-- onarwa‐akhala óréla mu werano wawe."
James1:26 Mukina yowo oniséra wi tomulapa Muluku-- ahinamaka nlumi nawe-- nyenya oniwoka m’murimani mwawe-- omulapa waya Muluku wa mutchu’la ti watherutheru."
James1:27 Omulapa Muluku wawéla ni wohirípihiwa va mithoni va Muluku ni Atithi ti wu-- warerya ni ikwásuni-- ni anámukhwele muhawa waya-- ni wikhapelela mwanene óhirwelihiwa mathepa ni elapo ya vathi."
James2:1 Annaka-- muhikhaleno nroromelo na Apwiyahu Yesu Kristu-- Apwiya a nchichimiho ni othokororya sothanyana."
James2:2 Ntakhara avolowa mothukumanela mwanyu mutchu owarela munela wa mivira-- ni yowara yorerasha-- nave avolowatho mutchu óhawa ni yowara yotakhala;"
James2:3 nave munnamuthanla yowo owanre yowara yorerasha-- mulochano-- Nyuwo mukilathi vaphama va; nave munnalocha ni óhawa owo-- Weyo-- emela iwo-- nari-- kilathi vathi va munyukhu wa manani aka;"
James2:4 ham’mwalannye va mwa nyuwo mekhinyu-- ni okhala alipa‐othoriha awupuwelela sonanara?"
James2:5 Nkiwani-- annaka ósiveliwa; Muluku háthanlile óhawa a elapo ya vathi wi ekhale óréla ni nroromelo-- ni mikelampa yomwene yowo álakanenliye yawo enamusivela Yowo?"
James2:6 Nyenya nyuwo munnamunyemula mutchu óhawa. Alipa‐muhakhu tahi yawo enohóshani-- enopururyelani o makhuchani a milachu?"
James2:7 Tahi yawo enerela opwalu nsina norera nla munitchaniwanyuno?
James2:8 Nyenya mwákhwányaka nlamulo nomwene nlo-- ntoko mwa sorempwa-- Omusiveleke mukhwá ntoko onisivelelá mekhá-- munnerano phama:"
James2:9 nyenya mwárino nthalu-- munnatcheka-- nave munnaványiwa ni malamulo ntoko alipa‐otcheka."
James2:10 Ntakhara yowo onakhapelela malamulo othene-- nyenya akwachuliwa va nimoha-- yowo tatchekenliye othene."
James2:11 Ntakhara Yowo áriye-- Ohinararuwa-- táriyetho-- Ohinipha. Nave wáhiraruwa-- nyenya wipha-- turiá ótchekela nlamulo."
James2:12 Ulumakani mwawihihá-- nave erakannoni mwawihihá-- wi ntoko atchu yawo eni erwe‐ethorihiwe ni nlamulo nonéthi."
James2:13 Ntakhara mathoriheryo hanamorela ikharari yowo ohinamorela ikharari; ikharari sinníthamala oványanano mathoriheryo.
James2:14 Yophuchula aya ti sheni-- annaka-- mutchu alocha-- Kókhalano nroromelo-- nyenya ahikhalano miteko?"
James2:15 Mano nroromelo nlo ninnawerya omvulusha? Munna nari murokora atháleliwa-- anathoiwa yólya ya va nihiku naya--"
James2:16 nave mukina a nyuwo alochano-- Hawekeni ni murechele-- mwikhunéle ni ovona; ahávahileru sa va mwílini hiho sináthowa; yophuchula aya ti sheni?"
James2:17 Mwawihihátho nroromelo-- náhikha?-?lanoru miteko-- n’nakhala nokhwa nene mpuwa mwaya’mmo."
James2:18 Nyenya mukina alocha wi-- Weyo wókhalano nroromelo-- nave miyo kókhalano miteko; okónihe miyo nroromelo ná nóhikhalano mitekoá-- nave miyo kinawoniha weyo nroromelo naka norwela m’mitekoni mwaka."
James2:19 Weyo onnaroromela wi Muluku ti mmoha; onnerano phama; masololo ennaroromelatho-- nave ennathukumela."
James2:20 Nyenya onnakhwela osuwelasha-- mutchu atherutheru we-- wi nroromelo nóhikhalano miteko n’ri etheru ene?"
James2:21 Abrahamu nikholo nahu-- vale hériwe ékhaikhai ni miteko-- vavale ámvelénliye ephepa mwanawe Isake va’yuponi yephepa?"
James2:22 Onnonasha wi nroromelo náherano vamoha ni miteko awe-- nave orwela mwa miteko nroromelo ti nériwaya nophameya;"
James2:23 nave sákhwannaya sorempwa sálochiwe iho-- Nave Abrahamu ámuroromela Muluku-- nave wáhalakhanyeryiwa wa yowo ekhaikhai; nave áheriwa nthamwene a Muluku."
James2:24 Munnona wi mutchu oneriwa ékhaikhai ni miteko awe-- tahi ni nroromeloru."
James2:25 Nave mwawihihá tahi éreliwiye ékhaikhai Rahabi chapaheya ole ni miteko-- ákhenliye mitchaka-- akumiha wi evire mphiro mukina?"
James2:26 Vawi ntoko mwíli wóhikhalano munepa oriaya wokhwa-- mwawihihátho nroromelo nóhikhalano miteko n’ri nokhwa nene."
James3:1 Annaka-- othene nyu muhikhale ahusiha-- n’suwelaka wi n’narwa‐nthorihiwa wopwaha."
James3:2 Ntakhara tinnakwachuliwahu othene hi va itchu sinchipale. Mutchu áhikwachuliwa va masu-- yowo tari mutchu óphameya-- owerya otchukanya mwíli wothene."
James3:3 Nyenya n’niyatheryahu akavaro sawaphara owanoni waya-- wi eniweleleke-- nave ninnarukunushatho mwíli aya wothene."
James3:4 Nkonani-- anaviotho-- nari ariaya atokotoko-- enakakhiwa ni etcheku etokotoko-- enarukunushiwa ni yawokolela ekhanikhani-- wothe wene wiwo mulipa‐wokolela anatchuniye’wo."
James3:5 Nari nlumitho n’ri yam’mwílini ekhani-- nave ninnírumiha ni itchu sitokotoko. Nkonani-- mwamoro mukhani onneyela ikhuni sinchipale!"
James3:6 Nave nlumi ti moro; ntoko elapo yohikhalano ekhaikhai mwa sam’mwílini sahu ti okhala waya wa nlumi-- tin’ri noripiha mwíli wothene-- n’neyela makhalelo óphachuwano-- nave tinneyeliwaya ti gehena."
James3:7 Ntakhara miloko yothene ya’nama-- ni ya’palametho-- ya sawapasa-- ni ya sa mu’nia-- sinnakhovelelihiwa-- nave sokhovelelihiwa tátchu;"
James3:8 nyenya nlumi havovo mutchu anawerya okhoveleliha; n’ri yonanara yohikhala epuro-- nosareya mihokhoroko yawipha."
James3:9 Ni nenlo ninnathamalano Apwiya ni Atithi; ni nenlotho ninnulumelano atchu-- yawo apachushiwe ophwanaphwana ni Muluku;"
James3:10 orwela mwano mmohamoha mummo munnakhuma oréliha ni wulumela.
James3:11 Annaka-- iha hasinaphwanela wereya mwawihihá. Mano nápilupilu onnakhuma va mwithe mmohamoha yowo mahi ósiva ni ówáwa?"
James3:12 Mano mukúkhu onnawerya wima azitona-- annaka-- nari mpesa wima makúkhu? Mwawihihá mahi amwapa hewerya okumiha ósiva."
James3:13 Taní ori miruku-- ni airacha mwa nyuwo? Ónihe ni makhalelo awe aphama miteko awe m’miruku yawítchachala."
James3:14 Nyenya mwakhalano nrima nowáwa-- ni wakhulana m’murima mwanyu-- muhíthamaleke-- nave muhotheke munaványihananyuno eparipari."
James3:15 Miruku ela-- heri yokhuruwa wirimu-- nyenya eri ya velaponi-- ya otchuna wophachuwano-- ya masololo."
James3:16 Ntakhara vavo nrima ni wakhulana siriaya’vo-- vavotho ti vari wakanyeryeya ni werano sonanara sothe sene."
James3:17 Nyenya miruku yorwela wirimu enapacherya okhala yawéla-- enakhalatho ya murechele-- yamahala-- yawiwelela phama-- yosareya ikharari ni sawima saphama-- yohikhalano nthalu-- yohiwoka."
James3:18 Nave yawima yekhaikhai enamisiwa m’murecheleni wa yawo enera murechele.
James4:1 Ikhocho sinarwela wowi? wakhulana onarwela wowi mwa nyuwo? Hasinarwela m’minkhela anyu yeyo enawana mu sam’mwílini sanyu?
James4:2 Munnakhalela minkhela-- nave sinnothowani; munnipha-- munakakamela-- nave hamunawerya ophwanya; munnákhulana-- munawana; himwanono etchu-- ntakhara hamunaveka."
James4:3 Munnaveka-- nave hamunákhela-- ntakhara munnaveka monanara-- ntakhara munnakuphya muneranyu sawotheihani."
James4:4 Athiana amararuwo nyuwo-- nna hamunasuwela wi onthamwene welapo ya vathi ori wawichiwa ti Muluku? Hihá-- yowo onakhwela okhala nthamwene élapo ya vathi onnisera wi ichiweke ti Muluku."
James4:5 Akhweya munera wi sorempwa sinalocha etherutheru? Mano Munepa owo wátikitheryiwe mwa hiyo onnakhalela minkhela sa’hache?
James4:6 Nyenya onnavaha ikharari sopwaha. Hihá sorempwa tinalochaya-- Muluku annahíha awoséla-- nyenya annavaha ikharari wa awihasula."
James4:7 Mwawihihá mwiweleleni Muluku; nyenya muhíheni musaserya-- nave anarwa‐otchawani nyuwo."
James4:8 Mwachameleni Muluku-- nave anarwa‐awachamelani nyuwo. Nyawani-- ótcheka nyuwo; clihani mirima-- a mirima mili nyuwo."
James4:9 Khalani óhóshiwa-- mwanláni-- mwanláni mithori; otheya wanyu othatuwe wunla-- ni otchapela wanyu othatuwe othanana."
James4:10 Mwihasuléni va mithoni va Apwiya-- nave anarwa‐owelihani."
James4:11 Muhihelelaneke-- anna-- Yowo onamuhelela munna-- nari yowo onamuthoriha munneni-- onahelela nlamulo-- athoriha nlamulo-- nyenya wathoriha nlamulo-- hori awera nlamulo-- nyenya óthoriha."
James4:12 Mulipa‐ovaha nlamulo ni óthoriha ti mmoha-- ti yowo anawerya ovulusha ni opahula; nyenya weyo onamuthoriha munná wáni?"
James4:13 Vava nto-- nyenyu munalocha-- Olelo akhweya omelo n’narowa navolowe m’muchetche waneshe-- nave n’narupasa’wo ni wesiha marocha-- ni ophwanyeryano;"
James4:14 nyenyu muhinasuwela yeyo eni ephachuwe omelo. Okumi anyu ori wawihai? Ntakhara mwa mwishi-- wawoneya velukuluku ekhani-- nave vavo onnúkuluwa."
James4:15 Mano mwálonche-- Muluku émyeryerya-- nave nakhala akumi-- n’nera yaneshe yaneshe."
James4:16 Nyenya vano munnithamala ni wirumiha wanyu; withamalela wothene wawihihá ti wonanara.
James4:17 Va nthowa nenla yowo onasuwela werano phama-- ahinerano-- wa yowo ti otcheka."
James5:1 Vava nto-- alipa‐muhakhu nyuwo-- mwanláni ni wéwula ntakhara sohósha sanyu sinorwelani."
James5:2 Muhakhu anyu wohúcha nave sowara sanyu solyiwa asocholo.
James5:3 Mivira anyu ni prata anyu sónya murawa-- nave murawáya tunerelaya namona awohelelani nyuwo-- nave sinarwa‐sikhúra ethai anyu si moro. Mohithukumanyerya muhakhu mahiku ókutchula."
James5:4 Nkonani-- phatamari a alipa‐muteko awo yawo yáhama imacha sanyu-- ókhapeleliwa ti nyuwo mwáwokanyu-- annakhuwela; nave okhuwela wa alipa‐ohamáwo wáya o’waruni wa Apwiya a maloko."
James5:5 Mohítchála velaponi-- nave mohera sawotheihani; movakulela mirimányu ntoko nihiku nawipha."
James5:6 Mwámványa-- m’mwipha ékhaikhai owo; nave hanóhíhani."
James5:7 Mwawihihá-- vilelani-- anna-- ophiyerya orwa wawe wa Apwiya. Nkonani-- mulipa‐olima emacha onnaweherya yawima yophwanelela yelapo-- ni ovilelano ophiyerya yakhenle muluku‐mutchulo ni mahiku óhacha."
James5:8 Vilelani nyuwotho-- umihani mirimányu; ntakhara orwa wawe wa Apwiya onnáchamela."
James5:9 Muhinanariweke-- mukina ni mukhwawe-- anna-- wi muni muthorihiwe. Nkonani-- mulipa‐othoriha onémela va milakoni."
James5:10 Kushani anna-- yotakiherya yawona masóso ni ovilela-- ya alipa‐miririmo yawo yúlumme mu nsina na Apwiya."
James5:11 Nkonani-- n’nawéra wi tóréla alipa‐ovileláwo; mwáhiwa sa evilelelo ya Yobu-- nave mohona makutchuwelo a Apwiya-- wi Apwiya tosareya osivela-- ni aikharari."
James5:12 Nyenya tchiriene-- annaka-- muhilipeleke-- nari oromola wirimu nari elapo-- nari olipela okina waya; nyenya ahe anyu akhale ahe-- ni hoe anyu akhale hoe; wi munimmorele muthorihiwani."
James5:13 Mukina a nyuwo onnóna masóso? Tavekele.
James5:14 Mukina onnatheya-- Típe. Ókhala mukina yowo onicheliwa mwa nyuwo? Títchane atokwene a muloko-- nave emvekelele-- emóchihale makhurwa mu nsina na Apwiya;"
James5:15 nave nivekelo na nroromelo n’narwa‐nimvulusha awicheliwa owo-- nave Apwiya anarwa‐amvíha; nave khwino orimtcheka onarwa‐akhurumuweliwa."
James5:16 Vavá mwemyeryeryaneke wa mukina ni mukhwawe sotcheka sanyu-- nave mvekele?-?laneke mukina ni mukhwawe wi mpenushiwe. Nivekelo na mutchu ékhaikhai ninnawerya vatokotoko werano waya."
James5:17 Eliya ári awóna ntoko hiha n’nonahu iha-- nave ávekela motitelela wi epula ehirupe; nave epula heyárumperu velaponi miyakha miraru ni mieri mithanu na mmoha."
James5:18 Nave ávekelatho; nave wirimu wárwa’wo epula-- nave elapo yáhima sawima saya."
James5:19 Annaka-- mukina a nyuwo ahuwela omwalanano eparipari-- nave mukhwawe onnamutcharusha;"
James5:20 asuwelashe-- wi yowo onamutcharusha mulipa‐otcheka m’phironi mwawe mohuwela’mmo onarwa‐amvulusha mutchu wukhwani-- nave onarwa‐akhunéla sotcheka sinchi sene."
1Peter1:1 Petro-- murummwa a Yesu Kristu-- wa óthanliwa yawo ari alecho ómwalamwala ó Ponto-- Galatiya-- Kapadokiya-- Asiya-- ni Bituniya--"
1Peter1:2 ntoko ni osuwelela khuluwi wa Muluku Atithi-- ni wéliha wa Munepa-- waweriha wiwelela-- ni omisa wa nikhami na Yesu Kristu: Ikharari-- ni murechele siwacheleni nyuwo."
1Peter1:3 Órélihiwa ti Muluku ti Atithi a Apwiyahu Yesu Kristu-- Yowo-- ntoko mwa ikharari sawe sitokotoko-- tániyanriyetho muweheryerya wokumi-- mwa ovinya wukhwani wa Yesu Kristu;"
1Peter1:4 wi nákhele mikelampa yohúcha ni yohirípiha ni yohinyála-- yeyo mukhapelele?-?liwanyu wirimu--"
1Peter1:5 nyenyu munakhapeleliwa ni ikuru sa Muluku mwa nroromelo-- ophiyerya ovulushiwa woryeheryiwa wi wupululiwe mahiku ókutchula."
1Peter1:6 Mummo timunahakalalanyu’mo-- nari hihano velukuluku tonto-- wári wophwanela-- muthananihiwe ni saweha samiloko miloko--"
1Peter1:7 wi saweha sa nroromelo nanyu-- sa esisapo aya yopwaha ya mivira yeyo enamuyeheya-- nari sereryiwe ni moro-- sinaphwanyiwa sokhalano mathamalelo-- ni nchichimiho ni mahala va wupululuwa wa Yesu Kristu;"
1Peter1:8 yowo nari muhimonne munnamusivela; yowo nari muhimvaryaka hihano-- munaroromelanyu-- munnahakalalano ni otheya wohoneya ni wa nchichimiho:"
1Peter1:9 ni wakhela makutchuwelo a nroromelo nanyu-- ti ovulushiwa wa okumi anyu."
1Peter1:10 Volocha sa ovulusha wu alipa‐miririmo yáhávyavya yalikhela-- yálochaya sa ikharari hiho sinorwelani;"
1Peter1:11 ni walikhela elukuluku evi-- nari elukuluku tani Munepa wa Kristu yowo onakhala mwa yawo wálénlaya-- werenlaya namona a sohósha sa Kristu-- ni nchichimiho nenlo nátchánanano."
1Peter1:12 Wa yawo wáhupululeliwa-- wi hayíruménle mkhataya-- nyenya nyuwo-- ni itchu iha-- hiho muléliwanyu hihano-- mwa yawo tiyálaleliwaya Mitchaka Yaphama mwa Munepa Wawéla-- worummwa orwela wirimu; itchu iha angelo yátchunasha ovaryerya."
1Peter1:13 Mwa ela-- mwímanke mu’yununi mwa murimányu-- mukhale awíhíha-- nave muweheryeryeke wothe wene ikharari hiho munirianyu mukusheryiwe va wupululuwa wa Yesu Kristu;"
1Peter1:14 ntoko anamwane awiwelela muhíphwaniheryetho ni minkhela yakhalai-- mwéranyu muhisuwelelaka;"
1Peter1:15 nyenya ntoko Yowo anawitchanani nyuwo oríye awéla murima nyuwotho khalani awéla murima m’makhalelo anyu othene;
1Peter1:16 ntakhara turempwaya-- Khalani awéla murima-- ntakhara Miyo ka awéla murima."
1Peter1:17 Nave mwítchana Atithi-- Yawo anathoriha ntoko mwa miteko ya mutchu-- óhikhalano nthalu-- móváni va mahiku anyu ókhala alecho;"
1Peter1:18 musuwelaka wi hamópoliwe ni itchu sawúcha-- si mivira ni prata-- omwalanano makhalelo anyu atherutheru órwela wa makholo anyu;"
1Peter1:19 nyenya n’nikhami na esisapo aya yowalamela ntoko ya mwana épuchepuche óhikhalano murala-- ni óhikhalano nthepa-- ti nikhami nto na Kristu;"
1Peter1:20 yowo áthanleliwe khluwi elapo ya vathi ehákuvale okhala-- nyenya áhonihiwa va makutchuwelo a elukuluku--"
1Peter1:21 ntakhara a nyuwo nyenyu mwa Yowo munamuroromela Muluku yowo ámvíhale wukhwani-- ni omvaha Yowo nchichimiho-- mwawihihá wi nroromelo nanyu ni oweheryerya wanyu okhale va Muluku."
1Peter1:22 Ntakhara mohéliha okumi anyu muniwelelanyu eparipari wi mwásiveleke anna ni osivela wohiwoka-- musivelaneke tchiri ni muriméne:"
1Peter1:23 nyenyu mwáyariwetho-- tahi ni mmiso wawúchéne-- nyenya wohúcha-- mwa masu makumi ni awikhalelaru a Muluku."
1Peter1:24 Ntakhara-- Atchu othene antoko manashi-- Ni nchichimiho naya nothene ntoko ethutu ya nnashi. Manashi awo annanyála-- nave ethutu ennamora;"
1Peter1:25 Nyenya masu a Muluku ennikhalelaru okhala wokhala. Nave masu yawo enalaleyiwa wa nyuwo pi yawo.
1Peter2:1 Hihá murihale sonanara sothe sene-- ni owoka wothene ni mukhalo wowoka-- ni nrima-- ni ohelelana wothene--"
1Peter2:2 mwanlelani ntoko makwiya ahihano-- mapele óphwanela-- óhikhalano owoka-- wi munnuweno ophiyerya ovulushiwa;"
1Peter2:3 khwino mwálawihale wi Apwiya tépewe;
1Peter2:4 wa Yowo mwaya’wo-- nluku nokumi-- nenlo nákhochiwe tátchu-- nyenya ni Muluku nothanliwa--"
1Peter2:5 nochichimihiwa-- nyuwotho wi maluku ókumi munnamakiwa empa yamunepa-- wi mukhale alipa‐ephepa awéla murima-- óveléla iphepa samunepa-- sawakheliwa ti Muluku mwa Yesu Kristu."
1Peter2:6 Ntakhara turempwaya mu yorempwa-- Nkona-- kinniyathi m’Ziyoni nluku nokutchula na va muthokoni-- nothanliwa-- nesisapo aya; Nave yowo ani anamuroromela Yowo harwa‐alamwa."
1Peter2:7 Wa nyuwo nto alipa‐ororomela-- taríye ésisapo aya; nyenya wa yawo ehinaroromela-- Nluku nenlo óteka empa yákhochilaya-- Nenlo náheriwa muru wa va muthokoni;"
1Peter2:8 nave-- Nluku nokwachuliwano-- ni mwala wokhumula; wa yawo enakwachuliwa ni masu-- ariaya óhiwelela-- yáthanleliwa wiwotho."
1Peter2:9 Nyenya nyuwo mwá nloko nothanliwa-- alipa‐ephepa omwene-- nihimo nawéla murima-- anakinnya-- mwawihihá wi mwahilaleye sopwaha iho sa Yowo áwítchanneni wi mukhume mwipiphini-- mvolowe omwalela wawe wotikiniha;"
1Peter2:10 nyenyu khalai mwahári atchu-- nyenya vano mwa atchu a Muluku; nyenyu khalai mwahákhenle ikharari-- nyenya vano mohakhela ikharari."
1Peter2:11 Ósiveliwa-- kinnochenyeryani si alecho ni awecha mwíhíherye minkhela ya mwíli yeyo enawana ekhocho ni okumi;"
1Peter2:12 nave mukhalo anyu mwa amalapo okhale worera-- wi-- enopelelihaya mwaha sa nyuwo si awera sonanara-- emuchichimiheke Muluku eniriaya yoneke miteko anyu yaphama-- mu nihiku nolipelela."
1Peter2:13 Mwalapani solamuleliwa sothe sene sa atchu-- ntakhara a Apwiya; nari wa mwene-- si muru wa othene;"
1Peter2:14 nari wa achamasowa-- si órummwa ti yowo wálaka yawo enera sonanara-- nyenya wathamala yawo enera saphama."
1Peter2:15 Ntakhara okhwela wa Muluku onihiha-- wi ni wera saphama m’málihe ohísuwela wa atúte;"
1Peter2:16 ntoko anethi-- nyenya óhikhalano onethi ntoko wokhuwano sonanara-- nyenya si akapuro a Muluku."
1Peter2:17 Mwáchichimihani atchu othene. Mwásivelani anna-- mwamóvani Muluku-- Mwamuchichimihani mwene."
1Peter2:18 Anamiravo nyuwo-- mwálapani asipwiyanyu ni wova wothene-- tahi wa aphama ni amahalaru pothe-- nyenyatho wa ówali."
1Peter2:19 Ntakhara iha ti ikharari khwino mutchu-- ntakhara a yawupusherya‐ya‐murima ya wa Muluku onemyiye sothanana-- anona masóso óhimphwanelela."
1Peter2:20 Ntakhara ovuwa waphama wawihai-- mwavilelano owotopoliwa munatchekanyu? Nyenya nto-- muneranyu saphama-- m’vilela munonanyu’vo masóso-- vavá ti ikharari ni Muluku."
1Peter2:21 Ntakhara mwitchaneliwe werano ela; ntakhara nari Kristu áhóna masóso mu nipuroni mwa nyuwo-- óhiyeryani yotakiherya wi mutcharetchare manani awe;"
1Peter2:22 yowo ahátchenkeru-- nave mwano mwaháphwanyiweru owoka;"
1Peter2:23 yowo ányemuliwiye hákókihenryeru munyemu; áhóshiwiye-- háchechemunryeru-- nyenya áveléla mulachu wa Yowo anathoriha mwekhaikhai;"
1Peter2:24 yowo íreiye sotcheka sahu mkhatiye m’mwílini mwawe va mwikimanyo-- wi hiyo-- nikhwile mu sotcheka-- nikhaletho akumi votchara ekhaikhai; yowo mititiri awe ti mwápenushiwanyuno."
1Peter2:25 Ntakhara mwámuhuwela si ipuchepuche; nyenya vano mokókela wa Mukukhula ni Mulipa‐oweherya okumi anyu.
1Peter3:1 Hihátho athiana nyu-- mwawiwelelani asíyanyu a nyuwo mkhatinyu; wi-- akinatho yáhiwelelaka masu-- yahileketchiwe ehikhanleno masu ni mukhalo wa athiana;"
1Peter3:2 eniriaya yoneke mukhalo anyu wawéla ni wova wanyu.
1Peter3:3 Nyenyu wírériha wanyu oniriaya ohikhale wa vateru-- ovathanya mihi ni owara sa mivira-- nari owarela yowara;"
1Peter3:4 nyenya vakhale mutchu ókhuweya a murima-- mu yowara yohúcha ya munepa wawitchachala ni womála-- turi wesisapo aya yowalamela va mithoni va Muluku."
1Peter3:5 Ntakhara mwawihihátho khalai athiana awéla murima-- ómuweheryerya Muluku-- tiyírerihaya mekhaya-- enawiwelela asíyaya a yawo mkhataya;"
1Peter3:6 ntoko Sara ámwiweleliye Abrahamu-- anamwera apwiya; muni mukhale anamwane a yowo munirianyu mwerekeno phama-- óhóvaru yawopiha ekina."
1Peter3:7 Hihátho alopwana nyu-- mukhalekeno ntoko mwawisuwelela-- ni omuchichimiha muthiana-- ntoko yokusherya yoyeléla ikuru-- wi ntoko mukelampa vamoha ni nyuwo aikharari sokumi; wi mavekelo anyu eníhíhiwe."
1Peter3:8 Vokutchula vaya-- khalani othene a murima mmoha-- ómorelana ikharari-- ósivelana ni anna-- óthanana-- awíhasula;"
1Peter3:9 óhinla ekuhu va yonanara-- nari elomwe velomwe-- nyenya vakinatho oréliha; ntakhara mwítchaniwele otchara ela-- wi mwakhele oréla. Ntakhara--"
1Peter3:10 Yowo onakhwela osivela okumi-- Ni wona mahiku manchipale-- Ahíhe nlumi nawe nihiloche yonanara-- Ni minuphi awe ehulume yowoka;"
1Peter3:11 Nave ahapuwele yonanara-- anera saphama; Avye murechele ni otchararu."
1Peter3:12 Ntakhara mitho a Apwiya ari valipa‐ekhaikhai-- Nave maru awe enniwa mavekelo aya; Nyenya ethoi ya Apwiya eri va awera sonanara."
1Peter3:13 Nave tani yowo ani awereleni yonanara-- munakhalelanyu mvai etchu yaphama?"
1Peter3:14 Nyenya nto móna masóso ntakhara ekhaikhai-- nyuwo mwa óréla; nave muhóveke wopiha waya-- nari muhipeke murima;"
1Peter3:15 nyenya m’mwélihe Apwiya Kristu m’mirima mwanyu; awiryeheryela khuluwi mahiku othene wírúha wa mutchu yowo onokohani nyuwo nthowa na oweheryerya wiwo ori mwa nyuwo-- nyenya nto ni witchachala ni wova;"
1Peter3:16 ni okhalano yawupusherya‐yaphama‐ya‐murima-- wi yeyo enohelelayani-- yawo enahelela mwawotha mukhalo anyu waphama mwa Kristu-- muru owúleke."
1Peter3:17 Ntakhara-- wona masóso onerá saphama-- ni wona masóso onerá sonanara-- ti waphama wona masóso onerá saphama-- okhwela wa Muluku onípakelaya hiha."
1Peter3:18 Vawi Kristutho áhóna masóso omoha-- ntakhara sotcheka-- ékhaikhai mu nipuroni mwa óhikhala ékhaikhai-- wi anipishe wa Muluku; awiphiwa m’mwílini-- nyenya óvahiwa okumi mwa munepa;"
1Peter3:19 mummotho távinriye’mo-- alaleyerya minepa yeyo yári mu kariposo--"
1Peter3:20 yeyo yári yohiléleya khalai-- vava Muluku oleva wawe wáwehaya-- m’mahiku a Nowa-- mwacheya arikimryeheryiwa-- mummo awalakhanyeya-- tákumi athanu nararu-- yávulushiwe wa mahi;"
1Peter3:21 yophwaniherya yawihihátho tinovulushani hihano-- ti obatiso-- tahi oriha wa nikhurumela naya na mwíli-- nyenya wakhula waya wa yawupusherya‐yaphama‐ya‐murima ya wa Muluku-- muvinya wa Yesu Kristu;"
1Peter3:22 yowo anakhala va ntatani nolopwana na Muluku-- avoloiye wirimu; wiwo angelo ni olamulelo-- ni ikuru sinamulapaya."
1Peter4:1 Hihá Kristu ónniye masóso m’mwílini-- mwiryeheryele murima yowo; ntakhara yowo ónne masóso m’mwílini ómwalanano otcheka;"
1Peter4:2 wi elukuluku ehanléyo muhikhaletho akumi m’mwílini otchara minkhela ya atchu-- nyenya okhwela wa Muluku."
1Peter4:3 Ntakhara mahiku evinre ale yánikhwanela wera okhwela wa amalapo-- néchechahu nikhwelaka sotakhala-- minkhela-- owuryasha-- olyólya-- owuryawurya-- ni othamalela sophwaniherya mohemyiwaru;"
1Peter4:4 mummo taneraya yotikiniha wi hamunatchimakano ophiyerya oyeheryeya wiwo wa marimélelo-- enawerelani opwalu;"
1Peter4:5 yawo eni erwe‐emuthoriherye yowo ori awiryeheryela khuluwi wathoriha akumi ni alipa‐okhwa.
1Peter4:6 Ntakhara va nthowa nenla Mitchaka Yaphama tilokoheryiwaya wa yawotho yákhwile-- wi yahithorihiwe ntoko mwa atchu m’mwílini-- nyenya yahikhale akumi ntoko mwa Muluku m’munepani."
1Peter4:7 Nyenya makutchuwelo a itchu sothe sene ari vakhiviru; va nthowa nenla khalani amiruku-- nave mwaweheryani m’mavekelo;"
1Peter4:8 opwaha sothe sene mukhaleno osivela weparipari mwa nyuwo mkhatinyu; ntakhara osivela onuhéla wachasha wa sonanara;
1Peter4:9 muhayihaneke mukina ni mukhwawe-- óhichenyaru:"
1Peter4:10 ntoko mutchu ákhelenliye yamahala-- murumélanekeno-- ntoko anahota órera a ikharari sa miloko miloko sa Muluku;"
1Peter4:11 mukina árumélaka ereno ntoko mwa ikuru hiho Muluku anamvahiye-- wi mu sothe sene Muluku achichimihiwe mwa Yesu Kristu-- yowo orinono nchichimiho ni ikuru mahiku othene. Amen."
1Peter4:12 Ósiveliwa-- muhitikhine ni wehiwa wa moro wóphachuwenleni nyuwo wi okhale wowereryani-- ntoko etchu yotikiniha erimweriwa ti nyuwo:"
1Peter4:13 nyenya ntakhara munnalawihano Kristu masóso awe-- theyani; wi vawupululuwa wa nchichimiho nawe mwahihakalale otokotoko."
1Peter4:14 Mwarohiwa va nsina na Kristu-- mwa óréla; ntakhara Munepa wa nchichimiho-- ni Munepa wa Muluku onitchúwa va nyuwo."
1Peter4:15 Ntakhara ahone masóso mukina a nyuwo ntoko mulipa‐wipha-- nari mulipa‐wiya-- nari awera sonanara-- nari ntoko awúra;"
1Peter4:16 nyenya óna masóso ntoko mKristu muru ohimúleru; nyenya amuchichimihe Muluku mu nsina nla.
1Peter4:17 Ntakhara elukuluku yophiya wi mathoriheryo epacherye va’mpa ya Muluku; nyenya yapacherya ni hiyo-- makutchuwelo a yawo ehiniwelela Mitchaka Yaphama ya Muluku eníkhale yawihai?"
1Peter4:18 Nave mutchu ékhaikhai avuluwa ni weryeryaru-- mutchu óhithamala ni ótcheka ani oneye wowi?"
1Peter4:19 Hihátho yawo enona masóso ntoko ni okhwela wa Muluku yinnyererye okumi aya ni wera saphama-- m’matani mwa Mulipa‐opachusha óroromeleya."
1Peter5:1 Atokwene nto mwa nyuwo kinnachenyerya-- miyo mutokwene mukhwinyu n’namona a masóso a Kristu-- ni yomitho ólawihano nchichimiho nenlo nni nupululuwe nlo;"
1Peter5:2 Lyihani muloko wa Muluku yowo ori mwa nyuwo-- ni oweherya-- tahi mwawakuviha-- nyenya ni onethi-- wa Muluku; óhitchara yawiphwanyerya yotakhala-- nyenya mwa mvai;"
1Peter5:3 tahi ntoko awalamulela yawo ari a otokwene anyu-- nyenya okhala yotakiherya ya mulokówo."
1Peter5:4 Nave aniriye oneye Mukukhula mtokotoko-- munarwa‐mwakhela koroa a nchichimiho-- óhinyála. Hihátho-- anamiravo nyuwo-- mwawiwelelani atokwene."
1Peter5:5 Nyenya othene nyu muware wiyeviha wi murumélane; ntakhara Muluku annahíha awírumiha-- nyenya annavaha ikharari wa awiyeviha."
1Peter5:6 Hihá mwiyeviheni vathi va ntata na’kuru na Muluku-- wi velukuluku aya órumiheni;"
1Peter5:7 ni oriha wa yowo wipa murima wanyu wothene-- ntakhara Yowo tano?-?thokororyiyeni nyuwo."
1Peter5:8 Khalani awikhapelela-- weheryani; mwichani anyu musaserya-- ntoko mwacho awunla-- annechécha ni omwavyavya mukina wi ammirye:"
1Peter5:9 yowo m’mukhoche ókilatheya mu nroromelo-- musuwelaka wi masóso yawo ahulána mwa anninyu yawo ari velaponi."
1Peter5:10 Nave Muluku mwa ikharari sothe sene-- yowo áwitchanneni wi m’volowe nchichimiho nawe nohimala mwa Kristu-- mónne masóso elukuluku tonto-- anopishani nyuwo óhikhalano murala-- mwanenáwe-- anotikitharyani-- anokhomálihani."
1Peter5:11 Wa Yowo okhale ikuru mahiku othene. Amen.
1Peter5:12 Mwa Silvano-- munnihu óroromeleya ntoko kinamweraka-- kihorepelani nyuwo mokhuveiha-- ni ochenyerya-- ni werela namona-- ni ikharari separipari sa Muluku ti hiha; mu iha mwemele’mo."
1Peter5:13 Ó Babulo owo óthanliwa vamoha ni nyuwo annolochelani; anihonotho Marko mwanaka.
1Peter5:14 Lochelanani ni onula wa osivela. Murechele okhale ni nyenyu othene muri mwa Kristu. Amen.
2Peter1:1 Simoni Petro-- kapuro ni murummwa a Yesu Kristu-- wa yawo yákhenle nroromelo na esisapo aya emohamoha yeyo ni hiyo-- mwikhaikhai ya Muluku ahu ni Mvulusha Yesu Kristu:"
2Peter1:2 Ikharari wa nyuwo ni murechele sacheryeryiwe musuwelasha wa Muluku ni Yesu Apwiyahu.
2Peter1:3 Ntoko ikuru sa omuluku awe sánivahilaya hiyo sothe sene sa vokumini ni othamalela-- músuwelasha wa Yowo ánitchanne hiyo ni nchichimiho ni epewe awe ya Yowo mkhatiye;"
2Peter1:4 mwa iha tánivahiliye malakano aesisapo aya ni matokotokosha; wi mwa iha mukhale awátánano omuluku awe-- m’vuluwale o’yucheni yeyo eri velaponi ya vathi m’minkhela."
2Peter1:5 Nave nílatho-- munakhalanyunotho mvai wothene-- munnacheryerya epewe va nroromelo nanyu-- nave vepewe osuwelasha;"
2Peter1:6 nave vosuwelasha wíhíha-- nave vawíhíha evilelelo; nave vevilelelo mathamalelo;"
2Peter1:7 nave va mathamalelo okhovelelana womunna-- nave vokhovelelana womunna osivela."
2Peter1:8 Ntakhara iha sakhala ni nyuwo-- nave sácha-- sinarwa‐serano wi muhikhala óyere nari óhikhalano sawima vosuwelasha wa Apwiyahu Yesu Kristu."
2Peter1:9 Ntakhara yowo ohinono iha ori évasi-- ni óhísuwela-- óchiwala ovasiwa wawe woriha sonanara sawe sakhalai."
2Peter1:10 Hihá anna-- acheryeryani mvai otikitherya witchaniwa ni othanliwa wanyu; ntakhara mwerano iha-- hamurwa‐mukwachuliwaru okhala wokhala;"
2Peter1:11 ntakhara vawihihá onarwa‐wacheryeryiwa wa nyuwo móréla mulako wovolowano omwene wohimala wa Apwiyahu ni Mvulusha Yesu Kristu.
2Peter1:12 Mwa ela nkihiya owupusheryani nyuwo mahiku othene sa iha-- nari musuwelakano nave mwitikither?-?yaka mwiparipari yeyo eri mwa nyuwo."
2Peter1:13 Nave kinnera ti yorera-- kiriaka miyo m’mukotcha yola-- wovíhani ni owupusheryani;"
2Peter1:14 kisuwelaka wi ovinya’mo wa m’mukotchani mwaka onnáchamela-- ntoko ákiléleliye Apwiyahu Yesu Kristu."
2Peter1:15 Nyenya kinarwa‐kikhalatho ni mvai mohihiya wi kivinnye’vo miyo-- munaweryaka wupuwelela iha."
2Peter1:16 Ntakhara han’tchanre ikano satherutheru-- nólénlahuni ikuru ni woneya wa Apwiyahu Yesu Kristu-- nyenya nárimona mitho ni mitho otokwene awe."
2Peter1:17 Vawi áhákhela wa Muluku Atithi mahala ni nchichimiho-- yámurwenlaya masu awihiha órwela o nchichimiho ntokotoko-- Ola ti Mwanaka ósiveliwa-- yowo Miyo kinahakalalakano;"
2Peter1:18 nave masu yala yárwele wirimu hiyo náhiwa-- náriahu vamoha ni Yowo va mwakoni wawéla yowo."
2Peter1:19 Nave nókhalano masu awulummwa ótikitheryeya wopwaha; yawo mwáthokororyaka munnerano phama-- ntoko onyari womwaleya mu nipuroni mwepiphi-- ophiyerya vashile’vo-- nave nivorosha atchówa va mirimányu;"
2Peter1:20 Musuwelaka ela vopacherya-- wi hiyavovo yolochiwa ya yorempwa yeyo enataphuleliwa va mekhaya--"
2Peter1:21 ntakhara nari khalai olocha hewárúle ni okhwela wa mutchu; nyenya atchu a Muluku-- yawo yáphariwe ti Munepa Wawéla-- ti yálocha."
2Peter2:1 Nyenya véri va atchu awo vákhalatho alipa‐miririmo awotha-- ntoko vaniriaya varwe‐vakhaletho ahusiha awotha-- véri va nyuwo-- yawo eni erwe‐evoloweno wiphini omwaryeya woriméliha-- emukhocha Apwiya yowo áthumme-- yikusherya mekhaya oriméla wawakuva orwa."
2Peter2:2 Nave anchipale enarwa‐etchara sotakhala saya; ntakhara yawo ephiro yeparipari enarwa‐elocheliwa sopwalu.
2Peter2:3 Nave ni okhalela nrima enarwa‐ewesihani marocha ni masu awotha; yawo mathoriheryo aya ehinasheleliwaru okhala wokhala-- nave oriméla waya honoséla ikhove."
2Peter2:4 Ntakhara Muluku ahálemviye angelo yátchenke awo-- nyenya áhávonya mu kariposo awiyathi m’malichini epiphi vawi ekhapeleliwe ni orwa‐othorihiwa;"
2Peter2:5 nave hálemve elapo ya vathi yakhalai-- nyenya ámukhapelenle Nowa mulipa‐olaleya ékhaikhai ni akhwawe athanu neli-- áruhenryiye elapo ya alipa‐ohithamalela mahi;"
2Peter2:6 nave átatunshiye makhala michetche ya Sodoma ni Gomora áványa yeyo ápahunliye-- énre yeyo yotakiherya ya wa yawo yákhala óhithamalela;"
2Peter2:7 nave ámvulunshe Loti ékhaikhai owo-- awukhuwa m’murima ni mukhalo wotakhala wa alipa‐onanara ale;"
2Peter2:8 (ntakhara ékhaikhai owo ákhanliye véri vaya-- ni wona ni wiwa sawaya sahósha okumi wekhaikhai nihiku n’nihiku ni miteko aya yohithoriheya)."
2Peter2:9 Apwiya annasuwela wavulusha alipa‐othamalela enehiwaya-- ni wakhapelela óhikhalano ekhaikhai ophiyerya nihiku nothoriha wi yahilakiwe;"
2Peter2:10 nyenya tchiriene yawo enatchara sa mwíli-- m’minkhela ya sorípiha-- enaroha olamulelo; óhóvaru etchu-- ótchara okhwela wa yawo anene-- henathukumelaru owerela atokwene opwalu;"
2Peter2:11 ntakhara angelo-- nari enapwahaya wupasha mwikuru-- henahelela wa Apwiya mulachu wawera opwalu."
2Peter2:12 Nyenya yawo-- ntoko ikumi sohikhala miruku-- inama sopachushiwa wi siheyiweke ni opahuliwa-- enerelaya opwalu sa itchu hiho ehinasuwelaya-- enarwa‐epahuliwa mupahuliwa waya--"
2Peter2:13 awereliwa sonanara oliva ohikhala waya ékhaikhai; atchu yawo anera yawahakalaliha otchekela othana; tariaya mathepa ni mirala-- ótchekela mulyólya wa sawasivela-- analyaya vamoha ni nyuwo;"
2Peter2:14 ókhalano mitho ósareya mararuwo-- óhiweryaru ohiya otcheka-- wawoka yawo ari ni okumi wohitikitheryeya; ókhalano murima wokhovelela okhalela nrima; anamwane awulumeliwa;"
2Peter2:15 yawo ahiyale ephiro yothoriheya-- ehuwela-- enatchara ephiro ya Balamu mwana a Beori-- yowo ásivenle phatamari óhikhalano ekhaikhai;"
2Peter2:16 nyenya ásameliwa átchenkiye mwanene; puru óhilocha-- alochaka ni masu a mutchu-- áhíha olamwa wa mulipa‐miririmówo."
2Peter2:17 Yawo ti anapilupilu óhikhalano mahi-- mutcharapo wokakhiwa ni etcheku; yawo epiphi yorípa phii enákhapelelayaru."
2Peter2:18 Ntakhara enulumaya masu awithamalela atherutheru-- enawokela minkhela ya mwíli-- ni sotakhala-- yawo yápachenrye ovuluwa wa amechelo ótchekáwo;"
2Peter2:19 ni wávánelela yawo onethi-- yawo mkhataya ariaya akapuro a’yuche; ntakhara yowo mutchu onamulapihiye-- yowotho tanakhala kapuro awe."
2Peter2:20 Vawi khwino-- yátchawilaya sorípiha selapo ya vathi vosuwelasha wa Apwiya ni Mvulusha Yesu Kristu-- yáheyiwanotho-- elapihiwa-- makutchuwelo aya enarwa‐enanara opwaha mapacheryeryo aya."
2Peter2:21 Ntakhara vakahárérela yíkhalenleru óhisuwela ephiro yekhaikhai-- opwaha wi-- esuwenle-- ekoka ni oriha nlamulo nawéla nenlo yávahiwaya."
2Peter2:22 Yáháphwanelela yawo ekano yeparipari-- Mwanapwa ókokela o marapheyo awe-- nave ekupa yárampéyo yokokela wupuruwa mu nchokwini."
2Peter3:1 Ósiveliwa-- ela ti ekarata yanawili kinorepelakani hihano; mwa sopili kinnavíha murimányu weparipari ni owupushani;"
2Peter3:2 mwa sopili kinnavíha murimányu weparipari ni owupushani; wi mupuwele masu yawo yálochiwe khalai ti alipa‐miririmo awéla-- ni nlamulo na Apwiya ni Mvulusha-- mwa arummwa anyu;"
2Peter3:3 ni opacherya orórasha ela wi m’mahiku ókutchula enarwa‐erwa óroha ni awera soroha-- awecha ntoko mwa minkhela ya yawo anene--"
2Peter3:4 ni olocha-- N’ri wowi nlakano norwa wawe? ntakhara opacherya wopacherya makholo yákhwilaya-- sothe sene sinnikhalelaru ntoko sápachenryaya opachushiwa."
2Peter3:5 Ntakhara ela enachiwala mwaini-- wi erimu yápachushiwe khalai-- nave elapo yáhupiwa ni mahi ni mwa mahi-- ti masu a Muluku;"
2Peter3:6 mwa iha elapo ya vathi ya mahiku yale-- yámiryiwaya ti mahi-- yápahuwa; nyenya erimu ni elapo ya mahiku yala--"
2Peter3:7 ni masu yawo síyathiwe o mororni-- sinámkhapeleliwa ophiyerya nihiku nothoriha n’nopahuwa wa atchu óhithamalela."
2Peter3:8 Nyenya emoha ela muhichiwale-- ósiveliwa nyuwo-- wi nihiku nimoha n’nakhala wa Apwiya ntoko miyakha masanaru khumi-- ni miyakha masanaru khumi ntoko nihiku nimoha."
2Peter3:9 Apwiya hanavirikanya nlakano nawe-- ntoko akina aniriaya wi ti óvirikanya; nyenya anamolevani-- ahinakhwela wi akina etholowe-- nyenya wi othene ephiye wutcharuwani."
2Peter3:10 Nyenya nihiku na Apwiya n’ni n’rwe‐niphiye wi mulipa‐wiya; erimu eniriaya erwe evire ni oruma otokotoko-- nave sawirimu sinarwa‐sitothowa ni oviha otokotoko-- nave elapo ni miteko yeyo eri mummo sinarwa‐seyeliwa."
2Peter3:11 Sothe sene iha nto siniriaya sirwe‐sukuluwe mwawihihá-- nyuwo munaphwanela okhala atchu awihai nki-- m’makhalelo awéla ni m’mathamalelo--"
2Peter3:12 muweheryeryaka ni wakuvola orwa waya wa nihiku na Muluku-- mummo erimu eniriaya yeyeliwe-- enarwa‐yukuluwa; nave sawirimu sinarwa‐sitothowa ni oviha otokotoko."
2Peter3:13 Nyenya ntoko mwa nlakano nawe ninnaweheryerya erimu yahihano ni elapo yahihano mummo munitchála’mo ekhaikhai.
2Peter3:14 Mummo-- ósiveliwa-- munaweheryeryanyu iha-- khalani amvai wi mphwanyiwe ti Yowo m’murecheleni-- óhikhalano nthepa ni óhikhalano murala."
2Peter3:15 Nave mwerani oleva wa Apwiyahu wi ti ovulusha; ntoko munnihu ósiveliwa Paulo-- ntoko mwa miruku ávahiwiye-- órepenliyeni;"
2Peter3:16 ntoko mwikarata sawe sothe sene atchu othene enopelelihaya mwaha sa iha; mummo mokhala’mo sikina sovila osuwelasha-- hiho atchu óhihuserya ni óhitikitheryeya enakhoromanyaya-- ntoko enerayanotho sorempwa sikina-- enipahulano anene."
2Peter3:17 Nyuwo-- nto-- ósiveliwa-- munasuwelanyu iha-- mwisuweleleke-- wi munakushiwanyu ni otcheka wa alipa‐ohiléleya-- muni múwe ohiya otikitheryeya wanyu."
2Peter3:18 Nyenya munnuwe mwikharari ni osuwelasha wa Apwiyahu ni Mvulusha Yesu Kristu; wa Yowo okhale nchichimiho-- hihano ni ilukuluku sothene. Amen."
1John1:1 Yeyo yárivovo opacherya vopacherya-- yeyo níwalahu-- yeyo nónnahu ni mitho ahu-- yeyo návarenryahu-- nave matáhu yáphara ya Masu ókumi--"
1John1:2 (nave okumi owo wáhoneya-- nave náhona-- nave ninnerela namona-- nave ninnolaleyeryani okumi wohimala owo-- yowo wári wa Atithi-- woneya wa hiyo);"
1John1:3 yeyo nónnahu-- nave níwalahu-- tinnolaleyeryahuni nyuwotho-- wi nyuwotho mwátáne vamoha ni hiyo; nave eyátáno ahu eritho ni Atithi-- nave ni Mwanawe Yesu Kristu;"
1John1:4 nave hiyo ninnarepa iha-- wi otheya wahu okhwáne."
1John1:5 Nave ela ti Mitchaka níwalahu wa Yowo-- nave ninnalaleya wa nyuwo-- wi Muluku ti omwalela-- nave mwa Yowo mothe mwene himwamomo epiphi."
1John1:6 Néra wi ninnátánano Yowo-- nave n’necha mwipiphini-- ninnotha-- nave hannera eparipari;"
1John1:7 nyenya necha mumwalela-- ntoko Yowo oríye mumwalela-- ninnátána mukina ni mukhwawe-- nave nikhami na Yesu Mwanawe ninnanivasa onivíherya sotcheka sothe sene."
1John1:8 Néra wi hinanono sotcheka-- ninníwoka mkhatihu-- nave mwa hiyo himwamomo eparipari."
1John1:9 Némyeryerya sotcheka sahu-- ori óroromeleya ni ékhaikhai Yowo-- wi anikhurumuwele sotcheka sahu-- ni onrapiha onivíherya sothe sene sohikhala sekhaikhai."
1John1:10 Néra wi hanitchenke-- n’namwera Yowo mulipa‐wotha-- nave masu awe henakhala mwa hiyo."
1John2:1 Asanamwanáka-- kinnorepelani iha-- wi muhitcheke. Nave mukina atcheka-- Mulipa‐wurya nókhalano wa Atithi-- ti Yesu Kristu ékhaikhai;"
1John2:2 nave Yowo ti yawopola ya sotcheka sahu; nyenya tahi sauhuru-- nyenyatho selapo yothene ya vathi."
1John2:3 Nave mummo ninnasuwela wi nómuróra Yowo-- nakhapelelaru malamulo awe."
1John2:4 Yowo onalocha wi-- Kinnamusuwela-- nyenya ahinakhapelela malamulo awe-- ori mulipa‐wotha-- nave mwa yowo himwamomo eparipari;"
1John2:5 nyenya yowo onakhapelela masu awe-- mwa yowo tchiriene osivela wa Muluku tukutchuwenlaya’mo."
1John2:6 Mummo tinnasuwelahu wi hiyo n’ri mwa Yowo; yowo onalocha wi ólemeyano-- onaphwanelatho mwanenáwe wi écheke ntoko écheliye Yowo."
1John2:7 Ósiveliwa-- nkinorepelani nlamulo nahihano-- nyenya nlamulo nakhalai nenlo mwárianyuno opacherya vopacherya; nlamulo nakhalai nlo ti masu yawo mwíwalanyu."
1John2:8 Kinnorepelanitho nlamulo nahihano-- etchu yeyo tiri yeparipari mwa Yowo ni mwa nyuwo; wi epiphi yovira-- nave omwalela weparipari wopacherya warya."
1John2:9 Yowo onera wi ori mumwalela-- anamwícha munneni-- ori mwipiphini ophiyerya hihano vava."
1John2:10 Yowo onamusivela munneni onakhala mumwalela-- nave mwa yowo himwamomo yomukwachula."
1John2:11 Nyenya yowo onamwicha munneni ori mwipiphini-- anecha mwipiphini-- nave hanasuwela wiwo onayiye’wo-- ntakhara epiphi yorípiha mitho awe."
1John2:12 Kinnorepelani-- asanamwane-- ntakhara mokhurumu?-?weliwa sotcheka sanyu mwa nsina nawe."
1John2:13 Kinnorepelani-- asitithi-- ntakhara momusuwela Yowo ori opacherya vopacherya. Kinnorepelani-- anamiravo-- ntakhara momulapiha mulipa‐onanara owo. Kihorepelani-- anamwane-- ntakhara momusuwela Atithi."
1John2:14 Kihorepelani-- asitithi-- ntakhara momusuwela Yowo ori opacherya vopacherya. Kihorepelani-- anamiravo-- ntakhara mwa a’kuru-- nave masu a Muluku álemeya mwa nyuwo-- nave momulapiha mulipa‐onanara owo."
1John2:15 Muhisivele elapo ya vathi-- nari sa mwilaponi ya vathi. Mukina asivela elapo ya vathi-- osivela wa Atithi hori mwa yowo."
1John2:16 Ntakhara etchu phyakala ya mwilaponi ya vathi-- minkhela ya mwíli ni minkhela ya mitho-- ni woselela okumi-- hasinarwela wa Atithi nyenya wilapo ya vathi."
1John2:17 Nave elapo ya vathi ennavira ni minkheláya; nyenya yowo onerano okhwela wa Muluku onnikhalelaru okhala wokhala.
1John2:18 Anamwane nyu-- ala ti mahiku ókutchula; nave ntoko mwíwalanyu wi ómukhocha Kristu annórwa-- nari hihano ómukhocha Kristu ákhala anchiene; mwa ela ninnasuwela wi yala ti mahiku ókutchula."
1John2:19 Yákhumale mwa hiyo-- nyenya heyári a yehu; ntakhara yári a yehu ekahikhalelaru ni hiyo-- nyenya wáheriwa hihá wi yoneye wi othene heyári a yehu."
1John2:20 Nave nyuwo mókhalano wochihiwa worwela wa Awéla owo-- nave munnasuwela sothe sene."
1John2:21 Nkorepenleni wi hamunasuwela eparipari-- nyenya ntakhara munnasuwela-- nave ntakhara hiwavovo wotha worwela wipariparini."
1John2:22 Mulipa‐wotha pani-- nyenya yowo onakhócha owo-- wi Yesu tahi Kristu? Yowo tomukhócha Kristu-- yowo tanakhócha Atithi ni Mwana."
1John2:23 Yowo onamukhócha Mwana-- hanono Atithi; yowo onamwemya Mwana ori ni Atithitho."
1John2:24 Nyenya nyuwo-- yeyo mwíwalanyu opacherya vopacherya yikhaleleru mwa nyuwo. Yíkhalelaru mwa nyuwo yeyo mwíwalanyu opacherya vopacherya-- nyuwotho munarwa‐mwimwikhalelaru mwa Mwana-- ni mwa Atithi."
1John2:25 Nave nla ti nlakano nenlo ávanenliye ni hiyo-- ti okumi wohimala."
1John2:26 Iha kihorepelani sa yawo enohuwelihani. Nave nyuwo--"
1John2:27 wochihiwa wiwo mwákhenlanyu orwela wa Yowo-- onamkhalaru mwa nyuwo-- ntoko wochihiwa wiwo onohusihayani sa itchu sothe sene-- nave ori weparipari-- tahi wotha hoe-- nave ntoko wohusihalayani nyuwo-- mwikhaleleru mwa Yowo."
1John2:28 Nave vano-- asanamwane-- itchálani mwa Yowo; wi aniriye arwe‐oneye Yowo nahikhaleno wumiha murima-- óhuliwaru muru wa Yowo-- arúle."
1John2:29 Mwásuwelaka wi ori ékhaikhai munnasuwela wi Yowotho onera ekhaikhai oyariwe orwela mwa Yowo.
1John3:1 Nkonani-- osivela iwo Atithi ánivahilaya-- wi nitchuwiwe anamwane a Muluku; nave hiyo na awihiha. Mwa ela elapo ya vathi henansuwela hiyo-- ntakhara henamusuwela Yowo."
1John3:2 Ósiveliwa-- vano na anamwane a Muluku-- nave henoneya yeyo n’niriahu n’rwe‐nikhale. Ninnasuwela wi-- óneiye Yowo-- n’narwa‐nikhala óphwanaphwanano-- ntakhara n’narwa‐nimona Yowo ntoko okhaleliye."
1John3:3 Nave yowo onakhalano oweheryerya wu mwa Yowo-- onísélihe mekhiye-- ntoko Yowo oríye Awéla."
1John3:4 Yowo onatcheka onerano sohiléleya; nave otcheka tuhiléleya.
1John3:5 Nave munnasuwela wi Yowo áhoneya wi avíhe’vo sotcheka; nave mwa Yowo himwamomo yotcheka.
1John3:6 Mutchu yowo onítchála mwa Yowo hanatcheka; yowo onatcheka hamonneru.
1John3:7 Asanamwane-- mutchu ahohuweliheni; yowo onerano yekhaikhai ori ékhaikhai-- ntoko Yowo oríye ékhaikhai:"
1John3:8 yowo onatcheka ori órwela mwa musaserya ntakhara musaserya onnatcheka opacherya vopacherya. Va nthowa nenla Mwana a Muluku tóneiyiye-- ti wi apahule miteko ya musaserya."
1John3:9 Yowo oyariwe orwela mwa Muluku hanatchekaru-- ntakhara mmiso awe onikhalelaru mwa Yowo; nave hanawerya otcheka-- ntakhara oyariwe orwela mwa Muluku."
1John3:10 Mummo tanoneyaya anamwane a Muluku-- ni anamwane a musaserya: yowo ohinerano ekhaikhai hari orwela mwa Muluku-- ni yowotho ahinasivela munneni."
1John3:11 Ntakhara yela ti mitchaka yeyo mwíwalanyu opacherya vopacherya-- wi nsivelane mukina ni mukhwawe:"
1John3:12 óhikhala ntoko Kaini yowo ári órwela wa mulipa‐onanara owo-- amwipha munneni. Nave ámwipheleni? Ntakhara miteko awe yári yonanara-- ni ya munneni yekhaikhai."
1John3:13 Muhitikhine-- anna-- elapo ya vathi yawíchani."
1John3:14 Hiyo ninnasuwela wi nóvira okhuma mukhwani ni ovolowa mukumini-- ntakhara ninnasivelanano anna."
1John3:15 Yowo ohinasivela onakhala mukhwani. Mutchu yowo oníchana ni munneni ori awipha mutchu; nave munnasuwela wi yowo onamwipha mutchu hanono okumi wohimala wawikhalelaru mwa yowo.
1John3:16 Mummo tinnonahu’mo osivela-- ntakhara Yowo áveléla okumi awe ntakhara a hiyo; nave hiyo ninnaphwanela oveléla okumi ahu ntakhara a anna."
1John3:17 Nyenya yowo orinono muhakhu welapo ya vathi-- amona munneni athoiwaka awalela ikharari sawe ni omwímana-- nki osivela wa Muluku oni okhale hai mwa yowo?"
1John3:18 Asanamwane-- nihisiveleke ni masuru-- nari ni nlumi-- nyenya ni werano ni mwiparipari."
1John3:19 Mummo tinniriahu nsuwele wi nri órwela mwiparipari-- nave n’narwa‐ntikitherya murimáhu va mithoni vawe--"
1John3:20 murimáhu onaniványaya; ntakhara Muluku ti mutokwene ópwaha mirimáhu-- anasuwelano sothe sene."
1John3:21 Ósiveliwa-- murimáhu wáhiniványaka-- tinriahuno onyesererya wahu mwa Muluku;"
1John3:22 nave etchu yeyo n’navekahu-- n’nákhela wa Yowo-- ntakhara ninnakhapelela malamulo awe-- nave ninnerano somuhakalaliha va mithoni vawe."
1John3:23 Nave nlamulo nawe ti nla-- wi nroromele nsina na Mwanawe Yesu Kristu-- ni osivelana mukina ni mukhwawe-- ntoko ánilamulenliye."
1John3:24 Nave mutchu yowo onakhapelela malamulo awe onítchála mwa Yowo-- ni Yowo mwa mutchu’wo. Nave mummo tinnasuwelahu wi tanakhaliye mwa hiyo-- orwela mwa Munepa yowo ánivahiliye."
1John4:1 Ósiveliwa-- muhiroromeleke munepa phyakaléne-- nyenya ehani minepa khwino yarwelaka wa Muluku: ntakhara alipa‐miririmo ówoka anchiene yákhuma evolowa mwilaponi ya vathi."
1John4:2 Mummo timunasuwelanyu Munepa wa Muluku: munepa yowo onemyererya wi Yesu Kristu árúle m’mwílini-- onarwela mwa Muluku;"
1John4:3 nave munepa yowo ohinémya Yesu honarwela wa Muluku; nave yola ti munepa womukhócha Kristu yowo mwíwalanyu wi onnórwa; nave wokhala’mo mwilaponi ya vathi hihano vava.
1John4:4 Nyuwo mwa órwela mwa Muluku-- asanamwane-- nave molapiha yeyo; ntakhara Yowo anítchála mwa nyuwo annapwaha yowo onítchála mwilaponi ya vathi."
1John4:5 Yawo torwela mwilaponi ya vathi; hiha tanulumaya ntoko órwela mwilaponi ya vathi-- nave elapo ya vathi ennáwiriana."
1John4:6 Hiyo na órwela mwa Muluku; yowo onamusuwela Muluku onnaniwiriana; yowo ohinarwela mwa Muluku hananiwirianaru hiyo. Mummo tinnasuwelahu munepa weparipari-- ni munepa wotchekiha."
1John4:7 Ósiveliwa-- nsivelane mukina ni mukhwawe: ntakhara onarwela wa Muluku-- nave yowo onasivela oyariwe ti Muluku-- anamusuwelano Muluku."
1John4:8 Yowo ohinasivela hanamusuwelano Muluku; ntakhara Muluku ti osivela.
1John4:9 Mummo osivela wa Muluku wáhoneya mwa hiyo-- wi Muluku ámuruma Mwanawe óyariwa mekhiye-- avolowe mwilaponi ya vathi-- wi nikhale akumi mwa Yowo."
1John4:10 Mummo muri osivela-- tahi wi hiyo námusivela Muluku-- nyenya wi Yowo tánsivenle hiyo-- nave támurummiye Mwanawe-- akhale yawopola ntakhara a sotcheka sahu."
1John4:11 Ósiveliwa-- Muluku ánisivenliye mwawihihá-- hiyotho tinnaphwanelahu osivelana mukina ni mukhwawe."
1John4:12 Havovo mutchu ámonne Muluku okhala wokhala; nasivelana mukina ni mukhwawe Muluku tanítcháliye mwa hiyo-- nave osivela wawe tunakhalaya wophameya mwa hiyo;"
1John4:13 mummo tinnasuwelahu wi ninnítchála mwa Yowo-- ni Yowo mwa hiyo-- ntakhara ánivaha Munepawe."
1John4:14 Nave hiyo nihona-- nave ninnakhalela namona wi Atithi ámuruma Mwana akhale Mvulusha élapo ya vathi."
1John4:15 Yowo ani arwe‐emyeryerye wi Yesu ti Mwana a Muluku-- Muluku anítchála mwa yowo-- ni yowo mwa Muluku."
1John4:16 Nave hiyo ninnasuwelano-- nave nororomela osivela iwo Muluku oriyeno va hiyo. Muluku ti osivela-- nave yowo onítchála musivela onítchála mwa Muluku-- nave Muluku tanítcháliye mwa yowo."
1John4:17 Mummo osivela wahu tunakhalaya wophameya wi nikhaleno onyesererya va nihiku na mulachu; ntakhara ntoko Yowo oríye-- mwawihihá hiyotho nriahu mwilaponi ela ya vathi."
1John4:18 Himwamomo wova musivela; nyenya osivela wophameya onariha vate wova-- ntakhara wova wokhalano olaka-- nave awova owo hanakhala óphameya musivela."
1John4:19 Ninnamusivela-- ntakhara Yowo tápachenrye onsivela."
1John4:20 Mutchu alocha wi-- Kinnamusivela Muluku-- aníchanano munneni-- ori awotha: ntakhara yowo ohinamusivela munneni yowo omonniye hawerya omusivela Muluku yowo ohimonniye."
1John4:21 Nave nlamulo nla tinriahuno norwela wa Yowo-- wi yowo onamusivela Muluku amusiveletho munneni."
1John5:1 Mutchu yowo onaroromela wi Yesu ti Kristu oyariwe mwa Muluku; nave yowo onamusivela Yowo áyanre owo onnamusivelatho Yowo áyariwe ti Yowo.
1John5:2 Mummo ninnasuwela wi ninnásivela anamwane a Muluku-- n’namusivelahu Muluku-- nnera malamulo awe"
1John5:3 Ntakhara wowu tusivela wa Muluku-- wi nikhapelele malamulo awe: nave malamulo awe hari óveliha."
1John5:4 Ntakhara yeyo eyariwe mwa Muluku ennalapiha elapo ya vathi; nave wu ti opwaha wiwo n’nalapihahuno elapo ya vathi-- ti nroromelo nahu."
1John5:5 Nyenya pani yowo onalapiha elapo ya vathi-- nyenya yowo onaroromela wi Yesu ti Mwana a Muluku?"
1John5:6 Yowo tárúle owo mwa mahi n’nikhami-- ti Yesu Kristu; tahi ni mahiru-- nyenya ni mahi n’nikhami."
1John5:7 Nave Munepa tanerela namona-- ntakhara Munepa ti eparipari."
1John5:8 Ntakhara arivo araru awerela namona-- Munepa-- ni mahi-- n’nikhami; nave araru yawo ari mmoha."
1John5:9 Nákhelaru namona a atchu-- namona a Muluku tanapwahaya; ntakhara namona a Muluku túla-- wi áherela namona sa Mwanawe."
1John5:10 Yowo onamuroromela Mwana a Muluku ókhalano namona mwa mkhatiye; yowo ohinamuroromela Muluku omwenre Yowo mulipa‐wotha; ntakhara hanaroromela namona a Muluku yowo ámwerenliye mwa Mwanawe.
1John5:11 Nave ola ti namona owo-- wi Muluku ánivaha hiyo okumi wohimala-- nave okumi yowo ori mwa Mwanawe."
1John5:12 Yowo orinono Mwana tariyeno okumi; yowo ohinono Mwana a Muluku hanono okumi.
1John5:13 Iha kihorepelani-- wi musuwele wi mokhalano okumi wohimala-- nyenyu munaroromela nsina na Mwana a Muluku."
1John5:14 Nave wu ti onyesererya wiwo nriahuno mwa Yowo-- wi navekaru etchu ntoko ni okhwela wawe-- ananíwa:"
1John5:15 nave nasuwela wi annaníwa ni etchu yeyo n’navekahu-- ninnasuwela wi nokhalano iha nimvekilahu."
1John5:16 Mukina amona munneni arikimtcheka yotcheka yohikhala yawukhwani-- amveke Muluku-- nave Yowo anarwa‐amvaha okumi wa yawo enatcheka wohikhala wawukhwani. Vokhala otcheka wokhwano: sa wu nkinera wi mvekelele."
1John5:17 Yeyo ehikhanle ekhaikhai ti yotcheka; nave vokhala otcheka wiwo ohikhanle wokhwano.
1John5:18 Ninnasuwela wi yowo oyariwe orwela mwa Muluku hanatchekaru-- nyenya yowo oyariwe orwela mwa Muluku onnikhapelela mekhiye-- nave mulipa‐onanara owo hanamutannyaru."
1John5:19 Ninnasuwela hiyo na órwela mwa Muluku-- nave elapo yothene ya vathi enakona mwa mulipa‐onanara owo."
1John5:20 Nave ninnasuwela wi Mwana a Muluku óphiya-- anivaha hiyo osuwelasha-- wi nimusuwelashe Eparipari owo-- nave nri mwa Eparipari owo-- mwa Mwanawe Yesu Kristu. Yowo ti Muluku éparipari ni okumi wohimala."
1John5:21 Asanamwane-- mwikhapeleleni mkhatinyu osepa sophwaniherya. Amen."
2John1:1 Mutokwene owo wa muthiana óvuwa óthanliwa-- nánamwanáwe-- yawo miyo kinasivelanakano mwiparipari; nave tahi yomiru mkhataka-- nyenya othene yawo enasuwelasha eparipari;"
2John1:2 ntakhara a eparipari yeyo enakhala mwa hiyo-- nave enarwa‐ekhala ni hiyo mahiku othene;"
2John1:3 Namutchucha-- ikharari-- murechele sikhale ni nyuwo sorwela wa Muluku Atithi-- mwiparipari ni musivela."
2John1:4 Kóhakalala vatokotoko wi kihaphwanya akina a anamwa‐nányu yechakaru mwiparipari-- ntoko nákhelenlahu nlamulo norwela wa Atithi."
2John1:5 Nave vano kinnovekani-- muthiana óvuwa nyu-- tahi ntoko worepelani nlamulo nahihano-- nyenya nenlo náriahuno opacherya vopacherya-- wi nsivelane mukina ni mukhwawe."
2John1:6 Nave osivela ti wu-- wi necheke ntoko mwa malamulo awe. Nla ti nlamulo nlo-- ntoko mwíwalanyu opacherya vopacherya-- wi mwechekeru mummo."
2John1:7 Ntakhara alipa‐owoka anchipale yákhuma ovolowa mwilaponi ya vathi-- ti yawo ehinémya wi Yesu Kristu árwa m’mwílini."
2John1:8 Yowo ti mulipa‐owoka ni ómukhocha Kristu. Mwiweheryeryeke mkhatinyu-- wi muni murihe hiho nénrahuno-- nyenya wi mwákhele phatamari ókhwánela."
2John1:9 Yowo onapwaha’vo-- ahinítchála m’mahusiheryo a Kristu-- hanono Muluku; yowo onítchála m’mahusiheryo-- yowo tarinono Atithi ni Mwana."
2John1:10 Mutchu arwa wa nyuwo-- ahikushale mahusiheryo ala-- muhimwákheleru m’mpa-- nave muhimulocheleru."
2John1:11 Ntakhara yowo onamulochela onnátánano miteko awe yonanara.
2John1:12 Kiriakano sinchipale saworepelani-- nkinakhwela werano ni ekarata ni tinta: nyenya kinaweheryerya orwa wa nyuwo-- ni wuluma va mithoni-- wi otheya wanyu okhwáne."
2John1:13 Anamwane a munninyu óthanliwa ennolochelani. Amen.
3John1:1 Mutokwene owo wa Gayo ósiveliwa owo-- yowo kinasivelanakano mwiparipari."
3John1:2 Ósiveliwa-- kinnavekela wi m’sothe sene oréle-- okhale phama-- ntoko munepá onarélaya."
3John1:3 Ntakhara káhakalala vatokotoko-- anna yáphiyalaya ni werela namona sa eparipariá-- ntoko onechelá mwiparipari."
3John1:4 Nkinono otheya wopwaha wu-- wawi kinníwa sa anamwane aka wi enamwécharu mwiparipari."
3John1:5 Ósiveliwa-- onnerano mororomeleya yeyo onawerelá anna ni alecho ene;"
3John1:6 yawo yérenle namona sa osivela wá va mithoni va muloko: wáhóla yawo va mukwaháya momphwanelela Muluku onerano phama:
3John1:7 Ntakhara yákhumale ni nthowa na Nsina nla-- ehinákhelaru etchu wa amalapo."
3John1:8 Hihá hiyo ninnaphwanela owákhela awihiha-- wi nikhale ókhaviheryanano eparipari."
3John1:9 Kórepela muloko etchu: nyenya Diotrefe ole-- yowo onakhwela okhala mutokwene a yawo-- hananákhelaru hiyo."
3John1:10 Mummo-- miyo kirúle-- kinarwa‐kupusherya miteko awe yeyo oneriye ela-- sonlochela hiyo itheru sene ni masu ónanara; nave iha sihinamukhwánaya-- hanawákhela anneni yowo mkhatiye-- nave yawo enakhwela owákhela onnáhíha-- anákeriha vate onákumihiye m’mulokoni."
3John1:11 Ósiveliwa-- ohitakiherye yeyo eri yonanara nyenya yeyo eri yaphama. Yowo onera yaphama onarwela wa Muluku; yowo onera yonanara hamonneru Muluku."
3John1:12 Demetriyo-- atchu othene yámwerela namona-- ni eparipari ene; nave hiyotho ninnerela namona-- nave onnasuwela wi namonáhu teparipari."
3John1:13 Kákhalano sinchipale saworepela-- nyenya nkinakhwela worepela ni ekarata ni tinta;"
3John1:14 nyenya kinnaweheryerya owona vahilekenle’vo-- nave n’narwa‐nuluma va mithoni. Murechele okhale ni weyo. Asinthamwene annolochela. Lochela asinthamwene ni waromola masináya."
Jude1:1 Yuda-- kapuro a Yesu Kristu-- ni munna a Yakobo-- wa awitchaniwáwo-- ósiveliwa mwa Muluku Atithi-- ni ókhapeleliwa ti Yesu Kristu:"
Jude1:2 Ikharari ni murechele ni osivela siwacheleni.
Jude1:3 Ósiveliwa-- kinakhalakano mvai wothene waworepelani sa ovulushiwa wa hiyo othene-- kihakuvihiwa m’murima worepelani ni wochenyeryani wi muwane tchiri ntakhara a nroromelo nenlo návahiwe omoha wa awéla murima."
Jude1:4 Ntakhara vokhala atchu akina yawo yitale wiphíni-- ti yale yárempwe masináya khalai-- wi yákhele ovanyiwa wu-- atchu óhithamalela-- ótatusha ikharari sa Muluku ahu wi sikhale minkhela yotakhala-- enamukhocha Mwene mmoharu-- ni Apwiyahu-- Yesu Kristu."
Jude1:5 Nyenya kinnakhwela owupushani nari mwásuwenlanyu sothe sene khalai-- wi Apwiya-- avulunshe nloko na atchu ni wakumiha mwilaponi ya Aigupto-- áhátoloshatho yawo yahároromela."
Jude1:6 Angelotho yawo yahákhapelenle mukhalo aya wopacherya-- nyenya yávinya’vo vavo yákhalaya’vo-- áhákeriha mu kariposo óhimala vathi vepiphi-- ophiyerya othoriha wa nihiku ntokotoko."
Jude1:7 Ntoko Sodoma ni Gomora-- ni michetche yeyo yárukuryenrye’vo-- yechelanakano-- yáhiveléla wulavilavi-- ni otchara minkhela mikinako aya-- yoheriwa yotakiherya-- yálakiwaya ti moro wohimala."
Jude1:8 Hihátho yawo muloha waya ennarípiha míli aya-- enyemula omwene-- yerela opwalu ochichimiha."
Jude1:9 Nyenya Mikayeli mutokwene a angelo ákhulaniye ni musaserya yáványana sa mwíli wa Mose-- hányeserenrye omuromolela nthowa nomwerela opwalu-- nyenya áriye-- Apwiya ósamele."
Jude1:10 Nyenya yala hiho ehinasuwelaya tanerelaya opwalu; nave hiho enasuwelashaya oyariwa woyariwa-- ntoko ikumi sohikhala miruku-- mu iha tanarimélaya."
Jude1:11 Ochilu wa yawo! Ntakhara etchenre mphiro wa Kaini-- nave yáhípahula ni otcheka wa Balamu ntakhara yophárya-- eriméla muványa wa Kore."
Jude1:12 Yawo tari mathepa va sólya sanyu sosivelana-- enalyaya vamoha ni nyuwo-- enivakulelaya mekhaya ehóvakaru; mahiriku óhikhalanoru mahi-- ókushiwa‐kushiwa ti etcheku; miri ya’yita yohimaru-- yokhwa wili-- yopholeya mitathari;"
Jude1:13 matchumusha awopiha a’nia-- órwela niphweru na wuliwa waya muru; itheneri sohuwela-- hiho epiphi yoripa phí eripihalaya wohimala."
Jude1:14 Nave wa yawo-- Henoke-- anethanu nawili opacherya wa Adamu-- áhuluma wi-- Nkona-- órwa Apwiya ni awéla awe-- masanaru nsana nimoha--"
Jude1:15 orwa‐wathoriha othene-- ni waványa othene yawo ehinathamalela-- va miteko aya yothene yohithamalela-- yeyo yénraya mohithamalela-- ni va solipa hiho alipa‐otcheka óhithamalela yámulochenlaya."
Jude1:16 Yawo talipa‐ochenya-- órokela-- awecha ntoko mwa minkhela aya (nave va’wanoni vaya ennuluma itchu sitokotoko)-- awathamala atchu ntakhara yeyo eniphwanyeryaya."
Jude1:17 Nyenya nyuwo-- anna-- mupuwele masu yawo yálochiwe khalai tarummwa a Apwiyahu Yesu Kristu; wi yalocha ni nyuwo."
Jude1:18 Va mahiku ókutchula vanarwa‐vakhala alipa‐oroha-- awecha ntoko mwa minkhela yohithamalela waya."
Jude1:19 Yawo tawithanla-- atchu a makhalelo óphachuwano-- óhikhalanoru Munepa."
Jude1:20 Nyenya nyuwo-- ósiveliwa-- munitchukelelanyu mekhinyu va nroromelo nanyu nawélasha-- ni ovekela mwa Munepa Wawéla--"
Jude1:21 mwikhapelele mkhatinyu musivela wa Muluku-- ni oweherya ikharari sa Apwiyahu Yesu Kristu-- ophiyerya okumi wohimala."
Jude1:22 Nave akina awanyiherya‐anyiherya mwamoreleke ikharari-- nyenya akina mwavulusheke ni washophola o moroni;"
Jude1:23 nyenya akina mwamoreleke ikharari ni wova-- nave mwichanekenotho malaya órwelihiwa mathepa ni mwíli."
Jude1:24 Nave wa Yowo anawerya wolipelelani wi muni mukwachuliwe-- ni owemeshani va mithoni va nchichimiho nawe óhikhalanoru murala múhakalala-- wa Muluku mmoharu amiruku--"
Jude1:25 Mvulushahu-- mwa Yesu Kristu Apwiyahu okhale nchichimiho-- otokwene-- ikuru-- ni olamulelo sihipachenrye ilukuluku-- ni hihano-- ni ophiyerya mahiku othene. Amen."
